Genesis1:1 Le gɔmedzedzea me Mawu wɔ dziƒo kple anyigba.
Genesis1:2 Ke anyigba le nyama
Genesis1:3 Eye Mawu gblɔ be: Kekeli nedo! Eye kekeli do.
Genesis1:4 Eye Mawu kpɔ kekelia bena enyo. Eye Mawu ma kekeli la kple viviti la dome.
Genesis1:5 Mawu yɔ kekeli la be ŋkeke; ke viviti la eyɔe be zã. Ale zã do
Genesis1:6 Eye Mawu gblɔ be: Alili nenɔ tsia titina
Genesis1:7 Eye Mawu wo alili la
Genesis1:8 Eye Mawu yɔ alilia be dziƒo. Ale zã do
Genesis1:9 Eye Mawu gblɔ be: Tsi
Genesis1:10 Mawu yɔ ƒuƒuiƒe la be anyigba
Genesis1:11 Eye Mawu gblɔ be: Anyigba nemie gbe fẽwo
Genesis1:12 Anyigba mie gbe fẽwo
Genesis1:13 Ale zã do
Genesis1:14 Eye Mawu gblɔ be: Nu keklẽwo nado ɖe dziƒolilia ŋu
Genesis1:15 eye woanye nu keklẽwo anɔ dziƒolilia ŋu
Genesis1:16 Tete Mawu wɔ nu keklẽ gã eveawo. Ewɔ gãtɔ
Genesis1:17 Eye Mawu tsɔ wo ɖo dziƒolilia ŋu
Genesis1:18 woaɖu ŋkeke kple zã dzi
Genesis1:19 Ale zã do
Genesis1:20 Tete Mawu gblɔ bena: Nu gbagbewo neƒu tsi le tsia me
Genesis1:21 Eye Mawu wo ƒumelã klitsuwo kple nu gbagbe
Genesis1:22 Eye Mawu yra wo gblɔ bena: Midzi
Genesis1:23 Ale zã do
Genesis1:24 Eye Mawu gblɔ bena: Nu gbagbewo nedo tso anyigba me hamehame
Genesis1:25 Ale Mawu wɔ gbemelãwo hamehame
Genesis1:26 Eye Mawu gblɔ be: Mine míawɔ ame ɖe míaƒe nɔnɔme
Genesis1:27 Eye Mawu wɔ ame ɖe ye ŋutɔ ƒe nɔnɔme
Genesis1:28 Eye Mawu yra wo
Genesis1:29 Eye Mawu gblɔ be: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis1:30 ke gbewo kple amagbewo katã nanye nuɖuɖu na anyigba dzi lãwo katã kple dziƒoxe dzodzoewo katã kple nusiwo katã tana
Genesis1:31 Eye Mawu kpo nusiwo katã wòwɔ la
Genesis2:1 Ale wowu dziƒo kple anyigba kple wo me nu gbogboawo katã nu enye si.
Genesis2:2 Eye Mawu wu eƒe ɖo
Genesis2:3 Eye Mawu yra ŋkeke adrelia
Genesis2:4 Esia nye dziƒo kple anyigba ƒe dzɔdzɔmenyawo le wo wɔwɔ me le ɣeyiɣi
Genesis2:5 Ke gbemetia ɖeke mele anyigba dzi haɖe o
Genesis2:6 Eye afu do tso anyigba dzi
Genesis2:7 Azã Yehowa Mawu tsɔ anyi mè ame
Genesis2:8 Tete Yehowa Mawu tso abɔ ɖe Eden le ɣedzeƒe
Genesis2:9 Eye Yehowa Mawu na ati vovovo
Genesis2:10 Eye tɔsisia ɖe do tso Eden
Genesis2:11 Gbãtɔ ŋkɔ nye Pison; eƒo xlã Xawila-nyigba blibo la katã; afima sika le;
Genesis2:12 eye anyigba sia ƒe sika nyo ŋutɔ; afima bedolax- kple soham-kpe hã le.
Genesis2:13 Tɔsisi evelia ŋkɔ nye Gixon; eƒo xlã Kus-nyigba blibo la katã.
Genesis2:14 Tɔsisi etɔ̃lia ŋkɔ nye Xidekel; esi to Asur ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome. Eye tɔsisi enelia nye Frat.
Genesis2:15 Eye Yehowa Mawu tsɔ ame la ɖo Eɖen-bɔ me
Genesis2:16 Eye Yehowa Mawu de se na ame gblɔ bena: Ɖu abɔmetiawo katã ƒe tsetse faa;
Genesis2:17 ke ati
Genesis2:18 Eye Yehowa Mawu gblɔ bena: Menyo bena ame la natsi akogo o; mawɔ kpeɖeŋutɔ
Genesis2:19 Tete Yehowa Mawu tsɔ anyi mè gbemelãwo katã kple dziƒoxe dzodzoewo katã
Genesis2:20 Eye ame la tsɔ ŋkɔ na aƒemelãwo katã kple dziƒoxe dzodzoewo kpakple gbemelãwo katã; ke amea ya mekpɔ kpeɖeŋutɔ
Genesis2:21 Eye Yehowa Mawu na ame dɔ alɔ̃ yi me ʋĩ
Genesis2:22 Tete Yehowa Mawu tsɔ agbaƒuti
Genesis2:23 Eye ame la gblɔ be: Azɔ ko! Esia enye ƒu tso nye ƒu me kple lã tso nye lã me; woayɔ ame sia bena nyɔnu
Genesis2:24 Eya ŋuti ŋutsu agblẽ fofoa kple dadaa ɖi ahaku ɖe srɔ̃a ŋuti
Genesis2:25 Eye wo kpakple eve la wole ƒeƒle
Genesis3:1 Ke da dze aye wu gbemelã
Genesis3:2 Nyɔnua ɖo ŋu na da la be: Míeɖua abɔmetiawo ƒe tsetse faa;
Genesis3:3 ke Mawu gblɔ le ati
Genesis3:4 Eye da la gblɔ na nyɔnua bena: Miele kuku ge akpɔ o;
Genesis3:5 ke boŋ Mawu nyae bena
Genesis3:6 Esi nyɔnu la kpɔ bena
Genesis3:7 Tete wo kpakple eve ƒe ŋkuwo ʋu
Genesis3:8 Eye esi wose Yehowa Mawu ŋkɔ le anyinufaɣi le abɔa me la
Genesis3:9 Tete Yehowa Mawu yɔ amea gblɔ nɛ bena: Afika nèle?
Genesis3:10 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Mese ŋkɔwò le abɔa me
Genesis3:11 Egblɔ be: Ameka toe na wò be
Genesis3:12 Ame la ɖo ŋu bena: Nyɔnu
Genesis3:13 Eye Yehowa Mawu gblɔ na nyɔnua bena: Nukaŋuti nèwɔ alea? Nyɔnu la ɖo ŋu ne be: Da lae blem
Genesis3:14 Eye Yehowa Mawu gblɔ na da la bena: Esi nèwɔ alea la
Genesis3:15 Made adikã mia kple nyɔnu la dome
Genesis3:16 Eye wògblɔ na nyɔnua bena: Mana nakpe fu geɖe le fufɔfɔ me
Genesis3:17 Eye wògblɔ na Adam bena: Esi nèse srɔ̃wo ƒe gbe
Genesis3:18 Ŋu kple aŋɔka amie na wò
Genesis3:19 Fifia ate wò
Genesis3:20 Eye ame la tsɔ ŋkɔ na srɔ̃a bena Xawa
Genesis3:21 Eye Yehowa Mawu tsɔ lãgbalẽwu do na Adam kple srɔ̃a.
Genesis3:22 Eye Yehowa Mawu gblɔ be: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis3:23 Yehowa Mawu ɖe ame ɖa tso Eden-bɔ la me
Genesis3:24 Tete wònyã ame la
Genesis4:1 Eye Adam ɖo kple srɔ̃a Xawa
Genesis4:2 Emegbe la edzi enɔvia Habel
Genesis4:3 Esia megbe la eteƒe medidi o
Genesis4:4 Habel hã tsɔ eƒe lãwo ƒe ŋgɔgbevi
Genesis4:5 ke Kain kple eƒe nunana ya medze eŋu o. Eye Kain bi dzi ŋutɔ
Genesis4:6 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Kain bena: Nukaŋuti nèle dzi bim
Genesis4:7 Alo menye ale wòle oa? Ne èwɔ nyui la
Genesis4:8 Esia megbe la Kain gadɔ nu kple nɔvia Habel. Ke eva ve me bena
Genesis4:9 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Kain bena: Afika noviwò Habel le? Eye wòɖo ŋu nɛ be: Nyemenyae o! Alo nɔvinye dzikpɔla menyea?
Genesis4:10 Eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Nuka enye esi nèwɔ? Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis4:11 Azã la woaƒo fi ade wò
Genesis4:12 Ne eŋlɔ anyigba la
Genesis4:13 Eye Kain gblɔ na Yehowa bena: Nye vodada la kpe wu nye tsɔtsɔ.
Genesis4:14 Wòe nyãm egbe tso agbledenyigba la dzi; madzo le wò ŋkuta anye tsatsala kple godzela le anyigba dzi
Genesis4:15 Eye Yehowa gblɔ nɛ bena: Eyata amesiame
Genesis4:16 Eye Kain dzo le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Genesis4:17 Eye Kain da kple srɔ̃a
Genesis4:18 Eye wodzi Irad na Henox
Genesis4:19 Ke Lamex ɖe srɔ̃ eve; ɖeka ŋkɔ enye Ada
Genesis4:20 Eye Ada dzi Yabal
Genesis4:21 Enɔvia ŋkɔ nye Yubal
Genesis4:22 Eye Zila hã dzi Tubalkain
Genesis4:23 Eye Lamex gblɔ na srɔ̃wo bena: Ada kple Zila
Genesis4:24 Elabena wòbia hlɔ̃ Kain zi adre
Genesis4:25 Eye Adam gadɔ kple srɔ̃a
Genesis4:26 Eye wodzi ŋutsuvi na Set hã
Genesis5:1 Esia nye Adam ƒe dzidzimeviwo ŋutinyagbalẽ. Esi Mawu wɔ Adam la
Genesis5:2 Ewɔ wo wonye ŋutsu kple nyɔnu
Genesis5:3 Eye esi Adam xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka kple blaetɔ̃ la
Genesis5:4 Esi Adam dzi Set megbe la
Genesis5:5 Eye Adam ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa asieke kple blaetɔ̃
Genesis5:6 Eye esi Set xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka kple atɔ̃ la
Genesis5:7 Esi Set dzi Enos megbe la
Genesis5:8 Eye Set ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa asieke kple wuieve
Genesis5:9 Eye esi Enos xɔ ƒe blaasieke la
Genesis5:10 Esi Enos dzi Kenan megbe la
Genesis5:11 Eye Enos ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa asieke kple atɔ̃
Genesis5:12 Eye esi Kenan xɔ ƒe blaadre la
Genesis5:13 Esi Kenan dzi Mahalalel megbe la
Genesis5:14 Eye Kenan ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa asieke kple ewo
Genesis5:15 Eye esi Mahalalel xɔ ƒe blaade vɔ atɔ̃ la
Genesis5:16 Esi Mahalalel dzi Yered megbe la
Genesis5:17 Eye Mahalalel ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa enyi kple blaasieke vɔ atɔ̃
Genesis5:18 Eye esi Yered xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka kple blaade vɔ eve la
Genesis5:19 Esi Yered dzi Henox megbe la
Genesis5:20 Eye Yered ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa asieke kple blaade vɔ eve
Genesis5:21 Eye esi Henox xa ƒe blaade vo atɔ̃ la
Genesis5:22 Esi wòdzi Metusala megbe la
Genesis5:23 Eye Henox ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa etɔ̃ kple blaade vɔ atɔ̃.
Genesis5:24 Esi Henox zɔ kple Mawu ta la
Genesis5:25 Eye esi Metusala xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka kple blanyi vɔ adre la
Genesis5:26 Esi Metusala dzi Lamex megbe la
Genesis5:27 Eye Metusala ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa asieke kple blaade vɔ asieke
Genesis5:28 Eye esi Lamex xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka kple blanyi vɔ eve la
Genesis5:29 Eye wòna ŋkɔe bena Noa
Genesis5:30 Esi Lamex dzi Noa megbe la
Genesis5:31 Eye Lamex ƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã nye ƒe alafa adre kple blaadre vɔ adre
Genesis5:32 Esi Noa xɔ ƒe alafa atɔ̃ la
Genesis6:1 Ke esi amewo de asi agbɔsɔsɔ me le anyigba dzi
Genesis6:2 mawuviwo kpɔ bena
Genesis6:3 Eye Yehowa gblɔ bena: Nye gbɔgbɔ maganɔ amewo me boo o
Genesis6:4 Le ŋkeke mawo me la ame dzɔtsuwo le anyigba dzi; eye esi Mawu viŋutsuwo ɖe amegbetɔwo ƒe vinyɔnuwo
Genesis6:5 Eye esi Yehowa kpɔ bena
Genesis6:6 eve Yehowa bena
Genesis6:7 Eye Yehowa gblɔ bena: Matsrɔ̃ ame
Genesis6:8 Ke Yehowa ve Noa nu.
Genesis6:9 Esia enye Noa ƒe dzidzimeviwo ŋutinya Noa enye ame dzɔdzɔe kple ame maɖifɔ le eŋɔlimetɔwo dome
Genesis6:10 Eye Noa dzi ŋutsuvi etɔ̃: Sem
Genesis6:11 Eye xexeame gblẽ le Mawu ƒe ŋku me
Genesis6:12 Eye Mawu kpɔ bena
Genesis6:13 Tete Mawu gblɔ na Noa bena: Ŋutilãwo katã ƒe nuwuwu ɖo azɔ
Genesis6:14 Tsɔ dzatiwo kpa aɖakaʋu na ɖokuiwò
Genesis6:15 Eye ale nawɔe enye si; Aɖakaʋu la ƒe didime nanye abɔklugui alafa etɔ̃
Genesis6:16 Eye naɖe fesre
Genesis6:17 Elabena nye la mana tsi naɖe anyigba la
Genesis6:18 Ke mabia nu kpli wò bena
Genesis6:19 Ɖe nu gbagbewo katã kple ŋutilãwo katã eveveve yi ɖe aɖakaʋu la me
Genesis6:20 Dziƒoxe dzodzoewo le woƒe ƒomeviwo nu
Genesis6:21 Ke wò la tsɔ nuɖuɖu ƒomevi vovovo
Genesis6:22 Eye Noa wɔe; alesi Mawu de se nɛ la
Genesis7:1 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Noa be na: Yi ɖe aɖakaʋu la me
Genesis7:2 Ɖe lã matsrimatsriwo katã atsu kple asi adreadre
Genesis7:3 Nenema ke naɖe dziƒoxe dzodzoewo hã atsu kple asi adreadre
Genesis7:4 Elabena esusɔ ŋkeke adre mana tsi nadza ɖe anyigba dzi ŋkeke blane kple zã hã blane
Genesis7:5 Eye Noa wɔe
Genesis7:6 Noa xɔ ƒe alafa ade
Genesis7:7 Eye Noa kple viaŋutsuwo kple srɔ̃a hekpe ɖe viaŋutsuawo srɔ̃wo ŋuti
Genesis7:8 Lã matsrimatsriwo kple lã tsitsriwo kple xe dzodzoewo hekpe ɖe nusiwo katã tana le anyigba dzi la ŋuti
Genesis7:9 woyi ɖe Noa gbɔ atsu kple asi eveveve le aɖakaʋu la me
Genesis7:10 Eye wòva me le ŋkeke adreagbe bena
Genesis7:11 Esi Noa xɔ ƒe alafa ade
Genesis7:12 Eye tsi dzi ɖe anyigba dzi ŋkeke blane kple zã blane sɔŋ.
Genesis7:13 Le ŋkeke ma dzi tututu Noa kple viaŋutsuwo: Sem
Genesis7:14 woawo kple gbemelãwo katã le woƒe ƒomeviwo nu kple aƒemelãwo katã le woƒe ƒomeviwo nu kple nu tata
Genesis7:15 Eye lãwo tsyo ƒomevi
Genesis7:16 Eye lã
Genesis7:17 Eye tsia le anyigba la ɖem ŋkeke blane sɔŋ
Genesis7:18 Eye tsia le ɖɔɖɔm ɖe dzi hesɔ gbɔ ɖe anyigba la dzi
Genesis7:19 Eye tsia do agbogbo de anyigba dzi ŋutɔŋutɔ hede to kɔkɔ
Genesis7:20 Eye tsia dɔ gbɔ to kɔkɔwo ta me abɔklugui wuiatɔ̃; ale wɔ
Genesis7:21 Eye nu gbagbe
Genesis7:22 Nusianu
Genesis7:23 Nusianu
Genesis7:24 Eye tsia le ɖɔɖɔm ɖe anyigba dzi ŋkeke alafa ɖeka kple blaatɔ̃ sɔŋ.
Genesis8:1 Eye Mawu ɖo ŋku Noa kple gbemelã kple aƒemelã
Genesis8:2 Eye anyigbatu me tsiwo nu tso
Genesis8:3 Eye tsia le miemiem le anyigba la dzi ʋeʋeʋe. Edze miemie gɔme le ŋkeke alafa ɖeka kple blaatɔ̃ megbe.
Genesis8:4 Le ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke wuiadrelia dzi aɖakaʋu la va xa ɖe Ararat-towo dometɔ ɖeka ta me.
Genesis8:5 Eye tsia le miemiem ʋeʋeʋe vaseɖe ɣleti ewolia dzi; le ɣleti ewolia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi towo ƒe tagbɔ dze.
Genesis8:6 Le ŋkeke blane megbe la Noa ʋu aɖakaʋua ƒe fesre
Genesis8:7 Eye wòʋu nu le akpaviãa ɖe nu ɖo ɖa
Genesis8:8 Tete wòʋu nu le ahɔnea ɖe nu ɖo ɖa
Genesis8:9 Ke esi ahɔne la mekpɔ afisi wòadze ɖo o la
Genesis8:10 Emegbe wòlala ŋkeke adre
Genesis8:11 Eye ahɔne la va egbɔ le fiẽ me
Genesis8:12 Eye wògalala ŋkeke adre bubu
Genesis8:13 Le ƒe alafa ade kple ɖeka me le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi tsia mie le anyigba dzi. Eye Noa fo aɖakaʋu la tame ɖa
Genesis8:14 Le ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke blave vɔ adrelia dzi anyigba dzi ƒu keŋkeŋ.
Genesis8:15 Eye Mawu ƒo nu kple Noa gblɔ bena:
Genesis8:16 Do go le aɖakaʋu la me
Genesis8:17 Lã vovovo
Genesis8:18 Tete Noa do go
Genesis8:19 Lãwo katã
Genesis8:20 Tete Noa ɖi vɔsamlekpui
Genesis8:21 Ke esi Yehowa se ʋeʋẽ lililia la
Genesis8:22 Tso esia dzi
Genesis9:1 Eye Mawu yra Noa kple viaŋutsuawo
Genesis9:2 Metsɔ anyigba dzi lãwo katã kple dziƒoxe dzodzoewo katã kple nusiwo katã tana le anyigba dzi
Genesis9:3 Nu gbagbe
Genesis9:4 Hafi lã
Genesis9:5 Ke mia ŋutɔwo miaƒe ʋu la
Genesis9:6 Amesi kɔ ameʋu ɖi la
Genesis9:7 Ke miawo la midzi
Genesis9:8 Eye Mawu gblɔ na Noa kple viaŋutsuawo bena:
Genesis9:9 Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis9:10 kpakple nu gbagbe
Genesis9:11 Mebia nu kpli mi bena
Genesis9:12 Eye Mawu gblɔ bena: Esia enye nubabla
Genesis9:13 Meɖo nye anyieʋɔ ɖe alilikpowo ŋu
Genesis9:14 Eye ava me bena
Genesis9:15 ekema maɖo ŋku nye nubabla
Genesis9:16 Eyata ne anyieʋɔ do ɖe alilikpowo ŋu la
Genesis9:17 Eye Mawu gblɔ na Noa bena: Esia enye nubabla
Genesis9:18 Noa ƒe viŋutsu
Genesis9:19 Noa viŋutsu etɔ̃ siawo me amegbetɔwo katã dzo tso hekaka ɖe anyigba blibo la katã dzi.
Genesis9:20 Eye Noa de asi agbledede me
Genesis9:21 Ke esi wòno wein mu la
Genesis9:22 Eye Xam
Genesis9:23 Tete Sem kple Yafet tsɔ avɔ lé ɖe abɔta hezɔ megbemegbee
Genesis9:24 Ke esi aha la kɔ le mo na Noa
Genesis9:25 egblɔ bena: Woaƒo fi ade Kanaan
Genesis9:26 Eye wògagblɔbena: Woakafu Yehowa
Genesis9:27 Mawu ana be
Genesis9:28 Eye le tsiɖɔɖɔ la megbe la Noa ganɔ agbe ƒe alafa etɔ̃ kple blaatɔ̃
Genesis10:1 Esia nye Noa viŋutsuwo
Genesis10:2 Yaƒet viŋutsuwo nye: Gomer
Genesis10:3 Gomer viŋutsuwo nye: Askenaz
Genesis10:4 Yawan viŋutsu wo nye: Elisa
Genesis10:5 Amesiawo me dukɔ
Genesis10:6 Xam viŋutsuwo nye: Kus
Genesis10:7 Kus viŋutsuwo nye: Seba
Genesis10:8 Kus dzi Nimrod; ame sia de asi gãɖuɖu me le anyigba dzi.
Genesis10:9 Ame sia enye adela kalẽtɔ le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Genesis10:10 Eƒe fiaɖuƒe ƒe gɔmeɖoɖo enye Babel
Genesis10:11 Eye wòʋu le anyigba sia dzi yi ɖe Asur
Genesis10:12 kple Resen le Niniwe kple Kalax dome
Genesis10:13 Eye Mizrayim dzi Luditɔwo
Genesis10:14 Patrusitɔwo
Genesis10:15 Eye Kanaan dzi Zidon
Genesis10:16 Yebusitɔwo
Genesis10:17 Xiwitɔwo
Genesis10:18 Arwatitɔwo
Genesis10:19 Eye Kanaan ƒe anyigba keke tso Zidon ɖo ta Gerar kple Gaza
Genesis10:20 Esiawo nye Xam-viwo le woƒe ƒomewo
Genesis10:21 Eye wodzi ŋutsuwo na Sem
Genesis10:22 Sem viŋutsuwo nye: Elam
Genesis10:23 Aram viŋutsuwo nye: Uz
Genesis10:24 Arpaxsad dzi Selax
Genesis10:25 Eye wodzi ŋutsuvi eve na Eber. Gbãtɔ ŋkɔ nye Peleg; elabena amegbetɔwo mã le eƒe ŋɔli me
Genesis10:26 Yoktan dzi Almodad
Genesis10:27 Hadoram
Genesis10:28 Obal
Genesis10:29 Ofir
Genesis10:30 Eye woƒe nɔƒe keke tso Mesa ɖo ta Safar vaseɖe ɣedzeƒetowo gbɔ.
Genesis10:31 Esiawo nye Sem viŋutsuwo le woƒe ƒomewo
Genesis10:32 Esia nye Noa viŋutsuwo ƒe ƒomewo le woƒe dzidzimewo kple woƒe dukɔwo nu
Genesis11:1 Ke gbe ɖeka kple nuƒoƒo ɖeka ŋugbe le amegbetɔwo katã nu.
Genesis11:2 Eye wòva me bena
Genesis11:3 Eye wogblɔ na wo nɔewo bena: Mina míamè anyikpe
Genesis11:4 Eye wogblɔ bena: Mina míatso du
Genesis11:5 Tete Yehowa ɖi va anyi
Genesis11:6 Eye Yehowa gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis11:7 Mina míaɖi ayi afima
Genesis11:8 Eye Yehowa na bena
Genesis11:9 Eyata woyɔnɛ bena Babel
Genesis11:10 Esia nye Sem ƒe dzidzimeviwo ŋutinya. Esime Sem xa ƒe alafa ɖeka la
Genesis11:11 Esi Sem dzi Arpaxsad megbe la
Genesis11:12 Esi Arpaxsad xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ la
Genesis11:13 Eye esi Arpaxsad dzi Selax megbe la
Genesis11:14 Esi Selax xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ la
Genesis11:15 Eye esi Selax dzi Eber megbe la
Genesis11:16 Esi Eber xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ ene la
Genesis11:17 Eye esi Eber dzi Peleg megbe la
Genesis11:18 Esi Peleg xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ la
Genesis11:19 Eye esi Peleg dzi Regu megbe la
Genesis11:20 Esi Regu xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ eve la

Genesis11:22 Esi Serug xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ la
Genesis11:23 Eye esi Serug dzi Naxor megbe la
Genesis11:24 Esi Naxor xɔ ƒe blave vo asieke la

Genesis11:26 Eye esi Tarax xɔ ƒe blaadre la
Genesis11:27 Tarax ƒe dzidzimeviwo ŋutinya enye si: Tarax dzi Abram. Naxor kple Haran; eye Haran dzi Lot.
Genesis11:28 Ke Haran tre kuku na fofoa Tarax le Kaldea-nyigba dzi le wo de Ur.

Genesis12:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Abram bena: Ʋu le wò anyigba dzi kple ƒowòmeawo gbɔ kple fofowò ƒe me
Genesis12:2 Mawɔ wò dukɔ gã
Genesis12:3 Mayra amesiwo yra wò
Genesis12:4 Tete Abram ʋu
Genesis12:5 Eye Abram kplɔ srɔ̃a Sarai
Genesis12:6 Eye Abram tsa le anyigba la dzi vaseɖe Sixem kple Moreli gã la gbɔ; ke ɣemaɣi la Kanaantɔwo le anyigba la dzi.
Genesis12:7 Eye Yehowa ɖe eɖokui fia Abram gblɔ nɛ bena: Wò dzidzimeviwo matsɔ anyigba sia ana. Eye wòɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖe afima na Yehowa
Genesis12:8 Eye wòʋu tso afima yi ɖe to dzi le Betel ƒe ɣedzeƒe
Genesis12:9 Eye Abram le ʋuʋum le dziehe gome yim ʋeʋeʋe.
Genesis12:10 Eye do to le anyigba la dzi. Eye Abram yi ɖe Egipte
Genesis12:11 Ke esi wògogo Egipte la

Genesis12:13 Gblɔ ko dzro bena

Genesis12:15 Eye esi Farao ŋumewo kpɔe la

Genesis12:18 Eye Farao yɔ Abram ve gblɔ ne bena; Nuka enye si nèwɔ ɖe ŋunye; nukaŋuti megblɔe nam bena
Genesis12:19 Nukaŋuti nègblɔ bena
Genesis12:20 Eye Farao do amewo
Genesis13:1 Ale Abram ʋu le Egipte kple srɔ̃ kple nusiwo katã le esi la
Genesis13:2 Eye lãwo
Genesis13:3 Eye wòzɔ tso dziehe gome vaseɖe Betel
Genesis13:4 afisi wòɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖo gbã. Eye Abram yɔ Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ le afima.
Genesis13:5 Ke Lot
Genesis13:6 Eye anyigba mede wo nu bena
Genesis13:7 Eye dzre dzɔ ɖe Abram ƒe lãnyilawo kple Lot ƒe lãnyilawo dome. Ke Kanaanitɔwo kple Perizitɔwo hã nɔ anyigba la dzi le ɣemaɣi me.
Genesis13:8 Tete Abram gblɔ na Lot bena: Megana dzre nanɔ mía kpli wò
Genesis13:9 Alo menye anyigba blibo la nye esi le ŋkuwò me oa? De megbe tso gbɔnye dzro! Ne ètia mia me la

Genesis17:1 Esi Abram xɔ ƒe blaasieke vɔ asieke la

Genesis17:3 Tete Abram tsyɔ mo anyi

Genesis17:5 Eyata womagayɔ wò bena Abram akpɔ o
Genesis17:6 Eye mana nadzi ɖe dzi ŋutɔ
Genesis17:7 Eye maɖo nye nubabla anyi le mía kpli wò kple megbewòviwo katã dome
Genesis17:8 Eye matsɔ Kanaan-nyigba blibo la katã
Genesis17:9 Eye Mawu gblɔ na Abraham bena: Ke wò la lé ye nubabla la me ɖe asi; wò ŋutɔ kple megbewòviwo katã milé ye nubabla la me ɖe asi!

Genesis22:3 Tete Abraham tɔ ŋdi kanya
Genesis22:4 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la Abraham wu mo dzi kpɔ teƒe la le adzɔge ɖa ʋĩ.
Genesis22:5 Tete Abraham gblɔ na dɔlawo bena: Mitsi afisia kple tedzi la; ke mía kple vinye la míayi afime aɖado gbe ɖa
Genesis22:6 Eye Abraham tsɔ numènake la ɖo la na via Isak

Genesis22:15 Eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla gayɔ Abraham zi evelia tso dziƒo
Genesis22:16 hegblɔ bena: Mefa ɖokuinye

Genesis24:7 Yehowa

Genesis30:21 Emegbe la edzi nyɔnuvi

Genesis30:23 Eye wòfɔ fu dzi ŋutsuvi
Genesis30:24 Eyata wòna ŋkɔe be Yosef; elabena egblɔ be: Yehowa agatsɔ ŋutsuvi bubu akpee nam.
Genesis30:25 Ke esi Raxel dzi Yosef megbe la
Genesis30:26 Tsɔ srɔ̃nye kple vinye
Genesis30:27 Tete Laban gblɔ nɛ bena: Ve nunye dzro! Elabena medze sii bena
Genesis30:28 Eye wògayi edzi bena: Gblɔ fetu
Genesis30:29 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Wò ŋutɔ ènya alesi mesubɔ wòe
Genesis30:30 Nusi le asiwò hafi meva la

Genesis30:32 Egbe la matsa le wò lãha la katã me
Genesis30:33 Gbesigbe nava kpɔ nye fetua ɖa la
Genesis30:34 Laban ɖo ŋu bena: Nenɔ nenema
Genesis30:35 Gbemagbe ke wòɖe gbɔ̃tsu
Genesis30:36 Eye wòɖo be
Genesis30:37 Tete Yakob tsɔ logo
Genesis30:38 Emegbe la etsɔ ati
Genesis30:39 Eye ne lãwo lé ŋku ɖe atiawo ŋu hafi fɔ fu la

Genesis30:42 Ke nenye lã beliwoe la
Genesis30:43 Eye ŋutsu la ƒe kesinɔnuwo le dzidzim ɖe dzi ŋutɔ
Genesis31:1 Ke esi Laban viŋutsuwo gblɔ bena: Yakob da dzo mía fofo ƒe nuwo katã
Genesis31:2 Eye Yakob kpɔ be
Genesis31:3 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Yakob bena: Trɔ yi fofowò ƒe anyigba dzi kple ƒowòmeawo gbɔ
Genesis31:4 Tete Yakob dɔ woyi ɖayɔ Raxel kple Lea va eƒe lãha gbɔ le gbe me.
Genesis31:5 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Mekpɔ be
Genesis31:6 Mia ŋutɔwo mienyae bena
Genesis31:7 Gake mia fofo blem
Genesis31:8 Ne egblɔ bena: lã ŋɔtaŋɔtawo nanye wò fetu la
Genesis31:9 Ale Mawu xɔ lãha blibo le mia fofo si hetsɔ nam.
Genesis31:10 Eye esi lãwo le asi yɔm la
Genesis31:11 Eye mawudɔla gblɔ nam le drɔ̃e me bena: Yakob! Meɖo ŋu bena: Nye enye si!
Genesis31:12 Eye wogblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis31:13 Nye enye Mawu
Genesis31:14 Tete Raxel kple Lea woɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Ɖe gome kple domenyinyia ɖe gali na mi le mía fofo ƒe mea?
Genesis31:15 Ɖe mele mia bum amedzrowoe oa? Elabena etsɔ mí dzra
Genesis31:16 Elabena kesinɔnu
Genesis31:17 Tete Yakob tsɔ viawo kple srɔ̃awo ɖo kposɔwo dzi.
Genesis31:18 Emegbe la ekplɔ eƒe lãwo katã
Genesis31:19 Ke esi Laban yi fu sẽ ge na lãwo la
Genesis31:20 Eye Yakob ble Laban Aramtɔ la
Genesis31:21 Ale wòsi yi kple nusiwo katã le esi la
Genesis31:22 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃ megbe la wova gblɔ na Laban bena
Genesis31:23 Tete wotsɔ nɔvia wo kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋu ti eyome ŋkeke adre sɔŋ
Genesis31:24 Eye Mawu va Laban
Genesis31:25 Eye Laban va tu Yakob; eye Yakob tu eƒe agbadɔ ɖe to la dzi
Genesis31:26 Tete Laban gblɔ na Yakob bena: Nuka nye esi nèwɔ
Genesis31:27 Nukaŋuti nèsi le adza me
Genesis31:28 eye mèna meɖuɖɔ nu na nye tɔgbuiyɔviwo kple vinyenyɔnuwo o mahã? Ewɔ bometsinu!
Genesis31:29 Ŋusẽ le asinye be
Genesis31:30 Ke esi nèdzo
Genesis31:31 Tete Yakob ɖo ŋu na Laban bena: Mele vɔvɔ̃m
Genesis31:32 Amesi ke gbɔ nakpɔ wò mawuawo le la
Genesis31:33 Tete Laban ka Yakob kple Lea kpakple kosi eveawo ƒe agbadɔwo me
Genesis31:34 Ke Raxel fi aklama kpakpɛawo
Genesis31:35 Eye wògblɔ na fofoa bena: Nye aƒetɔ
Genesis31:36 Azɔ Yakob bi dzi hedo dɔmedzoe ɖe Laban ŋuti. Eye Yakob bia Laban bena. Vo ka meda
Genesis31:37 Eka nye nuwo katã me
Genesis31:38 Ƒe blave enye si menɔ gbɔwò
Genesis31:39 Esiwo nu lé la
Genesis31:40 Le ŋkeke me ŋdɔ ɖuam
Genesis31:41 Ƒe blave sɔŋ mena aƒewò me. Mesubɔ wò ƒe wuiene ɖe viwònyɔnuvi eveawo ta
Genesis31:42 Ɖe menye tɔgbuinyewo ƒe Mawu
Genesis31:43 Tete Laban ɖo ŋu na Yakob bena: Nyɔnuawo tɔnyewoe
Genesis31:44 Na míabla nu kple mía nɔewo
Genesis31:45 Tete Yakob tso kpea ɖe tu anyi
Genesis31:46 Eye Yakob gblɔ na nɔviawo bena: Mifa kpewo vɛ! Eye wofɔ kpewo li koe; emegbe la woɖu nu le afima le ka la dzi.
Genesis31:47 Eye Laban na ŋkɔe be Yegar-Saxaduta; ke Yakob na ŋkɔe bena Galed.

Genesis31:50 Ne ate vinyenyɔnuwo ɖe anyi

Genesis32:1 Eye esi Laban fo ŋdi kanya la

Genesis32:3 Eye esi Yakob kpɔ wo la
Genesis32:4 Eye Yakob dɔ dɔlawo ɖo ɖe eŋgɔ ɖe nɔvia Esau gbɔ le Seir-nyigba dzi le Edom gbedzi.
Genesis32:5 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Ale miagblɔ na nye aƒetɔ Esau enye si: Wò dɔla Yakob be
Genesis32:6 Eye mekpɔ aƒenyiwo
Genesis32:7 Eye dɔlawo gatrɔ va Yakob gbɔ
Genesis32:8 Tete Yakob de asi vɔvɔ̃ me ŋutɔ
Genesis32:9 Elabena egblɔ bena: Ne Esau ava dze akpa ɖeka dzi

Genesis32:16 kposɔ vinɔ blaetɔ̃ kple wo viwo
Genesis32:17 Eye wotsɔ wo de dɔlawo si hamehame
Genesis32:18 Eye wogblɔna ŋgɔgbetɔ bena: Ne nɔvinye ava do go wò
Genesis32:19 ekema naɖo ŋu bena. Wò dɔla Yakob ɖo nu siawo ɖe nye aƒetɔ Esau: eye eya ŋutɔ le mia megbe gbɔna.
Genesis32:20 Nenema wògblɔ na ame evelia

Genesis32:22 Ale nunanawo dze ŋgɔ
Genesis32:23 Emegbe la efɔ le zã ma me

Genesis38:16 Tete wòdze yi ɖe egbɔ gblɔ bena: Na mamlɔ gbɔwò! Elabena menyae bena
Genesis38:17 Egblɔ bena: Malé gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka le lãhawo me aɖo ɖe wò. Eɖo ŋu bena: Ekema tsɔ nane ɖo awɔba nam
Genesis38:18 Eye wòbiae bena: Nuka matsɔ aɖo awɔba na wò mahã? Eɖo ŋu be: Wò ŋkɔsigɛ
Genesis38:19 Tete wòdzo yi
Genesis38:20 Emegbe la Yuda tsɔ gbɔ̃tsu la ɖe xɔlɔ̃a Adulamtɔ la si
Genesis38:21 Eye wòbia dua me ŋutsuwo bena: Afika gbolo
Genesis38:22 Tete wòtrɔ yi Yuda gbɔ gblɔ bena: Nyemekpɔe o
Genesis38:23 Yuda gblɔ bena: Nenɔ esi ko! Ne menya ɖu fewu le mía ŋuti o ko. Meɖo gbɔ̃tsu la ɖee
Genesis38:24 Anɔ ɣleti etɔ̃ megbe la wogblɔ na Yuda bena: Lɔ̃xowò Tamar wɔ ahasi
Genesis38:25 Ke esi wokplɔe do goe la
Genesis38:26 Esi Yuda ɖe ŋku ɖee nyuie la
Genesis38:27 Ke esi eƒe vidziɣi ɖo la
Genesis38:28 Esime wòle vi dzim la
Genesis38:29 Ke esi wògahe asi ɖe eme la
Genesis38:30 Emegbe la nɔvia
Genesis39:1 Eye esi wokplɔ Yosef va Egipte la
Genesis39:2 Ke Yehowa nɔ kple Yosef
Genesis39:3 Esi eƒe aƒetɔ kpɔ bena
Genesis39:4 eve Yosef nu
Genesis39:5 Tso esime wòtsɔe ɖo eƒe aƒe me nuwo dzikpɔlae
Genesis39:6 Eye wotsɔ eƒe nuwo katã de Yosef si
Genesis39:7 Le nusiawo megbe la eƒe aƒetɔ srɔ̃ nɔa ahiãmoe ɖom ɖe Yosef ŋu
Genesis39:8 Ke egbe
Genesis39:9 Amea ɖeke meɖe nunye le aƒe sia me o
Genesis39:10 Eye wonɔa nya sia gblɔm na Yosef ŋkeke sia ŋkeke
Genesis39:11 Gbe ɖeka esi wòva aƒea me
Genesis39:12 ele eƒe avɔ
Genesis39:13 Esi wòkpɔ be
Genesis39:14 eya aƒeametɔwo vɛ
Genesis39:15 Esi wòkpɔ be
Genesis39:16 Eye wotsɔ eƒe avɔ ta da ɖe eɖokui gbɔ
Genesis39:17 Eye wògblɔ nya mawo ke na eya hã bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis39:18 Ke esi medo ɣli sesĩe la
Genesis39:19 Esi eƒe aƒetɔ se nya
Genesis39:20 Eye Yosef ƒe aƒetɔ lée de gaxɔ
Genesis39:21 Ke Yehowa nɔ kple Yosef
Genesis39:22 Eye gaxɔdzikpɔla tsɔ gatɔ
Genesis39:23 Eye gaxɔdzikpɔla metsɔ ɖeke le nusi wòwɔna la me o
Genesis40:1 Le nya siawo megbe la Egipte-fia ƒe ahakula kple aboloƒola woda vo ɖe woƒe aƒetɔ
Genesis40:2 Eye Farao do dɔmedzoe ɖe eŋuti me eveawo
Genesis40:3 Eye wotsɔ wo de gaxɔ
Genesis40:4 Fia ŋuti mewo ƒe amegã la tsɔ wo de Yosef si
Genesis40:5 Gbe ɖeka ƒe zã Egipte-fia ƒe ahakula kple aboloƒola
Genesis40:6 Esi Yosef va wo gbɔ le ŋdi la
Genesis40:7 Tete wòbia Farao ŋuti me
Genesis40:8 Woɖo eŋu nɛ bena: Míeku drɔ̃e
Genesis40:9 Tete ahakulawo ƒe amegã lĩ eƒe drɔ̃e la na Yosef
Genesis40:10 Alɔ etɔ̃ le weinka sia ŋu
Genesis40:11 Ke Farao ƒe kplu la le asinye; tete megbe weinkpoawo
Genesis40:12 Yosef ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Drɔ̃e la gɔme enye si: Alɔ etɔ̃awo nye ŋkeke etɔ̃.
Genesis40:13 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la Farao ado wò ɖe dzi
Genesis40:14 Ke ɖo ŋku dzinye
Genesis40:15 Elabena yakatsyɔe wofim le Hebritɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi
Genesis40:16 Esi aboloƒolawo ƒe amegã kpɔ bena
Genesis40:17 Ke kusi etametɔ me la abolo vivi vovovowo li na Farao
Genesis40:18 Yosef ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Drɔ̃e la gɔme enye si: Kusi etɔ̃awo nye ŋkeke etɔ̃.
Genesis40:19 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la Farao atso ta le nuwo
Genesis40:20 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la Farao ɖu eƒe dzigbe
Genesis40:21 Egatsɔ ahakulawo ƒe amegã la ɖo eƒe ahakudɔ nu
Genesis40:22 Ke ena wohe aboloƒolawo ƒe amegã ya ɖe ati ŋu
Genesis40:23 Ahakulawo ƒe amegã megaɖo ŋku Yosef dzi o
Genesis41:1 Le ƒe eve megbe la Farao ku drɔ̃e. Ele tsitre ɖe Nil to.
Genesis41:2 Eye wòkpɔ nyinɔ adre
Genesis41:3 Wo yome la ekpɔ nyinɔ bubu adre
Genesis41:4 Eye nyinɔ
Genesis41:5 Esi wògayi alo me la
Genesis41:6 Wo yome la liŋɔ adre
Genesis41:7 Eye liŋɔ
Genesis41:8 Le ŋdi la Farao mekpɔ gbɔdzɔea ɖeke o
Genesis41:9 Tete ahakulawo ƒe amegã ƒo nu kple Farao gblɔ bena: Egbe la meɖo ŋku nye vodada dzi.
Genesis41:10 Esi Farao bi dzi ɖe eƒe dɔlawo ŋuti
Genesis41:11 mía kple eve míeku drɔ̃e le zã ɖeka me mia ta míatɔe
Genesis41:12 Eye Hebri-ɖekakpuia ɖe
Genesis41:13 Alesi wòɖe egɔme na mi la
Genesis41:14 Tete Farao do woyi ɖayɔ Yosef vɛ. Enumake woɖee le gaxɔa me

Genesis41:16 Tete Yosef ɖo ŋu na Farao bena: Gbeɖe
Genesis41:17 Eye Farao gblɔ na Yosef bena: Meku drɔ̃e
Genesis41:18 Kasiaa mekpɔ nyinɔ adre
Genesis41:19 Wo yome la nyinɔ kudɔe adre
Genesis41:20 Enumake nyinɔ
Genesis41:21 Gake esi womi wo hã la
Genesis41:22 Emegbe megaku drɔ̃e kpɔ liŋɔ adre
Genesis41:23 Wo yome la liŋɔ adre
Genesis41:24 Eye liŋɔ
Genesis41:25 Tete Yosef gblɔ na Farao bena: Farao ƒe drɔ̃eawo gɔme le ɖeka. Nusi wɔ ge Mawu gbɔna la
Genesis41:26 Nyinɔ dami adreawo nye ƒe adre
Genesis41:27 Nyinɔ kudɔe adre
Genesis41:28 Eyatae megblɔ na Farao gbã bena: Nusi wɔ ge Mawu ala la
Genesis41:29 Fe adre gbɔna
Genesis41:30 Eyome la dɔŋɔliƒe adre ava
Genesis41:31 Ale bena womaganye naneke le alesi nuɖuɖu do agbogbo ɖe anyigba dzi la ŋuti o
Genesis41:32 Ke nusi ta Farao ku drɔ̃ea zi eve ɖo la enye: Mawu ɖoe kplikpa
Genesis41:33 Azɔ Farao nedi ame
Genesis41:34 Eyata Farao nadi dzikpɔlawo aɖo anyigba la dzi kaba
Genesis41:35 eye woaƒo nuɖuɖuwo nu ƒu le ƒe nyui
Genesis41:36 Eye nuɖuɖuawo anye nusi wotu ɖo na anyigba la ɖe dɔŋɔliƒe adre
Genesis41:37 Nya sia dze Farao kple eŋuti mewo katã ŋu.
Genesis41:38 Tete Farao gblɔ na eŋuti meawo bena: Ɖe míate ŋu akpɔ amea ɖe
Genesis41:39 Eye Farao gblɔ na Yosef bena: Esi Mawu ɖe nu
Genesis41:40 Eyata wòe anɔ nye aƒe nu
Genesis41:41 Eye Farao gblɔ na Yosef bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis41:42 Eye Farao ɖe eƒe ŋkɔsigɛ le asi hetsɔ do na Yosef
Genesis41:43 Emegbe la ena wòɖo tasiaɖam evelia
Genesis41:44 Eye Farao gblɔ na Yosef bena: Nye enye Farao
Genesis41:45 Eye Farao na ŋkɔ Yosef bena Zafnat Paneax (amewo ƒe agbeɖela)
Genesis41:46 Yosef xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃
Genesis41:47 Eye anyigba la wɔ nu ŋutɔ le ƒe adreawo me.
Genesis41:48 Eye wòƒo agblemenu siwo katã wɔ le ƒe adreawo me
Genesis41:49 Eye Yosef tu bliawo ɖo wòsɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ abe ƒutake ene
Genesis41:50 Hafi dɔŋɔlia nava la
Genesis41:51 Eye Yosef na ŋkɔ eƒe ŋgɔgbevia bena Manase
Genesis41:52 Eye wòna ŋkɔ evelia be Efrayim; elabena egblɔ be: Mawu na medzi ɖe dzi le afisi mekpe fu le la.
Genesis41:53 Esi nuʋãƒe adre
Genesis41:54 tete dɔŋɔliƒe adreawo dze gɔme

Genesis41:57 Eye amewo tso afiawo katã va Egipte

Genesis43:2 Eye esi woɖu bli

Genesis43:4 Ne èlɔ̃ ɖe asi le mía nɔvia ŋuti na mí la
Genesis43:5 Ke ne mèlɔ̃ ɖe asi le eŋu na mí o la

Genesis44:1 Emegbe la ede se na eƒe aƒe dzikpɔla bena: De bli ŋutsuawo ƒe kotokuwo me taŋ

Genesis44:3 Le ŋdi kanya la wodo mɔ ŋutsuawo woyi kple woƒe tedziwo.
Genesis44:4 Eye esi wodo go le dua me

Genesis44:18 Tete Yuda te ɖe eŋu gblɔ be: Taflatse
Genesis44:19 Nye aƒetɔ bia eƒe dɔlawo bena: Ɖe fofo alo nɔviŋutsu gale mia siá?
Genesis44:20 Míegblɔ na nye aƒetɔ bena: fofo gale mia si

Genesis46:1 Eye Israel dze mo kple eƒemetɔwo katã
Genesis46:2 Tete Mawu ɖe eɖokui fia Israel le drɔ̃eƒe gblɔ bena: Yakob
Genesis46:3 Eye wògblɔ bena: Nye enye Mawu
Genesis46:4 Nye ŋutɔ mayi Egipte kple wò
Genesis46:5 Tete Yakob dze mɔ tso Berseba
Genesis46:6 Eye wokplɔ woƒe lãwo
Genesis46:7 Eye wòkplɔ viaŋutsuwo kple tɔgbuiayɔviŋutsuwo
Genesis46:8 Esiawo nye Israel ƒe vi
Genesis46:9 Ruben viŋutsuwo nye: Henox
Genesis46:10 Simeon viŋutsuwo nye: Yemuel
Genesis46:11 Lewi ƒe viŋutsuwo nye: Gerson
Genesis46:12 Yuda viŋutsuwo nye: Ger
Genesis46:13 Isaxar viŋutsuwo nye: Tola
Genesis46:14 Zebulon viŋutsuwo nye: Sered
Genesis46:15 Esiawo nye Lea ƒe viŋutsu
Genesis46:16 Gad viŋutsuwo nye: Zifyon
Genesis46:17 Aser viŋutsuwo nye: Yimna
Genesis46:18 Esiawo nye Silpa
Genesis46:19 Yakob srɔ̃ Raxel ƒe viŋutsuwo nye Yosef kple Benyamin.
Genesis46:20 Viŋutsu
Genesis46:21 Benyamin viŋutsuwo nye Bela
Genesis46:22 Esiawo nye Raxel ƒe viŋutsu
Genesis46:23 Dan ƒe viŋutsu enye Xusim.
Genesis46:24 Naftali viŋutsuwo nye: Yaxzeel
Genesis46:25 Esiawo nye Bilha
Genesis46:26 Yakob vi
Genesis46:27 Ŋutsuvi
Genesis46:28 Ke edɔ Yuda ɖe eŋgɔ ɖo ɖe Yosef gbɔ
Genesis46:29 Yosef na woɖo eƒe tasiaɖam ɖo
Genesis46:30 Eye Israel gblɔ na Yosef bena: Azɔ maku faa

Genesis46:32 Lãhawo le ŋutsuawo si
Genesis46:33 Ne Farao ayɔ mi
Genesis46:34 ekema miaɖo ŋu bena: lãnyilawo wò dɔlawo nye tso ɖevime vaseɖe fifi abe mía tɔgbuiwo ke ene
Genesis47:1 Tete Yosef yi ɖagblɔ na Farao bena: Fofonye kple nɔvinyewo tso Kanaan-nyigba dzi va kple woƒe alẽwo
Genesis47:2 Eye wòkplɔ nɔvia atɔ̃ ɖe asi yi ɖatsɔ fia Farao.
Genesis47:3 Eye Farao bia nɔviawo bena: Dɔ ka wɔlawo míenye? Woɖo ŋu na Farao bena: Lãnyilawo wò dɔlawo nye abe mia tɔgbuiwo ke ene.
Genesis47:4 Eye wogblɔ na Farao bena: Amedzrowo míenye va afisia na ge; elabena gbe megali na wò dɔlawo ƒe lãwo o
Genesis47:5 Tete Farao gblɔ na Yosef bena: Fofowò kple nɔviwòwo va gbɔwò.
Genesis47:6 Egipte-nyigba la enye si
Genesis47:7 Emegbe la Yosef kplɔ fofoa Yakob va fia Farao gbɔ
Genesis47:8 Eye Farao bia Yakob bena: Ƒe nenie nèxɔ?
Genesis47:9 Yakob ɖo ŋu na Farao bena: Ƒe
Genesis47:10 Emegbe la Yakob yayra Farao
Genesis47:11 Eye Yosef fia nɔƒe fofoa kple nɔviawo
Genesis47:12 Eye Yosef tsɔ nuɖuɖu kpɔ fofoa
Genesis47:13 Ke nuɖuɖua ɖeke megale anyigba blibo la dzi o
Genesis47:14 Mlɔeba la Yosef ƒo ga
Genesis47:15 Ke esi ga megale Egipte kple Kanaan-nyigba dzi o la
Genesis47:16 Yosef ɖo ŋu bena: Ne ga vɔ le mia si la
Genesis47:17 Tete wokplɔ woƒe lãhawo ve na Yosef
Genesis47:18 Ƒe sia va yi. Le ƒe bubu me la wogava egbɔ
Genesis47:19 Nukaŋuti miaku ɖe gbɔwò? Tsɔ bli ƒle mia kple míaƒe agblenyigbawo
Genesis47:20 Tete Yosef ƒle Egiptetɔwo ƒe agblewo katã na Farao. Eye Egiptetɔwo dome amesiame tsɔ eƒe agblenyigba dzra
Genesis47:21 Eye eƒe dukɔ la katã zu awɔbamewo tso Egipte ƒe go ɖeka me yi go bubu me.
Genesis47:22 Ke meƒle nunɔlawo ƒe agblenyigbawo o
Genesis47:23 Tete Yosef gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis47:24 Eye ne nuŋeɣi ɖo la
Genesis47:25 Tete wogblɔ bena: Wòe xɔ mí ɖe agbe! Aƒetɔ
Genesis47:26 Eye Yosef tsɔe wɔ see na Egiptetɔwo vaseɖe egbegbe bena
Genesis47:27 Ke Israel nɔ Egipte le Gosen-nyigba dzi
Genesis47:28 Yakob nɔ Egipte-nyigba dzi ƒe wuiadre
Genesis47:29 Esi Israel kpɔ be
Genesis47:30 ke boŋ naɖim ɖe tɔgbuinyewo gbɔ
Genesis47:31 Eye wògblɔ bena: Ka atam! Eye wòka atam nɛ. Tete Yakob gadze ŋe ɖe eƒe abati la dzi.
Genesis48:1 Le nusiawo megbe la wogblɔ na Yosef bena: Fofowò le dɔ lém. Tete wòkplɔ viaŋutsu eveawo
Genesis48:2 Eye wogblɔ na Yakob bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Genesis48:3 Eye Yakob gblɔ na Yosef bena: Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ɖe eɖokui fiãm le Lus le Kanaan-nyigba dzi

Genesis48:5 Ke viwòŋutsu eveawo
Genesis48:6 Ke vi

Genesis48:22 Ke metsɔ anyigbaa ɖe

Genesis50:1 Tete Yosef dze fofoa dzi
Genesis50:2 Emegbe Yosef de se na eƒe dɔla
Genesis50:3 Esi ŋkeke blane
Genesis50:4 Ke esi konyifaɣiawo va yi vɔ la
Genesis50:5 Fofonye na meka atam ne bena

Genesis50:9 Eye tasiaɖamwo kple sɔɖolawo kplɔe yii ale bena
Genesis50:10 Esi wova ɖo Gorenhatad
Genesis50:11 Esi Kanaantɔ

Genesis50:20 Miawo miesusu vɔ̃ ɖe ŋunye
Genesis50:21 Eyata migavɔ̃ o

Genesis50:26 Esi Yosef xa ƒe alafa ɖeka kple ewo la

Exodus7:7 Mose xɔ ƒe blanyi
Exodus7:8 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron bena:
Exodus7:9 Ne Farao abia nukunua ɖe tso mia si la
Exodus7:10 Tete Mose kple Aron woyi Farao gbɔ
Exodus7:11 Ke Farao hã yɔ nunyalawo kple afakalawo vɛ
Exodus7:12 Wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe tsɔ eƒe atikplɔ ɖa ɖe anyi
Exodus7:13 Gake Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus7:14 Emegbe Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus7:15 Yi Farao gbɔ ŋdi kanya: kpɔ ɖa
Exodus7:16 Eye nagblɔ nɛ bena: Yehowa
Exodus7:17 Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esia natsɔ anyae bena
Exodus7:18 Eye lã
Exodus7:19 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Gblɔ na Aron bena: Tsɔ wò atikplɔ
Exodus7:20 Eye Mose kple Aron wɔ
Exodus7:21 Eye lã
Exodus7:22 Ke Egipte-tɔwo ƒe akunyawɔlawo tsɔ woƒe ave me nuwɔwɔwo wɔe nenema ke. Eye Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus7:23 Tete Farao trɔ yi aƒe me
Exodus7:24 Eye Egiptetɔwo ɖe vudowo ɖe Nil ŋu
Exodus7:25 Esi Yehowa gblẽ Nil me tsia la
Exodus7:26 Eyome Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Yi Farao gbɔ
Exodus7:27 Ke ne egbe asiɖeɖe le eŋu la
Exodus7:28 Eye Nil-tɔsisi la adzi akpɔkplɔwo
Exodus7:29 Gɔ̃ la akpɔkplɔawo ata le wò ŋuta
Exodus8:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Gblɔ na Aron be: Do wo asi kple atikplɔ ɖe tɔsisiwo
Exodus8:2 Tete Aron do eƒe asi ɖe Egiptetɔwo ƒe tɔwo dzi
Exodus8:3 Ke afakalawo hã tso woƒe aye me nuwɔwɔwo wòe nenema
Exodus8:4 Tete Farao yɔ Mose kple Aron vɛ
Exodus8:5 Mose ɖo ŋu na Farao bena: Ele asiwò me! Ɣekaɣie maɖe kuku la ɖe wò ŋutɔ
Exodus8:6 Eɖo ŋu be: Etso! Eye wògblɔ be: Ava me
Exodus8:7 Wò ŋuta kple wò aƒe
Exodus8:8 Esi Mose kple Aron wodzo le Farao gbɔ la
Exodus8:9 Eye Yehowa wɔ Mose ƒe nya la dzi
Exodus8:10 Eye wolɔ wo li kɔ gagãwoe
Exodus8:11 Ke esi Farao kpɔ bena
Exodus8:12 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Gblɔ na Aron be: Tsɔ wo atikplɔ
Exodus8:13 Eye wòwɔ nenema Aron do eƒe asi kple atikplɔ ɖa
Exodus8:14 Eye afakalawo hã tsɔ woƒe aye me nuwɔwɔwo wɔe nenema
Exodus8:15 Eye afakalawo gblɔ na Farao bena: Esia la Mawu ƒe asibidee! Ke Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus8:16 Emegbe Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Yi Farao gbɔ ŋdi kanya
Exodus8:17 Ke ne ègbe asiɖeɖe le nye dukɔa ŋu la
Exodus8:18 Gbemagbe maɖe Gosen-nyigba
Exodus8:19 Eye made vovo nye dukɔ kple wò dukɔ dome; etsɔe dzesi sia ava me!
Exodus8:20 Eye Yehowa wo nenema; tete togbato geɖe fũ va Farao ƒe aƒe kple eŋu mewo ƒe xɔwo me kpakple Egipte-nyigba blibo la dzi
Exodus8:21 Eye Farao yɔ Mose kple Aron vɛ
Exodus8:22 Mose ɖo ŋu bena: Menyo bena
Exodus8:23 Míazɔ ŋkeke etɔ̃ ƒe mo ayi gbeɖzi
Exodus8:24 Farao gblɔ bena: Maɖe asi le mia ŋu
Exodus8:25 Mose ɖo ŋu bena: Ne menya dzo le gbɔwò ko
Exodus8:26 Tete Mose dzo le Farao gbɔ
Exodus8:27 Eye Yehowa wɔ
Exodus8:28 Ke Farao sẽ eƒe dzime fifia hã
Exodus9:1 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Yi Farao gbɔ
Exodus9:2 Ke ne egbe asiɖeɖe de wo ŋu
Exodus9:3 ekema Yehowa ƒe asi alé wò lãha
Exodus9:4 Ke Yehowa ade vovo Israel-viwo ƒe lãwo kple Egiptetɔwo to dome
Exodus9:5 Eye Yehowa ɖo ŋkeke gblɔ bena: Etsɔ Yehowa ana nu sia ava anyigba la dzi.
Exodus9:6 Esi ŋu ke la
Exodus9:7 Eye Farao do amewo ɖa
Exodus9:8 Emegbe Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron bena: Miɖe kpo me dzɔble ɖe miaƒe asiʋlowo me
Exodus9:9 ekema azu ʋuʋu akaka ɖe Egipte-nyigba blibo la katã dzi
Exodus9:10 Eye woɖe kpo me dzɔble la heva tsi tre ɖe Farao ƒe ŋku me
Exodus9:11 Ke afakalawo mete ŋu no te ɖe Mose nu o
Exodus9:12 Eye Yehowa na Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus9:13 Eyome Yehowa gblɔ na Mese bena: Yi Farao gbɔ ŋdi kanya
Exodus9:14 Ne menye nenem o la
Exodus9:15 Elabena mate ŋu ado nye asi ɖa atsɔ dɔvɔ̃ agblẽ wò ŋutɔ kple wò dukɔ
Exodus9:16 gake megblẽ wò ɖi vaseɖe fifi
Exodus9:17 Ke ne egagbe asiɖeɖe le nye dukɔa ŋu la
Exodus9:18 ekema mana kpetsi gãwo nadza etsɔ wɔale siawo
Exodus9:19 Eyata dɔ woadzra wò lãha kple wò nusianu
Exodus9:20 Eye Farao ŋuti mewo dometɔ
Exodus9:21 Ke amesi ke mebu Yehowa ƒe nya la o la
Exodus9:22 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Do wò asi ɖe dziƒo
Exodus9:23 Eye Mose do eƒe atikplɔ ɖe dziƒo
Exodus9:24 Kpetsia le dzadzam
Exodus9:25 Eye kpetsia gblẽ nusianu
Exodus9:26 Negbe Gosen-nyigba
Exodus9:27 Tete Farao do woɖayɔ Mose kple Aron vɛ
Exodus9:28 Miɖaɖe kuku na Yehowa
Exodus9:29 Mose ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Ne menya do le dua me ko la
Exodus9:30 Ke menyae be
Exodus9:31 Eye ɖeti kple mɔli gblẽ
Exodus9:32 Ke lu kple bli ya megblẽ o
Exodus9:33 Emegbe Mese dzo le Farao gbɔ
Exodus9:34 Ke esi Farao kpɔ bena
Exodus9:35 Eye Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus10:1 Emegbe Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Yi Farao gbɔ
Exodus10:2 eye bene nava xlẽ nusiwo mewɔ Egiptetɔwo kple dzesi
Exodus10:3 Tete Mose kple Aron woyi Farao gbɔ
Exodus10:4 Ke ne egbe asiɖeɖe le nye dukɔ ŋu la
Exodus10:5 Eye woanye atsyɔ anyigba blibo la katã dzi
Exodus10:6 Eye wòayi ɖe wò xɔwo
Exodus10:7 Eye Farao ŋu mewo gblɔ nɛ bena: Zi nenie gɔ̃ ame sia anye mɔ̃ anɔ mía ɖem? Ɖe asi le ameawo ŋu
Exodus10:8 Tete wogagbugbɔ Mose kple Aron va Farao gbɔ
Exodus10:9 Mose ɖo ŋu bena: Miele mía viwo kple míaƒe amegã ɖeɖiwo kplɔ ge ɖe asi; miele mía viŋutsuwo kple mía vinyɔnuwo
Exodus10:10 Eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Yehowa naɖi na mi! Maɖe asi le mia kple mia viwo siaa ŋua? Nyateƒee
Exodus10:11 Gbeɖe! Ŋutsuwo ko nayi aɖasubɔ Yehowa
Exodus10:12 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Do wò asi ɖe Egipte-nyigba dzi
Exodus10:13 Tete Mose do eƒe atikplɔ ɖe Egipte-nyigba dzi
Exodus10:14 Eye ʋetsuviawo ƒo ɖe Egipte-nyigba blibo la katã dzi
Exodus10:15 Eye wonye tsyo anyigba blibo la katã dzi
Exodus10:16 Tete Farao na woyɔ Mose kple Aron ve kaba eye wògblɔ bena: Meda vo ɖe Yehowa
Exodus10:17 Eyata mitso nye vodada la kem fifia hã
Exodus10:18 Tete wòdzo le Farao gbɔ
Exodus10:19 Eye Yehowa na ɣetoɖoƒeya sesẽa ɖe ƒo
Exodus10:20 Ke Yehowa na Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus10:21 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Do wò asi ɖe dziƒo
Exodus10:22 Tete Mose do eƒe asi ɖe dziƒo
Exodus10:23 Amea ɖeke mete ŋu kpɔ nɔvia o
Exodus10:24 Eye Farao yɔ Mose vɛ gblɔ bena: Miheyi ɖasubɔ Yehowa la! Miaƒe alẽwo kple nyiwo natsi anyi
Exodus10:25 Mose ɖo ŋu bena: Ele be
Exodus10:26 Ke míakplɔ míaƒe lãwo hã ɖe asi
Exodus10:27 Gake Yehowa na Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus10:28 Eye Farao gblɔ nɛ bena: Te ɖa le gbɔnye! Kpɔ nyuie
Exodus10:29 Mose ɖo ŋu bena: Yoo
Exodus11:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Esusɔ fuwɔame ɖeka mahe ava Farao kple Egiptetɔwo dzii; emegbe la aɖe asi le mia ŋu miadzo le afisia. Ke menye asi ko wòaɖe le mia ŋu o; boŋ anyẽ mi atso afisia.
Exodus11:2 Eyata gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Ŋutsu sia ŋutsu kple nyɔnu sia nyɔnu nabia klosalo kple sikanuwo le eƒe aƒelika si!
Exodus11:3 Eye Yehowa na Egipte-tɔwo ve dukɔ la nu
Exodus11:4 Eye Mose gblɔ be: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi. Le zã titina la mele Egipte-nyigba me to ge ayi
Exodus11:5 eye ŋgɔgbeviwo katã aku le Egipte-nyigba dzi
Exodus11:6 Eye nublanuiɣli aɖi le Egipte-nyigba blibo la katã dzi
Exodus11:7 Ke avũ mawo ɖe ame alo lã ŋu le Israel-viwo katã dome o
Exodus11:8 Emegbe ŋutiwò me siawo katã ava gbɔnye
Exodus11:9 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena Farao maɖo to mi o
Exodus11:10 Eye Mose kple Aron wowɔ nukunu siawo katã le Farao ƒe ŋku me; ke Yehowa na Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus12:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron le Egipte-nyigba dzi bena:
Exodus12:2 Ɣleti sia nanye vevietɔ na mi
Exodus12:3 Migblɔ na Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la katã bena: Le ɣleti sia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi la ŋutsu sia ŋutsu nalé alẽvi ɖeka; aƒe sia aƒe
Exodus12:4 Ke ne aƒea ɖe me tɔwo mesɔ gbɔ ate ŋu aɖu alẽvi ɖeka o la
Exodus12:5 Lãtsui
Exodus12:6 Eye miadzrae ɖo vaseɖe ɣleti sia ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia dzi
Exodus12:7 Eye woatsɔ nu la ƒe ɖe asisi ɖe xɔ
Exodus12:8 Woame lã la aɖu le zã ma me
Exodus12:9 Migaɖui mumũ alo aɖae hafi o; ke boŋ miamee ɖo nogo
Exodus12:10 Migagblẽ ɖeke ɖi ŋu nake ɖe edzi o
Exodus12:11 Ale mianɔ hafi aɖui enye si. Mibla miaƒe aliwo dzi
Exodus12:12 Elabena mele Egipte-nyigba dzi to ge le zã ma me
Exodus12:13 Eye ʋu
Exodus12:14 Ŋkeke sia nanye ŋkuɖodzigbe na mi
Exodus12:15 Ŋkeke adre sɔŋ mianɔ abolo maʋamaʋã ɖum; tso ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi ke miaɖe amɔwɔ ʋaʋã ɖa tso miaƒe xɔwo me
Exodus12:16 Le ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi miawɔ takpekpe kɔkɔea de
Exodus12:17 Miɖo ŋku abolo maʋamaʋã la dzi
Exodus12:18 Le ɣleti gbãtɔ me
Exodus12:19 Ŋkeke adre sɔŋ womakpɔ amɔwɔ ʋaʋã le miaƒe xɔwo me o
Exodus12:20 Migade nu abolo ʋaʋãa ɖeke ŋu o
Exodus12:21 Eye Mose yɔ Israel-viwo ƒe ame tsitsiwo katã vɛ
Exodus12:22 Eye mitsɔ isop babla nyrɔ̃ ɖe ʋu
Exodus12:23 Elabena ne Yehowa yina Egiptetɔwo gblẽ ge
Exodus12:24 Eye mia ŋutɔwo kple mia viwo miɖo ŋku ɖoɖo sia dzi tegbee.
Exodus12:25 Ne mieva anyigba
Exodus12:26 Eye ne mia viwo abia mi be: miaƒe subɔsubɔ sia gɔme ɖe mahã la
Exodus12:27 ekema migblɔ na wo bena: Esia enye ŋutitotovɔsa na Yehowa
Exodus12:28 Eye Israel-viwo wɔ
Exodus12:29 Le zã titina la Yehowa wu ŋgɔgbeviwo katã le Egipte-nyigba dzi
Exodus12:30 Tete Farao kple eŋu mewo kpakple Egiptetɔwo katã fɔ le zã titina
Exodus12:31 Eye wòyɔ Mose kple Aron vɛ le zã me gblɔ bena: Netsɔ
Exodus12:32 Mikplɔ miaƒe alẽwo kple nyiwo hã ɖe asi yii
Exodus12:33 Eye Egiptetɔwo ƒo ɖu ɖe dukɔ la nu
Exodus12:34 Eye dukɔ la tsɔ woƒe amɔwo
Exodus12:35 Eye Israel-viwo wɔe ɖe Mose ƒe nya la nu
Exodus12:36 Eye Yehowa na Egiptetɔwo ve dukɔ la nu
Exodus12:37 Eye Israel-viwo ʋu tso Ramses va Sukot; ŋutsu
Exodus12:38 Amedzro geɖewo hã kpe ɖe wo ŋuti
Exodus12:39 Eye wotsɔ amɔwɔ
Exodus12:40 Ƒe siwo katã Israel-viwo no Egipte la
Exodus12:41 Eye le ƒe alafa ene blaetɔ̃ megbe
Exodus12:42 Eyata wodɔa ŋu na Yehowa le zã ma me
Exodus12:43 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron bena: Esia enye ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie la ŋu ɖoɖowo: Amedzroa ɖeke mekpɔ mɔ aɖui o.
Exodus12:44 Ke ne amea ɖe ƒle ŋutsua ɖe kple ga la
Exodus12:45 Amedzro kple agbatedɔwɔla mekpe mo aɖui o.
Exodus12:46 Xɔ ɖeka me woaɖui ale; migatsɔ lã la ƒe ɖeke do go le xɔ me ɖe xexe o
Exodus12:47 Eye Israel ha blibo la nawɔ alea.
Exodus12:48 Ke ne amedzroa ɖe le gbɔwò
Exodus12:49 Se ɖeka ano eŋu na dumevi kple amedzro
Exodus12:50 Eye Israel-viwo katã wɔ
Exodus12:51 Gbemagbe Yehowa kplɔ Israel-viwo ƒe amehawo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi.
Exodus13:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus13:2 Kɔ ŋgɔgbeviwo katã ŋuti nam
Exodus13:3 Tete Mose gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Miɖo ŋku ŋkeke sia
Exodus13:4 Egbee mieʋu
Exodus13:5 Ne Yehowa akplɔ wò ava Kanaanitɔwo
Exodus13:6 Ŋkeke adre sɔŋ naɖu abolo maʋamaʋã
Exodus13:7 Abolo maʋamaʋã miaɖu ŋkeke adre sɔŋ
Exodus13:8 Gbemagbe naxlẽe afia viwòŋutsuwo bena: Ale Yehowa wɔ nam
Exodus13:9 Eye wòanye dzesi na wò anɔ wò asi ŋu kple ŋkuɖodzinu anɔ wò ŋgonu
Exodus13:10 Eyata naɖo ŋku ɖoɖo sia dzi ɖe eƒe ɣeyiɣi dzi
Exodus13:11 Ne Yehowa akplɔ wò ava Kanaanitɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi
Exodus13:12 ekema natsɔ nusianu
Exodus13:13 Eye natsɔ alẽ aɖɔ li tedzi ƒe ŋgɔgbevi; hafi ne mèɖɔ lii o la
Exodus13:14 Eye ne viwòŋutsu ava bia wò bena: esia gɔme ɖe mahã la
Exodus13:15 Esi Farao sẽ tame be
Exodus13:16 Eye wòanye dzesi anɔ wò asi ŋu kple ŋgoblanu anɔ wò ŋgonu
Exodus13:17 Esi Farao ɖe asi le dukɔa ŋu la
Exodus13:18 Eyata Mawu kplɔ dukɔ la to gbedzimɔ heyi Avaƒu la nu; eye Israel-viwo bia akpa hafi ʋu tso Egipte.
Exodus13:19 Eye Mose ho Yosef ƒe ƒuwo ɖe asi; elabena eka atam na Israel-viwo gblɔ bena: Ne Mawu va ɖo ŋku mia dzi la
Exodus13:20 Eye woho tso Sukot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Etam le gbedzi la me.
Exodus13:21 Le ŋkeke me la Yehowa zɔa wo ŋgɔ le alilikpo dodoa ɖe me
Exodus13:22 Ŋkeke me la alilikpo dodo la medzona le dukɔ la gbɔ o
Exodus14:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus14:2 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena
Exodus14:3 Elabena Farao agblɔ le Israel-viwo ŋu be: Wotre mɔ le anyigba la dzi
Exodus14:4 Eye mana Farao ƒe dzime nasẽ
Exodus14:5 Esi wogblɔ na Egipte-fia bena
Exodus14:6 Tete wòna wodzra eƒe tasiaɖamwo ɖo
Exodus14:7 Eye wolia tasiaɖam alafa ade kpe ɖe Egiptetɔwo ƒe tasiaɖam bubuawo ŋu
Exodus14:8 Eye Yehowa na Egipte-fia Farao ƒe dzime sẽ
Exodus14:9 Eye Egiptetɔwo kple Farao ƒe sɔwo
Exodus14:10 Esi Farao gogo wo
Exodus14:11 eye wogblɔ na Mose bena: Esi yɔdo mele Egipte o ta
Exodus14:12 Menye esia mienɔa gbɔgblɔm na wò le Egipte bena: ɖe asi le mía ŋu míasubɔ Egiptetɔwo ko
Exodus14:13 Ke Mose gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Migavɔ̃ o
Exodus14:14 Yehowa le aʋa wo ge ɖe mia nu
Exodus14:15 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Nukaŋuti nèle ɣli dom le yɔyem? Gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena
Exodus14:16 Ke wò la tsɔ wò atikplɔ
Exodus14:17 Nye la mana Egiptetɔwo ƒe dzime nasẽ
Exodus14:18 Eye Egiptetɔwo adze sii bena
Exodus14:19 Tete mawudɔla
Exodus14:20 Eye wònɔ Egiptetɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ kple Israel ƒe aʋakɔ la dome
Exodus14:21 Eye Mose ɖo eƒe asi ɖe ƒu la dzi. Tete Yehowa na ɣedzeƒeya nyama ƒu la zã blibo la katã
Exodus14:22 Eye Israel-viwo zɔ ƒuƒuiƒe to ƒu la me
Exodus14:23 Eye Egiptetɔwo ti wo yome
Exodus14:24 Le fɔŋli la Yehowa le dzobibi kple alilikpo dodo me kpɔ Egiptetɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ dzi ɖa
Exodus14:25 Eye wòna woƒe tasiaɖamfɔwo gli
Exodus14:26 Ke Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Do wò asi ɖe ƒu la dzi
Exodus14:27 Tete Mose do eƒe asi ɖe ƒua dzi
Exodus14:28 Eye tsi la nyẽ zi va kpe
Exodus14:29 Ke Israel-viwo ya zɔ ƒuƒuiƒe to ƒu la me
Exodus14:30 Gbemagbe Yehowa ɖe Israel tso Egiptetɔwo si me
Exodus14:31 Eye Israel kpɔ ŋusẽ gã
Exodus15:1 Ɣemaɣi Mose kple Israel-viwo dzi ha sia na Yehowa bena: Madzi ha na Yehowa
Exodus15:2 Nye ŋusẽ kple kafukafuha enye Yehowa
Exodus15:3 Yehowa enye aʋawɔla
Exodus15:4 Ede Farao ƒe tasiaɖam kple eƒe aʋakɔ la ƒu
Exodus15:5 Ƒuɖɔɖɔ gbagba ɖe wo dzi
Exodus15:6 Yehowa
Exodus15:7 Ewo nu tsu geɖe
Exodus15:8 Wò ŋɔti me gbɔgbɔ na tsiawo ƒo kɔ
Exodus15:9 Futɔ la gblɔ be: Mati wo yome
Exodus15:10 Eɖo ƒuƒu
Exodus15:11 Yehowa
Exodus15:12 Edo wo nuɖusi ɖa
Exodus15:13 Eve wò dukɔ la nu hekplɔ wo
Exodus15:14 Esi dukɔwo see la
Exodus15:15 Ɣemaɣi la Edom-fiawo ɖi vo
Exodus15:16 Vɔvɔ̃ kple ŋɔdzi lé wo
Exodus15:17 Ekplɔ wo yii
Exodus15:18 Yehowa aɖu fia ɖaa tegbetegbe.
Exodus15:19 Elabena esi Farao ƒe sɔwo
Exodus15:20 Eye nyɔnu nyagblɔla Miryam. Aron nɔvinyɔnu
Exodus15:21 Eye Miryam ɖo ha la ɖa bena: Midzi ha na Yehowa
Exodus15:22 Emegbe Mose na Israel-viwo ho tso Avaƒu la nu heva Surgbedzi. Eye wozɔ gbea dzi ŋkeke etɔ̃
Exodus15:23 Eye wovɔ Mara
Exodus15:24 Eye dukɔ la li Mose ŋu gblɔ bena: Nuka no ge míala?
Exodus15:25 Ke eya do ɣli yɔ Yehowa
Exodus15:26 gblɔ bena: Ne eɖo to Yehowa
Exodus15:27 Eyome wova Elim. Afima vudo wuieve kple deti blaadre le; eye woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe afima le tsia gbɔ.
Exodus16:1 Emegbe woho tso Elim
Exodus16:2 Eye Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la li Mose kple Aron ŋu le gbea dzi
Exodus16:3 eye Israel-viwo gblɔ na wo bena: Ɖe Yehowa na míeku le Egipte-nyigba dzi
Exodus16:4 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus16:5 Eye ne woada nusi wofɔ va aƒe me le ŋkeke adeagbe la
Exodus16:6 Eye Mose kple Aron gblɔ na Israel-viwo katã bena: Fiẽ la miadze sii bena
Exodus16:7 eye ŋdi la míakpɔ Yehowa
Exodus16:8 Eye Mose gblɔ bena: Fiẽ la Yehowa ana lã mi miaɖu
Exodus16:9 Eye Mose gblɔ na Aron bena: Gblɔ na Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la bena: Mite va Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Exodus16:10 Esi Aron ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo ƒe ha bliboa la
Exodus16:11 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Exodus16:12 Mese Israel-viwo ƒe liʋĩliʋĩlilĩ la. Gblɔ na wo be: Fiẽ la miaɖu lã
Exodus16:13 Le fiẽ la tegliwo dzo va nyẽ tsyɔ asaɖa la
Exodus16:14 Esi afu la kɔ ɖa la
Exodus16:15 Eye esi Israel-viwo kpɔe la
Exodus16:16 Se
Exodus16:17 Eye Israel-viwo wɔ nenema; amea ɖewo fɔe fũ
Exodus16:18 Eye wotsɔ gomer dzidzee; ke amesi fɔe fũ la
Exodus16:19 Eye Mose gblɔ na wo bena: Amea ɖeke megagblẽ ɖeke ɖiŋu nake ɖe edzi o!
Exodus16:20 Ke womeɖo to Mose o
Exodus16:21 Ale wofɔnɛ ŋdi sia ŋdi; amesiame ɖe eƒe ɖuɖu nu
Exodus16:22 Ke le ŋkeke adeagbe la wolɔa nuɖuɖu la teƒe eve
Exodus16:23 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Etsɔ nye dzudzɔgbe
Exodus16:24 Eye wodae ɖi ŋu ke ɖe edzi
Exodus16:25 Eye Mose gblɔ bena: Miɖu eya egbea
Exodus16:26 Ŋkeke ade miafɔe; ke ŋkeke adrelia enye dzudzɔgbe
Exodus16:27 Eye le ŋkeke adreagbe la amea ɖewo tso dukɔ la me yi efɔ ge
Exodus16:28 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Zi nenie miagbe toɖoɖo nye sewo kple nye ɖoɖowo mahã?
Exodus16:29 Mikpɔ ɖa Yehowa na dzudzɔgbe mi
Exodus16:30 Ale dukɔ la dzudzɔ eɖokui le ŋkeke adrelia dzi.
Exodus16:31 Eye Israeltɔwo na ŋkɔe be man; ele abe xetsetse ene hele ɣie; eye wòvivina abe tatali
Exodus16:32 Eye Mose gblɔ bena: Se
Exodus16:33 Eye Mose gblɔ na Aron bena: Tsɔ zevia ɖe
Exodus16:34 Eye Aron tsɔe dzra ɖo ɖe seawo gbɔ
Exodus16:35 Eye Israel-viwo ɖu man la ƒe blane
Exodus16:36 Gomer ɖeka enye eta ƒe mamã ewolia ɖeka.
Exodus17:1 Eye Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la ho tso Sin-gbedzi hele teƒeleƒewo tom
Exodus17:2 Tete dukɔ la wɔ dzre kple Mose
Exodus17:3 Eye tsikɔ wu dukɔ la le afima. Eye dukɔ la ti Mose ŋu gblɔ bena: Nukaŋuti nèkplɔ mí tso Egipte
Exodus17:4 Tete Mose do ɣli yɔ Yehowa bena: Nuka mawɔ na dukɔ sia? Esusɔ vie ko woafɔ kpe aƒum!
Exodus17:5 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Dze dukɔ la ŋgɔ
Exodus17:6 Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus17:7 Eye wona ŋkɔ teƒe la bena: Masa kple Meriba. Elabena Israel-viwo wɔ dzre
Exodus17:8 Esia megbe Amalekitɔwo va wɔ aʋa kple Israel le Refidim.
Exodus17:9 Tete Mose gblɔ na Yosua bena: Tia ŋutsuwo kpe ɖe ŋuwò
Exodus17:10 Eye Yosua wɔ
Exodus17:11 Eye ne Mose kɔ eƒe asi dzi la
Exodus17:12 Ke esi alɔ ku ɖe Mose ŋu la
Exodus17:13 Eye Yosua ɖu Amalek kple eƒe aʋakɔ dzi kple yi.
Exodus17:14 Eve Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ŋlɔ nusia ɖe agbalẽ me hena ŋkuɖoɖo dzi
Exodus17:15 Eye Mose ɖi vɔsamlekpui
Exodus17:16 Eye wogblɔ bena: Meta Yehowa ƒe zikpui Yehowa ewo aʋa kple Amalek tegbetegbe.
Exodus18:1 Eye Midian-nunɔla Yetro
Exodus18:2 Tete Mose to Yetro kple Mose srɔ̃ Zipora
Exodus18:3 kple viaŋutsu eveawo
Exodus18:4 Evelia ƒe ŋkɔ nye Eliezer. Elabena fofonye ƒe Mawu la kpe de ŋunye
Exodus18:5 Eye Mose to Yetro kple viaŋutsuwo kpakple srɔ̃a wova Mose gbɔ le gbea dzi
Exodus18:6 Eye wòda ame ɖo ɖe Mose gbɔ be: Nye towo Yetro kple srɔ̃wò kpakple viaŋutsu eveawo míegbɔna gbɔwò.
Exodus18:7 Tete Mose yi ɖakpe toa
Exodus18:8 Eyome Mose xlẽ nusiwo katã Yehowa wɔ Farao kple Egiptetɔwo le Israel ta
Exodus18:9 Eye Yetro kpɔ dzidzɔ le nu nyui
Exodus18:10 Eye Yetro gblɔ bena: Woakafu Yehowa
Exodus18:11 Fifi ko menyae bena
Exodus18:12 Eyome Mose to
Exodus18:13 Esi ŋu ke la
Exodus18:14 Ke esi Mose to kpɔ dɔ
Exodus18:15 Mose ɖo ŋu na toa bena: Dukɔ la va gbɔnye
Exodus18:16 Ne nyaa ɖe le wo si la
Exodus18:17 Tete Mose to gblɔ ne bena: Menyo be
Exodus18:18 Ɖeɖi ate wò ŋutɔ kple dukɔ
Exodus18:19 Eyata ɖo to nye gbe
Exodus18:20 Ɖe seawo kple ɖoɖoawo me na wo
Exodus18:21 Tia ŋutsu zãzɛwo le dukɔ la dome
Exodus18:22 bena woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na dukɔ la ɣesiaɣi
Exodus18:23 Ne èwɔ alea
Exodus18:24 Eye Mose ɖo to toa ƒe gbe
Exodus18:25 Eye Mose tia ŋutsu zãzɛwo le Israel-viwo dome heɖo amegãwoe ɖe dukɔ la nu. Ɖewo de ame akpe nu
Exodus18:26 Eye wodrɔ̃a ʋɔnu na dukɔ la ɣesiaɣi
Exodus18:27 Emegbe Mose ɖo toa ɖa
Exodus19:1 Esi Israel-viwo ʋu tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la ɣleti etɔ̃ megbe
Exodus19:2 Esi woho tso Refidim la
Exodus19:3 Ke Mose yi Mawu gbɔ le to la dzi. Eye Yehowa yɔe tso to la dzi gblɔ bena: Ale nagblɔ na Yakob-ƒomeawo
Exodus19:4 Mia ŋutɔwo miekpɔ nusi mewo Egiptetɔwo
Exodus19:5 Azɔ ne míaɖo to nye gbe
Exodus19:6 Eye mianye; nunɔlawo ƒe fiaduƒe kple dukɔ kɔkɔe nam! Esiawo nye nya
Exodus19:7 Eye Mose yi ɖayɔ dukɔ la ƒe ame tsitsiawo hegblɔ nya
Exodus19:8 Tete dukɔ blibo la ɖo ŋu yoo bena: Nya
Exodus19:9 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Mava gbɔwò le alilikpo dodoa ɖe me
Exodus19:10 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Yi dukɔ la gbɔ
Exodus19:11 ne wòasu te le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe; elabena le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe Yehowa aɖi va Sinai-to la dzi le dukɔ blibo la ƒe ŋku me.
Exodus19:12 Ɖo liƒo na dukɔ la godoo
Exodus19:13 Ne asia ɖe aka eŋu la
Exodus19:14 Tete Mose ɖi tso toa dzi va dukɔ la gbɔ
Exodus19:15 Eye wògblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Misu te vaseɖe ŋkeke etɔ̃lia dzi; amea ɖeke megado nyɔnu gbɔ o.
Exodus19:16 Eye le ŋkeke etɔ̃lia ƒe ŋdi kanya la dzi de asi gbeɖeɖe me
Exodus19:17 Eye Mose kplɔ dukɔ la tso asaɖa la me yi Mawu kpe ge
Exodus19:18 Eye dzudzɔ bia Sinai-to blibo la
Exodus19:19 Eye kpẽawo nu le sesẽm ɖe dzi. Mose ƒo nu
Exodus19:20 Tete Yehowa ɖi va Sinai-to la tame
Exodus19:21 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ɖi yi ɖaxlɔ̃ nu dukɔ la bena
Exodus19:22 Eye nunɔla
Exodus19:23 Mose ɖo ŋu na Yehowa bena: Dukɔ la mate ŋu aha Sinai-to la o
Exodus19:24 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ɖi yi
Exodus19:25 Tete Mose ɖi yi dukɔ la gbɔ
Exodus20:1 Eye Mawu to nya siawo katã bena:
Exodus20:2 Nyee nye Yehowa wò Mawu
Exodus20:3 Mawu bubua ɖeke megunɔ asiwò kpe ɖe ŋunye o.
Exodus20:4 Megawɔ legbaa ɖeke na ɖokuiwò o. Megawɔ nusiwo le dziƒo
Exodus20:5 Megade ta agu na wo o
Exodus20:6 ke mevea ame akpe nane
Exodus20:7 Megayɔ Yehowa
Exodus20:8 Ɖo ŋku dzudzɔgbe la dzi
Exodus20:9 Ŋkeke ade nawɔ dɔ
Exodus20:10 Ke ŋkeke adrelia enye dzudzɔgbe na Yehowa
Exodus20:11 Elabena ŋkeke ade mee Yehowa wɔ dzi kple anyigba
Exodus20:12 Bu fofowò kple dawo
Exodus20:13 Megawu ame o.
Exodus20:14 Megawɔ ahasi o.
Exodus20:15 Megafi fi o.
Exodus20:16 Megaɖi aʋatsoɖase le hawòvi ŋuti o.
Exodus20:17 Megabiã ŋu ɖe hawòvi ƒe aƒe dzi o. Megabiã ŋu ɖe hawòvi srɔ̃
Exodus20:18 Esi dukɔ blibo la se dziɖegbe kple kpẽawo ƒe ɖiɖi
Exodus20:19 Eye wogblɔ na Mose bena: Wò la ƒo nu kpli mí
Exodus20:20 Mose gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Migavɔ̃ o
Exodus20:21 Ale dukɔ la tsi tre ɖe adzɔge ke; ke Mose te ɖe alilikpo dodo
Exodus20:22 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ale nagblɔ na Israel-viwo enye si: Mia ŋutɔwo miekpɔ bena
Exodus20:23 Migawɔ mawu bubua ɖeke kpe ɖe ŋunye o; migawɔ ɖeke o
Exodus20:24 Tso anyi ɖi vɔsamlekpui nam
Exodus20:25 Ne ebe
Exodus20:26 Megaflɔ atrakpui de nye vɔsamlekpui dzi o
Exodus21:1 Esiawo nye ɖoɖo
Exodus21:2 Ne èƒle Hebriŋutsua ɖe kluvii la
Exodus21:3 Nenye eya ɖekae va la
Exodus21:4 Nenye eƒe aƒetɔe ɖe srɔ̃ ne
Exodus21:5 Ke ne kluvi la gblɔ be: Melɔ̃ nye aƒetɔ
Exodus21:6 ekema eƒe aƒetɔ nakplɔe ava Mawu ƒe ŋku me
Exodus21:7 Ne amea ɖe dzra vianyɔnu kosii la
Exodus21:8 Ne eƒe nu menyo eƒe aƒetɔ ŋu o
Exodus21:9 Ne etsɔe na viaŋutsu la
Exodus21:10 Ke ne eya ŋutɔ gaɖe nyɔnu bubu kpe ɖe eŋu la
Exodus21:11 Ne mewo nu etɔ̃ siawo nɛ o la
Exodus21:12 Ne amea ɖe ƒo ame woku la
Exodus21:13 Ne amea ɖe mebua o
Exodus21:14 Gake ne amea ɖe bua wu nɔvia ƒe aye me la
Exodus21:15 Amesi ke aƒo fofoa alo dada la
Exodus21:16 Amesi ke afi lãme adzra
Exodus21:17 Amesi ke aƒo fi ade fofoa alo dada la
Exodus21:18 Ne ŋutsuwo le dzre wɔm
Exodus21:19 emegbe wògafɔ do go le tɔtɔm ɖe ati ŋu la
Exodus21:20 Ne amea ɖe ƒo eƒe kluvi alo kosivi kple kpo
Exodus21:21 Ke ne eganɔ agbe ŋkeke ɖeka alo eve hafi la
Exodus21:22 Ne ŋutsuwo le dzre wɔm
Exodus21:23 Ke ne vɔ̃a ɖe dze eme la
Exodus21:24 ŋku ɖe ŋku teƒe
Exodus21:25 dzobi ɖe dzobi teƒe
Exodus21:26 Ne amea ɖe ƒo ŋku na eƒe kluvi alo eƒe kosivi wògbã la
Exodus21:27 Eye ne amea ɖe ŋe aɖu na eƒe kluvi alo eƒe kosivi la
Exodus21:28 Ne nyia ɖe tu dzo ŋutsu alo nyɔnu woku la
Exodus21:29 Ke ne nyi la dia dzotutu ame
Exodus21:30 Ke ne wodo hlɔ̃le nɛ la
Exodus21:31 Ne etu dzo ŋutsuvi alo nyɔnuvia ɖe la
Exodus21:32 Ne nyi la tu dzo kluvi alo kosivi la
Exodus21:33 Ne amea ɖe ʋu doa ɖe nu da ɖi
Exodus21:34 ekema vudoa tɔ
Exodus21:35 Ne amea ɖe ƒe nyi tu dzo nɔvia ƒe nyi wòku la
Exodus21:36 Ke ne wonyae bena nyi la dia dzotutu ame
Exodus21:37 Ne amea ɖe fi nyi alo alẽ eye wòwui
Exodus22:1 Ne wole fiafitɔa ɖe le fi dzi
Exodus22:2 Ke nenye ŋkeke mee la
Exodus22:3 Nenye nyi tedzi alo alẽ wòfi
Exodus22:4 Ne amea ɖe kplɔ lãwo yi eƒe boƒo alo weingble me
Exodus22:5 Ne dzo dze gbe
Exodus22:6 Ne amea ɖe dzra ga alo nuwo ɖo de nɔvia gbɔ
Exodus22:7 Gake ne womekpɔ fiafi la o la
Exodus22:8 Ne nyi
Exodus22:9 Ne amea ɖe tsɔ tedzi
Exodus22:10 ekema woata Yehowa na nɔvia be
Exodus22:11 Nenye ɖe wofii le egbɔ la
Exodus22:12 Nenye lãa ɖee vuvui la ekema wòatsɔ kukua ava fia abe ɖase ene
Exodus22:13 Ne amea ɖe ɣe lã le nɔvia si
Exodus22:14 Ke ne lã la tɔ le eteƒe la
Exodus22:15 Ne amea ɖe ble ɖetugbi
Exodus22:16 Ke ne fofoa gbe be
Exodus22:17 Megana nyɔnu dzotɔwo nanɔ agbe o.
Exodus22:18 Amesiame
Exodus22:19 Amesi sa vɔ na mawu bubu wo
Exodus22:20 Megate amedzro ɖe anyi o eye megasẽ ŋuta le eŋu o; elabena miawo hã míenye amedzrowo kpɔ le Egipte-nyigba dzi.
Exodus22:21 Migate ahosiwo kple tsyɔ̃eviwo ɖe anyi o.
Exodus22:22 Ne ete wo ɖe anyi
Exodus22:23 eye nye dɔmedzoe abi ɖe mia ŋu
Exodus22:24 Ne edo ga na nye dukɔ la dome ame dahea ɖe si le gbɔwò la
Exodus22:25 Ne exɔ hawòvi ƒe avɔ awɔbae la
Exodus22:26 elabena eyae koe nye avɔ le esi
Exodus22:27 Megado ɖiŋu na Mawu o
Exodus22:28 Megamiã asi ɖe wò agblemenu ʋaʋãwo kple wò ami dzi o
Exodus22:29 Nenema ke nawɔ wò nyiwo kple alẽwo hãe; ŋkeke adre wòanɔ dada gbɔ
Exodus22:30 Ame kɔkɔewo míenye nam. Eyata migaɖu lã
Exodus23:1 Megasa sakpli o. Wò nu meganɔ ŋutasẽla ƒe nya me
Exodus23:2 Meganɔ ha yome le nu vlo wɔwɔ me o
Exodus23:3 Megaɖe ami ɖe ame dahe ƒe nya o.
Exodus23:4 Ne èkpɔ wò ketɔ ƒe nyi alo tedzi tre mɔ la
Exodus23:5 Ne agba nɔ wò futɔ ƒe tedzi dzi nèkpɔ la
Exodus23:6 Megatrɔ ame dahe ƒe nya bu anyi le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe o.
Exodus23:7 Ɖe nu le aʋatsonyawo me; megawu amesi ƒe nya dzɔ
Exodus23:8 Megaxɔ zãnu o
Exodus23:9 Migase ŋuta le amedzrowo ŋu o
Exodus23:10 Ƒe ade naƒã nu ɖewo anyigba dzi
Exodus23:11 Ke le ƒe adrelia me la na wòagbɔ ɖe eme
Exodus23:12 Ŋkeke aɖe nawɔ wò dɔwo
Exodus23:13 Midzra nya sia nya
Exodus23:14 Zi etɔ̃ naɖu ŋkekenyuie nam le ƒe ɖeka me.
Exodus23:15 Ɖo ŋku abolo maʋamaʋã ŋkeke la dzi; ŋkeke adre sɔŋ naɖu abolo maʋamaʋã le nuŋeɣleti ƒe ŋkeke
Exodus23:16 Ne èdze nusiwo nèƒã ɖe agble me la ŋeŋe gɔme la
Exodus23:17 Wò ŋutsuwo katã nava wò Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe ŋku me zi etɔ̃ le ƒe ɖeka me.
Exodus23:18 Megatsɔ nye vɔsalã ƒe ʋu sa vɔe le afisi amɔwɔ ʋaʋã le o
Exodus23:19 Tsɔ wò agblemenu gbãtɔ
Exodus23:20 Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus23:21 Kpɔ nyuie le eŋu
Exodus23:22 Ne eɖo to eƒe gbe
Exodus23:23 Ne nye ɖɔla dze ŋgɔwò
Exodus23:24 ekema megade ta agu na woƒe mawuwo alo asubɔ wo o
Exodus23:25 Ne miesubɔ Yehowa
Exodus23:26 Fu mage le nyɔnuwo ƒo
Exodus23:27 Madɔ vɔvɔ̃
Exodus23:28 Madɔ téamekplɔɖoewo ɖe ŋgɔwò
Exodus23:29 Gake nyemanyẽ wo katã le dowòme le ƒe ɖeka me o
Exodus23:30 Manɔ wo nyãm le mia ŋu ʋeʋeʋe
Exodus23:31 Eye mana wò liƒowo natso Avaƒu la nu vaseɖe Filistitɔwo ƒe ƒu la nu
Exodus23:32 Migabia nu kpli wo alo naxɔ woƒe mawuwo o.
Exodus23:33 Womeganɔ wò anyigba dzi o
Exodus24:1 Eye wògblɔ na Mose bena: Lia toa va Yehowa gbɔ
Exodus24:2 Eye Mose ɖeɖe nate ɖe Yehowa ŋu
Exodus24:3 Eye Mose yi ɖagblɔ Yehowa ƒe nyawo katã kple ɖoɖoawo katã na dukɔ la. Tete dukɔ la katã ɖo ŋu yoo gblɔ bena: Nya
Exodus24:4 Eye Mose ŋlɔ Yehowa ƒe nyawo katã
Exodus24:5 Eye Mose dɔ Israel-viwo dome ɖekakpuiwo ɖa
Exodus24:6 Eye Mose ku ʋu la ƒe afã ɖe ze me
Exodus24:7 Eye wotsɔ agbalẽ
Exodus24:8 Eyome Mose
Exodus24:9 Esia megbe Mose kple Aron
Exodus24:10 eye wokpɔ Israel ƒe Mawu la
Exodus24:11 Ke mewɔ naneke Israel-viwo ƒe ame ŋkutawo o
Exodus24:12 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Va gbɔnye le to la dzi
Exodus24:13 Tete Mose tso
Exodus24:14 Eye wògblɔ na ame tsitsiawo bena: Mina afisia
Exodus24:15 Esi Mose yi toa dzi la
Exodus24:16 Eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe va nɔ Sinai-to la dzi
Exodus24:17 Eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe dze na Israel-viwo le toa tame abe dzobibi ene.
Exodus24:18 Eye Mose to alilikpoa me lia to la
Exodus25:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus25:2 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena
Exodus25:3 Nusiwo miadzɔ le wo si la wonye: Sika
Exodus25:4 aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple aɖabɛ dzĩtɔ ƒe ka
Exodus25:5 agbogbalẽ
Exodus25:6 Ami ɖe akaɖiniedede ŋu kple ami ʋeʋẽe hena sisi kple numeme ʋeʋẽe.
Exodus25:7 Soham-kpe kple kpe xɔasiwo
Exodus25:8 Eye woawɔ nɔƒe kɔkɔe nam
Exodus25:9 Alesi metia nɔƒe la tutume kple eŋuti nuwo katã wɔwɔ wò la
Exodus25:10 Eye woatsɔ xé akpa aɖakae
Exodus25:11 Eye nafa sika nyuitɔ ɖe eŋu; nafae ɖe eme kple ekɔgo
Exodus25:12 Emegbe nakɔ sikasigɛ ene
Exodus25:13 Eyome natsɔ xé akpa kpowo
Exodus25:14 Eye natsɔ kpoawo aƒo ɖe asigɛ
Exodus25:15 Kpoawo natsi asigɛawo me le aɖaka la ŋu
Exodus25:16 Eye natsɔ se
Exodus25:17 Tsɔ sika nyuitɔ wɔ nutsyɔnu ɖe nutuvi la dzi; eƒe didime nanye abɔklugui eve kple afã
Exodus25:18 Eye natsɔ sika atu Kerubi eve ɖe nutsyɔnu la ƒe goawo kple eve dzi.
Exodus25:19 Wɔ Kerubi ɖeka ɖe go si dzi
Exodus25:20 Eye Kerubiawo naklẽ aʋala aɖo ta dzi
Exodus25:21 Eye natsɔ nutsyɔnu la aɖo aɖaka la tame
Exodus25:22 Kerubi eve
Exodus25:23 Emegbe natsɔ xé akpa kplɔ̃e; eƒe didime nanye abɔklugui eve
Exodus25:24 Fa sika nyuitɔ ɖe eŋu
Exodus25:25 Eye naɖo to nɛ akpe ɖo
Exodus25:26 Tsɔ sika wɔ asigɛ ene
Exodus25:27 Asigɛawo nate ɖe toawo ŋu
Exodus25:28 Tsɔ xé kpa kpewo
Exodus25:29 Eye natsɔ sika nyuitɔ awɔ eŋu gbawo
Exodus25:30 Eye natsɔ abolo aɖo kplɔ la dzi le ŋkunye me ɖaa.
Exodus25:31 Eyome natsɔ sika nyuitɔ awɔ akaɖitii; woatu akaɖitia
Exodus25:32 Alo ade nanɔ akaɖiti la ƒe axawo dzi; alɔ etɔ̃ nanɔ axa ɖeka
Exodus25:33 Seƒoƒo etɔ kple woƒe tamekukuwo nanɔ alɔ ɖeka ŋuti
Exodus25:34 Eye seƒoƒo ene kple woƒe tamekukuwo nanɔ atia ŋutɔ ŋuti.
Exodus25:35 Seƒoƒo ɖeka kple etamekuku nanɔ alɔ eveve kpeƒe le ati la ŋu.
Exodus25:36 Kɔawo kple alɔavvo nawɔ ɖeka ɖe ati la ŋu; sika nyuitɔ woatso atu akaɖiti lae blibo.
Exodus25:37 Emegbe nawɔ akaɖigbɛ adre ada ɖe wo dzi
Exodus25:38 Eye natso sika nyuitɔ awɔ ɖovulãnuwo kple ganu suewoe.
Exodus25:39 Woatso sika nyuitɔ talento ɖeka awɔ akaɖiti la kple eŋu nuawo katãe.
Exodus25:40 Kpɔ dzi
Exodus26:1 Tsɔ kuntru ewo wɔ nɔƒe la; eye aɖaŋuvɔlɔ̃lawo natsɔ ɖetí ɣi dada
Exodus26:2 Kuntru ɖeka ƒe didime nanye abɔklugui blave vɔ enyi
Exodus26:3 Woatɔ kuntruawo akpe ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu atɔ̃atɔ̃.
Exodus26:4 Eye natɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ƒe ka kpukpuiwo de kuntru kpekpea ƒe go ɖeka me
Exodus26:5 Tɔ ka kpuspui blaatɔ̃ ɖe kuntru kpekpeawo ƒe go ɖekaɖekawo me
Exodus26:6 Eye natso sika atu ganuvi blaatɔ̃ aku kawo
Exodus26:7 Eyome natsɔ gbɔ̃fu alɔ̃ kuntru wuiɖekɛ
Exodus26:8 Kuntru ɖeka ƒe didime nanye abɔklugui blaetɔ̃
Exodus26:9 Natɔ Kuntru atɔ̃ akpe vovo
Exodus26:10 Emegbe natɔ ka kpukpui blaatɔ̃ ɖe kuntru kpekpea ƒe go ɖeka me
Exodus26:11 Eyome natu akɔbliganuvi blaatɔ̃
Exodus26:12 Eye agbadɔkuntru la ƒe go ɖeka si tsi edzi le agbadɔa megbe la
Exodus26:13 Eye kuntru
Exodus26:14 Emegbe natso agbogbalẽ
Exodus26:15 Esia yome natsɔ xè adze ʋuƒo
Exodus26:16 Ʋuƒo ɖeka ƒe didime nanye abɔklugui ewo
Exodus26:17 Eye nayrɔ ʋuƒo ɖeka gɔme wòadze eve
Exodus26:18 Nawɔ ʋuƒowo hena agbadɔ la; ʋuƒo blave nano dziehe gome.
Exodus26:19 Eye natso klosalo awɔ afɔ blane ɖe ʋuƒo blaveawo te; afɔ eve nanɔ ʋuƒo ɖesiaɖe ƒe nu eveawo gɔme.
Exodus26:20 Eyome nawɔ ʋuƒo blave hena agbadɔ la ƒe anyiehe gome.
Exodus26:21 Eye natsɔ klosalo awɔ afɔ blane ɖe wo gome
Exodus26:22 Eye nadze ʋuƒo ade hena agbadɔ la ƒe axa
Exodus26:23 Eye nagadze ʋuƒo eve hena dzogoe
Exodus26:24 Eye woakpe wo gome kple wo tame ɖe ʋuƒoawo ŋu
Exodus26:25 Wo katã le ʋuƒo enyi
Exodus26:26 Emegbe natsɔ xé akpa gameti atɔ̃ hena ʋuƒo
Exodus26:27 gameti atɔ̃ hã na ʋuƒo
Exodus26:28 Eye gameti dometɔ nato ʋuƒoawo titina
Exodus26:29 Fa sika ɖe ʋuƒoawo ŋu
Exodus26:30 Tu agbadɔ la ɖe nɔnɔme
Exodus26:31 Aɖaŋuvɔlɔlawo natsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ ƒe ka
Exodus26:32 Eye naku wo ɖe xésɔti ene
Exodus26:33 Ku xɔmetsovɔ la ɖe kuntru gbãtɔwo ƒe kpeƒe
Exodus26:34 Eye natsɔ nutsyɔnu la ada ɖe nubablaɖaka la dzi le kɔkɔeƒewo ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la me.
Exodus26:35 Tsa kplɔ̃ la da ɖe xɔmetsovɔa ŋgɔ le anyiehe gome
Exodus26:36 Eye avɔlɔ̃lawo natsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ ƒe ka
Exodus26:37 Emegbe natsɔ xé akpa sɔti atɔ̃ hena avɔ la; fa sika ɖe wo ŋu
Exodus27:1 Emegbe natsɔ xé awɔ vɔsamlekpui; eƒe didime nanye abɔklugui atɔ̃
Exodus27:2 Wɔ dzowo ɖe eƒe dzogoe eneawo dzi; dzoawo nawɔ ɖeka kplii
Exodus27:3 Eye nawɔ afilɔnuwo
Exodus27:4 Eye tsɔ akɔbli wɔ adzralawo abe ɖɔ ene
Exodus27:5 Eye naklã adzrala la ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ŋu tso ele vaseɖe vɔsamlekpui la titina.
Exodus27:6 Eyome natsɔ xé akpa kpowo hena vɔsamlekpui la
Exodus27:7 Eye woatsɔ kpoawo aƒo ɖe asigɛawo me
Exodus27:8 Ʋuƒo natsɔ awɔe
Exodus27:9 Eye natɔ kpɔ ɖe agbadɔ la ŋu. Tsɔ ɖeti ɣi dada lɔ̃ avɔ hena kpɔ la; kpɔ la ƒe dziehekpa nadidi abɔklugui alafa ɖeka.
Exodus27:10 Wɔ kpɔti blave
Exodus27:11 Nenema ke anyiehekpa hã ƒe avɔ nadiɖi abɔklugui alafa ɖeka
Exodus27:12 Avɔ
Exodus27:13 Kpɔ la nakeke le ɣedzeƒe gome abɔklugui blaatɔ̃.
Exodus27:14 Avɔ
Exodus27:15 Eye avɔ
Exodus27:16 Esia megbe avɔlɔ̃lawo natsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ
Exodus27:17 Kpɔti
Exodus27:18 Kpɔ la fe didime nanye abɔklugui alafa ɖeka
Exodus27:19 Nusiwo katã ŋu dɔ woawɔ le kpɔa me
Exodus27:20 De se na Israel-viwo
Exodus27:21 le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Exodus28:1 Eye naɖe nɔviwò Aron kple viaŋutsuwo le Israel-viwo dome ava gbɔwòe
Exodus28:2 Tɔ awu kɔkɔewo na nɔviwò Aron
Exodus28:3 Eye gblɔ na amesiwo katã mede nunya tagbɔ na
Exodus28:4 Nusiwo woatɔ wonye: akɔtaɖonu
Exodus28:5 Eye woawɔ sika
Exodus28:6 Eye aɖaŋuvɔlɔ̃lawo natsɔ sika
Exodus28:7 Woaɖe nu eve de kɔmewu la ƒe abɔtawo kple eve ŋu
Exodus28:8 Eye woatso avɔ ma tɔgbe
Exodus28:9 Emegbe natsɔ soham-kpe eve aɖe Israel-viwo ƒe ŋkɔwo ɖe wo dzi;
Exodus28:10 naɖe ŋkɔ ade ɖe kpe ɖeka dzi
Exodus28:11 Kpekpalawo nakpae
Exodus28:12 Eye natsɔ kpe eveawo aɖo kɔmewu la ƒe abɔtawo
Exodus28:13 Eyome natsɔ sikaka aƒo gboe.
Exodus28:14 Eye natsɔ ka
Exodus28:15 Eye aɖaŋuvɔlɔ̃lawo natsɔ sika
Exodus28:16 Nawɔe ɖe dzogoe ene me
Exodus28:17 Eye natsɔ kpe xɔasiwo aɖo eŋu ɖe agbaka ene me. Agbaka gbãtɔ nanye karneol
Exodus28:18 agbaka evelia nanye rubin
Exodus28:19 agbaka etɔ̃lia nanye ligurio
Exodus28:20 eye agbaka enelia nanye krisolit
Exodus28:21 Kpeawo nanɔ wuieve ɖe Israel-viwo ƒe ŋkɔwo nu
Exodus28:22 Eye tsɔ ka
Exodus28:23 Emegbe natu sikasigɛ eve hena akɔtaɖonu la
Exodus28:24 eye nade sikakɔsɔkɔsɔ eveawo asigɛawo me le akɔtaɖonu la ƒe dzogoeawo dzi.
Exodus28:25 Eyome nade kɔsɔkɔsɔ eveawo ƒe nu eveawo gbo eveawo ŋu
Exodus28:26 Eye natu sikasigɛ eve
Exodus28:27 Emegbe nagatu sikasigɛ eve
Exodus28:28 Eye woagbe aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ƒe ka asa ɖe asigɛ
Exodus28:29 Ne Aron yi kɔkɔeƒea la
Exodus28:30 Eye natsɔ Urim kple Tumim ade akɔtaɖonu
Exodus28:31 Emegbe natsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ƒe ka ɖeɖe alɔ̃ dziwui
Exodus28:32 Eye woaɖe kɔme nɛ ɖe titina
Exodus28:33 Eyome natsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ ƒe ka kpakple ka dze awɔ yevuboɖawo ɖe awu la to godoo ava kpe
Exodus28:34 Sikanyawowoe ɖeka yevuboɖa ɖeka
Exodus28:35 Eye woanɔ Aron ŋu
Exodus28:36 Eye natsɔ sika nyuitɔ awɔ ŋgoblanu
Exodus28:37 Eye natsii ɖe aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ƒe ka ŋuti le tablanu la ŋu le ŋgɔ.
Exodus28:38 Eye wòanɔ Aron ƒe ŋgonu; ale Aron naxa vodada
Exodus28:39 Tso ɖeti ɣi lɔ̃ awutewui ʋlaya la kple tablanu la
Exodus28:40 Eyome nalɔ̃ awutewui ʋlaya
Exodus28:41 Ɖo atsyɔ̃ na nɔviwò Aron kple viaŋutsuwo
Exodus28:42 Eye natɔ agbotɛ ɣiwo na wo
Exodus28:43 Eye Aron kple viaŋutsuwo nadoe
Exodus29:1 Eye nusi nawɔ na wo
Exodus29:2 eye natsɔ wɔ memee aƒo abolo maʋamaʋà kple aboŋgo maʋamaʋã
Exodus29:3 Tsɔ wo de kusi me
Exodus29:4 Eye na bena
Exodus29:5 Fɔ awua wo vɛ
Exodus29:6 Bla tablanu la nɛ
Exodus29:7 Tso ami ko ɖe eƒe tame
Exodus29:8 Emegbe nana viaŋutsuawo nate va
Exodus29:9 Bla ali dzi na wo
Exodus29:10 He nyitsu la va Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ŋgɔ
Exodus29:11 Eye nawu nyitsu la le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Exodus29:12 Eye nade asibide nyitsu la ƒe ʋu me asisi ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ƒe dzowo ŋu
Exodus29:13 Eyome naɖe ami
Exodus29:14 Ke natɔ dzo nyitsu la ƒe lã
Exodus29:15 Emegbe nahe agbo ɖeka vɛ
Exodus29:16 eye nawu agbo la atsɔ eƒe ʋu awu ɖe vɔsamlekpui la dzi godoo ava kpe.
Exodus29:17 Eyome nafli agbo la ɖe eƒe ƒunuɖeƒeewo
Exodus29:18 Eye natɔ dzo agbo blibo la ɖe vɔsamlekpui la dzi; elabena numevɔsa wònye na Yehowa
Exodus29:19 Emegbe nahe agbo evelia vɛ
Exodus29:20 Eye nawu agbo la atsɔ eƒe ʋu asisi ɖe Aron kple viaŋutsuawo ƒe nuɖusi togboewo
Exodus29:21 Eye natsɔ ʋu
Exodus29:22 Eyome naɖe ami
Exodus29:23 Eye natsɔ abolo bɔbɔ ɖeka
Exodus29:24 eye natsɔ nuawo katã ade asiƒome na Aron kple viaŋutsuawo
Exodus29:25 Emegbe naxɔ nuawo le wo si ada ɖe vɔsalã la dzi le vɔsamlekpuia dzi
Exodus29:26 Ɖe agbo
Exodus29:27 Kɔ agbo
Exodus29:28 bena woanye Aron kple viaŋutsuawo to
Exodus29:29 Aron ƒe awu kɔkɔeawo nazu viaŋutsu
Exodus29:30 Viaŋutsuwo dometɔ
Exodus29:31 Ke naɖa agbo
Exodus29:32 Eye Aron kple viaŋutsuawo naɖu agbolã la kple abolo
Exodus29:33 Ale woaɖu nusi wotsɔ ɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa hafi ɖo wo
Exodus29:34 Ne ameɖovɔsalã la kple abolo la ƒe ɖe tsi anyi ŋu ke ɖe edzi la
Exodus29:35 Wɔ na Aron kple viaŋutsuawo pɛpɛpɛ
Exodus29:36 Gbesiagbe nawu nyitsu ɖeka hena nuvɔ̃ŋutivɔsa
Exodus29:37 Ŋkeke adre sɔŋ name avulénuwo le vɔsamlekpui la dzi
Exodus29:38 Eye nusiwo namè le vɔsamlekpuia dzi
Exodus29:39 Me alẽvi ɖeka le ŋdi
Exodus29:40 Eye natsɔ dzomi hin eneliawo ɖeka adzaba wɔ memee efa ewoliawo ɖeka
Exodus29:41 Mè alẽvi evelia le fiẽ me: eye nawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa
Exodus29:42 Esia enye gbesiagbe numevɔsa
Exodus29:43 Afima maɖe ɖokuinye afia Israel-viwo le
Exodus29:44 Makɔ agbadɔ la kple vɔsamlekpuia ŋu
Exodus29:45 Mana Israel-viwo dome
Exodus29:46 Eye wòadze sii be
Exodus30:1 Tso xe wo vɔsamlekpui
Exodus30:2 Eƒe didime nanye abɔklugui ɖeka
Exodus30:3 Fa sika nyuitɔ ɖe eŋuti
Exodus30:4 Eye nawɔ sikasigɛ eveve ɖe eƒe axawo kple eve dzi le atsiãdodo la te
Exodus30:5 Tsɔ xe kpa kpoawo
Exodus30:6 Eye natsɔe ada ɖe nubablaɖaka
Exodus30:7 Eye Aron natsɔ atike ʋeʋẽe ado dzudzɔ ɖe edzi
Exodus30:8 Eye ne Aron si akaɖigbɛawo le fiẽ la
Exodus30:9 Migatsɔ dzudzɔdonu bubua ɖeke va edzi migatsɔ numevɔsa alo nuɖuvɔsa va edzi o
Exodus30:10 Eye Aron natsɔ nuvɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsalã
Exodus30:11 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena;
Exodus30:12 Ne ètia Israel-viwo xlẽ la
Exodus30:13 Amesiwo woxlẽ la dome ɖesiaɖe nadzɔ sekel kɔkɔe atãafã. Gera blave enye sekel kɔkɔe ɖeka. Sekel afãafã wòadze na Yehowa.
Exodus30:14 Amesiame
Exodus30:15 Kesinɔtɔ mana awu o
Exodus30:16 Eye nagblẽ ga
Exodus30:17 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus30:18 Tsɔ akɔbli wɔ tsileze
Exodus30:19 Eye Aron kple viaŋutsuawo naklɔ woƒe asiwo kple afɔwo le eme.
Exodus30:20 Ne wole Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me yi ge la
Exodus30:21 Woaklɔ asiwo kple afɔwo
Exodus30:22 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus30:23 Tsɔ atike nyuitɔ
Exodus30:24 kotoklobo sekel kɔkɔe alafa atɔ̃ kple dzomi hin ɖeka:
Exodus30:25 eye natsɔ wo awɔ ami kokoe lae
Exodus30:26 Eye nasii ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la kple nubablaɖaka la
Exodus30:27 kplɔ̃ la kple eŋu nuwo
Exodus30:28 numevɔsamlekpui la kple eŋu nuwo kpakple tsileze la kple eƒe zɔ ŋuti.
Exodus30:29 Wɔ wo kɔkɔe
Exodus30:30 Eye nasi ami na Aron kple viaŋutsuawo awɔ wo kɔkɔe
Exodus30:31 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena: Ami kɔkɔe wòanye nam le miaƒe dzidzimeviwo dome.
Exodus30:32 Womasii na ame bubua ɖeke o
Exodus30:33 Ne amea ɖe wɔ etɔgbe alo wòna eƒe ɖe ame bubua ɖe la
Exodus30:34 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Tsɔ atike
Exodus30:35 Eye natsɔ wo awɔ dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe donui; natɔtɔ wo
Exodus30:36 Eye natu eƒe ɖe memee ada ɖe nubablaɖaka la ŋgɔ le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Exodus30:37 Migawɔ dzudzɔdonu
Exodus30:38 Ne amea ɖe wɔ etɔgbe
Exodus31:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus31:2 Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus31:3 eye metsɔ Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ
Exodus31:4 bena wòabu tame anya alesi wowɔa sika
Exodus31:5 anya alesi wòadze kpe hena nuwo me ɖeɖe
Exodus31:6 Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus31:7 Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la
Exodus31:8 kplɔ̃ kple eŋu nuwo
Exodus31:9 numevɔsamlekpui la kple eŋu nuwo katã
Exodus31:10 atsyɔ̃ɖowuawo kple nunɔla Aron ƒe awu kɔkɔeawo kpakple viaŋutsuawo ƒo awuwo
Exodus31:11 ami sisi la kple atike ʋeʋẽe
Exodus31:12 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus31:13 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena: Miɖo ŋku ne dzudzɔgbeawo dzi! Elabena dzesi wònye le mia kpli mi kpakple miaƒe dzidzimeviwo dome
Exodus31:14 Miɖo ŋku dzudzɔgbe la dzi
Exodus31:15 Ŋkeke ade woawɔ dɔ
Exodus31:16 Israel-viwo naɖo ŋku dzudzɔgbe la dzi
Exodus31:17 Dzesi wonye le mia kple Israel-viwo dome tegbee; elabena ŋkeke ade Yehowa wɔ dzi kple anyigba
Exodus31:18 Eye esi wòƒo nu kple Mose le Sinai-toa dzi vɔ la
Exodus32:1 Esi dukɔ la kpɔ bena: Mose mele gbɔgbɔm tso toa dzi o la
Exodus32:2 Aron gblɔ na wo bena: Miɖe sikatɔgɛ
Exodus32:3 Tete dukɔ blibo la ɖe sikatogɛ
Exodus32:4 Eye wòxɔ wo le wo si
Exodus32:5 Esi Aron kpɔe la
Exodus32:6 Esi wòtɔ ŋdi la
Exodus32:7 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Tso
Exodus32:8 Wote ɖa enumake le mɔ
Exodus32:9 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Mekpɔ bena
Exodus32:10 Eyata na nye dɔmedzoe nabi ɖe wò ŋu
Exodus32:11 Ke Mose ƒo koko na Yehowa
Exodus32:12 Nukaŋuti Egiptetɔwo agblɔ bena: Dzɔgbevɔ̃e didi na wo ta wòkplɔ woyii ɖo
Exodus32:13 Ɖo ŋku wò dɔla Abraham
Exodus32:14 Eye Yehowa ɖe asi le vɔ
Exodus32:15 Eye Mose trɔ heɖi tso to la dzi
Exodus32:16 Mawu ŋutɔe kpa kpeawo
Exodus32:17 Esi Yosua se dukɔ la ƒe ɣli la
Exodus32:18 Eɖo ŋu bena: Menye dziɖuɖuseye kple aʋasiɣli sem mele o
Exodus32:19 Esi wote tu asaɖa la
Exodus32:20 Eye; wòxɔ nyivi
Exodus32:21 Eye Mose gblɔ; na Aron bena: Nuka dukɔ sia wɔ wò
Exodus32:22 Aron do ŋu bena: Nye aƒetɔ
Exodus32:23 Wogblɔ nam bena: Wɔ mawu na mi
Exodus32:24 Megblɔ na wo bena: Amesi ke si sika le la
Exodus32:25 Esi Mose kpɔ bena
Exodus32:26 Mose tsi tre ɖe asaɖa la ƒe agbo nu gblɔ bena: Amesi ke le Yehowa dzi
Exodus32:27 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Ale Yehowa Israel ƒe Mawu la gblɔ esi: Ŋutsu sia ŋutsu nesa eƒe yi ɖe ali; mige ɖe asaɖa la me
Exodus32:28 Eye Lewi-viwo wɔe ɖe Mose ƒe nya la nu
Exodus32:29 Eye Mose gblɔ bena: Mitsɔ vɔsanu vɛ na Yehowa
Exodus32:30 Esi ŋu ke la
Exodus32:31 Eye Mose gatrɔ yi Yehowa gbɔ
Exodus32:32 Meɖe kuku
Exodus32:33 Yehowa ɖo ŋu na Mose bena: Amesi wɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋunye la
Exodus32:34 Heyi ko
Exodus32:35 Eye Yehowa ho to na dukɔ la
Exodus33:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Heyi
Exodus33:2 Madɔ dɔla ɖe ŋgɔwò
Exodus33:3 akplɔ mi ayi anyigba
Exodus33:4 Esi dukɔ la se ŋɔdzinya sia la
Exodus33:5 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Dukɔ kɔ lialiatɔwo mienye
Exodus33:6 Tete Israel-viwo ɖe woƒe atsyɔ̃ɖonuwo ɖi tso Xoreb-to la gbɔ.
Exodus33:7 Eye Mose tsɔ agbadɔ la tu de asaɖa la godo le adzɔge
Exodus33:8 Eye ne Mose yina ɖe agbadɔ la gbɔ la
Exodus33:9 Ne me da
Exodus33:10 Eye ne dukɔ blibo la kpɔ alilikpo dodo la le agbadɔa nu la
Exodus33:11 Eye Yehowa ƒɔ nu kple Mose ŋku me kple ŋku me
Exodus33:12 Eye Mose gblɔ na Yehowa bena Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus33:13 Ne evɔ nunye vavã la
Exodus33:14 Eɖo ŋu bena: Nye ŋutɔ manɔ
Exodus33:15 Exɔ dzi nɛ bena: Ne wò ŋutɔ manɔ me o la
Exodus33:16 Eye nuka gɔ woatsɔ adze sii bena
Exodus33:17 Yehowa ɖo ŋu na Mose bena: Mawɔ nya
Exodus33:18 Eɖo ŋu bena Meɖe kuku
Exodus33:19 Exɔ dzi bena: Mana nye atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo blibo la nato ŋkuwò me ayi
Exodus33:20 Eye wògagblɔ bena: Mate ŋu akpɔ nye ŋku me o
Exodus33:21 Eye Yehowa gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus33:22 Ne nye ŋutikɔkɔe tso me yina la
Exodus33:23 Ne meɖe nye asi le dziwò la
Exodus34:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Kpe kpe eve nyuie abe gbãtɔwo ene
Exodus34:2 Dzra ɖo vaseɖe etsɔ
Exodus34:3 Amea ɖeke malia to la kpli wò o
Exodus34:4 Eye Mose kpɔ kpe ete nyuie abe gbãtɔwo ene
Exodus34:5 Eye Yehowa ɖi va le alilikpo me
Exodus34:6 Eye Yehowa va to eŋuti yi heɖe gbe ƒã bena: Yehowa
Exodus34:7 amesi dzia amenuveve ɖo na ame akpe nanewo
Exodus34:8 Tete Mese wɔ kaba tsyɔ mo anyi
Exodus34:9 gblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ
Exodus34:10 Eɖo ŋu bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Exodus34:11 Dzra se
Exodus34:12 Kpɔ nyuie
Exodus34:13 Ke boŋ mímu woƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo
Exodus34:14 Megade ta agu na mawu bubuwo o
Exodus34:15 Megabla nu kple anyigbadzitɔwo gbeɖegbeɖe o; elabena ne wole woƒe mawunuwo wɔm
Exodus34:16 eye naɖe woƒe vinyɔnuwo na viwòŋutsuwo; eye ne woƒe vinyɔnuwo le woƒe mawunuwo wɔm la
Exodus34:17 Megake mawu na ɖokuiwò o!
Exodus34:18 Ɖo ŋku abolo-maʋamaʋã-ŋkekenyuie la dzi. Ŋkeke adre sɔŋ naɖu abolo maʋamaʋã le nuŋeɣleti ƒe ŋkeke
Exodus34:19 Nusianu
Exodus34:20 Ke natsɔ alẽ èɖuɖɔ tedzi ƒe ŋgɔgbevii
Exodus34:21 Ŋkeke ade nawɔ da
Exodus34:22 Ɖu kwasiɖawo ƒe ŋkekenyuie
Exodus34:23 Wò ŋutsuwo katã nava Aƒetɔ Yehowa
Exodus34:24 Manyã dukɔwo le ŋgɔwò
Exodus34:25 Megatsɔ nye vɔsalã ƒe ʋu sa vɔe le afisi amɔwɔ ʋaʋã le o
Exodus34:26 Wò agblemenu gbãfa
Exodus34:27 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ŋlɔ nya siawo ɖi; elabena nya siawo dzi mebia nu kpli wò kpakple Israel-viwo ɖo.
Exodus34:28 Eye wono Yehowa gbɔ afima ŋkeke blane kple zã blane sɔŋ
Exodus34:29 Esi Mose di tso Sinai-toa dzi la
Exodus34:30 Eye esi Aron kple Israel-viwo katã kpo bena

Exodus34:32 Emegbe Israel-viwo katã te va
Exodus34:33 Esi Mose ƒo nu kpli wo vo la
Exodus34:34 Eye ne Mose yi Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Exodus34:35 Ke ne Israel-viwo kpɔ Mose ƒe mo wòle keklẽm la
Exodus35:1 Eye Mose ƒo Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la nu ƒu
Exodus35:2 Ŋkeke ade miawɔ dɔ
Exodus35:3 Migado dzo ɖe miaƒe aƒea ɖeke me le dzudzɔgbe la dzi o.
Exodus35:4 Eye Mose gblɔna Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la bena: Ale Yehowa de se gblɔ enye si:
Exodus35:5 Midzɔ nusiwo le mia si la na Yehowa Amesiame
Exodus35:6 aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ ƒe ka
Exodus35:7 agbogbalẽ
Exodus35:8 akaɖimemi
Exodus35:9 soham-kpe kple kpe xɔasiwo
Exodus35:10 Eye mia dometɔ
Exodus35:11 Woawo nye: nɔƒe la kple eƒe agbadɔ
Exodus35:12 aɖaka la kple eŋu kpoawo
Exodus35:13 kplɔ̃ la kple eŋu kpoawo kpakple eŋu nuwo katã kple ŋkumeɖobolo la;
Exodus35:14 akaɖiti la
Exodus35:15 dzudzɔdovɔsamlekpui la kple eŋu kpoawo
Exodus35:16 numevɔsamlekpui la kple eŋu dzrala
Exodus35:17 kpɔ ŋuti vɔwo
Exodus35:18 agbadɔ ŋu tsyotiwo kple kpɔ ŋu tsyotiwo kpakple woƒe atagbiawo;

Exodus35:21 Eye amesiame

Exodus36:1 Ale Bezaleel kple Oholiab kpakple ŋutsu
Exodus36:2 Eye Mose yɔ Bezaleel kple Oholiab kpakple aɖaŋutɔ
Exodus36:3 Eye wòxɔ nudzɔdzɔ
Exodus36:4 Eye aɖaŋutɔ
Exodus36:5 eye wogblɔna Mose bena: Dukɔ la na nu geɖe wu alesi ɖɔ
Exodus36:6 Tete Mose na wodo kpo le asaɖa la me be: Eɖanye ŋutsu alo nyɔnu o
Exodus36:7 Elabena nuawo sɔ gbɔ na dɔ blibo la wɔwɔ: wode gbɔ dzi gɔ̃ hã.
Exodus36:8 Eye amesiwo katã ƒe tagbɔ aɖaŋu le
Exodus36:9 Kuntru ɖeka ƒe didime le abɔklugui blave vo enyi
Exodus36:10 Ekpe kuntru atɔ̃ ɖe wo nɔewo nu
Exodus36:11 Eye wòtɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ƒe ka kpukpuiwo ɖe kuntru kpekpea ƒe to ɖeka; nenema ke wòtɔe ɖe kuntru kpekpe evelia ƒe to evelia hã.
Exodus36:12 Etɔ ka kpukpui blaatɔ̃ ɖe kuntru ɖeka to
Exodus36:13 Etsɔ sika tu ganuvi blaatɔ̃
Exodus36:14 Emegbe wòtsɔ gbɔ̃fu lɔ̃ kuntru wuiɖekɛ
Exodus36:15 Kuntru ɖeka ƒe didime le abɔklugui blaetɔ̃
Exodus36:16 Ekpe kuntru atɔ̃ vovo
Exodus36:17 Eye wòtɔ ka kpukpui blaatɔ̃ ɖe kuntru kpekpea ƒe to ɖeka
Exodus36:18 Etsɔ akɔbli tu ganuvi blaatɔ̃ hetsɔ kpe agbadɔkuntruawo wozu ɖeka.
Exodus36:19 Ewɔ agbogbalẽ
Exodus36:20 Eye wòtsɔ xé dze ʋuƒo
Exodus36:21 Ʋuƒo ɖeka didi abɔklugui ewo
Exodus36:22 Eye wòyrɔ ʋuƒo ɖeka gɔme wòdze eve
Exodus36:23 Eye wòdze ʋuƒowo hena nɔƒe la. Ʋuƒo blave le dziehe gome.
Exodus36:24 Eye wòtsɔ klosalo wɔ afɔ blane ɖe ʋuƒo blaneawo gɔme; afɔ eveve le ʋuƒo ɖesiaɖe ƒe nu eveawo gɔme.
Exodus36:25 Eye wòdze ʋuƒo blave hena nɔƒe la ƒe axa evelia
Exodus36:26 eye wòtsɔ klosalo wɔ afɔ blane ɖe wo ŋu; afɔ eveve le ʋuƒo ɖeka gɔme.
Exodus36:27 Eye wodze ʋuƒo ade hena nɔƒe la ƒe akpa
Exodus36:28 Eye wòdze ʋuƒo eve bena nɔƒe la ƒe dzogoe
Exodus36:29 Eye wo gɔme kple wo tame kpe ɖe ʋuƒoawo ŋu
Exodus36:30 Wo katã le ʋuƒo enyi
Exodus36:31 Etsɔ xé kpa gameti atɔ̃ ɖe ʋuƒo
Exodus36:32 gameti atɔ̃ ɖe ʋuƒo
Exodus36:33 Eye wòwɔ gameti dometɔ wòto ʋuƒoawo titina
Exodus36:34 Eta sika ɖe ʋuƒoawo ŋu
Exodus36:35 Ena aɖaŋuvɔlɔ̃lawo tsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ ƒe ka
Exodus36:36 Eye wotsɔ xé kpa sɔti ene ɖe eŋu
Exodus36:37 Eye wòna avɔlɔ̃lawo tsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzẽtɔ ƒe ka
Exodus36:38 Ewɔ sɔti atɔ̃ kple wo ŋu gatagbadzɛawo ɖe eŋu
Exodus37:1 Eye Bezaleel tsɔ xé kpa aɖaka la
Exodus37:2 Eta sika nyuitɔ ɖe eme kple ekɔgo
Exodus37:3 Eye wòkɔ sikasigɛ ene hena eƒe dzogoe eneawo; asigɛ eve le axa ɖeka
Exodus37:4 Emegbe wotso xé kpa kpowo
Exodus37:5 eye wotsɔ kpoawo ƒo ɖe asigɛawo me le aɖaka la ƒe axawo dzi
Exodus37:6 Eyome wotsɔ sika nyuitɔ
Exodus37:7 Eye wotso sika tu Kerubi eve ɖe nutsyɔnu la ƒe go eveawo dzi.
Exodus37:8 Kerubi ɖeka le go si dzi
Exodus37:9 Kerubiawo klẽ aʋala ɖo ta dzi
Exodus37:10 Eye wòtsɔ xé kpa kplɔ̃ la; edidi abɔklugui eve
Exodus37:11 Efa sika nyuitɔ ɖe eŋu
Exodus37:12 Eɖo to ne kpe ɖo
Exodus37:13 Eye wotso sika kɔ asigɛ ene
Exodus37:14 Asigɛawo te ɖe to la ŋu

Exodus37:16 Eye wotsa sika nyuitɔ wɔ nusiwo kpe ɖe kplɔ̃ la ŋu
