Exodus37:18 Alɔ ade le akaɖiti la ƒe axawo kple eve dzi; alɔ etɔ̃ le eƒe axa ɖeka
Exodus37:19 Seƒoƒo etɔ̃ kple wo tamekukuwo le ala ɖeka ŋuti
Exodus37:20 Seƒoƒo ene kple wo tamekukuwo le atia ŋutɔ ŋuti.
Exodus37:21 Alɔ ade le ati la ŋu

Exodus37:24 Sika nyuitɔ talento ɖeka wòtsɔ wɔe kple eŋu nuwo katã.

Exodus38:1 Eye wòtsɔ xé kpa numevɔsamlekpui la; edidi abɔklugui atɔ
Exodus38:2 Èwɔ dzowo ɖe eƒe dzogoe eneawo dzi
Exodus38:3 Eye wowɔ vɔsamlekpui ŋu nuawo katã
Exodus38:4 Eyome wòtsɔ akɔbli wɔ adzrala abe ɖɔ ene ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ŋu godoo tso ete vaseɖe titina.
Exodus38:5 Eye wòkɔ asigɛ ene ɖe akɔblidzrala la ƒe dzogoe eneawo dzi
Exodus38:6 Etsɔ xé kpa kpoawo

Exodus39:1 Eye wotsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ ƒe ka kple ka dzẽ lɔ atsyɔ̃ɖowuawo
Exodus39:2 Eye wotsɔ sika
Exodus39:3 Woƒo sika la gbabɛ
Exodus39:4 Akpa eve me kɔmewu la le
Exodus39:5 Eye akɔblanu
Exodus39:6 Wotsɔ sika ƒo fefeka ɖe soham-kpe eve ŋu
Exodus39:7 Eye wotsɔ wo ɖo kɔmewu la ƒe abɔtawo hena ŋkuɖoɖo Israel-viwo dzi
Exodus39:8 Eyome wòna aɖaŋuvɔlɔ̃lawo tsɔ sika
Exodus39:9 Dzogoe ene me wòle
Exodus39:10 Eye woɖo kpewo eŋu ɖe agbaka ene me. Agbaka gbãtɔ nye: karneol
Exodus39:11 agbaka evelia nye rubin
Exodus39:12 agbaka etɔ̃lia nye
Exodus39:13 agbaka enelia nye: krisolit

Exodus39:17 Eye wotsɔ sikakɔsɔkɔsɔ eveawo de asigɛ eveawo me le akɔtaɖonu la ƒe dzogoewo dzi.
Exodus39:18 Eyome wode kɔsɔkɔsɔ eveawo ƒe nu eveawo gbo eveawo ŋu

Exodus39:26 nyawowoe ɖeka yevuboɖa ɖeka

Exodus39:28 Wotsɔ ɖeti ɣi lɔ tablanuawo
Exodus39:29 Eye avɔlɔ̃lawo tsɔ ɖeti ɣi dada

Exodus40:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Exodus40:2 Le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi natu nɔƒe
Exodus40:3 Tsɔ nubablaɖaka la da ɖe eme
Exodus40:4 Tsɔ kplɔ la da ɖe eme
Exodus40:5 Eye natsɔ sikavɔsamlekpui
Exodus40:6 Eye natsɔ numevɔsamlekpui la ada ɖe nɔƒe la
Exodus40:7 Tsɔ tsileze la da ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la kple vɔsamlekpui la dome
Exodus40:8 Eye natɔ kpɔ ɖe eŋu godoo ava kpe
Exodus40:9 Tsɔ ami sisi la si na nɔƒe la kple nusiwo katã le eme
Exodus40:10 Si ami na numevɔsamlekpui la kple eŋu nuwo katã
Exodus40:11 Eye nasi ami na tsileze la kple eƒe zɔ
Exodus40:12 Emegbe nana Aron kple viaŋutsuwo nate va Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu
Exodus40:13 Eye na Aron nado awu kɔkɔeawo
Exodus40:14 Eyome nana viaŋutsuwo nate va
Exodus40:15 eye nasi ami na wo
Exodus40:16 Eye Mose wɔe pɛpɛpɛ. Alesi Yehowa de se ne la
Exodus40:17 Le ƒe evelia ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi wotu nɔƒe la.
Exodus40:18 Ale Mose tu nɔƒe lae. Efɔ afɔawo da ɖi
Exodus40:19 Eye wòkeke kuntruawo ɖe nɔƒe la dzi
Exodus40:20 Etsɔ se la de aɖaka la me
Exodus40:21 Eye wokɔ aɖa ka la da ɖe nɔƒe la
Exodus40:22 Eye wotsɔ kplɔ la da ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Exodus40:23 eye wotsɔ abolo da de edzi le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Exodus40:24 Eyome wotsɔ akaɖiti la da ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Exodus40:25 eye wòfɔ akaɖigbɛawo do edzi le Yehowa ŋku me
Exodus40:26 Eye wòtsɔ sikavɔsamlekpui la da de Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Exodus40:27 eye wotsɔ atike ʋeʋẽewo do dzudzɔ de edzi
Exodus40:28 Emegbe wòtsɔ avɔ tu agbadɔ la nu.
Exodus40:29 Eye wòtsɔ numevɔsamlekpui la da ɖe nɔƒe
Exodus40:30 Eye wotsɔ tsileze la da de Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la kple vɔsamlekpui la dome
Exodus40:31 Eya me Mose kple Aron kple viaŋutsuwo klɔa woƒe asiwo kple afɔwo ɖo.
Exodus40:32 Ne wole Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me yi ge
Exodus40:33 Eye wòtɔ kpɔ ƒo xlã nɔƒe la kple vɔsamlekpui la godoo va kpe
Exodus40:34 Tete alilikpo tsyɔ Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la dzi
Exodus40:35 Ke Mose mete ŋu yi ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me o
Exodus40:36 Eye ne alilikpo la ho tso nɔƒe la dzi la
Exodus40:37 Ne alilikpo la meho o la
Exodus40:38 Le woƒe mɔzɔzɔwo katã me la Mawu ƒe alilikpo la nɔ nɔƒe la dzi le ŋkeke me
Leviticus1:1 Eye Yehowa yɔ Mose
Leviticus1:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Leviticus1:3 Nenye nyi wotso be
Leviticus1:4 Eye woatso eƒe asi aɖo numevɔsalã la ƒe tame
Leviticus1:5 Eye wòawu nyivi la le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Leviticus1:6 Ekema wòako numevɔsalã la
Leviticus1:7 Emegbe Aron viŋutsu
Leviticus1:8 Eye Aron viŋutsu
Leviticus1:9 Ke woatso tsi akpala eƒe domenuwo kple eƒe afɔwo
Leviticus1:10 Nenye alẽ alo gbɔ̃ wòbe
Leviticus1:11 Eye woawui ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ƒe anyiehekpa dzi le Yehowa ŋku me. Eye Aron viŋutsu
Leviticus1:12 Eye wòaflii ɖe eƒe ƒunuɖeƒeewo akpe ɖe eƒe ta kple eƒe amiawo ŋu; eye nunɔla natsɔ wo aɖo nake
Leviticus1:13 Eye woatso tsi akpala eƒe dɔmenuwo kple eƒe afɔwo
Leviticus1:14 Ke nenye xewo wòbe
Leviticus1:15 Eye nunɔla natsɔe ava vɔsamlekpui la gbɔ

Leviticus4:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Leviticus4:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo be: Ne amea ɖe ɖe ŋu ɖi ɖa Yehowa ƒe seawo dometɔ ɖeka dzi

Leviticus8:2 Kplɔ nɔviwò Aron kple viaŋutsuwo
Leviticus8:3 eye na ameha blibo la naƒo ƒu ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ƒe ʋɔtru nu.
Leviticus8:4 Mose wo abe alesi Yehowa de se nɛ ene
Leviticus8:5 Tete Mose gblɔ na

Leviticus8:7 Edo awutewui ʋlaya la nɛ
Leviticus8:8 etsɔ akɔtaɖonu la ɖo eŋu
Leviticus8:9 emegbe wòtsɔ tablanu la bla ta nɛ
Leviticus8:10 Eyome Mose tso ami sisi la
Leviticus8:11 Ewu ami la ɖe vɔsamlekpuia ŋu zi adre

Leviticus8:18 Eyome wòhe numevɔsagbo la vɛ
Leviticus8:19 Eye Mose wui
Leviticus8:20 Eye wòfli agbo la ɖe eƒe ƒunuɖeƒeewo; eye Mose tɔ dzo ta la
Leviticus8:21 Ke etsɔ tsi kpala dɔmenuawo kple afɔawo
Leviticus8:22 Emegbe wòhe agbo evelia
Leviticus8:23 Eye Mose wui hetsɔ ʋu la ƒe ɖe sisi ɖe Aron ƒe ɖusitogboe
Leviticus8:24 Eyome Mose na Aron viŋutsuawo le va
Leviticus8:25 Eye wòɖe eŋu miwo: Asike la kple eŋu miwo
Leviticus8:26 Emegbe wotsɔ akaklã ɖeka
Leviticus8:27 eye wòtsɔ nu siawo katã de asi me na Aron kple viaŋutsuawo henyè wo le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me.

Leviticus8:30 Eye Mose tsɔ ami sisi la kple nu
Leviticus8:31 Eye Mose gblɔ na Aron kple viaŋutsuawo bena: Miɖa lã la le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu
Leviticus8:32 Ke ne lã la kple aboloa ɖe tsi anyi la

Leviticus9:1 Le ŋkeke enyiagbe Mose ya Aron kple Israel-ame tsitsiwo
Leviticus9:2 eye wògblɔ na Aron bena: Lé nyitsuvi woawo nuvɔ̃vɔsae kple agbo woawɔ numevɔsa; woa kple eve la nasɔ blibo
Leviticus9:3 Eye nagblɔ na Israel-viwo bena: Milé gbɔ̃tsu woawo nuvɔ̃vɔsae
Leviticus9:4 nyi kple agbo ɖeka woawɔ akpedavɔsae; eye miawu wo le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Leviticus9:5 Tete wotsɔ nusiwo Mose bia la
Leviticus9:6 Eye Mose gblɔ bena: Ale Yehowa de se be
Leviticus9:7 Emegbe Mose gblɔ na Aron bena: Te ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ŋu
Leviticus9:8 Tete Aron te ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ŋu
Leviticus9:9 Eye Aron viŋutsuawo tso ʋu la vɛ ne
Leviticus9:10 Eye wòto dzo nuvɔ̃vɔsalã ƒe amiawo
Leviticus9:11 Ke eta dzo lã la ŋutɔ kple agbalẽa le asaɖa la godo.
Leviticus9:12 Eyome wòwu numevɔsalã la
Leviticus9:13 Wotsɔ numevɔsalã la ƒe akpawo kpakple ta la nɛ
Leviticus9:14 Eye wòkpala dɔmenuawo kple afɔawo da ɖe numevɔsalã la dzi heto dzo wo.
Leviticus9:15 Emegbe wòsa vɔ na dukɔ la. Elé nuvɔ̃vɔsagbɔ̃tsu
Leviticus9:16 Eyome wòhe numevɔsalã la vɛ
Leviticus9:17 Eye wotso nuɖuvɔsa la vɛ: eku asiʋlo ɖeka le eŋu hetɔ dzoe le vɔsamlekpui la dzi kpe ɖe ŋdinumevɔsa la ŋu.
Leviticus9:18 Eye wòwu nyi kple agbo la hena dukɔ la ƒe akpedavɔsasa. Aron viŋutsuawo tsa ʋu la nɛ
Leviticus9:19 Wotsɔ nyi la ƒe amiawo
Leviticus9:20 da ɖe lãwo ƒe akɔwo dzi
Leviticus9:21 Ke Aron nyè akɔwo kple ɖusitawo le Yehowa ƒe ŋku me
Leviticus9:22 Emegbe Aron wu eƒe asiwò dzi ɖe dukɔ la dzi
Leviticus9:23 Eye Mose kple Aron woyi ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me; eye esi wodo go la
Leviticus9:24 Eye dzo tso Yehowa gbɔ fiã numevɔsalã kple amiawo le vɔsamlekpui la dzi. Dukɔ blibo la kpɔe

Leviticus11:40 Amesi ɖu kukua la
Leviticus11:41 Anyigbadzilã suewo katã la
Leviticus11:42 Lã sue
Leviticus11:43 Migatsɔ lã suewo do ŋunyɔ mia ɖokui o
Leviticus11:44 Elabena nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus11:45 Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus11:46 Esia nye se le lãfɔnewo
Leviticus11:47 bena woade vovo nu makɔmakɔ kple nu kokoe dome
Leviticus12:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus12:2 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Ne nyɔnua ɖe fo fu
Leviticus12:3 Eye le ŋkeke enyiagbe la woatso eƒe aʋanuyi ɖa.
Leviticus12:4 Eye woatsi xɔ me ŋkeke blaetɔ̃ vo etɔ̃
Leviticus12:5 Ke ne edzi nyɔnuvi la
Leviticus12:6 Nenye ŋutsuvi alo nyɔnuvie
Leviticus12:7 Eya natsɔe asa wɔe le Yehowa ŋku me
Leviticus12:8 Ke ne mate ŋu ana alé o la
Leviticus13:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kpakple Aron bena:
Leviticus13:2 Ne amea ɖe ƒe ŋutigbalẽ dze haƒla
Leviticus13:3 Ne nunɔla kpo nusi le eƒe ŋutigbalẽ ŋu
Leviticus13:4 Ke ne eƒe ŋutigbalẽ ɖe bo ɣie ko

Leviticus13:45 Ɖovu nanɔ anyidzela ŋu
Leviticus13:46 Ŋkeke alesi anyia le eŋu la
Leviticus13:47 Ne anyi ɖo awua ɖe me

Leviticus14:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena;
Leviticus14:2 Esia nye se na anyidzela
Leviticus14:3 eye nunɔla la nado ayi egbɔ le asaɖa la godo. Ne nunɔla la kpɔ bena
Leviticus14:4 ekema nunɔla nade se bena
Leviticus14:5 Eye nunɔla nade se bena
Leviticus14:6 Eye wòatsɔ xevi gbagbe la kple sederti
Leviticus14:7 awu ɖe anyidzela
Leviticus14:8 Eye amesi ŋu kɔm wole la
Leviticus14:9 Le ŋkeke adreagbe la wòalũ eƒe ɖawo keŋ; alũ ta
Leviticus14:10 Le ŋkeke enyiagbe woatso alẽvi eve
Leviticus14:11 Eye nunɔla
Leviticus14:12 Nunɔla nalé alẽvi ɖeka akpe ɖe ami trevi ɖeka la ŋu asa fɔɖivɔe
Leviticus14:13 Emegbe woawu alẽvi la ɖe teƒe kɔkɔe
Leviticus14:14 Eye nunɔla la natsɔ fɔɖivɔsalã ƒe ʋu ƒe ɖe asisi ɖe amesi ŋu kɔm wole la ƒe ɖusitogboe
Leviticus14:15 Eye nunɔla la nakɔ ami trevi ɖeka la ƒe ɖe ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe miãsi me.
Leviticus14:16 Nunɔla la natsɔ eƒe ɖusisibide ade ami
Leviticus14:17 Eye nunɔla la natsɔ ami
Leviticus14:18 Emegbe nunɔla la natsɔ ami mamlea
Leviticus14:19 Eye nunɔla la nawɔ fɔɖivɔsalã ŋu dɔ
Leviticus14:20 Eye nunɔla la natsɔ numevɔsa kple nuɖuvɔsa asa vɔe le vɔsamlekpui la dzi
Leviticus14:21 Ke ne eda ahe
Leviticus14:22 kpakple akpakpa eve alo ahɔnevi eve
Leviticus14:23 Ne wobui be
Leviticus14:24 Nunɔla la natsɔ alẽvi
Leviticus14:25 Eye woawu alẽvi
Leviticus14:26 Nunɔla la nakɔ ami la ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe miasi me.
Leviticus14:27 Eye nunɔla la natsɔ eƒe asibide ahlẽ ami
Leviticus14:28 Eye nunɔla la natsɔ ami
Leviticus14:29 Eyome nunɔla la natsɔ ami mamlea
Leviticus14:30 Emegbe wòawɔ akpakpa alo ahɔnevi
Leviticus14:31 wòatsɔ ɖeka asa fɔɖivɔe
Leviticus14:32 Esia nye se na amesi dze anyi
Leviticus14:33 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kpakple Aron bena;
Leviticus14:34 Ne miava Kanaan-nyigba
Leviticus14:35 ekema xɔtɔ nava gblɔ na nunɔla bena: Nane ɖo ɖe nye xɔ ŋu abe anyi ene.
Leviticus14:36 Nunɔla la nade se bena
Leviticus14:37 Ne ekpɔ nu la teƒe
Leviticus14:38 ekema nunɔla la naɖo le xɔa me ɖe xɔa nu
Leviticus14:39 Ne nunɔla la va le ŋkeke adreagbe
Leviticus14:40 ekema nunɔla la nade se bena
Leviticus14:41 Emegbe woadza xɔ la ƒe gli ŋu afisiafi le eme
Leviticus14:42 Eyome woatsɔ kpe bubuwo aɖo kpe kemeawo teƒe
Leviticus14:43 Ne woho kpewo ɖa
Leviticus14:44 eye nunɔla la va kpɔ nu la
Leviticus14:45 Woagbã xɔ la aƒu anyi
Leviticus14:46 Ŋkeke alesi xɔ la gale tutu ko
Leviticus14:47 Amesi ɖo xɔa me la
Leviticus14:48 Ke ne wogbugbɔ xɔ la tre
Leviticus14:49 Eye wòatsɔ xevi eve
Leviticus14:50 Wòatso xevi ɖeka ɖe tɔsisi me tsi ŋgɔ le ze me
Leviticus14:51 eye wòatsɔ sederti
Leviticus14:52 Ale wòatsɔ xevi la ƒe ʋu
Leviticus14:53 Eye wòaɖe asi le xevi gbagbe la ŋu aɖo ɖe du la godo le gbe me; eye ale wòaɖe vɔ ɖa le xɔ la ŋu
Leviticus14:54 Esia nye se le anyidɔwo keŋ kple haƒladzedze
Leviticus14:55 kple anyi
Leviticus14:56 kpakple aklabi
Leviticus14:57 bena wòanya nusi ŋu mekɔ o kple nusi ŋu ko. Esia nye se le anyi ŋu.
Leviticus15:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kpakple Aron bena:
Leviticus15:2 Miƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Leviticus15:3 Ne tsi le dodom le eƒe ŋutsu me alo enu xe la
Leviticus15:4 Aba sia aba
Leviticus15:5 Amesi ka asi eƒe aba ŋu la
Leviticus15:6 Amesi no nusi dzi afuɖɔla no la
Leviticus15:7 eye amesi de asi afuɖɔla ŋu la
Leviticus15:8 Ne afuɖɔla ɖe ta ɖe amea ɖe
Leviticus15:9 Sɔkpa
Leviticus15:10 Ne amea ɖe de asi nusianu
Leviticus15:11 Ne afuɖɔla meklɔ asi hafi de asi amea ɖe ŋu o la
Leviticus15:12 Ne afuɖɔla de asi anyinua ɖe ŋu la
Leviticus15:13 Ne afu la vo na amea
Leviticus15:14 Le ŋkeke enyiagbe la woatso akpakpa eve alo ahɔnevi eve ava Yehowa ŋku me le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu
Leviticus15:15 eye nunɔla la nawɔ wo ŋu dɔ; wòatsɔ ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe
Leviticus15:16 Ne ŋutsua ɖe nyẽ tsi la
Leviticus15:17 Eye wòanyã avɔ sia avɔ kple lãgbalẽ sia lãgbalẽ
Leviticus15:18 Ne ŋutsua mlɔ nyɔnua ɖe gbã
Leviticus15:19 Ne nyɔnua ɖe kpɔ dzinu
Leviticus15:20 Nusianu
Leviticus15:21 Amesiame
Leviticus15:22 eye amesiame
Leviticus15:23 Ne nane le eƒe aba alo nunɔdzi dzi
Leviticus15:24 Ne ŋutsua ɖe mlɔ egbɔ
Leviticus15:25 Ne nyɔnua ɖe mekpɔ dzinu
Leviticus15:26 Ŋkeke alesi ʋu le dodom le eŋu
Leviticus15:27 Amesiame
Leviticus15:28 Ne ʋu la nu tso la
Leviticus15:29 Le ŋkeke enyiagbe la wòatsɔ akpakpa eve alo ahɔnevi eve avae na nunɔla le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu?
Leviticus15:30 Eye nunɔla la natsɔ ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe
Leviticus15:31 Ale miaxlɔ̃ nu Israel-viwo le nu makɔmakɔwo ŋu
Leviticus15:32 Esia nye se na amesi le afu ɖom kple amesi nyẽ tsi
Leviticus15:33 nyɔnu
Leviticus16:1 Esi Aron viŋutsu eveawo te ɖe Yehowa ŋu
Leviticus16:2 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Gblɔ na nɔviwò Aron be
Leviticus16:3 Nusiwo Aron natsɔ ava kɔkɔeƒe la
Leviticus16:4 Wòado awutewui ʋlaya la
Leviticus16:5 Eye woaxɔ gbɔ̃tsu eve le Israel-viwo ƒe ha la si awɔ nuvɔ̃vɔsae kple agbo ɖeka awɔ numevɔsae.
Leviticus16:6 Emegbe Aron natsɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe nuvɔ̃vɔsanyitsu la alé avu na eya ŋutɔ kple eƒe aƒe.
Leviticus16:7 Eyome wòatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu eveawo aɖo Yehowa ƒe ŋku me le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu.
Leviticus16:8 Eye Aron nadzidze nu ɖe gbɔ̃tsu eveawo dzi
Leviticus16:9 Eye Aron natsɔ gbɔ̃tsu
Leviticus16:10 Ke wòatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu
Leviticus16:11 Emegbe Aron nahe eƒe nuvɔ̃vɔsanyitsu la vɛ
Leviticus16:12 eye wòatsɔ sonu aɖe dzoka xɔxɔ le vɔsamlekpui la dzi le Yehowa ŋku me
Leviticus16:13 Eye wòako dzudzɔdonua ɖe dzo la dzi le Yehowa ŋku me
Leviticus16:14 Wòatso eƒe asibide ahlẽ nyitsu la ƒe ʋu ƒe ɖe ɖe nutsyɔnu la dzi
Leviticus16:15 Eyome wòawu dukɔ la ƒe nuvɔ̃vɔsagbɔ̃tsu la
Leviticus16:16 Eye wòaɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa le kɔkɔeƒe la ŋu le Israel-viwo ƒe nu makɔmakɔ wɔwɔwo kple vo
Leviticus16:17 Amea ɖeke manɔ Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Leviticus16:18 Ne edo go la
Leviticus16:19 Eye wòatsɔ eƒe asibide ahlẽ ʋua ƒe ɖe ɖe edzi zi adre
Leviticus16:20 Ne eɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa le kɔkɔeƒe la
Leviticus16:21 Eye Aron natsɔ eƒe asiwo kple eve aɖo gbɔ̃tsu gbagbe la ƒe tame
Leviticus16:22 Ekem woƒe vodadawo katã yi ɖe gbɔ̃tsu la dzi wotsa yi gbedadaƒoe
Leviticus16:23 Emegbe Aron nayi ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Leviticus16:24 Eye wòale tsi le teƒe kɔkɔe la
Leviticus16:25 Eye wòatɔ dzo nuvɔ̃vɔsalã ƒe amiwo le vɔsamlekpui la dzi.
Leviticus16:26 Amesi kplɔ gbɔ̃tsu la ɖo ɖe Asasel gbɔ la
Leviticus16:27 Eye woatsɔ nuvɔ̃vɔsanyitsu la kple nuvɔ̃vɔsagbɔ̃tsu
Leviticus16:28 Amesi tɔ dzo wo la
Leviticus16:29 Esia nanye ɖoɖo mavɔ na mi. Le ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi la míatsi nu ado
Leviticus16:30 Elabena gbemagbe wolé avu na mi
Leviticus16:31 Dzudzɔgbe gã wòanye na mi
Leviticus16:32 Amesi alé avua la
Leviticus16:33 eye wòaɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa le kɔkɔeƒewo katã ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la
Leviticus16:34 Esia nye ɖoɖo mavɔ na mi. Zi ɖeka ƒe ɖeka woalé avu na Israel-viwo katã le woƒe nuvɔ̃wo katã ta. Eye wòwɔ
Leviticus17:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus17:2 Ƒo nu kple Aron kple viaŋutsuwo kpakple Israel-viwo katã

Leviticus17:4 eye metsɔe va Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu

Leviticus17:6 Eye nunɔla nawu ʋu la ɖe Yehowa ƒe vɔsamlekpui la ŋu le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu

Leviticus17:9 eye mietsɔe va Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu

Leviticus17:11 Elabena agbe le ʋu la me

Leviticus18:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus18:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Leviticus18:3 Migawɔ Egipte-nyigba
Leviticus18:4 Miwɔ nye sewo dzi
Leviticus18:5 Eyata milé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖowo kple sewo ŋu
Leviticus18:6 Amea ɖeke megamlɔ eƒe ƒometɔ kekeake gbɔ ade asi eŋu o. Nyee nye Yehowa.
Leviticus18:7 Megaɖe ama fofowò o
Leviticus18:8 Megade asi fofowò srɔ̃ ŋu o
Leviticus18:9 Megaɖe asi nɔviwònyɔnu
Leviticus18:10 Megaɖe asi viwòŋutsu ƒe vinyɔnu alo viwònyɔnu ƒe vinyɔnu ŋu o

Leviticus18:12 Megade asi fofowò nɔvinyɔnu ŋu o
Leviticus18:13 Megade asi dawò nɔvinyɔnu ŋu o
Leviticus18:14 Megaɖe ama fofowò nɔviŋutsu o
Leviticus18:15 Megaɖe asi viwòŋutsu srɔ̃ ŋu o; wò ŋutɔ viwò srɔ̃e; megaɖe amae o.
Leviticus18:16 Megade asi nɔviwòŋutsu srɔ̃ ŋu o
Leviticus18:17 Megaɖe asi nyɔnua ɖeke kple vianyɔnu siaa ŋu o
Leviticus18:18 Ne srɔ̃wò le agbe la
Leviticus18:19 Ne nyɔnua ɖe kpɔ dzinu la
Leviticus18:20 Megaɖe asi hawòvi srɔ̃ ŋu
Leviticus18:21 Megatsɔ viwò sa vɔe na Molex o
Leviticus18:22 Megadɔ ŋutsu gbɔ abe nyɔnu gbɔ ene o
Leviticus18:23 Megade asi lã ŋu ahado ŋunyɔ ɖokuiwò o
Leviticus18:24 Migawɔ nusiawo atsɔ ado ŋunyɔ mia ɖokui o
Leviticus18:25 eye woƒe anyigba gblẽ; eyata maɖo woƒe vodadawo teƒe na wo
Leviticus18:26 Milé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖoawo kple seawo ŋu
Leviticus18:27 elabena anyigbadzitɔ
Leviticus18:28 ne anyigba la nagatu miawo hã aƒu gbe
Leviticus18:29 Ne amea ɖe wɔ ŋunyɔnu siawo dometɔa ɖe la

Leviticus19:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus19:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel ƒe ha blibo la
Leviticus19:3 Amesiame nayɔ dada kple fofoa
Leviticus19:4 Migayi legbawo gbɔ o
Leviticus19:5 Ne miesa akpedavɔ na Yehowa la
Leviticus19:6 Miaɖui le gbesigbe miewui kple ŋkeke
Leviticus19:7 Ke ne woɖui le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la
Leviticus19:8 Amesi ɖui la
Leviticus19:9 Ne mieŋe nukuwo le miaƒe agble me la
Leviticus19:10 Megaxa wò weingblemenuwo ƒiaƒiaƒia o
Leviticus19:11 Migafi fi o
Leviticus19:12 Migaka aʋatso yɔ nye ŋkɔ ta nui o
Leviticus19:13 Megate hawòvi ɖe anyi o
Leviticus19:14 Megaɖe alɔme le mumuitɔ ŋu o
Leviticus19:15 Migawɔ apasa le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me o. Mígade ame dahe dzi o
Leviticus19:16 Meganye sakplitɔ nɔ yiyim le wò dukɔ me viwo dome o; eye megaka ɖe dzi
Leviticus19:17 Megalé nɔviwò ɖe do me o
Leviticus19:18 Megawɔ wɔɖenui o
Leviticus19:19 Milé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖoawo ŋu. Megana wò lã ƒomevi vovovowo natsaka ayɔ asi wo nɔewo o; megaƒã nuku ƒomevi vovovowo ɖe wò agble me o
Leviticus19:20 Ne ŋutsua ɖe mlɔ nyɔnua ɖe gbɔ
Leviticus19:21 Ŋutsu la natsɔ agbo ɖeka ava Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu
Leviticus19:22 Eye nunɔla natsɔ fɔɖivɔsagbo lã alé avu nɛ le Yehowa ŋku me
Leviticus19:23 Ne mieva anyigba la dzi
Leviticus19:24 Le ƒe enelia me la woƒe tsetsewo katã ŋu ko
Leviticus19:25 Ke le ƒe atɔ̃lia me miekpɔ mɔ aɖu woƒe tsetsewo
Leviticus19:26 Migaɖu nusi me ʋu le o. Migaka afã o
Leviticus19:27 Migatso ako o
Leviticus19:28 Ne ame ku la
Leviticus19:29 Megagblẽ viwònyɔnu
Leviticus19:30 Miɖo ŋku nye dzudzɔgbewo dzi
Leviticus19:31 Migayi ŋɔliyɔlawo gbɔ o
Leviticus19:32 Amegã ta ɣi ŋku me nanɔ tsitre ɖo
Leviticus19:33 Ne amedzroa ɖe dze gbɔwò le wò anyigba dzi la
Leviticus19:34 Amedzro nanɔ mia gbɔ abe duamevi ene
Leviticus19:35 Migawɔ apasa le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me o
Leviticus19:36 Nudanu nyui kple nudakpe nyuiwo
Leviticus19:37 Eyata milé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖoawo katã kple nye seawo katã ŋu
Leviticus20:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus20:2 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Ne Israel-viwo dometɔa ɖe alo amedzro
Leviticus20:3 Maɖe ŋku atɔ ame la
Leviticus20:4 Ke ne anyigbadzitɔwo miã ŋku ɖe amesi tsɔ via na Molex la dzi
Leviticus20:5 ekema nye ŋku anɔ ame la kple eƒomeawo ŋu
Leviticus20:6 Ne amea ɖe yi ŋɔliyɔlawo kple bokɔnɔwo gbɔ
Leviticus20:7 Eyata miwɔ mia ɖokui kɔkɔe
Leviticus20:8 Milé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖoawo ŋu
Leviticus20:9 Ne amea ɖe ƒo fi de fofoa alo dada la
Leviticus20:10 Ne amea ɖe wo ahasi kple ŋutsua ɖe srɔ̃ la
Leviticus20:11 Ne amea ɖe do fofoa srɔ̃ gbɔ la
Leviticus20:12 Ne amea ɖe dɔ viaŋutsu srɔ̃ gbɔ la
Leviticus20:13 Ne ŋutsua ɖe do ŋutsu gbɔ
Leviticus20:14 Ne ŋutsua ɖe ɖe nyɔnua ɖe kple dada siaa la
Leviticus20:15 Ne ŋutsua ɖe ɖe asi lã ŋu la
Leviticus20:16 Eye ne nyɔnua ɖe na lãa ɖe yɔ asii la
Leviticus20:17 Ne amea ɖe ɖe nɔvianyɔnu
Leviticus20:18 Ne amea ɖe dɔ nyɔnua ɖe
Leviticus20:19 Amesi ɖe asi dada nɔvinyɔnu alo fofoa nɔvinyɔnu ŋu la
Leviticus20:20 Ne amea ɖe do fofoa nɔviŋutsu srɔ̃ gbɔ la
Leviticus20:21 Ne amea ɖe ɖe nɔviaŋutsu srɔ̃ la
Leviticus20:22 Eyata milé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖoawo katã kple nye seawo katã ŋu
Leviticus20:23 Migawɔ dukɔ
Leviticus20:24 Eye megblɔ na mi bena: Mixɔ woƒe anyigba la wòanye mia tɔ
Leviticus20:25 Eyata miɖe vovo lã
Leviticus20:26 Mínye ame kɔkɔewo nam
Leviticus20:27 Ne ŋutsu alo nyɔnua ɖe nye ŋɔliyɔla alo bokɔnɔ la
Leviticus21:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Gblɔ na Aron viŋutsu
Leviticus21:2 negbe eƒe ƒometɔ kekeake ŋu ko wòagblẽ kɔ ɖo
Leviticus21:3 kpakple nɔvianyɔnu
Leviticus21:4 Ke megagblẽ kɔ ɖo na eɖokui ɖe ame kukua ɖeke ŋu le eƒe dukɔ la dome
Leviticus21:5 Womegalũ dzodome kokoe o
Leviticus21:6 Woanɔ kɔkɔe na woƒe Mawu
Leviticus21:7 Womekpɔ mɔ aɖe gbolo
Leviticus21:8 Bu nunɔlawo kɔkɔe
Leviticus21:9 Ne nunɔlaa ɖe ƒe vinyɔnu gblẽ le ahasi wɔm la
Leviticus21:10 Ke amesi nye nunɔlagã le nɔviawo dome
Leviticus21:11 Eya mekpɔ mɔ ava ame kukua ɖeke gbɔ o
Leviticus21:12 Mado go le kɔkɔeƒe la o
Leviticus21:13 Ɖetugbi atiati wòaɖe.
Leviticus21:14 Mekpɔ mɔ aɖe ahosi alo nyɔnu
Leviticus21:15 bena viawo nagaɖi gbɔ le eƒe dukɔ me viwo dome o. Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus21:16 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus21:17 Gblɔ na Aron be: Ne viawo alo woƒe dzidzimeviwo dometɔa ɖe nye nuwɔametɔ la
Leviticus21:18 Nuwɔametɔa ɖeke megate va o
Leviticus21:19 eɖanye ataŋeŋetɔ alo abɔŋeŋetɔ o
Leviticus21:20 eɖanye kponɔ alo amesi ɖi ku glaŋ o
Leviticus21:21 Amesiame
Leviticus21:22 Ke ekpɔ mɔ aɖu eƒe Mawu ƒe nuɖuɖu kɔkɔe la
Leviticus21:23 Ɖeko mekpɔ mɔ ava xɔmetsovɔ la gbɔ o
Leviticus21:24 Eye Mose ƒo nu kple Aron kple viaŋutsuwo kpakple Israel-viwo katã.
Leviticus22:1 Eve Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus22:2 Ƒo nu kple Aron kple viaŋutsuawo bena
Leviticus22:3 Gblɔ na wo bena: Ne mia viwo alo miaƒe dzidzimeviwo dometɔa ɖe ŋu mekɔ o
Leviticus22:4 Ne Aron viwo dometɔa ɖe dze anyi alo le atu ɖɔm la
Leviticus22:5 alo amea ɖe ka asi nu gbagbea ɖe
Leviticus22:6 amesi ka asi nusiawo ƒe ɖe ŋu la
Leviticus22:7 Ne ɣe ɖo to la
Leviticus22:8 Mekpɔ mɔ aɖu lã kuku alo lã
Leviticus22:9 Woalé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖoawo ŋu bena womagagblẽ kɔ ɖo
Leviticus22:10 Amedzroa ɖeke mekpɔ mɔ aɖu nu kɔkɔe la o
Leviticus22:11 Ne nunɔla ƒle amea ɖe kple ga la
Leviticus22:12 Ne nunɔla ƒe vinyɔnu ɖe to bubu me tɔa ɖe la
Leviticus22:13 Ke ne nunɔla ƒe vinyɔnu zu ahosi
Leviticus22:14 Ne amea ɖe ɖe ŋu ɖu nu kɔkɔea la
Leviticus22:15 Eye womegagblẽ kɔ ɖo na Israel-viwo ƒe nunana kɔkɔe
Leviticus22:16 Eye womegana woaɖu woƒe nunana kokoe la
Leviticus22:17 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus22:18 Ƒo nu kple Aron kple viaŋutsuwo kpakple Israel-viwo katã
Leviticus22:19 ekema wòana lãtsui
Leviticus22:20 Migatso lã
Leviticus22:21 Ne amea ɖe ɖe adzɔgbe
Leviticus22:22 Migatsɔ lã
Leviticus22:23 Nenye ɖokuiwò si nèbe
Leviticus22:24 Ke miekpɔ mɔ atsɔ lã
Leviticus22:25 Migaƒle wo le amedzrowo si o
Leviticus22:26 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus22:27 Ne wodzi nyi
Leviticus22:28 Miekpɔ mo awu nyi alo alẽ kple via siaa gbe ɖeka o.
Leviticus22:29 Ne miesa kafukafuvɔ na Yehowa la
Leviticus22:30 Gbemagbe ke woaɖui
Leviticus22:31 Eyata milé ŋku ɖe nye seawo ŋu
Leviticus22:32 Migaƒo ɖi nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la o
Leviticus22:33 eye mekplɔ mi tso Egipte-nyigba dzi
Leviticus23:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena: Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Leviticus23:2 
Leviticus23:3 Ŋkeke ade miawo ɖo
Leviticus23:4 Esiawo nye Yehowa ƒe ŋkekenyuie
Leviticus23:5 Ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia ƒe fiẽ enye ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie na Yehowa
Leviticus23:6 eye le ɣleti sia ƒe ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃lia dzi miaɖu abolo maʋamaʋã ƒe ŋkekenyuie na Yehowa; ŋkeke adre sɔŋ miaɖu abolo maʋamaʋã.
Leviticus23:7 Ŋkeke gbãtɔ enye takpegbe kokoe na mi
Leviticus23:8 Ŋkeke adre sɔŋ miasa dzovɔ na Yehowa
Leviticus23:9 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus23:10 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Leviticus23:11 Eye wòanyè lubablawo le Yehowa ŋku me
Leviticus23:12 Eye miatsɔ alẽvi
Leviticus23:13 Miatsɔ wɔ memee eta ƒe mamã ewoliawo eve
Leviticus23:14 Ke miekpɔ mɔ aɖu abolo
Leviticus23:15 Emegbe miabu kwasiɖa dedie adre tso ŋkeke
Leviticus23:16 mixlẽ ŋkeke blaatɔ̃ vaseɖe ŋkeke
Leviticus23:17 Mitsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe mamã ewoliawo eve ƒe abolo ʋaʋã eve atsɔ tso mia nɔƒewo katã vɛ
Leviticus23:18 Eye miatsɔ alẽvi adre
Leviticus23:19 Eyome miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe
Leviticus23:20 Eye nunɔla nanyè nu gbãtɔwo ƒe aboloawo akpe ɖe alẽvi eveawo ŋu le Yehowa ŋku me; nu kɔkɔewo wonye na Yehowa hena nunɔla.
Leviticus23:21 Ŋkeke ma dzi miaɖe gbe ƒã bena
Leviticus23:22 Ne mieŋe nu le miaƒe anyigba dzi la
Leviticus23:23 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus23:24 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ nanye dzudzɔgbe
Leviticus23:25 Miawɔ asinudɔa ɖeke o
Leviticus23:26 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus23:27 Ɣleti adrelia sia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia enye avulégbe
Leviticus23:28 Miawɔ dɔa ɖeke le ŋkeke sia dzi o
Leviticus23:29 Ne amea ɖe metsi nu ɖɔ le ŋkeke sia dzi o la
Leviticus23:30 eye ne amea de wɔ dɔa ɖe le ŋkeke sia dzi la
Leviticus23:31 Miawɔ dɔa ɖeke o
Leviticus23:32 Dzudzɔgbe blibo wòanye na mi
Leviticus23:33 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus23:34 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Tso ɣleti adrelia sia ƒe ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃lia dzi miaɖu agbadɔŋkekenyuie ŋkeke adre sɔŋ na Yehowa.
Leviticus23:35 Ŋkeke gbãtɔ enye takpegbe kɔkɔe
Leviticus23:36 Ŋkeke adre miasa dzovɔ na Yehowa. Ŋkeke enyilia nanye takpegbe kɔkɔe na mi
Leviticus23:37 Esiawo nye Yehowa ƒe ŋkekenyuie
Leviticus23:38 hekpe de Yehowa ƒe dzudzɔgbewo
Leviticus23:39 Ne mieƒo anyigba dzi nu ʋaʋãwo nu ƒu la
Leviticus23:40 Le ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi miatsɔ atikutsetse nyuitɔwo
Leviticus23:41 Eye miaɖui wòanye ŋkekenyuie na Yehowa ŋkeke adre sɔŋ le ƒe ɖeka me. Ɖoɖo mavɔ wòanye na miaƒe dzidzimeviwo
Leviticus23:42 Mianɔ agbadɔwo me ŋkeke adre sɔŋ
Leviticus23:43 bena miaƒe dzidzimeviwo nanyae bena
Leviticus23:44 Eye Mose gblɔ Yehowa ƒe ŋkekenyuieawo na Israel-viwo.
Leviticus24:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus24:2 De se na Israel-viwo be
Leviticus24:3 Eye Aron nadzrae ɖo le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Leviticus24:4 Wòatsɔ akaɖigbɛawo aɖo sikakaɖiti la dzi
Leviticus24:5 Eye natsɔ wɔ memee aƒo abolo wuieve; wɔ efa ƒe mamã ewoliawo eve naƒo abolo ɖeka
Leviticus24:6 eye naɖo wo ɖe agbaka eve me ɖe sikakplɔ̃ la dzi le Yehowa ŋku me; agbaka ɖeka nanye wo ame aɖe.
Leviticus24:7 Eye nada dzudzɔ donu ɖe agbakawo dzi
Leviticus24:8 Wòa ɖoe Yehowa ŋku me ɖaa dzudzɔ gbe sia dzudzɔgbe; ɖoɖo mavɔ wòanye na Israel-viwo.
Leviticus24:9 Woanye Aron kple viaŋutsuawo to
Leviticus24:10 Eye Israel-nyɔnua ɖe ƒe viŋutsua
Leviticus24:11 Eye Israel-nyɔnu la ƒe viŋutsu la ƒo ti de ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la
Leviticus24:12 Eye wolée da ɖi
Leviticus24:13 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Leviticus24:14 Kplɔ ɖiŋudola la yi asaɖa la godo
Leviticus24:15 Ke ale nagblɔ na Israel-viwo enye si: Ne amea ɖe do ɖiŋu na eƒe Mawu la
Leviticus24:16 Ne amea ɖe ƒo fi de Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ la
Leviticus24:17 Ne amea ɖe ƒo ame wòku la
Leviticus24:18 eye ne amea ɖe ƒo lã woku la
Leviticus24:19 Ne amea ɖe wo nu vevi nɔvia la
Leviticus24:20 nuveviwɔame ɖe nuveviwɔame teƒe
Leviticus24:21 Amesi ƒo lã wòku la
Leviticus24:22 Se ɖeka nanɔ mia si na amedzro kple duamevi siaa; elabena nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus24:23 Mose ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo; tete wokplɔ ɖiŋudola la do goe ɖe asaɖa godo
Leviticus25:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose le Sinai-to la dzi bena:
Leviticus25:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Leviticus25:3 Ƒe ade naƒã nu ɖe wò agble me
Leviticus25:4 Ke le ƒe adrelia me la anyigba la nagbɔ ɖe me na Yehowa
Leviticus25:5 Maŋe nusiwo mie ɖe flu me o
Leviticus25:6 Gake miaɖu nuku
Leviticus25:7 wò lã kple gbemelã
Leviticus25:8 Eye naxlẽ dzudzɔƒe adre; ƒe adre teƒe adre naxlẽ
Leviticus25:9 Le ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi woaku kpẽ atsae; le avulégbe la dzi woaku kpẽ atsa le miaƒe anyigba blibo la dzi.
Leviticus25:10 Miakɔ ƒe blaatɔ̃lia ŋu
Leviticus25:11 Ƒe blaatɔ̃lia nanye aseyetsoƒe na mi
Leviticus25:12 Aseyetsoƒe wònye
Leviticus25:13 Le aseyetsoƒe sia me amesiame nagaxɔ eƒe nuwo.
Leviticus25:14 Ne èdzra nu na nɔviwò
Leviticus25:15 Aseyetsoƒe la ŋu naƒle nu le nɔviwò si ɖo
Leviticus25:16 Ƒe geɖe kple eƒe asi gã
Leviticus25:17 Migatafa mia nɔewo o
Leviticus25:18 Mi wo nye ɖoɖoawo kple nye seawo dzi. Ne mielé ŋku ɖe wo ŋu
Leviticus25:19 anyigba la awɔ nu
Leviticus25:20 Ke ne miagblɔ be: Nuka ɖu ge míala le ƒe adrelia me
Leviticus25:21 mayra ɖe mia dzi le ƒe adelia me ale gbegbe be
Leviticus25:22 Ne míeƒã nu le ƒe enyilia me la
Leviticus25:23 Womadzra anyigba wòatsi ame si ɖaa o
Leviticus25:24 Eyata woagagbugbɔ anyigba axɔ le miaƒe anyigba blibo la dzi.
Leviticus25:25 Ne nɔviwò ɖo ko
Leviticus25:26 Ke ne exɔla mele ame la si o
Leviticus25:27 ekema wòabu ƒe alesi nu wòdzra nu la
Leviticus25:28 Gake ne mekpɔ nu wòde
Leviticus25:29 Ne amea ɖe dzra aƒea ɖe le ɖu
Leviticus25:30 Ke ne ƒe ɖeka la de
Leviticus25:31 Ne womeɖo gli ɖe kɔƒea ɖe ŋu o la
Leviticus25:32 Ke Lewitɔwo kpɔ mɔ axɔ aƒe
Leviticus25:33 Ke ne Lewitɔa ɖeke mexɔe o la
Leviticus25:34 Ke womadzra gbeɖuƒe
Leviticus25:35 Ne nu vɔ le nɔviwò si
Leviticus25:36 Megabia deme le esi o
Leviticus25:37 Megado ga ne ɖe deme dzi o
Leviticus25:38 Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus25:39 Ne nɔviwò ɖo ko
Leviticus25:40 Nenɔ gbɔwò abe agbatedɔwɔla kple gbɔwò me ene
Leviticus25:41 Emegbe woadzo le gbɔwò
Leviticus25:42 Nye dɔlawo wonye
Leviticus25:43 Megaɖu edzi kple sesẽ o
Leviticus25:44 Ke ne edi be
Leviticus25:45 Miekpɔ mo aƒle amedzro
Leviticus25:46 Woawo anye miaƒe ame
Leviticus25:47 Ne nu ɖo amedzro alo gbɔwò mea ɖe si
Leviticus25:48 ne edzra eɖokui la
Leviticus25:49 Etɔɖia alo etɔɖia ƒe viŋutsu alo eƒe ƒometɔ kekeake kpɔ mɔ axɔe
Leviticus25:50 Eya kple eƒlela nabu ƒe tso ƒe
Leviticus25:51 Ne ƒe geɖe gasusɔ la
Leviticus25:52 Ke nenye ƒe ʋea ɖe koe susɔ
Leviticus25:53 Wòanɔ egbɔ ƒe sia ƒe abe agbatedɔwɔla ene
Leviticus25:54 Ke ne womexɔe alea o la
Leviticus25:55 Elabena nye dɔlawo nye Israel-viwo
Leviticus26:1 Migawɔ legba na mia ɖokui o
Leviticus26:2 Miɖo ŋku nye dzudzɔgbewo dzi
Leviticus26:3 Ne mielé ŋku ɖe nye ɖoɖoawo ŋu
Leviticus26:4 ekema mana tsi nadza na mi le edzaɣi
Leviticus26:5 Luƒoɣi adidi vaseɖe weinhaɣi
Leviticus26:6 Mana anyigba dzi nata
Leviticus26:7 Mianya miaƒe futɔwo
Leviticus26:8 Mia dometɔ atɔ̃ anyẽ ame alafa ɖeka
Leviticus26:9 Matrɔ ɖe mia ŋu
Leviticus26:10 Mianɔ agblemenu xoxoawo ɖum
Leviticus26:11 Maɖo nye nɔƒe ɖe mia dome
Leviticus26:12 Mazɔ mia dome
Leviticus26:13 Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus26:14 Ke ne mieɖo tom o
Leviticus26:15 ne mieɖe nye ɖoɖoawo ɖa
Leviticus26:16 ekema nye hã mawo nu siawo mi
Leviticus26:17 Maɖe ŋku ata mi
Leviticus26:18 Ne nusiawo va tso
Leviticus26:19 Maŋe miaƒe dada vivivo la nu
Leviticus26:20 Yakatsyɔ miawo do
Leviticus26:21 Gake ne miaƒe nuwɔwɔwo gatsi tre ɖe ŋunye ko
Leviticus26:22 Maɖo lã wɔadãwo ɖe mia dome; eye woaɖe viwo le mia ŋu
Leviticus26:23 Ke ne miena metso nusiawo xlã nu mi o
Leviticus26:24 ekema nye hã matsi tre ɖe mia ŋu
Leviticus26:25 Maɖo yi de mia dome
Leviticus26:26 Magblẽ abolo
Leviticus26:27 Ke ne nusiawo va tso hafi mieɖo tom o
Leviticus26:28 ekema nye hã mado dɔmedzoe atsi tre ɖe mia ŋu
Leviticus26:29 Eye miaɖu mia viŋutsuwo kple mia vinyɔnuwo ƒe lã.
Leviticus26:30 Magbã miaƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo
Leviticus26:31 Magbã miaƒe duwo woazu glikpo
Leviticus26:32 Mana anyigba la nazu gbegbe
Leviticus26:33 Maka mi ahlẽ ɖe dukɔwo dome
Leviticus26:34 Ekema anyigba la akpo gbɔdzɔe: le ɣeyiɣi
Leviticus26:35 Agba ɖe me le ɣeyiɣi
Leviticus26:36 Made vɔvɔ̃ lã me na mia dometɔ
Leviticus26:37 Mialɔ mia nɔewo aƒu anyi
Leviticus26:38 Miatsrɔ̃ ɖe dukɔwo dome
Leviticus26:39 Eye mia dometɔ kpɔtɔeawo atsrɔ̃ ɖe woƒe vodadawo me
Leviticus26:40 Emegbe ne woaʋu woawo ŋutɔ kple wo fofowo ƒe vo
Leviticus26:41 eye nye hã metsi tre ɖe wo ŋu hekplɔ wo va woƒe futɔwo ƒe anyigba dzii la
Leviticus26:42 ekema mado ŋku nu
Leviticus26:43 Elabena esi wogblẽ anyigba la ɖi wòzu gbegbe la
Leviticus26:44 Ke ne wole woƒe futɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi la
Leviticus26:45 Le woƒe nyui didi ta maɖo ŋku nu
Leviticus26:46 Esiawo nye ɖoɖowo
Leviticus27:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Leviticus27:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Leviticus27:3 Ale nado asi lae enye si: Ne ame la nye ŋutsu le ƒe blave kple ƒe blaade dome la
Leviticus27:4 ke nenye nyɔnue la
Leviticus27:5 Ne ame la le ƒe atɔ̃ kple ƒe ewo domee la
Leviticus27:6 Ke ne ame la le dzinu ɖeka kple ƒe atɔ domee la
Leviticus27:7 Ne ame la xɔ ƒe blaade kple vɔ la
Leviticus27:8 Ke ne ame la da ahe
Leviticus27:9 Nenye lã
Leviticus27:10 Mekpɔ mɔ aɖo lii alo atsɔ lã nyui aɖuɖɔ manyomanyoa alo atsɔ manyomanyoa aɖo li nyuia o; ke ne eɖuɖɔe la
Leviticus27:11 Ke nenye lã makɔmakɔ
Leviticus27:12 Eye nunɔla nado asi ɖe lã la ƒe nyonyome alo manyomanyome ŋu
Leviticus27:13 Ke ne ebe
Leviticus27:14 Ne amea ɖe kɔ eƒe xɔ ŋu na Yehowa la
Leviticus27:15 Ke ne amesi kɔ eƒe xɔ ŋu be
Leviticus27:16 Ne amea ɖe ko eƒe agble
Leviticus27:17 Ne ekɔ eƒe agble ŋu tso aseyetsoƒe dzi la
Leviticus27:18 Ke ne aseyetsoƒe va yi
Leviticus27:19 Ke ne amesi kɔ eŋu be
Leviticus27:20 Ne mexɔ agble la o
Leviticus27:21 ke ne agble la ŋu vo le aseyetsoƒe dzi la
Leviticus27:22 Ne amea ɖe kɔ agble
Leviticus27:23 ekema nunɔla nabu asi la nɛ vaseɖe aseyetsoƒe dzi
Leviticus27:24 Ke amesi ƒe domenyinu wònye
Leviticus27:25 Nado asiawo katã ɖe sekel kɔkɔe la ŋu
Leviticus27:26 Ke amea ɖeke mekpɔ mɔ akɔ lãwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo ŋu na Yehowa o
Leviticus27:27 Nenye lã makɔmakɔe la
Leviticus27:28 Ke ne amea ɖe ko eƒe nua ɖe ŋu hetsɔ ɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa ɖikaa
Leviticus27:29 Ne wodo busu amea ɖe la
Leviticus27:30 Anyigba dzi nuwo katã ƒe mamã ewoliawo ɖeka nye Yehowa to
Leviticus27:31 Ke ne amea ɖe be
Leviticus27:32 Lã
Leviticus27:33 Womadzro eme be
Leviticus27:34 Esiawo nye se

Numbers2:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kple Aron bena:
Numbers2:2 Israel-viwo naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe woƒe aflaga
Numbers2:3 Yuda-to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe woƒe aflaga gbɔ hamehame le ɣedzeƒe gome. Yuda-viwo ƒe amegã nye Naheson
Numbers2:4 amesi ƒe ana wɔlawo le ame akpe blaadre vo ene alafa ade.
Numbers2:5 Isaxar-to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe wo xa
Numbers2:6 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaatɔ̃ vɔ ene alafa ene.
Numbers2:7 Eye Zebulon-to la nakpe ɖe wo ŋu. Zebulon viwo ƒe amegã nye Eliab. Xelon vi
Numbers2:8 amesi ƒe
Numbers2:9 Aʋawɔla
Numbers2:10 Ruben-to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe woƒe aflaga gbã hamehame le dziehe gome. Ruben-viwo ƒe amegã nye Elizur
Numbers2:11 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blane vo ade alafa atɔ̃.
Numbers2:12 Simeon ƒe to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe wo xa. Simeon-viwo ƒe amegã nye Selumiel
Numbers2:13 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaatɔ̃ vɔ asieke alafa etɔ̃.
Numbers2:14 Eye Gad-to la nakpe ɖe wo ŋu Gad-viwo ƒe amegã nye Elyasaf
Numbers2:15 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blane vɔ atɔ̃ alafa ade blaatɔ̃.
Numbers2:16 Aʋawɔla
Numbers2:17 Emegbe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la kple Lewitɔwo ƒe asaɖa
Numbers2:18 Efrayim-to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe woƒe aflaga gbɔ hamehame le ɣetoɖoƒe gome. Efrayim-viwo ƒe amegã nye Elisama
Numbers2:19 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blane alafa atɔ̃.
Numbers2:20 Manase ƒe to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe wo xa. Manase-viwo ƒe amegã nye Gamliel
Numbers2:21 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaetɔ̃ vɔ eve alafa eve.
Numbers2:22 Eye Benyamin-to la nakpe ɖe wo ŋu. Benyamin-viwo ƒe amegã nye Abidan
Numbers2:23 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaetɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ alafa ene.
Numbers2:24 Aʋawɔla
Numbers2:25 Dan-to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe woƒe aflaga gbɔ hamehame le anyiehe gome. Dan-viwo ƒe amegã nye Axiezer
Numbers2:26 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaade vɔ eve alafa adre.
Numbers2:27 Aser-to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe wo xa. Aser-viwo ƒe amegã nye Pagiel
Numbers2:28 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blane vɔ ɖeke alafa atɔ̃

Numbers2:30 amesi ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaatɔ̃ vɔ etɔ̃ alafa ene.
Numbers2:31 Aʋawɔla

Numbers3:1 Esiawo nye Aron kple Mose viwo
Numbers3:2 Aron viŋutsuwo ƒe ŋkɔwo nye si: Eƒe ŋgɔgbevi Nadab
Numbers3:3 Esiawo nye nunɔla Aron
Numbers3:4 Ke Nadab kple Abihu ku le Yehowa ŋku me
Numbers3:5 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers3:6 Na Lewi-to la nava nunɔla Aron gbɔ
Numbers3:7 Eye woawɔ do
Numbers3:8 Woakpɔ Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ŋuti nuwo dzi
Numbers3:9 Eye natsɔ Lewitɔwo ade asi na Aron kple viaŋutsuwo
Numbers3:10 Eye naɖo Aron kple viaŋutsuwo
Numbers3:11 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers3:12 Nye ŋutɔe ɖe Lewitɔwo le Israel-vi bubuawo dome ɖe ŋgɔgbevi
Numbers3:13 Ŋgɔgbeviwo katã nye tɔnye; elabena gbesigbe mewu ŋgɔgbeviwo katã le Egipte-nyigba dzi la
Numbers3:14 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose le Sinai-gbedzi bena:
Numbers3:15 Tia Lewitɔwo xlẽ le wo fofowo ƒe aƒewo kple woƒe ƒomeawo nu; ŋutsuvi
Numbers3:16 Eye Mose tia wo xlẽ
Numbers3:17 Lewi-viwo ƒe ŋkɔwo nye si: Gerson
Numbers3:18 Gerson-viwo ƒe ŋkɔwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Libni kple Simei.
Numbers3:19 Kehat-viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Amram
Numbers3:20 Eye Merari viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Maxeli kple Musi. Esiawo nye Lewitɔwo ƒe ƒome le wo fofowo ƒe aƒewo nu.
Numbers3:21 Gerson-hawo nye: Libni-viwo ƒe ƒome kple Simei-viwo ƒe ƒome. Woawo nye Gerson ƒomeawo.
Numbers3:22 Wotia ŋutsu
Numbers3:23 Eye Gerson ƒome la ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe nɔƒe la megbe le ɣedzeƒe gome.
Numbers3:24 Gerson ƒome la ƒe amegã nye Eliasaf
Numbers3:25 Dɔ
Numbers3:26 kpɔ
Numbers3:27 Kehat-hawo nye. Amram-viwo ƒe ƒome
Numbers3:28 Ŋutsu
Numbers3:29 Kehat ƒome la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe nɔƒe la ƒe axa dzi le dziehe gome.
Numbers3:30 Kehat ƒome la ƒe amegã nye Elzafan
Numbers3:31 Woƒe dɔe nye be
Numbers3:32 Lewitɔwo ƒe amegã ƒe tatɔ enye Eleazar
Numbers3:33 Merari-hawo nye: Maxeli-viwo ƒe ƒome kple Musi-viwo ƒe ƒome. Woawo nye Merari ƒomeawo.
Numbers3:34 Wo dome ŋutsu
Numbers3:35 Merari ƒome la ƒe amegã nye Zuriel
Numbers3:36 Merari-viwo ƒe dɔe nye be
Numbers3:37 kpɔtiawo katã kple woƒe afɔwo

Numbers3:39 Ŋutsu

Numbers3:41 Tia Lewitɔwo na Yehowa ɖe Israel-viwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã teƒe; eye natia Lewitɔwo ƒe lãwo ɖe Israel-viwo ƒe lã ŋgɔgbeawo katã teƒe.
Numbers3:42 Eye Mose tia Israel-viwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã xlẽ
Numbers3:43 Eye ŋutsu ŋgɔgbeawo katã
Numbers3:44 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers3:45 Tia Lewitɔwo nam ɖe Israel-viwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã teƒe
Numbers3:46 Ke woaxe fe ɖe ame alafa eve blaadre vɔ etɔ̃
Numbers3:47 naxa sekel kokoe atɔ̃ ɖe ame ɖeka ta; gera blave nanye sekel ɖeka.
Numbers3:48 Eye natsɔ wo dometɔ
Numbers3:49 Eye Mose xɔ sekel kɔkɔe akpe ɖeka alafa etɔ̃ blaade vɔ atɔ̃
Numbers3:50 le amesiwo Israel-viwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo tsɔ sɔ gbɔ wu Lewitɔwo la si.
Numbers3:51 Eye Mose tsa ga la na Aron kple viaŋutsuwo
Numbers4:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kpakple Aron bena:
Numbers4:2 Miɖe Kehat viwo le Lewitɔwo dome
Numbers4:3 Amesiwo xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ kple vo vaseɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃
Numbers4:4 Kehat viwo ƒe dɔ enye be
Numbers4:5 Ne ameha la le hoho ge la
Numbers4:6 eye woatsɔ nyogbalẽ atsyɔ edzi
Numbers4:7 Eye woakeke aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ɖe ŋkumeɖobolokplɔ̃ la dzi
Numbers4:8 Emegbe woatso nyagadzĩ atsyɔ nuawo dzi
Numbers4:9 Eyome woabia akaɖiti la kple eŋu kaɖigbɛawo
Numbers4:10 emegbe woabia nyogbalẽ ɖe eŋu
Numbers4:11 Woakeke aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ɖe sikavɔsamlekpui la dzi
Numbers4:12 Emegbe woabia nusi wo katã ŋu dɔ wowɔna le kɔkɔeƒe la
Numbers4:13 Emegbe woalɔ afi le vɔsamlekpui la me
Numbers4:14 Eyome woafɔ eŋu nu

Numbers4:16 Eleazar

Numbers4:21 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers4:22 Ŋlɔ Gerson viwo ƒe xexlẽme hã le wo fofowo ƒe aƒewo kple woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
Numbers4:23 Tia amesiwo xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ kple vɔ vaseɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃
Numbers4:24 Gerson viwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple woƒe nutsɔwo nye si:
Numbers4:25 Woawoe atsɔ nɔƒe la ƒe kuntruawo kple Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la tamekuntruawo kple nyogbalẽ
Numbers4:26 kpɔ

Numbers4:49 Mose na wòfiã amesiame ƒe dɔ kple agba
Numbers5:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers5:2 De se na Israel-viwo be
Numbers5:3 Woaɖo wo ɖe asaɖa la godo
Numbers5:4 Israel-viwo wɔ nenema
Numbers5:5 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers5:6 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Ne ŋutsu alo nyɔnua ɖe da vo ɖe amea ɖe ŋu
Numbers5:7 Eye wòaʋu eƒe vo
Numbers5:8 Ke ne ƒometɔ kekeake mele ame la si
Numbers5:9 Israel-viwo ƒe nunana kɔkɔe
Numbers5:10 Ne amea ɖe na nunana kɔkɔe la
Numbers5:11 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers5:12 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Ne ŋutsua ɖe srɔ̃ da ƒu
Numbers5:13 eye ŋutsu bubu ɖe asi eŋu
Numbers5:14 eye ŋuʋaʋã ɖo ŋutsu la me
Numbers5:15 ekema ŋutsu la nakplɔ srɔ̃a ava nunɔla gbɔ
Numbers5:16 Nunɔla la nana nyɔnua nate va
Numbers5:17 Eye nunɔla la naku tsi kɔkɔe la ɖe agba me
Numbers5:18 Emegbe nunɔla la nakplɔ nyɔnu la aɖo Yehowa ŋku me
Numbers5:19 Eye nunɔla naka atam na nyɔnu la agblɔ bena: Ne ŋutsua ɖeke medo gbɔwò o
Numbers5:20 Ke ne eda ƒu ɖe srɔ̃wò ŋu
Numbers5:21 Ale nunɔla naka atam agblɔ fiƒoɖenyawo na nyɔnu la bena: Yehowa ana fiƒode la naɖi ŋuwò
Numbers5:22 Tsi
Numbers5:23 Emegbe nunɔla naŋlɔ fiƒodenya siawo ɖe agbalẽ dzi
Numbers5:24 Eyome wòana nyɔnu la nano tsi
Numbers5:25 Eye nunɔla naxɔ anukluiwɔwɔ-nuɖuvɔsa la le nyɔnu si
Numbers5:26 Nunɔla la naku nuɖuvɔsa la asiʋlo ɖeka
Numbers5:27 Ne eno tsi lã
Numbers5:28 Ke ne nyɔnu la megblẽ kɔ ɖo o
Numbers5:29 Esia nye se le anukluiwɔwɔ ŋu. Ne nyɔnua ɖe ɖa ƒu ɖe srɔ̃a ŋu
Numbers5:30 alo ŋuʋaʋã ɖo ŋutsua ɖe me
Numbers5:31 Eye fɔɖiɖi manɔ ŋutsu la dzi o
Numbers6:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers6:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Numbers6:3 ekema mano wein alo nu muamea ɖeke o
Numbers6:4 Ŋkeke
Numbers6:5 Talũhɛ made eƒe ta le ŋkeke
Numbers6:6 Made ame kuku gbɔ le ŋkeke
Numbers6:7 Eye magblẽ ko ɖo le fofoa alo ɖada
Numbers6:8 Ame kɔkɔe wònye na Yehowa le ŋkeke
Numbers6:9 Ke ne amea ɖe ku ku kpata ɖe egbɔ
Numbers6:10 Eye le ŋkeke enyiagbe la wòatsɔ akpakpa eve alo ahɔnevi eve avae na nunɔla le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu.
Numbers6:11 Nunɔla la natsɔ ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe
Numbers6:12 Emegbe wòagagbugbɔ adzɔgbe aɖe na Yehowa
Numbers6:13 Esia nye se na amesi ɖe adzɔgbe hekɔ eɖokui ŋu. Ne ŋkeke
Numbers6:14 Eye wòatsɔ nusiawo asa vɔe na Yehowa
Numbers6:15 kpakple kusi
Numbers6:16 Eye nunɔla natsɔ wo ava Yehowa ŋku me
Numbers6:17 Ke wòatsɔ agbo la kple kusi
Numbers6:18 Eye amesi ɖe adzɔgbe hekɔ eɖokui ŋu la
Numbers6:19 Ne amesi ɖe adzɔgbe hekɔ eɖokui ŋu
Numbers6:20 Eye nunɔla nanyè wo le Yehowa ŋku me
Numbers6:21 Esia nye se le amesi ɖe adzɔgbe hekɔ eɖokui ŋu la
Numbers6:22 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers6:23 Gblɔ na Aron kple viaŋutsuawo be: Ale miayra Israel-viwo agblɔ na wo enye si:
Numbers6:24 Yehowa ayra wò
Numbers6:25 Yehowa akɔ ŋku me ɖe wò
Numbers6:26 Yehowa atrɔ mo ɖe gbɔwò
Numbers6:27 Ale woayɔ nye ŋkɔ atɔ ɖe Israel-viwo ŋu
Numbers7:1 Esi Mose wu nɔƒe la tutu nu vɔ
Numbers7:2 Israel-amegã
Numbers7:3 Woƒe nunana
Numbers7:4 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Numbers7:5 Xɔ wo le wo si hena Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ŋu dɔwo wowɔ
Numbers7:6 Tete Mose xɔ tasiaɖamawo kple nyiawo
Numbers7:7 Etsɔ tasiaɖam eve kple nyi ene na Gerson viwo
Numbers7:8 Eye wotsɔ tasiaɖam ene kple nyi enyi na Merari viwo
Numbers7:9 Ke metsɔ ɖeke na Kehai viwo o
Numbers7:10 Esime wole ami sim na vɔsamlekpuia la
Numbers7:11 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Woatsɔ woƒe nunanawo vɛ ɖekaɖeka
Numbers7:12 Amesi na nu le ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi
Numbers7:13 Nusiwo wòna
Numbers7:14 sikanutɔgba ɖeka
Numbers7:15 nyitsuvi ɖeka
Numbers7:16 gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka woawɔ nuvɔ̃vɔsae
Numbers7:17 nyi eve

Numbers7:89 Ne Mose yi ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Numbers8:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers8:2 Ƒo nu kple Aron
Numbers8:3 Aron wo nenema
Numbers8:4 Sika wotsɔ tu akaɖiti blibo lae; ɖe wotu ati la kple eŋu seƒoƒoawo. Alesi Yehowa fia Mose la
Numbers8:5 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers8:6 Ɖe Lewitɔwo le Israel-viwo dome
Numbers8:7 Ale nawɔ na wo ákɔ wo ŋu enye si: Wu tsi
Numbers8:8 Woana nyitsuvi ɖeka
Numbers8:9 Emegbe nana Lewitɔwo nate va Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ŋgɔ
Numbers8:10 Eyome nana Lewitɔwo nate va Yehowa ŋku me
Numbers8:11 Eye Aron nanyè Lewitɔwo le Yehowa ŋku me abe Israel-viwo ƒe nunana ene
Numbers8:12 Lewitɔwo natsɔ woƒe asiwò aɖo nyitsuawo ƒe tame
Numbers8:13 Kplɔ Lewitɔwo ɖo Aron kple viaŋutsuawo ŋku me
Numbers8:14 Ale naɖe Lewitɔwo le Israel-viwo dome
Numbers8:15 Emegbe Lewitɔwo nava
Numbers8:16 Elabena tɔnye wonye blibo le Israel-viwo dome. Nye ŋutɔe xɔ wo ɖe Israel-viwo ƒe ŋgɔgbevi
Numbers8:17 Israel-viwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã kple lãwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeawo nye tɔnye; elabena esi mewu ŋgɔgbeviwo katã le Egipte-nyigba dzi la
Numbers8:18 Eye mexɔ Lewitɔwo ɖe Israel-viwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã teƒe.
Numbers8:19 Meɖe Lewitɔwo le Israel-viwo dome na Aron kple viaŋutsuawo
Numbers8:20 Eye Mose kple Aron kpakple Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la wɔ nenema: alesi Yehowa de se na; Mose le Lewitɔwo ŋu ta
Numbers8:21 Lewitɔwo ɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa le wo ɖokui ŋu
Numbers8:22 Emegbe Lewitɔwo yi
Numbers8:23 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers8:24 Nusi Lewitɔwo nawɔ enye si: Wo dometɔ
Numbers8:25 Ke ne eva xɔ ƒe blaatɔ̃ la
Numbers8:26 Gake ate ŋu akpe asi ɖe nɔviawo ŋu
Numbers9:1 Esi woʋu tso Egipte-nyigba dzi le ƒe evelia ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ dzi la
Numbers9:2 Israel-viwo naɖu ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie la ɖe eƒe ɣeyiɣi dzi.
Numbers9:3 Miaɖui ɖe eƒe ɣeyiɣi dzi le ɣleti sia ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia dzi le fiẽ ɖe ɖoɖo kple se
Numbers9:4 Eye Mose ƒo nu kple Israel viwo be
Numbers9:5 Eye Israel-viwo ɖu ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie la le Sinai-gbedzi le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia dzi le tiẽ; alesi Yehowa ɖe se na Mose la
Numbers9:6 Ke ŋutsua ɖewo gblẽ kɔ ɖo ɖe ame kukuwo ŋu
Numbers9:7 eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Miegblẽ kɔ ɖo ɖe ame kuku ŋu. Nukaŋuti miekpɔ mɔ atsɔ vɔsa vɛ na Yehowa akpe ɖe Israel-viwo ŋu le ɣeyiɣi la dzi o?
Numbers9:8 Mose ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Milala
Numbers9:9 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers9:10 Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Ne mia ŋutɔwo alo miaƒe dzidzimeviwo dometɔa de gblẽ kɔ ɖo ɖe ame kuku ŋu alo yi nugbe la
Numbers9:11 Woawo naɖui le ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia dzi le fiẽ
Numbers9:12 Womagblẽ ɖeke ɖi ŋu nake ɖe edzi o
Numbers9:13 Ne amea de megblẽ kɔ ɖo o
Numbers9:14 Ne amedzro
Numbers9:15 Gbesigbe wotu nɔƒea la
Numbers9:16 Alea wònɔ ɖaa; alilikpo la tsyɔ edzi
Numbers9:17 Ne alilikpo la ho le agbadɔa dzi la
Numbers9:18 Le Yehowa ƒe sedede nu Israel-viwo hona
Numbers9:19 Ne alilikpo la tsi nɔƒe la dzi ŋkeke geɖewo la
Numbers9:20 Ne alilikpo la tsi nɔƒea dzi ŋkeke ʋeea de ko la
Numbers9:21 Eva me ɣeaɖewoɣi bena
Numbers9:22 Ɖewo etsia anyi ŋkeke eve
Numbers9:23 Le Yehowa ƒo sedede nu woƒua asaɖa anyi
Numbers10:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers10:2 Tso klosalo wo kpẽ eve
Numbers10:3 Ne woku kpẽawo wòtso tatata la
Numbers10:4 Ke ne woku kpẽ ɖeka ko tatata la
Numbers10:5 Ne woku kpẽawo tsiã ɖe nu la
Numbers10:6 Eye ne wogaku wo zi evelia tsiã ɖe nu la
Numbers10:7 Ne wobe
Numbers10:8 Aron viŋutsu
Numbers10:9 Ne mieho aʋa le miaƒe anyigba dzi ɖe miaƒe futɔ
Numbers10:10 Gbesigbe miele dzidzɔ kpɔm
Numbers10:11 Le ƒe evelia me
Numbers10:12 Eye Israel-viwo ho tso Sinai-gbedzi hamehame
Numbers10:13 Esia nye zi gbãtɔ woho ɖe se
Numbers10:14 Yuda-viwo ƒe asaɖa la ho gbã kple woƒe aflaga hamehame
Numbers10:15 Amesi le Isaxar-viwo to la ƒe aʋakɔ nu
Numbers10:16 eye Eliab
Numbers10:17 Emegbe wokaka nɔƒe la
Numbers10:18 Eyome Ruben ƒe asaɖa la ho kple woƒe aflaga hamehame; woƒe aʋakɔ la ƒe tatɔ enye Elizur
Numbers10:19 Amesi le Simeon-viwo to la ƒe aʋakɔ nu
Numbers10:20 eye Elyasaf
Numbers10:21 Emegbe Kehat-viwo
Numbers10:22 Eyome Efrayim-viwo ƒe asaɖa la ho kple woƒe aflaga hamehame; woƒe aʋakɔ la ƒe tatɔ enye Elisama
Numbers10:23 Amesi le Manase-viwo to la ƒe aʋakɔ nu
Numbers10:24 eye Abidan
Numbers10:25 Emegbe Dan-viwo ƒe asaɖa la ho kple woƒe aflaga hamehame
Numbers10:26 Amesi le Aser-viwo ƒe to la ƒe aʋakɔ nu
Numbers10:27 eye Axira
Numbers10:28 Ale Israel-viwo ho hamehame enye si.
Numbers10:29 Eye Mose gblɔ na Hobab toa
Numbers10:30 Eɖo ŋu bena: Nyemayi kpli mi o
Numbers10:31 Egblɔ nɛ bena: Megagblẽ mí ɖi o dzro
Numbers10:32 ne èyi kpli mí la
Numbers10:33 Eye woho tso Yehowa to la gbɔ hezɔ ŋkeke etɔ̃ ƒe mɔ
Numbers10:34 Ne woho la
Numbers10:35 Ne aɖaka la ho la
Numbers10:36 Eye ne edro la
Numbers11:1 Eye dukɔ la li liʋĩliʋi le Yehowa ŋu le fuwɔame ta Yehowa see; eye wòdo dɔmedzoe eye Yehowa na dzo dze aƒe le wo dome
Numbers11:2 Tete dukɔ la do ɣli na Mose
Numbers11:3 Eye wona ŋkɔ afima be „dzobiƒe“
Numbers11:4 Eye yakame
Numbers11:5 Mieɖo ŋku tɔmelã
Numbers11:6 Azɔ miaƒe veme ƒu; naneke mele afisia o
Numbers11:7 Mana la lolo abe xetsetsee ene
Numbers11:8 Eye dukɔ la kaka heyi efɔ ge le afisiafi; wogbãnɛ le te dzi
Numbers11:9 Ne zãmu dza ɖe asaɖa la me le zã me la
Numbers11:10 Mose se
Numbers11:11 Eye Mose gblɔ na Yehowa bena: Nukaŋuti nèwɔ vɔ ɖe wò dɔla ŋu
Numbers11:12 Alo nyee fɔ dukɔ blibo sia ƒe fua? Eye nyee dzi wo
Numbers11:13 Afika makpɔ lã atsoe na dukɔ blibo sia? Elabena wole avi fam nam le gbɔgblɔm be: Na lã mí miaɖu!
Numbers11:14 Nye ɖeka nyemate ŋu atsɔ dukɔ blibo sia o
Numbers11:15 Nenye alea nèle wɔ ye gee la
Numbers11:16 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ƒo Israel-ame tsitsi blaadreawo
Numbers11:17 Maɖi ava ƒo nu kpli wò le afima
Numbers11:18 Ke gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Mikɔ mia ɖokui ŋu hena etsɔ; miakpɔ lã aɖu
Numbers11:19 Menye ŋkeke ɖeka alo ŋkeke eve
Numbers11:20 boŋ ɣleti ɖeka sɔŋ
Numbers11:21 Mose ɖo ŋu bena: Dukɔ la dometɔ
Numbers11:22 Alẽ alo nyie wole wuwu ge
Numbers11:23 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ɖe Yehowa ƒe asi to ɖe emea? Azɔ àkpɔe be
Numbers11:24 Eye Mose ɖo yi ɖagblɔ Yehowa ƒe nyawo na dukɔ la. Eƒo dukɔ la ƒe ame tsitsi blaadreawo nu ƒu
Numbers11:25 Tete Yehowa ɖi va le alilikpo me heƒo nu kplii
Numbers11:26 Ke ŋutsu eve tsi asaɖa la me
Numbers11:27 Tete ŋutsuvia ɖe ƒu du ɖagblɔ na Mose bena: Eldad kple Medad wode asi nyagbɔgblɔ me ɖi le asaɖa la me.
Numbers11:28 Eye Yosua
Numbers11:29 Ke Mose ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Wòe le ŋu ʋã ge ɖe nunyea? Oo
Numbers11:30 Emegbe Mose kple Israel-ame tsitsiawo gbugbɔ yi asaɖa la me.
Numbers11:31 Tete Yehowa na yaa ɖe ƒo
Numbers11:32 Eye dukɔ la tso yi ɖafɔ tegliawo ŋkeke blibo la kple zã blibo la kpakple ŋkeke
Numbers11:33 Lã la mekpɔ do le aɖu tame na wo wòahayi wo katã ɖu ge avɔ o
Numbers11:34 Eye wona ŋkɔ teƒe la bena „nudzrolawo ɖiƒe“
Numbers11:35 Emegbe dukɔ la ho tso „nudzrolawo ɖiƒe“ heva Xazerot
Numbers12:1 Eye Miryam kple Aron ƒo nu le Mose ŋu le Kus-nyɔnu la ta
Numbers12:2 hegblɔ bena: Alo Mose ɖeɖe koe Yehowa ƒo nu kplia? Ɖe meƒo nu kple miawo hã oa? Eye Yehowa see.
Numbers12:3 Ke Mose la wu amesiwo katã le anyigba dzi.
Numbers12:4 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron kpakple Miryam bena: Mia kple etɔ̃ la mido va Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la gbɔ
Numbers12:5 Tete Yehowa ɖi va agbadɔ la nu le alilikpo dodoa ɖe me
Numbers12:6 Eye wògblɔ bena: Mise gbenye! Ne amea ɖe nye Yehowa ƒe nyagblɔɖila le mia dome la
Numbers12:7 Ke menye alea mewɔna na nye dɔla Mose
Numbers12:8 boŋ nye ŋutɔ meƒoa nu kplii ŋku me kple ŋku me
Numbers12:9 Eye Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe wo ŋu hedzo.
Numbers12:10 Esi alilikpo la ho tso agbadɔa dzi la
Numbers12:11 Tete Aron gblɔ na Mose bena: Ao
Numbers12:12 Megana wòano abe ɖevi
Numbers12:13 Tete Mose ɖo ɣli na Yehowa bena: Ao
Numbers12:14 Yehowa ɖo ŋu na Mose bena; Ɖe wònye fofoa ye ɖe ta ɖe mo nɛ la
Numbers12:15 Ale woɖe Miryam xa ɖe asaɖa godo ŋkeke adre; ke dukɔ la meho o
Numbers12:16 Emegbe dukɔ la ho tso Xazerot
Numbers13:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers13:2 Dɔ ŋutsuwo ɖa

Numbers13:4 Woƒe ŋkɔwo nye Samua

Numbers13:15 Guel

Numbers13:17 Eye Mose dɔ wo
Numbers13:18 Milé ŋku ɖe alesi anyigba la le kple dukɔ
Numbers13:19 alesi anyigba
Numbers13:20 alesi anyigba la le
Numbers13:21 Eye woyi ɖatsa ŋku le anyigba la dzi tso Zin-gbedzi vaseɖe Rexob heɖo ta Xamat.
Numbers13:22 Woɖo ta dziehe vaseɖe Xebron
Numbers13:23 Eye wova Eskol-bali la me
Numbers13:24 Woyɔa teƒe ma bena Eskol-bali me le weintsetse
Numbers13:25 Esi wotsa ŋku le anyigba la dzi vɔ la

Numbers13:27 Eye wòto woƒe numegbe la nɛ bena: Miede anyigba
Numbers13:28 negbe dukɔ
Numbers13:29 Amalekitɔwo le dziehe gome
Numbers13:30 Ke Kaleb tsi nya ɖe dukɔ la nu hexɔ ɖe Mose dzi bena: Míate ŋu ade
Numbers13:31 Ke ŋutsu
Numbers13:32 Eye wode vɔvɔ̃ anyigba
Numbers13:33 Miekpɔ Enak viwo
Numbers14:1 Tete ha blibo la do ɣlikpɛ
Numbers14:2 Eye Israel-viwo katã li Mose kple Aron ŋu
Numbers14:3 Nukata gɔ̃ Yehowa kplɔ mí va anyigba sia dzi
Numbers14:4 Eye wogblɔ na wo nɔewo bena: Mina míaɖo tatɔ na mía ɖokui
Numbers14:5 Tete Mose kple Aron tsyɔ mo anyi ɖe Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la katã ŋku me.
Numbers14:6 Ke Yosua
Numbers14:7 eye wogblɔ na Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la bena: Anyigba
Numbers14:8 Ne miaƒe nu dze Yehowa ŋu ko la
Numbers14:9 Ɖeko migadze aglã ɖe Yehowa ŋu o
Numbers14:10 Ke ha blibo la be
Numbers14:11 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Zi nenie gɔ̃ dukɔ sia ado vlom
Numbers14:12 Eyata matsɔ dɔvɔ̃ atsrɔ̃ wo
Numbers14:13 Mose gblɔ na Yehowa bena: Evɔ wònye Egiptetɔwo see bena
Numbers14:14 Eye amesiwo see la
Numbers14:15 Nenye be
Numbers14:16 Ɖe Yehowa mekpe
Numbers14:17 Eyata Aƒetɔ
Numbers14:18 Yehowa gbɔa dzi blewu
Numbers14:19 Eyata tsɔ dukɔ sia ƒe vodada ke wo le wò amenuveve gã la nu
Numbers14:20 Yehowa ɖo ŋu be: Matsɔe ake
Numbers14:21 Gake zi alesi mele agbe
Numbers14:22 ŋutsu
Numbers14:23 makpɔ anyigba
Numbers14:24 Ke makplɔ nye dɔla Kaleb ayi anyigba
Numbers14:25 Ke Amalekitɔwo kple Kanaanitɔwo nɔ gbadzaƒe. Etsɔ miaho agbugbɔ aɖo ta gbedzi le Avaƒu la gbɔ!
Numbers14:26 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kpakple Aron bena:
Numbers14:27 Zi nenie gã ha vɔ̃ɖi sia ali ŋunye? Elabena mese alesi Israel-viwo li liʋĩliʋĩ ɖe ŋunye lae.
Numbers14:28 Gblɔ na wo be
Numbers14:29 Mia dometɔ
Numbers14:30 Miade anyigba
Numbers14:31 Ke makplɔ mia vi
Numbers14:32 Gake miawo miaku ɖe gbe sia dzi kokoko.
Numbers14:33 Mia viwo anye lãnyilawo le gbeadzi ƒe blane sɔŋ
Numbers14:34 Ŋkeke blane
Numbers14:35 Nye Yehowae gblɔe
Numbers14:36 Eye Yehowa na ɖɔ vɔ̃ɖia ɖe ɖo amesiwo Mose dɔ be
Numbers14:37 eye woku
Numbers14:38 Ke Yosua
Numbers14:39 Esi Mose gblɔ nya siawo na Israel-viwo katã la
Numbers14:40 Wotso ŋdi kanya
Numbers14:41 Ke Mose gblɔ bena: Nukaŋuti miele Yehowa ƒe se la dzi dam? Mehele edzi dze ge o!
Numbers14:42 Migayi o
Numbers14:43 Amalekitɔwo kple Kanaanitɔwo le mia ŋgɔ le afima
Numbers14:44 Ke wosẽ tame helia to la
Numbers14:45 Tete Amalekitɔwo kple Kanaanitɔwo
Numbers15:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers15:2 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Numbers15:3 eye mieɖe adzɔgbe alo na nu le mia ɖokui si alo le ŋkekenyuie ɖum hehe
Numbers15:4 ekema amesi na nua Yehowa la
Numbers15:5 Eye natsɔ wein awɔ nunovɔsa akpe ɖe numevɔsa kple akpedavɔsa la ŋu; hin ƒe eneliawo ɖeka nanɔ alẽvi ɖeka ŋu.
Numbers15:6 Ke natsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe ewoliawo eve
Numbers15:7 eye natsɔ wein hin ƒe etɔ̃liawo ɖeka
Numbers15:8 Ke ne èbe
Numbers15:9 ekema natsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe ewoliawo etɔ̃
Numbers15:10 eye natsɔ wein hin afã
Numbers15:11 Alea woakpee ɖe nyi sia nyi
Numbers15:12 Alesi lã
Numbers15:13 Ne duamevi sia duamevi sa dzovɔ
Numbers15:14 Ne amedzroa ɖe dze mia gbɔ
Numbers15:15 Ɖoɖo ɖeka nanɔ eŋu na dukɔ blibo la kple amedzrowo siaa. Ɖoɖo mavɔ wòanye na miaƒe dzidzimeviwo; mia kple amedzrowo miesɔ le Yehowa ŋku me.
Numbers15:16 Se ɖeka kple ɖoɖo ɖeka nanɔ eŋu na mia kple amedzro
Numbers15:17 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers15:18 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Numbers15:19 eye miekpɔ abolo ɖu le anyigba dzi la
Numbers15:20 Mitsɔ miaƒe wɔ gbãtɔwo tɔ tatali ahana; eya nanye adzɔ tso miaƒe lu
Numbers15:21 Mia kple miaƒe dzidzimeviwo miatsɔ miaƒe wɔ gbãtɔwo ƒe ɖe ana adzɔ Yehowa.
Numbers15:22 Ke ne mieɖe ŋu ɖi heda se
Numbers15:23 miewɔ se
Numbers15:24 ne ha blibo la ɖe ŋu ɖi da ƒu la
Numbers15:25 Eye nunɔla nalé avu na Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la
Numbers15:26 Eye woatsɔe ake Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la kple amedzro
Numbers15:27 Ke nenye ame ɖeka koe ɖe ŋu ɖi da ƒu la
Numbers15:28 Eye nunɔla nawɔ avulenuwo na amesi ɖe ŋu ɖi da ƒu la
Numbers15:29 Se ɖeka nanɔ mia si na amesiwo ɖe ŋu ɖi da ƒu la
Numbers15:30 Ke ne amea ɖe ɖo tame wo nane la
Numbers15:31 Yehowa ƒe nya wodo vloe
Numbers15:32 Esi Israel-viwo nɔ gbedzi la
Numbers15:33 Eye amesiwo kpɔe wole nakea fɔm la
Numbers15:34 Eye wolée da ɖi
Numbers15:35 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Ele be
Numbers15:36 Tete ha blibo la kplɔe yi ɖe asaɖa la godo
Numbers15:37 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Numbers15:38 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Numbers15:39 Ne miekpɔ gboawo la
Numbers15:40 Eye miaɖo ŋku nye seawo katã dzi
Numbers15:41 Nyee nye Yehowa
Numbers16:1 Eye Korax
Numbers16:2 dze aglã ɖe Mose ŋuti
Numbers16:3 Eye wokpe ta ɖe Mose kple Aron ŋu hegblɔ na wo bena: Mia tɔ do ɖoɖo akpa! Ha blibo la le kokoe
Numbers16:4 Esi Mose see la
Numbers16:5 Eye wogblɔ na Korax kple eƒe ha blibo la bena: Etsɔ la Yehowa aɖe amesi nye etɔ
Numbers16:6 Korax kple eƒe ha blibo la
Numbers16:7 eye miaɖe dzo ɖe wo me atsɔ dzudzɔdonu ada ɖe dzi le Yehowa ŋku me etsɔ
Numbers16:8 Eye Mose gblɔ na Korax bena: Mi Lewi-viwo
Numbers16:9 Mesɔ gbɔ na mi haɖe be
Numbers16:10 Ena mia kple nɔviwò Lewi viwo katã miegogoe tso
Numbers16:11 Eyata Yehowa ŋue mia kple wò ha blibo la mietsi tre ɖo; ameka nye Aron
Numbers16:12 Eye Mose dɔ be
Numbers16:13 Mesɔ gbɔ na wò be
Numbers16:14 Mekplɔ mí ɖe anyigba
Numbers16:15 Tete dɔme ve Mose ŋutɔ
Numbers16:16 Eye Mose gblɔ na Korax bena: Mia kple wò ha blibo la miakpe ɖe Aron ŋu ava Yehowa ŋku me etsɔ.
Numbers16:17 Amesiame natsɔ eƒe dzudzɔdosonu
Numbers16:18 Tete amesiame tsɔ eƒe dzudzɔdosonu ɖe dzo ɖe eme
Numbers16:19 Eye Korax ƒo ha blibo la nu ƒu ɖe wo ŋu heva Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu. Tete Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ɖe eɖokui fia ha blibo la.
Numbers16:20 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kple Aron bena:
Numbers16:21 Mite ɖe aga le ha sia ŋu
Numbers16:22 Ke woawo tsyɔ mo anyi hegblɔ bena: Oo
Numbers16:23 Tete Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers16:24 Gblɔ na ha la bena: Miɖe megbe le Korax
Numbers16:25 Eye Mose tso yi Datan kple Abiram gbɔ
Numbers16:26 Eye wògblɔ na ha la bena: Mite ɖa le ame mavɔ̃mawu siawo ƒe agbadɔwo gbɔ
Numbers16:27 Tete wode megbe le Korax
Numbers16:28 Eye Mose gblɔ bena: Esia miatsɔ adze sii bena
Numbers16:29 Ne ame siawo aku
Numbers16:30 Ke ne Yehowa awɔ nu masekpɔa ɖe
Numbers16:31 Esi wowu nya siawo nu vɔ la
Numbers16:32 eye anyigba ke nu mi wo kple woƒe aƒewo kpakple amesiwo katã le Korax ŋu kple woƒe nuwo katã.
Numbers16:33 Ale woamawo kple woƒe nuwo katã yi tsiẽ agbagbe; anyigba tu ɖe wo nu
Numbers16:34 Eye Israel blibo la katã
Numbers16:35 Eye dzo tso Yehowa gbɔ fiã ŋutsu alafa eve blaatɔ̃
Numbers17:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers17:2 Gblɔ na nunɔla Aron viŋutsu Eleazar bena
Numbers17:3 Elabena nuvɔ̃wɔla mawo ƒe ku na dzudzɔdosonuawo ŋu kɔ
Numbers17:4 Tete nunɔla Eleazar fɔ akɔbli-dzudzɔdosonu
Numbers17:5 hena ŋkuɖoɖodzi na Israel-viwo
Numbers17:6 Ke esi ŋu ke la
Numbers17:7 Esi ha blibo la kpe ta ɖe Mose kple Aron ŋu la
Numbers17:8 Eye esi Mose kple Aron wova Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ŋgɔ la
Numbers17:9 Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers17:10 Mide megbe le ha sia ŋu
Numbers17:11 Eye Mose gblɔ na Aron bena: Tsɔ dzudzɔdosonu
Numbers17:12 Eye Aron tsɔe
Numbers17:13 Eye esi wotsi tre ɖe ame kukuawo kple agbagbeawo dome la
Numbers17:14 Amesiwo dɔvɔ̃a wu la
Numbers17:15 Eye Aron gatrɔ va Mose gbɔ le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu. Eye dɔvɔ̃ la nu tso.
Numbers17:16 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Numbers17:17 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Numbers17:18 Ŋlɔ Aron ŋkɔ ɖe Lewitɔwo ƒe atikplɔ ŋu
Numbers17:19 Eye natsɔ wo aɖa ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me le se la ŋgɔ
Numbers17:20 Eye amesi ke mada la
Numbers17:21 Tete Mose ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Numbers17:22 Eye Mose tso atikplɔawo da ɖe agbadɔ
Numbers17:23 Esi ŋu ke
Numbers17:24 Tete Mose fɔ atikplɔawo katã le Yehowa ŋku me va Israel-viwo katã gbɔ
Numbers17:25 Ke Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: Gagbugbɔ Aron ƒe atikplɔ yi se la ŋgɔ
Numbers17:26 Eye Mose wɔ nenema: alesi Yehowa de se nɛ la
Numbers17:27 Eye Israel-viwo gblɔ na Mose bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Numbers17:28 Amesiame
Numbers18:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Aron bena: Nu kɔkɔeawo ŋu vodada anɔ mia kple viwòŋutsuwo kpakple fofowò ƒe to la dzi
Numbers18:2 Na nɔviwowo
Numbers18:3 Eye woawɔ dɔ
Numbers18:4 Woanɔ ŋuwò awɔ dɔ
Numbers18:5 Eye miawo miawo do
Numbers18:6 Elabena nye ŋutɔe ɖe mia nɔvi Lewitɔwo
Numbers18:7 Ke mia kple viwòwo miawo nunɔladɔ la le vɔsamlekpui la gbɔ kple xɔmetsovɔ la godo. Ɖe metsɔ nunɔladɔ la na mi: ke ne ame tutɔa ɖe te va la
Numbers18:8 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Aron bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Numbers18:9 Woƒe nunana kɔkɔetɔ
Numbers18:10 Teƒe kɔkɔetɔ naɖui le
Numbers18:11 bena woanyè la

Numbers18:13 Woƒe anyigbadzinu gbãtɔwo katã dometɔ
Numbers18:14 Nusianu
Numbers18:15 Nusianu
Numbers18:16 Ne woxɔ ɣleti ɖeka la
Numbers18:17 Ke womatsɔ ga axɔ nyiwo
Numbers18:18 Gake woƒe lã nanye tɔwò
Numbers18:19 Metsɔ adzɔ

Numbers18:21 Eye metsɔ nuwo katã ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka na Lewi-viwo
Numbers18:22 Ke Israel-viwo megate va Mawu ƒe agbadɔ ŋu azɔ o
Numbers18:23 boŋ Lewitɔwo nawɔ dɔ le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ŋu

Numbers18:29 Miɖe nusiwo katã woana mi la
Numbers18:30 Gblɔ na wo be: Ne mieɖe nyuitɔwo na adzoe la
Numbers18:31 Mia kple miaƒe ƒometɔwo miekpɔ mɔ aɖui le afisiafi
Numbers18:32 Ne miede nyuitɔ le wo ŋu na adzɔe la
Numbers19:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose kpakple Aron bena:
Numbers19:2 Ale Yehowa de se gblɔ enye si: Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be
Numbers19:3 Miatsɔe na nunɔla Eleazar
Numbers19:4 Eye nunɔla Eleazar nade eƒe asi nu la me ahlẽ zi adre ɖe go
Numbers19:5 Eye woatɔ dzo nyinɔ la ƒe agbalẽ
Numbers19:6 Eye nunɔla natsɔ sederti
Numbers19:7 Nunɔla nanyã eƒe avɔwo
Numbers19:8 Amesi tɔ dzo nyinɔa la
Numbers19:9 Eye ŋutsu
Numbers19:10 Amesi la nyinɔ ƒe afia la
Numbers19:11 Ne amea ɖe de asi ame kuku ŋu la
Numbers19:12 Eye wòatsɔe aɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa le eɖokui ŋu le ŋkeke etɔ̃lia kple ŋkeke adrelia dzi
Numbers19:13 Ne amea ɖe ɖe asi ame kuku ŋu
Numbers19:14 Se la enye si: Ne ame ku le agbadɔa ɖe me la

Numbers19:18 Eye ŋutsu
Numbers19:19 Amesi ŋu kɔ la

Numbers19:21 Ɖoɖo mavɔ wòanye na mi. Amesi wu ameŋukɔtsia la

Numbers20:1 Le ɣleti gbãtɔ me la Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la va Zin-gbedzi
Numbers20:2 Ke tsi mele afima na ha la o. Tete wokpe ta ɖe Mose kple Aron ŋu.
Numbers20:3 Eye dukɔ la wɔ dzre kple Mose bena: Oo
Numbers20:4 Nukata gɔ̃ miekplɔ Yehowa ƒe ha la va gbe sia dzi
Numbers20:5 Nukaŋuti miekplɔ mí tso Egipte va teƒe baɖa sia
Numbers20:6 Ke Mose kple Aron dzo le ha la gbɔ yi ɖe Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu
Numbers20:7 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers20:8 Tsɔ wò atikplɔ
Numbers20:9 Tete Mose tso atikplɔ la le Yehowa ŋku me
Numbers20:10 Eye Mose kple Aron ƒo ha la nu ƒu ɖe agakpe la ŋgɔ
Numbers20:11 Eye Mose ko eƒe asi dzi tsɔ eƒe atikplɔ ƒo agakpe la zi eve
Numbers20:12 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron bena: Esi mieɖo ŋu ɖe ŋunye o
Numbers20:13 Esia nye dzrewɔtsi
Numbers20:14 Eye Mose dɔ dɔlawo le Kades ɖo ɖe Edom-fia gbã bena: Ale nɔviwò Israel gblɔ esi: Wò ŋutɔ ènya fu
Numbers20:15 Mía fofowo ʋu va Egipte
Numbers20:16 Eye mieɖo ɣli na Yehowa
Numbers20:17 Na míato wò anyigba dzi ayi! Miele agble alo weinbɔwo me to ge o
Numbers20:18 Edom ɖo ŋu bena: Mato gbɔnye avi o
Numbers20:19 Tete Israel-viwo gblɔ nɛ bena: Dumɔ gã dzi ko miehe
Numbers20:20 Ke eɖo ŋu be: Mèle eme tso ge ayi o! Eye Edom tsɔ aʋakɔ gã
Numbers20:21 Esi Edom gbe be: Israel mato yeƒe anyigba dzi: ayi o la
Numbers20:22 Eye Israel ƒe ha blibo la ho tso Kades heva Hor-to la gbɔ.
Numbers20:23 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron le Hor-to la gbɔ le Edom-nyigba ƒe liƒo dzi bena:
Numbers20:24 Aron nayi tɔgbuiawo gbɔ; elabena mele anyigba
Numbers20:25 Kplɔ Aron kple viaŋutsu Eleazar yi Hor-to la dzi

Numbers20:27 Mose wo

Numbers22:2 Esi Balak

Numbers22:5 Eye wòdɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Bileam
Numbers22:6 Eyata va naƒo fi ade dukɔ sia nam
Numbers22:7 Esi Moab-ame tsitsiwo kple Midian-ame tsitsiwo xɔ afãkaho la
Numbers22:8 Eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Mitsi afisia dɔ

Numbers22:26 Eye Yehowa ƒe ɖɔla la gayi ŋgɔ va tsi tre ɖe teƒe xaxɛa ɖe
Numbers22:27 Esi tedzinɔ la kpɔ Yehowa ƒe dɔlaa la

Numbers22:29 Bileam ɖo ŋu na tedzinɔ la bena: Esi nedo tsukunɔm ta! Ɖe wònye yie le asinye la
