Numbers25:10 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers25:11 Pinehas
Numbers25:12 Eyata gblɔ bena Meɖo kpe ŋutifafa-nubabla dzi nɛ
Numbers25:13 eye metso nunɔladɔ la de asi na eya ŋutɔ kple eƒe dzidzimeviwo tegbee
Numbers25:14 Israel-ŋutsu
Numbers25:15 Eye Midian-nyɔnu
Numbers25:16 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers25:17 Mile fu Midiantɔwo
Numbers25:18 elabena wòlé fu mi
Numbers26:1 Esi dɔvɔ̃ la nu tso la
Numbers26:2 Mixlẽ amesiwo xɔ ƒe blave kple vɔ le Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la me
Numbers26:3 Eye Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar fia wo xlẽ le Moab-tagba le Yordan nu le Yerixo kasa;
Numbers26:4 amesiwo xɔ ƒe blave kple vɔ
Numbers26:5 Ruben enye Israel ƒe ŋgɔgbevi. Ruben viwo nye: Xanok
Numbers26:6 Xezron
Numbers26:7 Esiawo nye Ruben-hawo ƒe ƒomewo Amesiwo wolia xlẽ le wo me la
Numbers26:8 Palu vi enye Eliab.
Numbers26:9 Eye Eliab viwo nye Nemuel
Numbers26:10 eye anyigba ke nu mi wo kpe ɖe Korax ŋu
Numbers26:11 Ke Korax viwo ya meku o.
Numbers26:12 Simeon viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewonu: Nemuel
Numbers26:13 Sera
Numbers26:14 Simeon-hawo ƒe ƒome la le ame akpe blave vɔ eve alafa eve.
Numbers26:15 Gad viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu Zifon
Numbers26:16 Osni
Numbers26:17 Arod
Numbers26:18 Esiawo nye Gad viwo te woƒe ƒomewo nu
Numbers26:19 Yuda viwo nye Ger kple Onan
Numbers26:20 Yuda viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu Sela
Numbers26:21 Perez viwo nye si Xezion
Numbers26:22 Amesiwo wotia xlẽ le Yuda-ƒome la me la; le ame akpe blaadre vɔ ade alafa atɔ̃.
Numbers26:23 Isaxar viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Tola
Numbers26:24 Yasub
Numbers26:25 Amesiwo wotia xlẽ le Isaxar-ƒome la me la
Numbers26:26 Zebulon viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Sered
Numbers26:27 Amesiwo wotia xlẽ le Zebulon-ƒome la me la
Numbers26:28 Yosef viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Manase kple Efrayim.
Numbers26:29 Manase viwo nye: Maxir
Numbers26:30 Gilead viwo nye si Yezer
Numbers26:31 Ariel
Numbers26:32 Semida
Numbers26:33 Ke Zelofxad
Numbers26:34 Esia nye Manase-ƒomeawo
Numbers26:35 Efrayim viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Sulelax
Numbers26:36 Sutelax vi nye Eran
Numbers26:37 Amesiwo wolia xlẽ le Efrayim viwo ƒe ƒome la me la
Numbers26:38 Benyamin viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Bela
Numbers26:39 Sefufam
Numbers26:40 Bela viwo nye. Ard kple Naaman: Ard dzi Ard-ƒome la; eye Naaman dzi Naaman-ƒome la.
Numbers26:41 Esiawo nye Benyamin viwo le woƒe ƒomewo nu
Numbers26:42 Dan viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Suxam
Numbers26:43 Amesiwo katã wotia xlẽ le Suxam-ƒome la me la
Numbers26:44 Aser viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Yimna
Numbers26:45 Beria viwo nye Xeber
Numbers26:46 Aser vinyɔnu ŋkɔ nye Sarax.
Numbers26:47 Amesiwo wotia xlẽ le Asir viwo ƒe ƒome la me la
Numbers26:48 Naftali viwo nye si le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Yaxzeel
Numbers26:49 Yezer
Numbers26:50 Esia nye Naftali viwo le woƒe ƒomewo nu
Numbers26:51 Amesiwo wotia xlẽ le Israel-viwo me la
Numbers26:52 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers26:53 Ame siawoe woamã anyigba la na wòazu woƒe domenyinu le ŋkɔwo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ nu.
Numbers26:54 Nana domenyinu la amesiwo sɔ gbɔ la
Numbers26:55 Ke woadzidze nu hafi amã anyigba la
Numbers26:56 Woadzidze nu hafi amã domenyinu la na amesiwo sɔ gbɔ kple amesiwo le ʋee.
Numbers26:57 Esiawo nye amesiwo wotia xlẽ le Lewi-viwo dome
Numbers26:58 Lewi-ƒomeawo nye si: Libni-ƒome la
Numbers26:59 Amram srɔ̃ ŋkɔ nye Yoxebed
Numbers26:60 Eye wodzi Nadab
Numbers26:61 Ke Nadab kple Abihu ku
Numbers26:62 Eye wotia ŋutsu
Numbers26:63 Esiawo nye Israel-vi
Numbers26:64 Ke Israel-vi
Numbers26:65 Elabena Yehowa gblɔ na wo bena. Woaku le gbeadzi
Numbers27:1 Eye Zelofxad
Numbers27:2 Eye wotsi tre ɖe Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar
Numbers27:3 Mía fofo ku le gbeadzi
Numbers27:4 Nukaŋuti mía fofo ŋkɔ atsrɔ̃ le eƒe ƒome la me
Numbers27:5 Eye Mose tsɔ woƒe nya la va Yehowa ŋku me.
Numbers27:6 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Numbers27:7 Zelofxad-vinyɔnuawo gblɔe ɖe teƒe; eyata na domenyinu wo ɖe wo fofo nɔviwo dome
Numbers27:8 Eye nagblɔ na Israel-viwo be: Ne ŋutsua ɖe ku
Numbers27:9 Ke ne vinyɔnua ɖeke mele esi o la
Numbers27:10 Ne nɔviŋutsua ɖeke mele esi o la
Numbers27:11 Ke ne nɔviŋutsua ɖeke mele fofoa si o la
Numbers27:12 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena: De Abarim-to dzi
Numbers27:13 Eye ne ekpɔe vɔ la
Numbers27:14 Elabena miesẽ to ɖe nye nya ŋu le Zin-gbedzi
Numbers27:15 Tete Mose ƒo nu kple Yehowa bena:
Numbers27:16 Yehowa
Numbers27:17 amesi ado kpli wo
Numbers27:18 Yehowa ɖo ŋu na Mose bena: Yɔ Yosua
Numbers27:19 eye nakplɔe ava nunɔla Eleazar kple ha blibo la gbɔ
Numbers27:20 eye naɖe bubu
Numbers27:21 Ele nɛ be
Numbers27:22 Eye Mose wɔ
Numbers27:23 eye wotsɔ eƒe asiwò ɖo edzi
Numbers28:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers28:2 De se na Israel-viwo
Numbers28:3 Gblɔ na wo bena: Dzovɔ
Numbers28:4 Nawu alẽvi ɖeka le ŋdi
Numbers28:5 Eye natsɔ wo memee efa ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka
Numbers28:6 Esia nye numevɔ
Numbers28:7 Eye woatsɔ nunovɔsa hin eneliawo ɖeka akpe ɖe alẽvia ɖesiaɖe ŋu. Woatsɔ wein
Numbers28:8 Eye nawɔ alé evelia ŋu dɔ le fiẽ me
Numbers28:9 Eye nawɔ alẽvi eve
Numbers28:10 Esia nye numevɔ
Numbers28:11 Gbesigbe ɣleti dze dzi la
Numbers28:12 Eye miatsɔ wɔ memee eta ƒe ewoliawo etɔ
Numbers28:13 eye miatsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka
Numbers28:14 Eye miatsɔ wein hin afã awɔ nunovɔsa akpe ɖe nyitsua ɖesiaɖe ŋu; hin etɔ̃liawo ɖeka akpe ɖe agbo ɖeka la ŋu
Numbers28:15 Eye miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe na Yehowa akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kple nunovɔsa la ŋu.
Numbers28:16 Ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia enye ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie na Yehowa.
Numbers28:17 Eye ɣleti sia ƒe ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃lia enye ŋkekenyuie; woaɖu abolo maʋamaʋã ŋkeke adre sɔŋ.
Numbers28:18 Ŋkeke gbãtɔ enye takpegbe kɔkɔe
Numbers28:19 Miatsɔ nyitsuvi eve
Numbers28:20 eye miatsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe ewoliawo etɔ̃
Numbers28:21 eye eta ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka akpe ɖe alẽviawo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe ŋu.
Numbers28:22 Eye woatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe
Numbers28:23 Miasa vɔ sia akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔ
Numbers28:24 Alea miasa vɔe gbesiagbe ŋkeke adre sɔŋ
Numbers28:25 Eye ŋkeke adreagbe enye takpegbe kɔkɔe na mi
Numbers28:26 Gbesigbe mieŋe nu gbãtɔwo
Numbers28:27 Eye miatsɔ nyitsuvi eve
Numbers28:28 Eye miatsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe ewoliawo etɔ̃
Numbers28:29 eye efa ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka akpe de alẽviawo dome ɖesiaɖe ŋu.
Numbers28:30 Emegbe woatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka alé avu na mi.
Numbers28:31 Esiawo miatsɔ asa vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kple nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti; lãwo nasɔ blibo.
Numbers29:1 Ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ enye takpegbe kɔkɔe na mi eve miawɔ asinudɔa ɖeke o; kpẽkugbe wòanye na mi.
Numbers29:2 Eye i woatsɔ nyitsuvi ɖeka
Numbers29:3 Eve miatsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe ewoliawo etɔ
Numbers29:4 eye efa ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka akpe ɖe alẽvi adreawo dome ɖesiaɖe ŋu.
Numbers29:5 Eye woatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe ahatsɔ le avu na mi
Numbers29:6 hekpe ɖe ɣleti yeye dzi numevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kpakple gbesiagbe numevɔsa kple
Numbers29:7 Ɣleti adrelia sia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia enye takpegbe kɔkɔe na mi
Numbers29:8 Eye miatsɔ nyitsuvi ɖeka
Numbers29:9 Eye miatsɔ wɔ memee eta ƒe ewoliawo etɔ̃
Numbers29:10 eye efa; ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka akpe ɖe alẽvi adreawo dome ɖesiaɖe ŋu.
Numbers29:11 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe vɔ akpe ɖe nuvɔ̃vɔsa
Numbers29:12 Ɣleti adrelia te ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃lia enye takpegbe kɔkɔe na mi miawɔ asinudɔa ɖeke o
Numbers29:13 Eye miatsɔ nyitsuvi wuietɔ̃
Numbers29:14 Eye miatsɔ wɔ memee efa ƒe ewoliawo etɔ̃
Numbers29:15 eye efa ƒe ewolia wo ɖeka akpe ɖe alẽvi wuieneawo dome ɖesiaɖe ŋuti.
Numbers29:16 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti.
Numbers29:17 Miawu nyitsu wuieve
Numbers29:18 Eye miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:19 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti.
Numbers29:20 Eye miawu nyitsu wuiɖekɛ
Numbers29:21 eye miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa le nyitsuawo
Numbers29:22 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti.
Numbers29:23 Miawu nyitsu ewo
Numbers29:24 eye miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:25 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti.
Numbers29:26 Eye miawu nyitsu asieke
Numbers29:27 eye miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:28 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti.
Numbers29:29 Miawu nyitsu enyi
Numbers29:30 eye miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:31 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti
Numbers29:32 Eye miawu nyitsu adre
Numbers29:33 eye miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:34 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti.
Numbers29:35 Ŋkeke enyilia enye takpegbe na mi
Numbers29:36 Eye miatsɔ nyitsu ɖeka
Numbers29:37 Eye miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsu la
Numbers29:38 Emegbe miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔe akpe ɖe gbesiagbe numevɔsa kpakple eŋu nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋuti.
Numbers29:39 Esiawo miatsɔ asa vɔ na Yehowa le miaƒe ŋkekenyuiewo dzi hekpe ɖe numevɔsa
Numbers30:1 Eye Mose gblɔ se
Numbers30:2 Eye Mose ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo ƒe toawo ƒe amegãwo bena: Ale Yehowa ɖe se enye si:
Numbers30:3 Ne amea ɖe ɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa
Numbers30:4 Ne nyɔnua ɖe nye ɖetugbi le fofoa ƒe me
Numbers30:5 eye fofoa se adzɔgbe
Numbers30:6 Ke ne fofoa see
Numbers30:7 Ke ne eɖe adzɔgbe
Numbers30:8 eye srɔ̃a zi kpi kpɔe le gbesigbe wòsee la
Numbers30:9 Gake ne srɔ̃a gbe nɛ le gbesigbe wòsee la
Numbers30:10 Ke ahosiwo kple nyɔnu
Numbers30:11 Nenye srɔ̃ ƒe me wòɖe adzɔgbe le
Numbers30:12 eye srɔ̃a see
Numbers30:13 Ke ne srɔ̃ gblẽ eme nɛ
Numbers30:14 Ne nyɔnua ɖe ɖe adzɔgbe sia adzɔgbe alo ka atam sia atam hetsri nu bena
Numbers30:15 Ke ne srɔ̃a zi kpi egbe kple etsɔ la
Numbers30:16 Gake ne esee eteƒe didi
Numbers30:17 Esia nye ɖoɖo
Numbers31:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers31:2 Bia hlɔ̃ Midiantɔwo na Israel-viwo; emegbe nayi tɔgbuiwòwo gbɔ.
Numbers31:3 Tete Mose gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Mina ŋutsuwo nabia akpa le mia dome
Numbers31:4 Israel-viwo ƒe to sia to naɖe ame akpe ɖeka aɖo ɖe ana la.
Numbers31:5 Eye to sia to na ame akpe ɖeka tso Israel ƒe ame akpe akpeawo dome; amesiwo bia akpa hena aʋayiyi la
Numbers31:6 Eye Mose ɖɔ ame akpe ɖeka tso to sia to me ɖo ɖe aʋa la
Numbers31:7 Woho aʋa ɖe Midian ŋu
Numbers31:8 Eye wowu Midian-fia atɔ̃awo
Numbers31:9 Eye Israel-viwo ɖe aboyo Midiantɔwo srɔ̃wo kple wo viwo
Numbers31:10 eye wòto dzo du
Numbers31:11 Woɖe aboyo amewo
Numbers31:12 Eye wohe amesiwo wòlé kple nusiwo woha kpakple nusiwo woɖe aboyo la
Numbers31:13 Eye Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar kpakple Israel-amegãwo katã yi ɖakpe wo le asaɖa la godo.
Numbers31:14 Eye Mose do dɔmedzoe ɖe aʋakplɔla
Numbers31:15 Eye Mose gblɔ na wo bena: A
Numbers31:16 Evɔ wònye woawoe na Israel-viwo subɔ Peor hetrɔ ʋu le Yehowa yome le Bileam ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo la nu
Numbers31:17 Eyata miwu ŋutsuvi
Numbers31:18 gake mina nyɔnuvi
Numbers31:19 Ke miawo mitsi asaɖa godo ŋkeke adre sɔŋ
Numbers31:20 Eye miaɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa le avɔwo katã kple nusiwo katã wotsɔ lãgbalẽ kple gbɔ̃fuwo wɔe
Numbers31:21 Eye nunɔla Eleazar gblɔ na aʋawɔla
Numbers31:22 Mitsɔ sika kple klosalo
Numbers31:23 kpakple nusianu
Numbers31:24 Eye ne mienyã miaƒe avɔwo le ŋkeke adreagbe la
Numbers31:25 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena:
Numbers31:26 Mia kple nunɔla Eleazar kpakple ha la ƒe toawo ƒe amegãwo mixlẽ ame kple lã
Numbers31:27 mimã wo na amesiwo de aʋa la
Numbers31:28 Eye naxɔ ame alo nyi
Numbers31:29 Naɖee le wo tɔ ŋu awɔ adzɔe na Yehowa ahatsɔ na nunɔla Eleazar.
Numbers31:30 Ke miaxɔ ame alo nyi
Numbers31:31 Eye Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar wɔ
Numbers31:32 Eye aboyonu
Numbers31:33 nyi akpe blaadre vɔ eve
Numbers31:34 tedzi akpe blaade vɔ ɖekɛ:
Numbers31:35 eye nyɔnuvi
Numbers31:36 Amesiwo de aʋa la ƒe gome enye ale akpe alafa etɔ̃ blaetɔ̃ vɔ adre kple alafa atɔ̃.
Numbers31:37 Eye adzɔ
Numbers31:38 Nyiwo le akpe blaetɔ̃ vɔ ade
Numbers31:39 Tedziwo le akpe blaetɔ̃ kple alafa atɔ
Numbers31:40 Eye amewo le akpe wuiade
Numbers31:41 Eye Mose tsɔ adzɔ
Numbers31:42 Eye Israel-viwo tɔ
Numbers31:43 ameha la tɔ enye alẽ akpe alafa etɔ̃ blaetɔ̃ vɔ adre kple alafa atɔ̃
Numbers31:44 nyi akpe blaetɔ̃ vɔ ade
Numbers31:45 tedzi akpe blaetɔ̃ kple alafa atɔ̃
Numbers31:46 kple ame akpe wuiade.
Numbers31:47 Eye Mose ɖe ame ɖekaɖeka kple lã ɖekaɖeka tso wo ame blaatɔ̃ me le Israel-viwo to ŋu hena Lewitɔwo
Numbers31:48 Eye aʋakplɔla
Numbers31:49 eye wogblɔ na Mose bena: Wò dolawo xlẽ aʋawɔla
Numbers31:50 Eyata mietsɔ sikanu
Numbers31:51 Tete Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar xɔ sikatsyɔ̃ɖonu vovovoawo le wo si.
Numbers31:52 Eye sika
Numbers31:53 Ke aʋawɔviawo dome ɖesiaɖe ha nu na eɖokui.
Numbers31:54 Eye Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar xɔ sikawo le amesiwo woɖo ame akpewo kple ame alafawo nu la si
Numbers32:1 Eye lã geɖewo le Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo si. Eye wokpɔ Yaezer kple Gilead-nyigba bena
Numbers32:2 Eyata Gad-viwo kple Ruben-viwo va gblɔ na Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar kpakple ha la ƒe amegãwo bena:
Numbers32:3 Atarot
Numbers32:4 anyigba
Numbers32:5 Eye wogblɔ bena: Ne eve mía nu la
Numbers32:6 Tete Mose gblɔ na Gad-viwo kple Ruben-viwo bena: A
Numbers32:7 Nukaŋuti miele didim be
Numbers32:8 Alea pɛ mia fofowo wɔ
Numbers32:9 Wova Eskol-tɔʋu la nu hekpɔ anyigba la ɖa
Numbers32:10 Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe gbemagbe heka atam bena:
Numbers32:11 Ŋutsu
Numbers32:12 negbe Kaleb
Numbers32:13 Eye Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu
Numbers32:14 Azɔ mi nuvɔ̃wɔlawo ƒe dzidzimeviwo
Numbers32:15 Ne mietrɔ le eyome la
Numbers32:16 Tete wova egbɔ gblɔ bena: Miato kpɔ na míaƒe lãwo ɖe afisia
Numbers32:17 ke mía ŋutɔwo míabla akpa anɔ Israel-viwo ŋgɔ
Numbers32:18 Míatrɔ va míaƒe xɔwo nu o
Numbers32:19 Míaxɔ domenyinu ɖe wo ti le Yordan godo o
Numbers32:20 Tete Mose gblɔ na wo bena: Ne miawɔ alea
Numbers32:21 eye mia dometɔ
Numbers32:22 eye anyigba la na ta le Yehowa ŋku me
Numbers32:23 Ke ne miewɔ alea o la
Numbers32:24 Mitso duwo na mia viwo
Numbers32:25 Eye Gad-viwo kple Ruben-viwo ɖo ŋu na Mose bena; Wò dɔlawo awɔ
Numbers32:26 Mia viwo kple nua srɔ̃wo
Numbers32:27 Ke wò dɔlawo katã abla akpa le Yehowa ŋku me ayi aʋa le tɔa godo
Numbers32:28 Tete Mose de se le wo ta na nunɔla Eleazar kple; Yosua
Numbers32:29 eye Mose gblɔ na wo bena: Ne Gad-viwo kple Ruben-viwo katã abla akpa le Yehowa ŋku me ayi aʋa kpli mi le Yordan godo
Numbers32:30 Ke ne womebla akpa yi tɔa godo kpli mi o la
Numbers32:31 Tete Gad-viwo kple Ruben-viwo do ŋu bena: Alesi Yehowa gblɔ na wò dɔlawo la
Numbers32:32 Míabla akpa le Yehowa ŋku me ayi Kanaan-nyigba dzi
Numbers32:33 Eye Mose tsɔ Sixon
Numbers32:34 Eye Gad-viwo tso Dibon
Numbers32:35 Aterot-Sofan
Numbers32:36 Bet-Nimra kple Bet-Haran
Numbers32:37 Eye Ruben-viwo tso Xesbon
Numbers32:38 Neho
Numbers32:39 Eye Manase vi Maxir ƒe viwo yi ɖaxɔ Gilead
Numbers32:40 Eye Mose tsɔ Gilead na Manase vi Maxir
Numbers32:41 Eye Manase vi Yair yi ɖaxɔ woƒe kɔƒewo
Numbers32:42 Eye Nobax yi ɖaxɔ Kenat kple eŋu kɔƒewo
Numbers33:1 Esiawo nye Israel-viwo ƒe toƒewo
Numbers33:2 Eye Mose ŋlɔ woƒe mɔzɔzɔ la le woƒe toƒewo nu
Numbers33:3 Woho tso Ramses le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃lia dzi
Numbers33:4 le esime Egiptetɔwo le woƒe ŋgɔgbevi
Numbers33:5 Eye Israel-viwo ho tso Ramses heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sukot.
Numbers33:6 Woho tso Sukot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Etam le gbegbe la nu
Numbers33:7 eya woho tso Etam hetrɔ ɖo ta Pihaxirot le Baal-Zefon ŋgɔ
Numbers33:8 Woho tso Pihaxirot
Numbers33:9 eye woho tso Mara heva Elim
Numbers33:10 Woho tso Elim heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Avaƒu la nu
Numbers33:11 eye woho tso Avaƒu la nu heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sin-gbedzi.
Numbers33:12 Woho tso Sin-gbedzi heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Dofka;
Numbers33:13 eye woho tso Dofka heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Alus.
Numbers33:14 Woho tso Alus heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Refidim
Numbers33:15 eye woho tso Refidim heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sinai-gbedzi.
Numbers33:16 Woho tso Sinai-gbedzi heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe nudzrolawo ɖiƒe;
Numbers33:17 eye woho tso nudzrolawo ɖiƒe heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xazerot.
Numbers33:18 Woho tso Xazerot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Ritma;
Numbers33:19 eye woho tso Ritma heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Rimon-Perez.
Numbers33:20 Woho tso Rimon-Perez heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Libna
Numbers33:21 eye woho tso Libna heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Risa.
Numbers33:22 Woho tso Risa heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Kehelata
Numbers33:23 eye woho tso Kehelata heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sefer-to la gbɔ.
Numbers33:24 Woho tso Sefer-to la gbɔ heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xarada
Numbers33:25 eye woho tso Xarada heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Makehelot.
Numbers33:26 Woho tso Makehelot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Taxat
Numbers33:27 eye woho tso Taxat heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Tarax.
Numbers33:28 Woho tso Tarax heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Mitka
Numbers33:29 eye woho tso Mitka heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xasmona.
Numbers33:30 Woho tso Xasmona heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Moserot
Numbers33:31 eye woho tso Moserot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Bene-Yakan.
Numbers33:32 Woho tso Bene-Yakan heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xor-Hagidgad
Numbers33:33 eye woho tso Xor-Hagidgad heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yotbata
Numbers33:34 Woho tso Yotbata heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Abrona
Numbers33:35 eye woho tso Abrona heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Ezeon-Geber.
Numbers33:36 Woho tso Ezeon-Geber heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Kades le Sin-gbedzi
Numbers33:37 eye woho tso Kades heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Hor-to la gbɔ
Numbers33:38 Eye nunɔla Aron ɖe Hor-to la dzi
Numbers33:39 Aron xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka blave vo etɔ̃ hafi ku le Hor-to la dzi.
Numbers33:40 Eye Kanaanitɔ
Numbers33:41 Woho tso Hor-to ta gbɔ heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Zalmona
Numbers33:42 eye woho tso Zalmona heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Punon.
Numbers33:43 Woho tso Punon heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Obot
Numbers33:44 eye woho tso Obot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Iyim-Abarim le Moabitɔwo ƒe liƒo dzi.
Numbers33:45 Woho tso Iyim heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Dibon-Gad
Numbers33:46 eye woho tso Dibon-Gad heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Almon-Diblatayim.
Numbers33:47 Woho tso Almon-Diblatayim heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Abarim-to la gbɔ
Numbers33:48 eye woho tso Abarim-to la gbɔ heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Moab-tagba le Yordan nu le Yerixo kasa.
Numbers33:49 Woƒu asaɖa la anyi ɖe Yordan nu tso Bet-Yesimot vaseɖe Abel-Sitim le Moab-tagba.
Numbers33:50 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose le Moab-tagba
Numbers33:51 Ƒo nu kple Israel-viwo
Numbers33:52 ekema mianya anyigbadzinɔlawo katã le mia ŋgɔ
Numbers33:53 Eye miaxɔ anyigba la wòanye mia to miano edzi; elabena miawoe metsɔ anyigba la na
Numbers33:54 Miadzidze nu ɖe anyigba la dzi amãe ɖe miaƒe ƒomeawo nu; miana domenyinu la amesiwo sɔ gbɔ la
Numbers33:55 Ke ne mienyã anyigbadzinɔlawo le mia ŋgɔ o la
Numbers33:56 Eye matsɔ nusi meɖi be
Numbers34:1 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers34:2 De se na Israel-viwo
Numbers34:3 Miaƒe dziehekpa natso Zin-gbedzi amlo ato Edom ŋu. Ale miaƒe dzieheliƒo natso Dzeƒu la ƒe mlɔenu le ɣedzeƒe gome
Numbers34:4 eye liƒo la naɖo ta Akrabim-to dzi mo ƒe dziehe gome ato Zin ŋu ayi ɖe Kades-Barnea ƒe dziehe gome
Numbers34:5 Eye liƒo la nanyè kpo tso Azmon ɖe Egipte-tɔʋu la ŋu ava wu nu ɖe ƒu la nu.
Numbers34:6 Miaƒe ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo nanye ƒu gã la; eya nado liƒo na mi le ɣetoɖoƒe gome.
Numbers34:7 Miaɖe anyieheliƒo la tso ƒu gã la nu ato Hor-to la ŋu.
Numbers34:8 Miaɖee tso Hor-to la gbɔ aɖo ta Xamat
Numbers34:9 Liƒo la nato Zifron ava wu nu ɖe Xazar-Enan. Esia nanye anyieheliƒo na mi.
Numbers34:10 Miaɖe ɣedzeƒeliƒo la tso Xazar-Enan ayi Sefam.
Numbers34:11 Eye liƒo la natso Sefam ato Ribla le Ain ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome
Numbers34:12 Eye liƒo la nazɔ Yordan ŋu axa wu nu ɖe Dzeƒu la nu.
Numbers34:13 Eve Mose de se na Israel-viwo bena Esia nye anyigba
Numbers34:14 Elabena Ruben-viwo ƒe to kple Gad-viwo ƒe to kpakple Manase ƒe to atã la xɔ woƒe domenyinu ɖe wo tofowo ƒe aƒewo nu xoxo.
Numbers34:15 To eve kple afã xɔ woƒe domenyinu ɖe Yordan ƒe go keme dzi le Yerixo kasa le ɣedzeƒe gome.
Numbers34:16 Eye Yehowa ƒo nu kple Mose bena:
Numbers34:17 Ŋutsu
Numbers34:18 Eye miade amegã ɖekaɖeka le to sia to me
Numbers34:19 Ŋutsuawo ƒe ŋkɔwo nye si: Kaleb

Numbers34:27 amegã Axihud
Numbers34:28 kple amegã Pehadel

Numbers35:6 Eye du

Numbers35:12 Duawo nanye sitsoƒe na mi le hiãtɔ ta
Numbers35:13 Sitsoƒedu

Numbers35:15 Du ade siawo nanye sitsoƒe na Israel-viwo kple amedzrowo kpakple wo gbɔ mewo

Numbers35:17 Ne etsɔ kpe

Numbers35:22 Ke ne melé fui o
Numbers35:23 alo mekpɔe o

Numbers35:25 Eye ha la naɖe amewula tso hlɔ̃tɔ si me
Numbers35:26 Ke ne hlɔ̃dola la gbɔ sitsoƒedu
Numbers35:27 eye hlɔ̃tɔ do goe le sitsoƒedu la ƒe liƒo godo
Numbers35:28 elabena ɖe wobe

Joshua7:15 Eye woatɔ dzo amesi gbɔ wokpɔ busunua le
Joshua7:16 Eye Yosua tso ŋdi kanya
Joshua7:17 Esi Yuda-ƒomeawo te va la
Joshua7:18 Eye esi wòna eƒe aƒe te va ŋutsu ɖekaɖeka la
Joshua7:19 Tete Yosua gblɔ na Axan bena: Vinye
Joshua7:20 Axan ɖo ŋu na Yosua gblɔ bena: Nyateƒe
Joshua7:21 Mekpɔ Sinear-tɔwo ƒe awu ʋlaya nyuia ɖe kple klosalo sekel alafa eve kpakple sikakpɔti ɖeka
Joshua7:22 Enumake Yosua dɔ amewo woƒu du yi ɖe agbadɔ la me. Woɖi wo ɖe eƒe agbadɔ la me vava
Joshua7:23 Eye wotsɔ wo tso agbadɔ la me va Yosua kple Israel-viwo katã ŋku me
Joshua7:24 Tete Yosua kple Israel blibo la kplɔ Axan
Joshua7:25 Eye Yosua gblɔ bena: Esi nèhe dzɔgbevɔ̃e va mía dzi la
Joshua7:26 wofɔ kpewo li kɔ gãa ɖe ɖe wo dzi
Joshua8:1 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua bena: Megavɔ̃ o
Joshua8:2 eye wɔ Ai kple eme ba
Joshua8:3 Tete Yosua kple aʋawɔlawo katã ho
Joshua8:4 de se na wo gblɔ bena: Miɖo ŋku dzi
Joshua8:5 Ke mía kple aʋawɔlawo katã miazɔ ɖe du la dzi
Joshua8:6 bena woati mía yome
Joshua8:7 ekema miawo miado te xa me aɖaxɔ du la
Joshua8:8 Eye ne miexɔ dua vɔ la
Joshua8:9 Esi Yosua dɔ wo ɖa la
Joshua8:10 Tete Yosua fɔ ŋdi kanya
Joshua8:11 Eye aʋawɔla
Joshua8:12 Eye wòɖe ŋutsu akpe atɔ̃
Joshua8:13 eye woɖo asaɖa blibo la ƒe aʋawɔla
Joshua8:14 Esi Ai-fia kpɔ esia la
Joshua8:15 Eye Yosua kple Israel blibo la na Aitɔwo nyã wo
Joshua8:16 Tete woyɔ duametɔwo katã ƒo ƒu
Joshua8:17 Eye ŋutsua ɖeke mele Ai kple Betel
Joshua8:18 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua bena: Do akplɔ
Joshua8:19 Esi wòdo eƒe asi ɖa la
Joshua8:20 Eye esi Aitɔwo nye kɔ kpɔ megbe la
Joshua8:21 Ke esi Yosua kple Israel blibo la kpɔ bena
Joshua8:22 Ame kemeawo do tso dua me va kpe wo
Joshua8:23 Eye wòlé Ai-fia agbagbe kplɔ va Yosua gbɔ.
Joshua8:24 Esi Israel wu Aitɔwo katã le tagba le gbedzi
Joshua8:25 Aitɔ
Joshua8:26 Ke Yosua magbugbɔ eƒe asi kple akplɔ
Joshua8:27 negbe dua me lãwo kple aboyonuwo ko Israel ha na eɖokui
Joshua8:28 Eye Yosua tɔ dzo Ai
Joshua8:29 Eye wòde ka ve na Ai-fia ɖe atia ɖe ŋu vaseɖe fiẽ; eye esi ɣe ɖo to la
Joshua8:30 Ɣemaɣi Yosua ɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa
Joshua8:31 kpe blibo
Joshua8:32 Eye wòŋlɔ se
Joshua8:33 Eye Israel blibo la
Joshua8:34 Emegbe wòxlẽ se la ƒe nyawo katã
Joshua8:35 Nya
Joshua9:1 Esi fia
Joshua9:2 wo katã ƒo ta kpli
Joshua9:3 Ke esi Gibeon-tɔwo se nusi Yosua wo Yerixo kple Ai la
Joshua9:4 woawo hã wɔ ayenu
Joshua9:5 wodo atokota xoxo
Joshua9:6 Eye wova Yosua gbɔ le asaɖa me le Gilgal gblɔ na eya kple Israel-ŋutsuwo bena: Anyigba didia ɖe dzi míetso va
Joshua9:7 Tete Israel-ŋutsuwo gblɔ na Xiwitɔwo bena: Ɖewohi miele mía dome; aleke wo hafi míabla nu kpli mi?
Joshua9:8 Wogblɔ na Yosua bena: Wò dɔlawo míenye. Yosua bia wo bena: Amekawo míenye
Joshua9:9 Woɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Wò dolawo tso anyigba didi booa ɖe dzi va le Yehowa
Joshua9:10 kpakple nusiwo katã wòwɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe fia eveawo le Yordan godo
Joshua9:11 Eyata miaƒe ame tsitsiwo kple anyigbadzitɔwo katã gblɔ na mi bena: Mido mo dzi nuɖuɖu asi
Joshua9:12 Esi miele mo dzi dze ge ava mia gbɔ la
Joshua9:13 míaƒe weingolo siawo la yeye wole
Joshua9:14 Tete ŋutsuawo xɔ woƒe mɔ dzi nuɖuɖuawo
Joshua9:15 Eye Yosua wo xɔlɔ̃ kpli wo hebla nu kpli wo be
Joshua9:16 Esi wòbia nu kpli wo ŋkeke etɔ̃ megbe la
Joshua9:17 Eye esi Israel-viwo ho la
Joshua9:18 Ke Israel-viwo mesi wo o
Joshua9:19 amegãwo katã do ŋu na ameha blibo la bena: Mieta Yehowa
Joshua9:20 Ale miawo wo enye si: Mina woanɔ agbe
Joshua9:21 Eye amegãwo gblɔ na wo bena: Mina woanɔ agbe! Eye wòtrɔ zu naketɔlawo kple tɔmedelawo na ameha blibo la
Joshua9:22 Tete Yosua yɔ wo gblɔ na wo bena: Nukaŋuti mieble mí gblɔ bena
Joshua9:23 Eyata aɖi mia ŋu
Joshua9:24 Woɖo ŋu na Yosua bena: Ɖe wogblɔ na wò dɔlawo bena
Joshua9:25 Kpɔ ɖa
Joshua9:26 Eye wòwɔ wo nenema heɖe wo tso Israel-viwo si me
Joshua9:27 Eye Yosua tsɔ wo wɔ nakefɔlawo kple tɔmedelawo na ameha la kple Yehowa ƒe vɔsamlekpui la le teƒe
Joshua10:1 Esi Yerusalem-fia Adonizedek se bena
Joshua10:2 wova ŋutɔ; elabena Gibeon-du la lolo abe fiaduwo dometɔ ɖeka ene
Joshua10:3 Tete Yerusalem-fia Adonizedek dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Xebron-fia Hoham
Joshua10:4 Miho va kpe ɖe ŋunye
Joshua10:5 Eye Amoritɔwo ƒe fia atɔ̃awo
Joshua10:6 Tete Gibeontɔwo ɖo ame ɖo ɖe Yosua le Gilgal le asaɖa me gblɔ bena: Megaɖe asi le wò dɔlawo ŋu o
Joshua10:7 Enumake Yosua kple eƒe aʋakɔ la katã kpakple kalẽtɔwo katã ho tso Gilgal.
Joshua10:8 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua bena. Megavɔ̃ o
Joshua10:9 Tete Yosua va ƒo ɖe wo dzi kpoyi
Joshua10:10 Eye Yehowa na wolulu le Israel ŋku me
Joshua10:11 Esi wosi le Israel nu hele Bet-Xoron-to ƒe abu ɖim la
Joshua10:12 Eye Yosua ƒo nu kple Yehowa le Israel-viwo ŋku me
Joshua10:13 Tete ɣe kple ɣleti wotɔ
Joshua10:14 Eye ŋkekea ɖeke meɖo ŋgɔ nɛ alo va le emegbe de esia nu
Joshua10:15 Eye Yosua kple Israel blibo la gbugbɔ va asaɖa la me le Gilgal.
Joshua10:16 Ke fia atɔ mawo si yi ɖaɣla ɖe do me le Makeda.
Joshua10:17 Eye wova gblɔ na Yosua bena
Joshua10:18 Yosua ɖo ŋu be: Mimli kpe gãwo tu do la nu
Joshua10:19 Ke miawo migatɔ o
Joshua10:20 Eye esi Yosua kple Israel-viwo si wo vɔ hetsrɔ̃ wo
Joshua10:21 dukɔ blibo la gbugbɔ va Yosua gbɔ le Makeda le asaɖa me dedie
Joshua10:22 Eye Yosua gblɔ bena: Miɖe nu le doa nu
Joshua10:23 Tete wowɔ nenema
Joshua10:24 Esi wokplɔ fia atɔ̃ siawo va Yosua gbɔ la
Joshua10:25 Eye Yosua gblɔ na wo bena: Migavɔ̃ o
Joshua10:26 Emegbe Yosua wu wo
Joshua10:27 Eye esi ɣe yina to ɖo ge la
Joshua10:28 Eye Yosua xɔ Makeda le ŋkeke ma ke dzi; ewu wo kple yi
Joshua10:29 Eye Yosua
Joshua10:30 Eye Yehowa tsɔ eya hã kple eme fia ɖe asi na Israel
Joshua10:31 Eyome Yosua kple Israel blibo la ho tso Libna yi Laxis
Joshua10:32 Eye Yehowa tso Laxis de asi na Israel
Joshua10:33 Ɣemaɣi Horam
Joshua10:34 Emegbe Yosua kple Israel blibo la ho tso Laxis yi Eglon
Joshua10:35 eye woxɔe le ŋkeke ma dzi hetsrɔ̃e kple yi
Joshua10:36 Tete Yosua kple Israel blibo la ho tso Eglon heyi Xebron
Joshua10:37 eye woxɔe hetsrɔ̃e kple eme fia
Joshua10:38 Eyome Yosua kple Israel blibo la trɔ yi Debir ɖawɔ aʋa kplii
Joshua10:39 eye woɖu eya hã kple eme fia kpakple eƒe duwo katã dzi
Joshua10:40 Ale Yosua du anyigba blibo la kple fia
Joshua10:41 Eye Yosua ɖu wo dzi tso Kades-Barnea vaseɖe Gaza
Joshua10:42 Eye Yosua ɖu fia siawo katã kple woƒe anyigbawo dzi zi ɖeka
Joshua10:43 Emegbe Yosua kple Israel blibo la gbugbɔ va asaɖa me le Gilgal.

Joshua16:5 Efrayim-viwo ƒe anyigba enye si le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. Woƒe anyigba la ƒe ɣedzeƒeliƒo tso Aterot-Adar vaseɖe Bet-Xoron ƒe dzigbe gome

Joshua17:4 Eye wova nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua

Joshua18:1 Esi anyigba la na ta wo vɔ la
Joshua18:2 Eye Israel-viwo ƒe to adre susɔ
Joshua18:3 Eye Yosua gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena: Ɣekaɣi gɔ̃ miawɔ kuvia ase ɖo
Joshua18:4 Miɖe ŋutsu etɔ̃etɔ̃ le to sia to me
Joshua18:5 eye woamãe ɖe akpa adre me; Yuda nenɔ eƒe anyigba dzi le dziehe
Joshua18:6 Ke mide anyigba la agbalẽ me ɖe akpa adre me tsɔ vɛ nam le afisia
Joshua18:7 Ke Lewitɔwo mexɔ gomea ɖeke ɖe mia dome o
Joshua18:8 Tete ŋutsuawo dze mɔ heyi
Joshua18:9 Ale ŋutsuawo yi ɖatsa le anyigba la dzi
Joshua18:10 Tete Yosua dzidze nu ɖe dzi na wo le Yehowa ŋku me le Silo
Joshua18:11 Wodzidze nu ɖe Benyamin-viwo ƒe to la dzi le woƒe ƒomewo nu
Joshua18:12 Woƒe anyieheliƒo tso Yordan nu zɔ Yerixo-to la ƒe anyiehe heto toawo dzi le ɣetoɖoƒe gome
Joshua18:13 emegbe liƒo la tso afisia ɖo ta Luz heva zɔ Luz-to la ƒe dziehe
Joshua18:14 Ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo la nyẽ kpo ɖo ta dziehe tso to
Joshua18:15 Dziehekpa tso Kirvat-Yearim ƒe mlɔenu ɖo ta ɣetoɖoƒe gome heva se Neftoax ƒe tsivudo la gbɔ;
Joshua18:16 eye liƒo la trɔ va zɔ to
Joshua18:17 eye wòtrɔ ɖo ta anyiehe gome va to En-Semes heto Gelilot ŋu le Adumim-to dzi mɔ kasa
Joshua18:18 hezɔ to la ŋu le gbadzaƒe la ƒe anyiehe vaseɖe Araba.
Joshua18:19 Eye liƒo la va to Bet-Xogla-to da ŋu le anyiehe heva wu nu ɖe adɔ la nu le Dzeƒu la ƒe anyiehe
Joshua18:20 Eye Yordan nye liƒo le ɣedzeƒe gome. Esia nye Benyamin-viwo ƒe anyigbe ƒe liƒowo godoo va kpe le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.

Joshua21:1 Eye Lewi-to la ƒe amegãwo va nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua

Joshua22:1 Ɣemaɣi Yosua ya Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo kpakple Manase-to afã la

Joshua22:3 Miegblẽ mia nɔviwo ɖi le ɣeyiɣi didi siawo me vaseɖe egbe sia o
Joshua22:4 Ke azɔ Yehowa
Joshua22:5 Ɖeko mikpɔ nyuie
Joshua22:6 Tete Yosua yra wo heɖe asi le wo ŋu
Joshua22:7 Mose na anyigba Manase-to afã ɖe Basan
Joshua22:8 gblɔ na wo bena: Mitsɔ kesinɔnu geɖewo kple lã geɖewo
Joshua22:9 Tete Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo kpakple Manase ƒe to afã la gbugbɔ tso Israel-viwo gbɔ le Silo le Kanaan-nyigba dzi heyi woawo ŋutɔ ƒe anyigba Gilead

Joshua22:17 Ɖe vo

Joshua22:19 Ke ne miaƒe anyigba ŋu mekɔ o la
Joshua22:20 Ɖe Axan

Joshua22:26 Eyata mieɖo be

Judges1:1 Le Yosua ƒe ku megbe la Israel-viwo bia Yehowa bena: Mia dometɔ kae atre hoho ayi aɖawɔ aʋa kple Kanaanitɔwo?
Judges1:2 Tete Yehowa gblɔ bena: Yuda neho yi; kpɔ ɖa
Judges1:3 Eye Yuda gblɔ na nɔvia Simeon bena: Ho kplim
Judges1:4 Eye esi Yuda ho yi la
Judges1:5 Wova kpe Adoni-Bezek le Bezek
Judges1:6 Ke Adoni-Bezek si
Judges1:7 Tete Adoni-Bezek gblɔ bena: Fia blaadre
Judges1:8 Eye Yuda-viwo wɔ aʋa kple Yerusalem
Judges1:9 Emegbe Yuda-viwo ho yi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Kanaanitɔ
Judges1:10 Eye Yuda ho aʋa ɖe Kanaanitɔ
Judges1:11 Eyome woho aʋa tso afisia ɖe Debirtɔwo ŋu; tsã la woyɔ Debir bena Kiryat-Sefer.
Judges1:12 Tete Kaleb gblɔ bena. Amesi aɖu Kiryat-Sefer dzi
Judges1:13 Eye esi Otniel
Judges1:14 Eye esi wokplɔe la
Judges1:15 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Yram
Judges1:16 Eye Mose nyo
Judges1:17 Eye Yuda ho kpe ɖe nɔvia Simeon ŋu wova ɖu Kanaanitɔ
Judges1:18 Eye Yuda xɔ Gaza kple eƒe anyigba
Judges1:19 Eye Yehowa nɔ kple Yuda
Judges1:20 Wotsɔ Xebron na Kaleb
Judges1:21 Ke Benyamin-viwo menya Yebusitɔ
Judges1:22 Yosef-viwo ho yi Betel
Judges1:23 Eye Yosef-viwo na woyi ɖatsa ŋku le Betel; tsã la woyɔ du la bena Luz.
Judges1:24 Tete ŋkutsalawo kpɔ ŋutsua ɖe ɖo tso dua me
Judges1:25 Tete wòfiã dua me mɔnu wo
Judges1:26 Eye ŋutsu la yi ɖatso du ɖe Xititɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi
Judges1:27 Eye Manase mexɔ Bet-Sean kple eƒe duwo
Judges1:28 Ke esi ŋusẽ do Israel ŋu la
Judges1:29 Eye Efrayim hã menya Kanaanitɔ
Judges1:30 Zebulon menya Kidrontɔwo kple Nahaloltɔwo o; eyata Kanaanitɔwo tsi wo dome
Judges1:31 Aser menya Akotɔwo
Judges1:32 eyata Aser-viwo nɔ anyigbadzitɔ
Judges1:33 Eye Naftali menya Bet-Semestɔwo kple Bet-Anattɔwo ɖa o
Judges1:34 Amoritɔwo nyã Dan-viwo ɖo ɖe towo dzi
Judges1:35 Eye Amoritɔwo do dzi nɔ Xeres-towo dzi kple Ayalon kpakple Saalbim bɛ. Ke esi Yosef-viwo ƒe alɔ va kpe wo dzi la
Judges1:36 Amoritɔwo ƒe liƒo tso Akrabim-to dzi mɔ gbɔ kple Sela hemlo ɖe nu yii.
Judges2:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla tso Gilgal va Boxim gblɔ bena: Mekplɔ mi tso Egipte va anyigba
Judges2:2 migabia nu kple anyigba sia dzitɔwo o
Judges2:3 Eyata nye hã mele egblɔm na mi bena: nyemanyã wo le mia ŋgɔ o
Judges2:4 Esi Yehowa ƒe dɔla gblɔ nya siawo na Israel-viwo katã la
Judges2:5 eye wona ŋkɔ teƒe ma bena Boxim
Judges2:6 Esi Yosua ɖe asi le dukɔa ŋu la
Judges2:7 Eye dukɔ la subɔ Yehowa
Judges2:8 Yehowa ƒe dɔla Yosua
Judges2:9 eye woɖu ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe anyigba dzi le Timnat-Xeres
Judges2:10 Esi dzidzime mawo katã yi wo tɔgbuiwo gbɔ vɔ la
Judges2:11 Tete Israel-viwo wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o
Judges2:12 Wogblẽ Yehowa
Judges2:13 Wogblẽ Yehowa ɖi hesubɔ Baal kple Astarot
Judges2:14 Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu
Judges2:15 Eye Yehowa ƒe asi nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e le wo ŋu le afisiafi
Judges2:16 Eye Yehowa ɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo
Judges2:17 Ke womeɖo to woƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo o
Judges2:18 Ne Yehowa ɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃la na wo la
Judges2:19 Ke ne ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la ku la
Judges2:20 Tete Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu gblɔ bena: Esi dukɔ sia tu nye nu

Judges2:22 ne matsɔ wo ado Israel akpɔ be

Judges3:1 Esiawo nye dukɔ
Judges3:2 ne Israel-viwo ƒe ƒome
Judges3:3 Woawo nye. Filistitɔwo ƒe amegã atɔ̃awo
Judges3:4 Wotsi anyi
Judges3:5 Eye Israel-viwo nɔ Kanaanitɔwo
Judges3:6 Woɖe woƒe vinyɔnuwo
Judges3:7 Eye Israel-viwo wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o
Judges3:8 Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu
Judges3:9 Eye Israel-viwo ɖo ɣli yɔ Yehowa
Judges3:10 Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ dze edzi
Judges3:11 Eye anyigba la dzi fa ƒe blane
Judges3:12 Ke esi Israel-viwo gade asi nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o wowɔ me la
Judges3:13 Eye wòda Amon-viwo kple Amalekitɔwo kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋu
Judges3:14 Israel-viwo subɔ Moab-fia Eglon ƒe wuienyi sɔŋ.
Judges3:15 Ke esi Israel-viwo do ɣli yɔ Yehowa la
Judges3:16 Eye Ehud tu adekpui nuevee
Judges3:17 Eye wòtsɔ nudzɔdzɔ la ve na Moab-fia Eglon; Eglon enye ame lolo damia ɖe.
Judges3:18 Esi wotsa nudzɔdzɔ la na vɔ la
Judges3:19 ke etrɔ le legba
Judges3:20 Eye Ehud yi egbɔ
Judges3:21 Enumake Ehud do mia ɖa di adekpui la le ɖusiklito heƒo ɖe dɔme nɛ
Judges3:22 ale be atia ke hã bu ɖe me
Judges3:23 Emegbe Ehud do go ɖe akpata me
Judges3:24 Esi wòdo go la
Judges3:25 Ke esi wolala ʋuu ɖokpoe meʋu ʋɔa o la
Judges3:26 Ke esi wole lalam nenema la
Judges3:27 Eye esi wògbɔ la
Judges3:28 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Mikplɔm ɖo kaba
Judges3:29 Eye wowu Moabitɔwo anɔ ame akpe ewo ɣemaɣi
Judges3:30 Ale Moabitɔwo ge ɖe Israel ƒe asi te ɣemaɣi
Judges3:31 Eye Samgar
Judges4:1 Ke esi Ehud ku la
Judges4:2 Eyata Yehowa tso wo dzra na Kanaan-fia Yabin
Judges4:3 Eye Israel-viwo ɖo ɣli na Yehowa
Judges4:4 Ɣemaɣi la nyɔnu-nyagblɔɖila Debora
Judges4:5 Ena Debora ƒe ɖeti te le Rama kple Betel dome le Efrayim-to dzi
Judges4:6 Eye wòdɔ ame woyi ɖayɔ Barak
Judges4:7 makplɔ Sisera
Judges4:8 Tete Barak gblɔ nɛ bena: Ne ayi kplim la
Judges4:9 Eɖo ŋu bena: Mele yiyi ge kpli wò tso; ke bubu
Judges4:10 Tete Barak yɔ Zebulon kple Naftali va kpe ta ɖe Kedes
Judges4:11 Ke Xeber. Kenitɔ la
Judges4:12 Eye esi wogblɔ na Sisera bena
Judges4:13 tete Sisera dzra eƒe gatasiaɖamwo katã ɖo
Judges4:14 Eye Debora gblɔ na Barak bena: Tso! Elabena egbe sia Yehowa le Sisera tso ge aɖe asi na wò. Alo ɖe Yehowa medze ŋgɔwò oa? Tete Barak ɖi tso Tabor-to la dzi
Judges4:15 Eye Yehowa tsɔ yi de zi Sisera kple eƒe tasiaɖamwo katã kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la me le Barak ŋgɔ
Judges4:16 Ke Barak ti tasiaɖamwo kple aʋakɔ la yome vaseɖe Xaroset-Goyim; eye Sisera ƒe aʋakɔ blibo la tsi yi nu
Judges4:17 Ke Sisera to afɔ si va Yael
Judges4:18 Tete Yael yi ɖakpe Sisera gblɔ ne bena: Va
Judges4:19 Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Taflatse
Judges4:20 Eyome wògblɔ nɛ bena: Yi
Judges4:21 Tete Xeber srɔ̃ Yael tsɔ agbadɔtsyɔti
Judges4:22 Esi Barak ti Sisera yome la
Judges4:23 Ale Mawu baba Kanaan-fia Yabin ɖe anyi le ŋkeke ma dzi le Israel-viwo ŋku me enye si.
Judges4:24 Eye Israel-viwo ƒe asi kpe Kanaan-fia Yabin dzi
Judges5:1 Tete Debora kple Barak
Judges5:2 Esi aʋafiawo dze Israel ŋgɔ
Judges5:3 Mi fiawo
Judges5:4 Yehowa
Judges5:5 towo dzo kpekpekpe le Yehowa ŋku me
Judges5:6 Le Samgar
Judges5:7 Aʋafiawo nu tso le Israel
Judges5:8 Wotia mawu yeyewo; eyata aʋa va ke ɖe woƒe duwo ŋu. Womegakpɔ akpoxɔnu kple akplɔa ɖeke le Israel ƒe ame akpe blaneawo dome o.
Judges5:9 Nye dzi enye Israel ƒe tatɔwo kple amesiwo lã faa le dukɔa dome la to. Mikafu Yehowa!
Judges5:10 Mi amesiwo do tedzinɔ ɣiwo
Judges5:11 Esi aŋutrɔdalawo tso aseye le lãtoawo gbɔ la
Judges5:12 Nyɔ
Judges5:13 Tete dukɔ la ƒe bubume mamleawo va
Judges5:14 Wotso Efrayim
Judges5:15 Isaxar-amegãwo le Debora ŋu
Judges5:16 Nukaŋuti nètsi lãhawo gbɔ
Judges5:17 Gilead tsi Yordan ƒe go keme dzi bɔkɔɔ. Nukaŋuti Dan nye amedzro le nuwo me? Aser baba nɔ ƒuta
Judges5:18 Zebulon enye dukɔa ɖe
Judges5:19 Fiawo va wɔ aʋa
Judges5:20 Dziƒo wotso wɔ aʋa la
Judges5:21 Kison-tɔʋu la kplɔ wo yii
Judges5:22 Kalẽtɔ
Judges5:23 Yehowa ƒe dɔla be; Aɖi Meros ŋu! Aɖi eme nɔlawo ŋu kpekpekpe; elabena womeva xɔ na Yehowa o
Judges5:24 Woayra Yael le nyɔnuwo dome
Judges5:25 Tsi wòbia
Judges5:26 Eɖo asi ɖa tsɔ tsyoti
Judges5:27 Etsra ɖe eƒe afɔ nu wɔɔ
Judges5:28 Sisera dada do mo ɖe fesre nu
Judges5:29 Nyɔnu bubume
Judges5:30 Ɖe womekpɔ aboyonu ma oa? Nyɔnuvi ɖeka alo eve na ŋutsu ɖeka
Judges5:31 Yehowa
Judges6:1 Esi Israel-viwo wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o la
Judges6:2 Midiantɔwo ƒe asi kpe Israel dzi
Judges6:3 Godoo ne Israel ƒã nu la
Judges6:4 eye woƒua asaɖa ɖe wo ŋu hegblẽa agblemenuawo vaseɖe Gaza ke
Judges6:5 elabena ɖe wohona vana kple woƒe lãwo kpakple agbadɔwo
Judges6:6 Ale Israel ɖi gbɔ le Midiantɔwo ŋku me
Judges6:7 Esi Israel-viwo do ɣli yɔ Yehowa le Midiantɔwo ta la
Judges6:8 Yehowa dɔ nyagblɔɖilaa ɖe ɖo ɖe Israel-viwo gbɔ wògblɔ na wo bena: Ale Yehowa
Judges6:9 meɖe mi tso Egiptetɔwo kple miaƒe futɔwo katã si me
Judges6:10 Eye megblɔ na mi bena: Nyee nye Yehowa
Judges6:11 Eye Yehowa ƒe ɖɔla va bɔbɔ nɔ logoti te le Ofra
Judges6:12 Eye Yehowa ƒe ɖɔla ɖo ɖe edzi gblɔ nɛ bena: Yehowa li kpli wò
Judges6:13 Gideon ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Tsoo
Judges6:14 Tete Yehowa trɔ ɖe eŋu gblɔ bena: Yi le wò ŋusẽ sia nu
Judges6:15 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Taflatse
Judges6:16 Tete Yehowa gblɔ nɛ bena: Manɔ anyi kpli wò kokoko
Judges6:17 Edo ŋu nɛ bena: Ne eve nunye la
Judges6:18 Megadzo le afisia o
Judges6:19 Tete Gideon yi ɖawu gbɔ̃tsuvi ɖeka
Judges6:20 Ke Mawu ƒe dɔla la gblɔ ne bena: Tsɔ lã kple tatali maʋamaʋã la da ɖe agakpe sia dzi
Judges6:21 Eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla la tsɔ atikplɔ
Judges6:22 Esi Gideon kpɔ bena
Judges6:23 Ke Yehowa gblɔ nɛ bena: Ŋuwo nafa
Judges6:24 Eye Gideon ɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa ɖe afima
Judges6:25 Eye Yehowa gblɔ nɛ le zã ma me bena: Lé fofowò ƒe nyitsu ɖeka kpe ɖe nyitsu bubu
Judges6:26 Emegbe naɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa
Judges6:27 Tete Gideon ɖe ŋutsu ewo le eƒe dɔlawo dome
Judges6:28 Esi dua me ŋutsuwo fɔ ŋdi kanya la
Judges6:29 Tete wode asi gbɔgblɔ me na wo nɔewo bena: Ameka wɔ nusia? Eye wodzro me hebia eta se
Judges6:30 Enumake dua me ŋutsuwo gblɔ na Yoas bena: Kplɔ viwò la doe
Judges6:31 Tete Yoas gblɔ na amesiwo katã tsi tre ɖe egbɔ bena: Dzree miehe
Judges6:32 Eye wona ŋkɔe tso gbemagbe be Yerub-Baal hegblɔ bena: Baal newɔ dzre kplii
Judges6:33 Eye Midiantɔwo katã kple Amalekitɔwo kpakple ɣedzeƒeviwo kpe la heho va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yezreel-bali me.
Judges6:34 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ yɔ Gideon me fũ; tete woku kpẽ yɔ Abiesritɔwo bena
Judges6:35 Edɔ lãme ɖo ɖe Manase blibo la yɔ wo be
Judges6:36 Tete Gideon gblɔ na Mawu bena: Nenye dzinye to ge nala aɖe Israel
Judges6:37 ekema matsɔ alẽgbalẽ da ɖe lugbɔƒe
Judges6:38 Eye wòva me nenema. Esi wòfɔ ŋdi la
Judges6:39 Eye Gideon gblɔ na Mawu bena: Taflatse
Judges6:40 Eye Mawu wɔ nenema le zã ma me Alẽgbalẽ la ɖeɖeko dzi le ƒuƒuie
Judges7:1 Tete Yerub-Baal
Judges7:2 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Gideon bena: Amesiwo le ŋuwò la
Judges7:3 Eyata ɖe gbe ƒã ɖe amea wo ƒe to me bena: Amesi ke le vɔvɔ̃m
Judges7:4 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Gideon bena: Ameawo: gasɔ gbɔ akpa ko. Kplɔ wo yi tɔ la nu
Judges7:5 Esi wòkplɔ ameawo va tɔa nu la
Judges7:6 Eye amesiwo kui kple asi kplɔ la
Judges7:7 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Gideon bena: Ame alafa etɔ̃
Judges7:8 Eye ameawo tsɔ mɔ dzi nuɖuɖu kple woƒe kpẽwo ɖe asi; ke eɖe asi le Israeltɔ bubuawo katã ŋu amesiame yi eƒe xɔ nu
Judges7:9 Eye Yehowa gblɔ nɛ le zã ma me bena: Tso
Judges7:10 Ke ne èle yiyi vɔ̃m la
Judges7:11 eye nase nya
Judges7:12 Eye Midiantɔwo kple Amalekitɔwo kpakple ɣedzeƒeviwo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe bali la me kpaŋkpaŋ abe ʋetsuviwo ene
Judges7:13 Esi Gideon va la
Judges7:14 Tete nɔvia ɖo ŋu ne bena: Menye nu bubua ɖekee o
Judges7:15 Esi Gideon se drɔ̃e la kple egɔme la
Judges7:16 Eye wòmã ame alafa etɔ̃awo ɖe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ me
Judges7:17 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Mikpɔ asinyenu
Judges7:18 Ne mía kple amesiwo katã le gbɔnye míeku kpẽawo la
Judges7:19 Eye Gideon kple ame alafa ɖeka
Judges7:20 Eye aʋalɔgo etɔ̃awo ku kpẽawo hegbã zeawo; wole akakatiawo ɖe mia
Judges7:21 Amesiame tɔ ɖe eteƒe le asaɖa la ŋu godoo
Judges7:22 Esime ame alafa etɔ̃awo le kpẽawo kum la
Judges7:23 Eye woyɔ Israel-ŋutsuwo tso Naftali kple Aser kpakple Manase blibo la
Judges7:24 Eye! Gideon do ame ɖo ɖe Efrayim-to blibo la dzi gblɔ bena: Miyi ɖaxe towo kple Yordan nu na Midiantɔwo vaseɖe Bet-Bara! Tete woyɔ Efrayim-ŋutsuwo katã
Judges7:25 Eye wòlé Midiantɔwo ƒe amegã eveawo
Judges8:1 Tete Efrayim-ŋutsuwo gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuka nye esi nèwɔ ɖe mía ŋu
Judges8:2 Ke eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Ɖe miawo miewɔ wum oa? Ɖe Efrayim ƒe weinxaxa mlɔetɔ menyo wu Abieser ƒe weinxaxa blibo la oa?
Judges8:3 Mawu tso Midian-amegãwo
Judges8:4 Esi Gideon va Yordan nu
Judges8:5 egblɔ na Sukottɔwo bena: Midi aboloa ɖewo na amesiwo le yonyeme la
Judges8:6 Sukot-amegãwo ɖo ŋu bena: Ɖe wò asi tu Zebax kple Zalmuna
Judges8:7 Eye Gideon gblɔ bena: Enyo! Ne Yehowa tsɔ Zebax kple Zalmuna de asi nam la
Judges8:8 Eye woho tso afima yi Penuel
Judges8:9 Tete wògblɔ na Penueltɔwo bena: Ne metrɔ gbɔ le ŋutifafa me la
Judges8:10 Ke Zebax kple Zalmuna kpakple woƒe aʋakɔ la va Karkor
Judges8:11 Eye Gideon to asimɔ gã dzi le Nobax kple Yogbeha ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome
Judges8:12 Tete Zebax kple Zalmuna wòsi
Judges8:13 Esi Gideon
Judges8:14 ele Sukot-ɖekakpuia ɖe
Judges8:15 Eye esi wòva Sukottɔwo gbɔ la
Judges8:16 Emegbe wòlé dua me tsitsiawo
Judges8:17 Egbã Penuel mɔ̃ la ƒu anyi
Judges8:18 Eye wògblɔ na Zebax kple Zalmuna bena: Ŋutsu ka ƒomeviwoe miewu le Tabor gbɔ? Woɖo ŋu bena: Wole abe wò ene
Judges8:19 Tete wògblɔ bena: Nɔvinyeŋutsuwoe
Judges8:20 Enumake wògblɔ na eƒe ŋgɔgbevi Yeter bena: Tso
Judges8:21 Tete Zebax kple Zalmuna gblɔ bena: Wò ŋutɔ tso
Judges8:22 Tete Israeltɔwo gblɔ na Gideon bena: Wò ŋutɔ kple viwòŋutsu kpakple viwòŋutsu ƒe vi miɖu fia ɖe mía dzi
Judges8:23 Gideon ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Nye ŋutɔ alo vinyeŋutsu míaɖu fia ɖe mia dzi o
Judges8:24 Gideon gblɔ na wo bena: Nu ɖeka biam mele tso mia si
Judges8:25 Woɖo ŋu bena: Miana wò baa! Tete wokeke avɔ ɖe anyi
Judges8:26 Eye sikatogɛ
Judges8:27 Eye Gideon tsɔ wo wɔ kɔmewu hetsɔ ɖa ɖe eƒe du Ofra me
Judges8:28 Ale wobɔbɔ Midiantɔwo ɖe anyi le Israel-viwo ŋku me
Judges8:29 Eye Yerub-Baal
Judges8:30 Ŋutsuvi blaadre le Gideon si
Judges8:31 Eye eƒe ahiã
Judges8:32 Gideon
Judges8:33 Esi Gideon nya ku ko la
Judges8:34 Eye Israel-viwo ƒe ŋku dzo le Yehowa
Judges8:35 Eye womeve Yerub-Baal
Judges9:1 Eye Abimelex
Judges9:2 Miƒo nu ɖe Sixemtɔwo ƒe to me bena: Kae nyo na mi wu; Yerub-Baal vi blaadreawo katã naɖu fia ɖe mia dzi loo
Judges9:3 Tete dadaa nɔviwo gblɔ nya siawo katã ɖe Sixemtɔwo katã ƒe to me
Judges9:4 Woɖe klosalo blaadre nɛ tso Baal-Berit ƒe gbedoxɔ me
Judges9:5 Eye wòva fofoa ƒe me le Ofra
Judges9:6 Eye Sixemtɔwo katã kple Milo-nɔlawo katã va kpe ta
Judges9:7 Esi wogblɔ nya sia na Yotam la
Judges9:8 Gbe ɖeka atiwo be
Judges9:9 Tete amiti gblɔ na wo bena: Magblẽ nye ami
Judges9:10 Atiawo gblɔ na gboti bena: Wòava ɖu fia ɖe mía dzi!
Judges9:11 Tete gboti gblɔ na wo bena: Magblẽ nye tsi vivi kple nye kutsetse xɔasiwo ɖi
Judges9:12 Atiawo gblɔ na weinka bena Wòa va naɖu fia ɖe mía dzi!
Judges9:13 Tete weinka ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Magblẽ nye tsetse me tsi
Judges9:14 Eye atiawo katã gblɔ na ŋuve bena: Wòa va ɖu fia ɖe mía dzi!
Judges9:15 Tete ŋuve gblɔ na atiawo bena: Nenye nyateƒe to gblɔm miele be
Judges9:16 Azɔ nuteƒe kple nu dzɔdzɔe wònye miewɔ be
Judges9:17 Fofonye wo aʋa na mi
Judges9:18 hafi miawo miedze aglã ɖe fofonye ƒe aƒe ŋu egbea
Judges9:19 Nenye nuteƒe kple nu dzɔdzɔe wònye miewɔ na Yerub-Baal ƒe aƒe egbe la
Judges9:20 Ne menye nenem o la
Judges9:21 Tete Yotam si le nɔvia Abimelex nu yi Beer
Judges9:22 Esi Abimelex ɖu Israel dzi ƒe etɔ̃ la
Judges9:23 Mawu de gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ɖia ɖe Abimelex kple Sixemtɔwo me
Judges9:24 bena ne nu vlo
Judges9:25 Eye Sixemtɔwo ɖe amewo wode xa ɖe towo dzi ɖe eŋuti
Judges9:26 Ekema me Gaal
Judges9:27 woyi agble ɖaxa woƒe weintsetsewo hewɔ wein
Judges9:28 Eye Gaal
Judges9:29 Ɖe wònye dukɔ sia asinye mee wòle la
Judges9:30 Esi dumegã Zebul se Gaal
Judges9:31 eye wòdɔ amewo dzaa ɖo ɖe Abimelex gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Judges9:32 Eyata mia kple wò amewo mifɔ zã
Judges9:33 Ne ŋu ke
Judges9:34 Tete Abimelex kple aʋakɔ blibo
Judges9:35 Esi Gaal
Judges9:36 Eye esi Gaal kpɔ aʋakɔa la
Judges9:37 Ke Gaal gagblɔ ne bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Judges9:38 Tete Zebul gblɔ nɛ bena: Menye wòe le nu me ɖim le gbɔgblɔm bena: ameka nye Abimelex
Judges9:39 Tete Gaal ho dze Sixemtɔwo ŋgɔ
Judges9:40 Ke Abimelex nyãe
Judges9:41 Abimelex tsi Aruma
Judges9:42 Esi ŋu ke
Judges9:43 Tete wòmã aʋakɔ la ɖe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ me
Judges9:44 Abimelex kple aʋalɔgo
Judges9:45 Emegbe Abimelex wɔ aʋa kple ɖu la ŋkeke blibo la katã
Judges9:46 Esi Sixem-mɔ̃metɔwo see la
Judges9:47 Eye wova gblɔe na Abimelex bena
Judges9:48 Tete Abimelex kple aʋakɔ
Judges9:49 Tete ana ka blibo la lã atilɔwo hedze Abimelex yome
Judges9:50 Emegbe Abimelex ho ɖe Tebez ŋu
Judges9:51 Mɔ̃ sesẽa ɖe le dua titina
Judges9:52 Eye Abimelex te ɖe mɔ̃ la ŋu hewɔ aʋa kplii
Judges9:53 Tete nyɔnua ɖe tsɔ tevi xlã ɖe la na Abimelex
Judges9:54 Enumake wòyɔ eƒe adekplɔvi gblɔ ne bena: Di wò yi
Judges9:55 Esi Israeltɔwo kpɔ bena
Judges9:56 Ale Mawu ɖo Abimelex ƒe nu vlo
Judges9:57 Eye Mawu he nu vlo
Judges10:1 Le Abimelex megbe la Isaxartɔ Tola
Judges10:2 Eye esi wòdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel ƒe blave vɔ etɔ̃ sɔŋ megbe la
Judges10:3 Eya megbe Gilead-tɔ Yair do
Judges10:4 Ŋutsuvi blaetɔ̃ nɔ esi
Judges10:5 Eye Yair ku woɖii ɖe Kamon.
Judges10:6 Eye Israel-viwo yi dzi wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o
Judges10:7 Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu
Judges10:8 Eye wote Israel-vi
Judges10:9 Eye Amon-viwo tso Yordan
Judges10:10 Eyata Israel-viwo ɖo ɣli yɔ Yehowa bena: Miewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò
Judges10:11 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena. Esi Egiptetɔwo
Judges10:12 Zidontɔwo
Judges10:13 Ke miawo mìegblẽm ɖi hesubɔ mawu bubuwo
Judges10:14 Miyi ɖado ɣli yɔ mawu
Judges10:15 Ke Israel-viwo gblɔ na Yehowa bena: Miewɔ nuvɔ̃
Judges10:16 Tete woɖe mawu bubuawo ɖa le wo ɖokui dome hesubɔ Yehowa; eyata Israel ƒe fukpekpe la mena wòɖe dzi ɖi o.
Judges10:17 Eye Amon-viwo kpe ta heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Gilead
Judges10:18 Tete Gileadtɔwo ƒe amegãwo gblɔ na wo bena: Amesi ayi aɖakpe aʋa kple Amon-viwo gbã la
Judges11:1 Yefta
Judges11:2 Eye Gilead srɔ̃ dzi viwo nɛ
Judges11:3 Tete Yefta si le nɔviawo nu yi ɖanɔ Tob-nyigba dzi
Judges11:4 Esi eteƒe didi ʋee la
Judges11:5 Eye esi Amon-viwo ho aʋa ɖe Israel ŋu la
Judges11:6 Wogblɔ na Yefta bena: Va nanye míaƒe aʋafia
Judges11:7 Tete Yefta ɖo ŋu na Gilead-ame tsitsiwo bena: Menye miawoe le fum
Judges11:8 Gilead-ame tsitsiwo gblɔ na Yefta bena: Esia ta pɛ mieva gbɔwo ɖo
Judges11:9 Eye Yefta gblɔ na Gilead-ame tsitsiwo bena: Ne miekplɔm meyi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Amon-viwo
Judges11:10 Gilead-ame tsitsiwo gblɔ na Yefta bena: Yehowa enye ɖasefo le mía dome! Miawo
Judges11:11 Tete Yefta yi kple Gilead-ame tsitsiawo
Judges11:12 Eye Yefta do amewo ɖo ɖe Amon-viwo ƒe fia gbɔ gblɔ bena: Nya ka le mía dome
Judges11:13 Amon-viwo ƒe fia gblɔ na Yefta ƒe dolawo bena: Elabena Israel xɔ nye anyigba
Judges11:14 Tete Yefta gadɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Amon-viwo ƒe fia eho
Judges11:15 eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Yefta ƒe gbe enye si: Israel mexɔ anyigbaa ɖeke le Moabtɔwo kple Amon-viwo si o.
Judges11:16 Elabena esi Israel tso Egipte
Judges11:17 edo ame ɖo ɖe Edom-fia be
Judges11:18 Eye wòto gbedzi hetrɔ Edom-nyigba kple Moab-nyigba ta
Judges11:19 Tete Israel do amewo ɖo ɖe Amoritɔwo ƒe fia Sixon
Judges11:20 Ke Sixon meɖo ŋu ɖe Israel ŋu
Judges11:21 Tete Yehowa
Judges11:22 Eye woxɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe anyigba blibo la tso Arnon nu vaseɖe Yabok nu
Judges11:23 Yehowa
Judges11:24 Me wò mawu Kemos xɔ nane na wò la
Judges11:25 Wòe nye ame wu Moab-fia Balak
Judges11:26 Esi Israel nɔ Xesbon kple eƒe duwo
Judges11:27 Nyemeda voa ɖeke ɖe ŋuwò
Judges11:28 Ke Amon-viwo ƒe fia meɖo to Yefta ƒe nya
Judges11:29 Tete Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ dze Yefta dzi
Judges11:30 Eye Yefta ɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Ne ètsɔ Amon-viwo ɖe asi nam vava
Judges11:31 eye megbɔ tso Amon-viwo gbɔ le ŋutifafa me la
Judges11:32 Tete Yefta ho aʋa ɖe Amon-viwo ŋu
Judges11:33 Eye wòsi wo tso Aroer vaseɖe Minit heva ke ɖe Abel-Keramim
Judges11:34 Eye esi Yefta gbɔ va aƒe le Mizpa la
Judges11:35 Esi wòkpɔe la
Judges11:36 Tete wòɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Fofonye
Judges11:37 Eye wògblɔ na fofoa bena: Wɔ esia ko nam: Ɖe mɔ nam dzinu eve
Judges11:38 Eɖo ŋu bena: Heyi! Ale wòɖe mɔ nɛ dzinu eve
Judges11:39 Esi dzinu evea nu yi la
Judges11:40 be
Judges12:1 Tete Efrayimtɔwo ƒo ƒu ho va anyiehe
Judges12:2 Yefta ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Mía kple nye dukɔ míekpe aʋa vɔ kple Amon-viwo
Judges12:3 Esi mekpɔ be
Judges12:4 Tete Yefta ƒo Gileadtɔwo katã nu ƒu yi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Efrayim
Judges12:5 Eye Gileadtɔwo xe Yordan-tsoƒewo na Efrayim. Eye ne Efrayimtɔ sisia ɖe va gblɔ be: mina matso tɔa la
Judges12:6 Wogblɔna nɛ be: Gblɔ be Sibolet! Tete wogblɔna be Zibolet; elabena meɖo ŋu ɖo be
Judges12:7 Eye Yefta drɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel ƒe ade
Judges12:8 Eyome Ibzan
Judges12:9 Edzi ŋutsuvi blaetɔ̃
Judges12:10 Emegbe Ibzan ku
Judges12:11 Elon
Judges12:12 Eye Elon
Judges12:13 Eyome Piratonitɔ Abdon
Judges12:14 Edzi ŋutsuvi blane
Judges12:15 Eye Piratonitɔ Abdon ku woɖi ɖe Piraton le Efrayim-nyigba dzi le Amalekitɔwo ƒe to dzi.
Judges13:1 Ke esi Israel-viwo gawɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o la. Yehowa tsɔ wo de asi na Filistitɔwo ƒe blane sɔŋ.
Judges13:2 Ɣemaɣi ŋutsua ɖe tso Zora le Dan-ƒome la me
Judges13:3 Tete Yehowa ƒe ɖɔla ɖe eɖokui fia nyɔnu la gblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Judges13:4 Eyata kpɔ nyuie
Judges13:5 Elabena kpɔ ɖa
Judges13:6 Tete nyɔnu la yi ɖagblɔ na srɔ̃a bena: Mawu ƒe amea ɖe va gbɔnye
Judges13:7 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Judges13:8 Tete Manoax ɖe kuku na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Oo Aƒetɔ
Judges13:9 Eye Mawu se Manoax ƒe gbe
Judges13:10 Tete nyɔnu la ƒu du kaba yi ɖagblɔe na srɔ̃a bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Judges13:11 Enumake Manoax tsi tre dze nyɔnu la yome heva ŋutsua gbɔ
Judges13:12 Manoax gblɔ bena Ne wò nya la va me la
Judges13:13 Tete Yehowa ƒe dɔla la gblɔ na Manoax bena: Nusi megblɔ na nyɔnua la
Judges13:14 Maɖu nusi tso weinka ŋu o
Judges13:15 Tete Manoax gblɔ na Yehowa ƒe dɔla la bena: Na míasika wò ɖi
Judges13:16 Yehowa ƒe dɔla la ɖo ŋu na Manoax bena: Ne èsikam ɖi hã la
Judges13:17 Eye Manoax gblɔ na Yehowa ƒe dɔla la bena: Ŋkɔwò ɖe? Bena ne wò nya la va me la
Judges13:18 Yehowa ƒe dɔla la gblɔ nɛ bena: Nukaŋuti nèle nye ŋkɔ
Judges13:19 Tete Manoax lé gbɔ̃vi hekpe ɖe nuɖuvɔsa ŋu
Judges13:20 Esi dzo ƒe aɖewo de dzi le vɔsamlekpuia dzi la
Judges13:21 Ke Yehowa ƒe dɔla megaɖe eɖokui fia Manoax kple srɔ̃a kpɔ o Azɔ Manoax dze sii bena
Judges13:22 Manoax gblɔ na srɔ̃a bena: Miele kuku ge
Judges13:23 Ke srɔ̃a gblɔ nɛ bena: Ɖe wònye Yehowa ɖe wòdi be
Judges13:24 Eye nyɔnu la dzi ŋutsuvi hena ŋkɔe bena Simson. Ɖevi la va tsi
Judges13:25 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ ɖe asi edzi dzedze me le Dan ƒe asaɖa
Judges14:1 Simson yi Timnat
Judges14:2 Esi wògbɔ la
Judges14:3 Fofoa kple dadaa gblɔ nɛ bena: Ɖe nyɔnua ɖeke mele nɔviwòwo ƒe vinyɔnuwo kple nye dukɔ blibo la dome o
Judges14:4 Ke fofoa kple dadaa medze sii be
Judges14:5 Esi Simson kple fofoa kpakple dadaa woyina ɖe Timnat
Judges14:6 Tete Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ dze edzi
Judges14:7 Eye wòyi ɖaƒo nu kple nyɔnu la
Judges14:8 Eye esi eteƒe didi ʋee
Judges14:9 Tete woɖee ɖe asi le nyinyim heva fofoa kple dadaa gbã
Judges14:10 Eye fofoa va nyɔnua gbɔ. Tete Simson tu aglo le afima
Judges14:11 Eye esi wokpɔe la
Judges14:12 Eye Simson gblɔ na wo bena: Mato adzo na mi; ne mieɖe egɔme nam le aglotutuŋkeke adreawo me la
Judges14:13 Ke ne miete ŋu ɖe egɔme nam o la
Judges14:14 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Nuɖuɖu tso nutsuɖula me
Judges14:15 Le ŋkeke eneagbe la wogblɔ na Simson srɔ̃ bena: Ƒoe ɖe srɔ̃wò nu
Judges14:16 Tete Simson srɔ̃ la avi nɛ gblɔ bena: Fu ko nèlém
Judges14:17 Eye wòfa avi ne le ŋkeke adre
Judges14:18 Tete duameviwo va gblɔ nɛ le ŋkeke aɖreagbe
Judges14:19 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ dze edzi wòyi Askalon ɖawu ŋutsu blaetɔ̃ heɖe wo ŋu nuwo
Judges14:20 Eye wotso Simson srɔ̃ na ehati
Judges15:1 Esi eteƒe didi ʋee la
Judges15:2 eye wògblɔ bena: Mebu be
Judges15:3 Ke Simson gblɔ na wo bena: Ne mehe dzɔgbevɔ̃e va Filistitɔwo dzi fifia la
Judges15:4 Tete Simson yi ɖalé abei alafa etɔ̃
Judges15:5 Emegbe wòdra akakatiawo heɖe asi le wo ŋu ɖo ɖe Filistitowo ƒe agblewo me; eye ale wòto dzo lu
Judges15:6 Filistitɔwo gblɔ bena: Ameka wo nusia? Eye wogblɔ bena: Simson
Judges15:7 Eye Simson gblɔ na wo bena: Ne miewɔ alea hã la
Judges15:8 Eye wòdza sobo kple ali na wo nyamanyama. Tete wòdzo yi ɖanɔ agato me le Elam.
Judges15:9 Eye Filistitɔwo ho va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yuda
Judges15:10 Tete Yuda-ŋutsuwo gblɔ bena: Nukaŋuti mieho ɖe mía ŋu? Woɖo ŋu bena: Simson lé ge mieva
Judges15:11 Eye Yuda-ŋutsu akpe etɔ̃ yi agato la me le Elam gblɔ na Simson bena: Menyae be
Judges15:12 Tete wogblɔ nɛ bena: Lé wò ge mieva
Judges15:13 Woɖo ŋu ne bena: Kpao
Judges15:14 Eye esi wova ɖo Lexi la
Judges15:15 Eye wòkpɔ tedziglã mumua ɖe hedo asi ɖa tsɔe wu ame akpe ɖeka.
Judges15:16 Eye Simson gblɔ be: Tedziglã metso li kɔ kɔe
Judges15:17 Esi wòƒo nu vo la
Judges15:18 Tete tsikɔ wui ŋuta
Judges15:19 Tete Mawu fe kpea ɖe le Lexi
Judges15:20 Eye wòdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel le Filistitowo ŋɔli ƒe blave sɔŋ.
Judges16:1 Tete Simeon yi Gaza
Judges16:2 Esi wofi tofi na Gazatɔwo bena
Judges16:3 Ke Simson mlɔ anyi vaseɖe zã titina; le zãtiƒe la efɔ
Judges16:4 Esia megbe la elɔ̃ nyɔnua ɖe le Sorek-tɔʋu la nu
Judges16:5 Eye Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo va egbɔ gblɔ nɛ bena: Ble enu
Judges16:6 Tete Delila gblɔ na Simson bena: Taflatse
Judges16:7 Simson ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Ne wotsɔ atagbi mumu adre
Judges16:8 Tete Filistitowo ƒe amegãwo tsɔ atagbi yeye adre
Judges16:9 Ke wode xa ɖe nyɔnua gbɔ le xɔgã me
Judges16:10 Eye Delila gblɔ na Simson bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Judges16:11 Eɖo ŋu ne bena: Ne wotsɔ ka yeye
Judges16:12 Tete Delila tsɔ ka yeyewo biae
Judges16:13 Delila gblɔ na Simson bena: Ɖeko neblem vaseɖe fifi
Judges16:14 Tete wòtsɔ agbatrɔti trɔe
Judges16:15 Eye wògblɔ ne bena: Aleke nègblɔ be
Judges16:16 Esi wòle dzi gbãm ne gbawotsyogbe kple eƒe nyawo
Judges16:17 Tete wògblɔ eƒe dzime-nyawo katã nɛ bena: Talũhɛa ɖeke ɖeke medea nye ta ŋu o
Judges16:18 Esi Delila kpɔ bena
Judges16:19 Eye wòna wòdɔ alɔ̃ ɖe eƒe ata dzi; tete wòyɔ ŋutsua ɖe vɛ wòlũ ɖakɔ adreawo le eta. Ale wòna wòde asi gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ me
Judges16:20 Eye nyɔnu la gblɔ bena: Simson
Judges16:21 Eye Filistitowo lee heŋɔ eƒe ŋkuwo
Judges16:22 Esi wolũ ta nɛ megbe la
Judges16:23 Eye Filistitowo ƒe amegãwo va kpe ta
Judges16:24 Eye esi dukɔ la kpɔe la
Judges16:25 Esi wole dzidzɔ kpɔm la
Judges16:26 Eye Simson gblɔ na ŋutsuvi
Judges16:27 Ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo yɔ xɔ la taŋtaŋ
Judges16:28 Tete Simson yɔ Yehowa gblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ Yehowa
Judges16:29 Eye Simson va titinasɔti eveawo
Judges16:30 Eye Simson gblɔ be: Maku kple Filistitɔwo! Eye wòbi eɖokui kple ŋusẽ
Judges16:31 Tete nɔviawo kple fofoa ƒemetɔwo katã va tsɔe yi ɖaɖi ɖe fofoa Manoax ƒe yɔdo me le Zora kple Estaol dome? Edrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel ƒe blave sɔŋ.
Judges17:1 Eye ŋutsua ɖe no Efrayim-to dzi
Judges17:2 Eya gblɔ na dadaa bena: Wò klosalo akpe ɖeka kple alafa
Judges17:3 Esi wògbugbɔ klosalo akpe ɖeka kple alafa la na dadaa la
Judges17:4 Eye wòtsɔ klosalo la na dadaa Ke dadaa ɖe klosalo alafa eve na sikanutula
Judges17:5 Eye Mixa tu mawuxɔ
Judges17:6 Ɣemaɣi la fíaa ɖeke mena Israel o
Judges17:7 Eye ɖekakpuia ɖe tso Betlexem-Yuda le Yuda ƒe ƒome la me; enye Lewitɔ
Judges17:8 Eye woʋu tso Betlexem-Yuda-du la me
Judges17:9 Tete Mixa gblɔ nɛ bena: Afika nètso? Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Lewito menye tso Betlexem-Yuda
Judges17:10 Mixa gblɔ nɛ bena: Tsi gbɔnye
Judges17:11 Lewito la lɔ̃ be
Judges17:12 Eye Mixa ɖo Lewitɔ la. Ale ɖekakpui la trɔ zu nunɔla nɛ
Judges17:13 Tete Mixa gblɔ bena: Azɔ menyae bena
Judges18:1 Ɣemaɣi la fiaa ɖeke menɔ Israel o. Eye Dan-viwo ƒe to la ɖi anyigba
Judges18:2 Eye Dan-viwo dɔ ŋutsu kalẽtɔ atɔ̃ le woƒe ƒome blibo la me tso Zora kple Estaol ɖo ɖa
Judges18:3 Esi woɖo Mixa ƒe aƒe gbɔ la
Judges18:4 Eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Ale kple ale Mixa wɔ nam
Judges18:5 Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Bia Mawu na mí kpɔ be
Judges18:6 Nunɔla la ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Miyi le ŋutifafa me! Miaƒe mɔ
Judges18:7 Tete ŋutsu atɔ̃awo dze mɔ heva Lais
Judges18:8 Esi wogbɔ va wo nɔviwo gbɔ le Zora kple Estaol la
Judges18:9 Woɖo ŋu bena: Mitso
Judges18:10 Ne mieyi la
Judges18:11 Tete ŋutsu alafa ade
Judges18:12 Eye woho va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Kiryat-Yearim le Yuda; eyata woyɔa teƒe ma vaseɖe egbe be Dan ƒe asaɖa; kpɔ ɖa
Judges18:13 Woho tso afima heyi Efrayim-to la dzi
Judges18:14 Tete ŋutsu atɔ
Judges18:15 Tete woge ɖe me
Judges18:16 Ke Dan-viwo dome ŋutsu alafa ade
Judges18:17 Eye ŋutsu atɔ̃
Judges18:18 Esi ame mawo ge ɖe Mixa ƒe me
Judges18:19 Wogblɔ ne bena: Zi ɖoɖoe! Tsɔ asi bu nu
Judges18:20 Tete wòdze nunɔla la ŋu
Judges18:21 Emegbe wòtrɔ hedzo
Judges18:22 Esi wode megbe le Mixa ƒe aƒe gbɔ la
Judges18:23 Eye esi woyɔ Dan-viwo ɖa la
Judges18:24 Eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Mietsɔ nye mawu
Judges18:25 Ke Dan-viwo gblɔ ne bena: Ɖe nu le mía ŋu
Judges18:26 Tete Dan-viwo lé woƒe mɔ
Judges18:27 Ke woawo tsɔ nusi Mixa wɔ la
Judges18:28 Ke xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli o
Judges18:29 Eye wotsɔ ŋkɔ na du la bena Dan ɖe wo fofo Dan
Judges18:30 Dan-viwo li aklama kpakpɛ la
Judges18:31 Eye Mixa ƒe aklama kpakpɛ
Judges19:1 Le ɣemaɣi la fiaa ɖeke menɔ Israel o. Eye Lewi-ŋutsua ɖe yi ɖanye amedzro le Efrayim-to la ƒe mlɔenu
Judges19:2 Eye eƒe ahiã la wo ahasi le emegbe
Judges19:3 Tete ŋutsu la kplu ɖekakpui ɖeka kple tedzi eve ɖe asi
Judges19:4 Ɖetugbi la fofo
Judges19:5 Esi wofɔ le ŋkeke eneagbe
Judges19:6 Tete wobɔbɔ nɔ anyi
Judges19:7 Esi ŋutsu la tso
Judges19:8 Esi wòfɔ le ŋkeke atɔ̃lia ƒe ŋdi
Judges19:9 Ke esi ŋutsu la kple eƒe ahiã kpakple ɖekakpui la wotso
Judges19:10 Gake ŋutsu la melɔ̃ be
Judges19:11 Esi woɖo Yebus gbo la
Judges19:12 Ke eƒe aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ bena: Miayi aɖadze ame tutɔwo ƒe ɖu
Judges19:13 Eye wògblɔ na eƒe ɖekakpui la bena: Nètso
Judges19:14 Esi woyi azɔlia dzi la
Judges19:15 Tete woge ɖe Gibea
Judges19:16 Eye kpɔ ɖa
Judges19:17 Tete wòfɔ ko dzi kpo amedzro la le dua ƒe ablɔ me
Judges19:18 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Míetso Betlexem-Yuda heyina ɖe Efrayim-to la ƒe mlɔenu; afima metso va yi Betlexem-Yuda
Judges19:19 Evɔ wònye aƒla kple nuɖuɖu hena míaƒe tedziwo
Judges19:20 Tete ame tsitsi la gblɔ nɛ bena: Ŋutifafa na wò! Ne nane le hiãwòm la
Judges19:21 Eye wòkplɔe yi eƒe me hena nuɖuɖu eƒe tedziwo
Judges19:22 Ke esi woƒe dzi gbo ɖe me la
Judges19:23 Tete ŋutsu
Judges19:24 Kpɔ ɖa
Judges19:25 Ke ŋutsuawo gbe toɖoɖoe. Tete ŋutsu la kplɔ eƒe ahiã yi wo gbɔ le xexe
Judges19:26 Esi ŋua mekpɔ ke ɖe le eme keŋ o la
Judges19:27 Eye esi eƒe aƒetɔ fɔ ŋdi
Judges19:28 Eye wògblɔ ne bena: Tsi tre
Judges19:29 Esi wògbɔ va aƒe la
Judges19:30 Eye amesiame
Judges20:1 Tete Israel-viwo katã ho
Judges20:2 Eye dukɔ blibo la ƒe tatɔwo kple Israel-toawo katã va Mawu ƒe dukɔ ƒe takpekpe la me; amesiwo zɔ afɔ
Judges20:3 Eye Benyamin-viwo se bena
Judges20:4 Tete Lewitɔ
Judges20:5 Ke Gibeatɔwo ƒo kpli ɖe ŋunye
Judges20:6 Tete melé nye ahiã la
Judges20:7 Kpɔ ɖa
Judges20:8 Tete dukɔ blibo la xɔ edzi nu ɖekɛ gblɔ bena: Mía dome amea ɖeke mayi eƒe agbadɔ me o
Judges20:9 ke boŋ ale míawɔ Gibea enye si: Míadzidze nu ɖe wo dzi!
Judges20:10 Eye miaɖe ŋutsu ewo te ame alafa me
Judges20:11 Tete Israel-ŋutsuwo katã ƒo ƒu
Judges20:12 Eye Israel-toawo ɖɔ ame ɖo ɖe Benyamin-ƒomeawo katã gbɔ bia wo bena: Nu vlo ka enye si wowɔ le mia dome?
Judges20:13 Eyata miɖe Gibeatɔ vloawo na
Judges20:14 Tete Benyamin-viwo tso duwo me va ƒo ƒu ɖe Gibea
Judges20:15 Eye woxlẽ Benyamin-vi
Judges20:16 Ame siawo katã dome aʋawɔla alafa adre nye miawɔlawo
Judges20:17 Eye woxlẽ Israel-ŋutsuwo: amesiwo katã ta yi
Judges20:18 Tete woho va Betel
Judges20:19 Israel-viwo fɔ ŋdi va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Gibea gbɔ.
Judges20:20 Eye Israel-ŋutsuwo ho aʋa ɖe Benyamin ŋu
Judges20:21 Tete Benyamin-viwo ɖo tso Gibea
Judges20:22 Eye Israel-viwo yi ɖafa avi le Yehowa ŋku me vaseɖe fiẽ
Judges20:23 Tete Israel-ŋutsuwo de dzi ƒo na wo ɖokui
Judges20:24 Ke esi Israel-viwo te tu Benyamin-viwo le ŋkeke evelia dzi la
Judges20:25 Benyamin-viwo do tso Gibea va kpewo le ŋkeke evelia dzi
Judges20:26 Tete Israel-viwo katã kple aʋakɔ blibo la yi Betel ɖafa avi
Judges20:27 Eye Israel-viwo bia Yehowa gblɔ bena: — ɣemaɣi la Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la le afima
Judges20:28 eye Aron vi Eleazar ƒe vi Pinexas subɔ le eŋku me ɣemaɣi. — Ɖe míagaho aʋa ɖe mia nɔvi Benyamin-viwo ŋu loo
Judges20:29 Eye Israel-viwo ɖe xadelawo ɖo Gibea ŋu va kpe.
Judges20:30 Eye Israel-viwo ho ɖe Benyamin-viwo ŋu le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe hedze aʋa ɖe Gibea ŋu abe tsã ene.
Judges20:31 Tete Benyamin-viwo ɖo va kpe aʋakɔ la; ke woble wo tso ɖu la gbɔ
Judges20:32 Eye Benyamin-viwo bu bena: Miele wo si ge abe tsã ene! Ke Israel-viwo gblɔ be: Mina miasi le wo nu
Judges20:33 Tete Israel-ŋutsuwo katã tso le wo nɔƒe va dze aʋa ɖe Baal-Tamar
Judges20:34 Ŋutsu aʋawɔla akpe ewo tso Israel blibo la me va Gibea kasa
Judges20:35 Tete Yehowa si Benyamin le Israel ŋgɔ
Judges20:36 Eye Benyamin-viwo kpo bena
Judges20:37 Tete xadelawo wo kaba ho ɖo ta Gibea
Judges20:38 Eye Israel-ŋutsuwo kple xadelawo ɖo gbe ɖi bena: Mina dzudzɔ nade dzi le du la ŋu kɔlii!
Judges20:39 Esi Israel-ŋutsuwo de megbe le aʋaa nu da
Judges20:40 Tete dzudzɔ de dzi le du la ŋu kɔlii
Judges20:41 Esi Israel-ŋutsuwo trɔ gbɔna la
Judges20:42 Eye wòsi le Israel-ŋutsuwo nu heto gbedzimɔ; ke aʋa la yɔ wo ɖe nu
Judges20:43 Woɖe to ɖe Benyamin
Judges20:44 Ŋutsu kalẽtɔ
Judges20:45 Tete wòtrɔ hesi ɖo ta gbedzi vaseɖe Rimon-kpe la gbɔ; wowu ame akpe atɔ̃ le woƒe megbexeawo ŋu le mɔ dzi
Judges20:46 Ŋutsu kalẽtɔ
Judges20:47 Eye ŋutsu alafa ade trɔ hesi ɖo ta gbedzi vaseɖe Rimon-kpe la gbɔ
Judges20:48 Eye Israel-ŋutsuwo trɔ ɖe Benyamin-viwo ŋu
Judges21:1 Eye Israel-ŋutsuwo ka atam le Mizpa gblɔ bena: Mía dometɔa ɖeke matsɔ vianyɔnu na Benyamin-viwo woaɖe akpɔ o!
Judges21:2 Eye esi dukɔ la va Betel la
Judges21:3 gblɔ bena: Oo
Judges21:4 Eye dukɔ la fɔ ŋdi kanya le ŋkeke eveagbe heɖi vɔsamlekpui
Judges21:5 Eye Israel-viwo gblɔ bena: Ameka le Israel-toawo katã dome
Judges21:6 Eye wòve Israel-viwo na wo nɔvi Benyamin
Judges21:7 Aleke míawɔ hafi ana nyɔnu ame kpɔtɔeawo? Elabena míeta Yehowa be
Judges21:8 Eye wòbia bena: Ameka le Israel-toawo dome
Judges21:9 Eye esi woxlẽ dukɔa la
Judges21:10 Tete ameha la ɖe ame akpe wuieve le kalẽtɔwo dome ɖo ɖa gblɔ na wo bena: Miyi ɖawu Yabes-Gileadtɔwo kple yi
Judges21:11 Ale miawɔ enye si: Mitsrɔ ŋutsu sia ŋutsu kple nyɔnu
Judges21:12 Eye wokpɔ ɖetugbi alafa ene
Judges21:13 Eye ameha blibo la dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Benyamin-viwo gbɔ le Rimon-kpe la gbɔ
Judges21:14 Tete Benyamin-viwo trɔ gbɔ ɣemaɣi
Judges21:15 Eye Benyamin ƒe nu ve dukɔ la
Judges21:16 Tete ameha la ƒe amegãwo gblɔ bena: Aleke míawɔ hafi ana nyɔnu ame kpɔtɔeawo? Elabena nyɔnuwo tsrɔ̃ le Benyamin.
Judges21:17 Eye wogblɔ bena: Benyamin ƒe anyigba enye woƒe amesiwo kpɔtɔ la tɔ
Judges21:18 Ke miawo la míate ŋu atsɔ mia vinyɔnuwo na wo woade o; elabena Israel-viwo ka atam bena: Aɖi amesi ana nyɔnu Benyamin la ŋu!
Judges21:19 Eye wogblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Judges21:20 Eye wode se na Benyamin-viwo bena: Miyi ɖade xa de weingblewo me
Judges21:21 eye ne miekpɔ be
Judges21:22 Ke ne wo fofowo kple wo nɔviŋutsuwo va dzre wɔ ge kpli mí la
Judges21:23 Tete Benyamin-viwo wɔ nenema
Judges21:24 Eye Israel-viwo dome amesiame dzo ɣemaɣi tso afima yi eƒe to me kple eƒe ƒomeawo gbɔ
Judges21:25 Ɣemaɣi la fiaa ɖeke menɔ Israel o
Ruth1:1 Le ɣeyiɣi
Ruth1:2 Ŋutsu la ŋkɔ nye Elimelex
Ruth1:3 Esi Naomi srɔ̃ Elimelex ku
Ruth1:4 woɖe Moab-nyɔnuwo
Ruth1:5 Ke wo ame eve la Maxlon kple Xilion hã ku; ale nyɔnu laƒeviwo kple eve kpakple srɔ̃a wogblẽe ɖi.
Ruth1:6 Tete eya kple lɔ̃xoawo wotso hegbugbɔ tso Moab-nyigba dzi; elabena ese le Moab-nyigba dzi be
Ruth1:7 Ale wòʋu tso afisi wònɔ la
Ruth1:8 Tete Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoa eveawo bena: Mitrɔ
Ruth1:9 Yehowa ana miakpɔ dzudzɔ le mia srɔ̃wo ƒe me! Eye wòɖuɖɔ nu na wo; tete wofa avisesĩe
Ruth1:10 hegblɔ nɛ bena: Míayi wò dukɔ gbɔ kpli wò boŋ!
Ruth1:11 Ke Naomi gblɔ bena: Vinyewo
Ruth1:12 Vinyewo
Ruth1:13 ɖe mialala
Ruth1:14 Tete wogafa avi sesĩe. Eye Orpa ɖuɖɔ nu na lɔ̃xoa
Ruth1:15 eye wògblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Ruth1:16 Ke Rut gblɔ bena: Megaƒoe ɖe nunye be
Ruth1:17 afisi naku ɖo la
Ruth1:18 Esi wòkpɔ be
Ruth1:19 Ale woa kple eve la wodze mɔ heva Betlexem. Eye esi woɖo Betlexem la
Ruth1:20 Ke egblɔ na wo bena: Migayɔm be Naomi o
Ruth1:21 Metsɔ nu geɖe yii
Ruth1:22 Ale Naomi gbɔ va aƒe
Ruth2:1 Eye Naomi srɔ̃ ƒe ƒometɔa ɖe tso Elimelex ƒe ƒome la me
Ruth2:2 Eye Rut
Ruth2:3 Tete wòyi ɖafɔe le agble me le nuxalawo yome; eye nanetɔe agble la nye Boas
Ruth2:4 Eye kpɔ ɖa
Ruth2:5 Tete Boas bia eƒe dɔla
Ruth2:6 Dɔla
Ruth2:7 Egblɔ nam bena: Na mafɔ nusiwo dzɔ ɖe nubablawo domee le nuxalawo yome la
Ruth2:8 Tete Boas gblɔ na Rut bena: Vinye
Ruth2:9 Afisiafi
Ruth2:10 Tete wòɖe ta agu hegblɔ nɛ bena: Aleke nève nunye
Ruth2:11 Boas ɖo ŋu gblɔ nɛ bena: Wogblɔ nusiwo katã nèwɔ na lɔ̃xowò
Ruth2:12 Yehowa naɖo wò nuwɔwɔ teƒe na wò
Ruth2:13 Tete wògblɔ bena: Nye aƒetɔ
Ruth2:14 Eye Boas gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuɖuɣi ɖo
Ruth2:15 Emegbe wòtsi tre gayi efɔ ge. Tete Boas de se na eƒe dɔlawo bena: Mina wòafɔe le bablawo hã domee
Ruth2:16 milũ ɖewo le bablawo ŋu da ɖe anyi nɛ
Ruth2:17 Ale wòfɔe le agble la me vaseɖe ɣetrɔ
Ruth2:18 Eye wòtsɔe va du la me
Ruth2:19 Eye lɔ̃xoa biae bena: Afika nèyi ɖafɔe le egbea? Eye afika nèwɔ do le? Woayra amesi bu wò ale! Tete wòto amesi gbɔ wòwɔ dɔ le la
Ruth2:20 Tete Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoa bena: Yehowa
Ruth2:21 Rut
Ruth2:22 Tete Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoa Rut bena: Enyo
Ruth2:23 Ale wòlé eɖokui ɖe Boas ƒe dɔlanyɔnuwo ŋu hele efɔfɔ dzi
Ruth3:1 Tete lɔ̃xoa Naomi gblɔ nɛ bena: Vinye
Ruth3:2 Boas
Ruth3:3 Eyata le tsi nasi ami
Ruth3:4 Eye ne eyi ɖamlɔ anyi la
Ruth3:5 Tete wòɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Nusiwo katã nègblɔ la
Ruth3:6 Eye wòyi lugbɔƒe la hewɔ
Ruth3:7 Esi Boas ɖu nu no nu
Ruth3:8 Le zãtiƒe la ŋutsu la ɖi vo
Ruth3:9 Tete wògblɔ bena: Wò amekae? Eɖo ŋu bena: Nye Rut
Ruth3:10 Eye wògblɔ bena: Yehowa ayra wò
Ruth3:11 Eyata
Ruth3:12 Nyateƒe
Ruth3:13 Tsi afisia dɔ
Ruth3:14 Tete wòmlɔ eƒe afɔde vaseɖe ŋu ke
Ruth3:15 Eye wògblɔ bena: Ɖo taɖedzi
Ruth3:16 Eye esi wògbɔ va lɔ̃xoa gbɔ la
Ruth3:17 hegblɔ bena: Lu dzidzenu ade sia wòtsɔ nam
Ruth3:18 Eye wògblɔ bena: Gbɔ dzi ɖi ko
Ruth4:1 Eye Boas yi agbo nu hebɔbɔ nɔ afima. Eye kpɔ ɖa
Ruth4:2 Eye wòɖe dumegã ewo hegblɔ bena: Mibɔbɔ nɔ afi! Tete wobɔbɔ nɔ anyi.
Ruth4:3 Eye wògblɔ na srɔ̃ɖia la bena: Naomi
Ruth4:4 Eyata meɖo be
Ruth4:5 Eye Boas gblɔ bena: Gbesigbe naxɔ agblea aƒle le Naomi si la
Ruth4:6 Tete srɔ̃ɖia la gblɔ bena: Nyemate ŋu axɔe na ɖokuinye o
Ruth4:7 Tsã la
Ruth4:8 Eyata esi srɔ̃ɖia la gblɔ na Boas bena: xɔe ƒle la
Ruth4:9 Tete Boas gblɔ na ame tsitsiawo kple duametɔwo katã bena: Miawoe nye ɖasefo egbea be
Ruth4:10 Eye mexɔ Moab-nyɔnu Rut
Ruth4:11 Tete duametɔ
Ruth4:12 Eye vi
Ruth4:13 Ale Boas ɖe Rut wòzu srɔ̃a
Ruth4:14 Tete nyɔnuwo gblɔ na Naomi bena: Woakafu Yehowa
Ruth4:15 Afa akɔ na wò
Ruth4:16 Eye Naomi xɔ ɖevi la ɖe akɔ
Ruth4:17 Eye aƒelikawo tsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ hegblɔ bena: Wodzi ŋutsuvi na Naomi! eye wona ŋkɔe be Obed; eyae dzi Dawid fofo Isai.
Ruth4:18 Perez ƒe dzidzimeviwo enye si: Perez dzi Xezron
Ruth4:19 Xezron dzi Ram
Ruth4:20 Aminadab dzi Naxeson
Ruth4:21 Salma dzi Boas
Ruth4:22 Obed dzi Isai
1Samuel1:1 Ŋutsua ɖe tso Ramatayim-Zofim le Efrayim-to la dzi
1Samuel1:2 Eɖe srɔ̃ eve
1Samuel1:3 Eye ŋutsu sia tsoa eƒe ɖu me ƒe sia ƒe yina ɖadoa gbe ɖa
1Samuel1:4 Gbesigbe Elkana sa vo la
1Samuel1:5 Ke ena lã Xana ɖe ame eve nu
1Samuel1:6 Eye atsusia tsɔ dzikunyawo gbã dzi nɛ
1Samuel1:7 Alea wòwɔna ƒe sia ƒe
1Samuel1:8 Tete srɔ̃a Elkana gblɔ nɛ bena: Xana
1Samuel1:9 Eye esi Xana du nu no nu le Silo vɔ la
1Samuel1:10 Eye wòle nu xam vevie
1Samuel1:11 Eye wòɖe adzɔgbe gblɔ bena: Yehowa Zebaot
1Samuel1:12 Eye esi wòle gbe dom ɖa le Yehowa ŋku me eteƒe didi la. Eli lé ŋku de eƒe nu ŋu.
1Samuel1:13 Ke Xana le nu ƒom le dzi me
1Samuel1:14 Eye Eli gblɔ nɛ bena: Ɣekaɣi namu aha ase do? Na wein la nakɔ le mo na wò!
1Samuel1:15 Xana do ŋu gblɔ bena: Gbeɖe
1Samuel1:16 Megabu wò dɔlanyɔnu ame ɖigbɔe o
1Samuel1:17 Tete Eli gblɔ bena: Yi le ŋutifafa me
1Samuel1:18 Eɖo ŋu bena: Ne ève wò dɔlanyɔnu nu ko! Emegbe nyɔnu la lé eƒe mɔ
1Samuel1:19 Eye wòfɔ ŋdi kanya ɖado gbe ɖa le Yehowa ŋku me
1Samuel1:20 Esi ƒe trɔ la
1Samuel1:21 Eye Elkana kple eƒemetɔwo katã yi
1Samuel1:22 Ke Xana ya meyi o
1Samuel1:23 Tete srɔ̃a Elkana gblɔ nɛ bena: Wɔ alesi dze ŋuwò
1Samuel1:24 Eye esi woɖee le no nu la
1Samuel1:25 Wowu nyi la
1Samuel1:26 Eye wògblɔ bena: Nye aƒetɔ
1Samuel1:27 Ɖevi sia tae medo gbe ɖa le
1Samuel1:28 Eyata mekplɔe ve na Yehowa le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã me
1Samuel2:1 Eye Xana do gbe ɖa gblɔ bena: Nye dzi le aseye tsom le Yehowa me
1Samuel2:2 Amea ɖeke mele kɔkɔe abe Yehowa ene o
1Samuel2:3 Miganɔ adegbe ƒom atraɖii o
1Samuel2:4 Kalẽtɔwo ƒe dati ŋe kliklikli eye ame benɔwo tsɔ ŋusẽ bia ali dzi;
1Samuel2:5 wotsɔ abolo tɔ agbate ƒoɖilawo
1Samuel2:6 Yehowa wua ame
1Samuel2:7 Yehowa wɔa ahetɔ kple kesinɔtɔ
1Samuel2:8 Eya ɖea hiãtɔwo tso ké me
1Samuel2:9 Ekpɔa eƒe ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe afɔ dzi
1Samuel2:10 Yehowa atsrɔ̃ eƒe futɔwo
1Samuel2:11 Emegbe Elkana dzo yi eƒe xɔ nu le Rama; ke ɖevi la zu subɔla na Yehowa le nunɔla Eli gbɔ.
1Samuel2:12 Ke Eli viŋutsuwo nye ame vlowo
1Samuel2:13 kple kɔnu
1Samuel2:14 eye wòtɔ lãwo le gaze alo ze
1Samuel2:15 Ɖewo la nunɔla ƒe dɔla vana
1Samuel2:16 Ne ame la do ŋu be: Na woatɔ dzo amiawo gbɔ
1Samuel2:17 Eye dɔlawo ƒe vodada sɔ gbɔ le Yehowa ŋku me
1Samuel2:18 Ke Samuel subɔna le Yehowa ŋku me
1Samuel2:19 Gake dadaa tɔa dziwui ɖagbia ɖe vana nɛ ƒe sia ƒe
1Samuel2:20 Emegbe Eli yra Elkana kple srɔ̃a gblɔ bena: Yehowa ana nyɔnu sia nadzi vu na wò natsɔ ɖo amesi nèbia Yehowa la teƒe! Eye wogbugbɔ yi wo nɔƒe.
1Samuel2:21 Yehowa ɖo ŋku Xana dzi
1Samuel2:22 Ke Eli ku amegã ɖeɖi
1Samuel2:23 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Nukaŋuti miele nusia tɔgbe wɔm? Elabena mese miaƒe nu vlo wɔwɔwo le dukɔ blibo sia nu.
1Samuel2:24 Menyo o hee
1Samuel2:25 Ne amegbetɔ da vo ɖe nɔvia amegbetɔ ŋu la
1Samuel2:26 Ke Samuel ɖevi la tsi ɖe dzi
1Samuel2:27 Eye Mawu ƒe amea ɖe va Eli gbɔ gblɔ nɛ bena: Yehowa ƒe gbe enye si: Meɖe ɖokuinye fia fofowò ƒe aƒe
1Samuel2:28 Metiae tso Israel-towo katã dome
1Samuel2:29 Nukaŋuti miedo vlo nye vɔsalã kple nye nuɖuvɔsa
1Samuel2:30 Eyata Yehowa
1Samuel2:31 Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel2:32 Eye nu nyui
1Samuel2:33 Gake wò ƒometɔ ɖeka ko nyematsrɔ̃ ɖa le nye vɔsamlekpui la gbɔ o
1Samuel2:34 Nusi ava viwòwo kple eve Xofni kple Pinexas dzi la
1Samuel2:35 Eye maɖo nunɔla nuteƒetɔ na ɖokuinye
1Samuel2:36 Eye amesiwo akpɔtɔ ɖe aƒewò me la
1Samuel3:1 Eye Samuel ɖevi la subɔ Yehowa le Eli gbɔ. Ɣemaɣi la Yehowa meƒoa nu enuenu o
1Samuel3:2 Eva me gbe ɖeka bena
1Samuel3:3 womekpɔ tsi Mawu ƒe akaɖiawo haɖe o
1Samuel3:4 Tete Yehowa yɔ Samuel
1Samuel3:5 Enumake wòƒu du yi Eli gbɔ gblɔ bena; Nyee nye si
1Samuel3:6 Ke Yehowa gayɔ Samuel. Tete Samuel fɔ yi Eli gbɔ gblɔ bena: Nyee nye si
1Samuel3:7 Samuel menya Yehowa haɖe o
1Samuel3:8 Yehowa gayɔ Samuel zi etɔ̃lia
1Samuel3:9 Eye Eli gblɔ na Samuel bena: Yi ɖamlɔ anyi
1Samuel3:10 Tete Yehowa va tsi tre ɖi
1Samuel3:11 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel3:12 Gbemagbe mana nusiwo katã megblɔ ɖe Eli ƒe aƒe ŋu la
1Samuel3:13 Megblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel3:14 Eyata meka atam ɖe Eli ƒe aƒe la ŋu bena: Womatsɔ vɔsalã alo nuɖuvɔsa alé avu ɖe Eli ƒe aƒe la ƒe vodada nu akpɔ o!
1Samuel3:15 Eye Samuel mlɔ anyi
1Samuel3:16 Tete Eli yɔ Samuel bena: Vinye Samuel! Etɔ bena: Nyee nye si!
1Samuel3:17 Eye wògblɔ bena: Nya ka wogblɔ na wò? Megaɣla naneke ɖem o! Ne èɣla nusi wògblɔ na wò la ɖe ɖem la
1Samuel3:18 Tete Samuel gblɔ wo katã ne
1Samuel3:19 Samuel va tsi
1Samuel3:20 Eye Israel blibo la tso Dan vaseɖe Beerseba nyae bena
1Samuel3:21 Eye Yehowa gade asi eɖokuiɖeɖefia me le Silo
1Samuel4:1 Eye Samuel ƒe nya de Israel blibo gbɔ. Eye Israel ho aʋa ɖe Filistitɔwo ŋu; woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Eben-Ezer gbɔ
1Samuel4:2 Eye Filistitɔwo ho ɖatɔ Israel
1Samuel4:3 Esi dukɔ la va asaɖa me la
1Samuel4:4 Eye dukɔ la ɖɔ ame ɖo ɖe Silo woyi ɖatsɔ Yehowa Zebaot
1Samuel4:5 Eye esi Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la va asaɖa me la
1Samuel4:6 Ke esi Filistitɔwo se aseye la ƒe ɖiɖi la
1Samuel4:7 Tete Filistitɔwo vɔ
1Samuel4:8 Nane wɔ mí tututu! Ameka aɖe mí atso mawu ŋusẽtɔ siawo si me? Woawo nye mawu
1Samuel4:9 Milé dzi ɖe ƒo
1Samuel4:10 Filistitɔwo wɔ aʋa la
1Samuel4:11 Woxɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la
1Samuel4:12 Eye Benyamintɔa ɖe ƒu du tso aʋagbe dzi va ɖo Silo gbemagbe; awu vuvu le eŋu
1Samuel4:13 Esi wòva la
1Samuel4:14 Esi Eli se ɣli la ƒe ɖiɖi la
1Samuel4:15 Eli xɔ ƒe blaasieke vɔ enyi
1Samuel4:16 Ŋutsu la gblɔ na Eli bena: Aʋagbe dzi metso
1Samuel4:17 Dɔla la ɖo ŋu gblɔ bena: Israel si le Filistitɔwo nu
1Samuel4:18 Esi wose Mawu ƒe aɖaka ŋkɔ la
1Samuel4:19 Ke fu tsi ɖe lɔ̃xoa
1Samuel4:20 Eye esi wòle kudɔ ƒom la
1Samuel4:21 Eye wòna ŋkɔ ɖevi la bena Ikabod hegblɔ bena: Ŋutikɔkɔe dzo le Israel
1Samuel4:22 Eye wògblɔ bena: Ŋutikɔkɔe dzo le Israel
1Samuel5:1 Ke Filistitɔwo xɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la
1Samuel5:2 Esi Filistitɔwo xɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la
1Samuel5:3 Ke esi Asdodtɔwo fɔ ŋdi kanya la
1Samuel5:4 Esi wogafɔ ŋdi kanya la
1Samuel5:5 Eyata Dagon ƒe nunɔlawo kple amesiwo katã dea Dagon ƒe me la
1Samuel5:6 Eye Yehowa ƒe asi sẽ ɖe Asdodtɔwo dzi
1Samuel5:7 Esi Asdodtɔwo kpɔ bena
1Samuel5:8 Eye wodɔ ame woɖaƒo Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo katã nu ƒu va wo gbɔ
1Samuel5:9 Ke esi aɖaka la va afima la
1Samuel5:10 Eye woɖo Mawu ƒe aɖaka la ɖe Ekron; ke esi Mawu ƒe aɖaka la va Ekron la
1Samuel5:11 Tete wodɔ ame woyi ɖaƒo Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo katã nu ƒu
1Samuel5:12 Amesiwo meku o la
1Samuel6:1 Esi Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la tsi Filistitɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi ɣleti adre la
1Samuel6:2 Filistitɔwo yɔ nunɔlawo kple afakalawo gblɔ bena: Aleke miele Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la wɔ gee? Migblɔ alesi miawɔ
1Samuel6:3 Tete woɖo ŋu bena: Ne miehe
1Samuel6:4 Eye wogblɔ bena: Avulénu ka miatsɔ akpe ɖe eŋu? Woɖo ŋu bena: Miwɔ sikaƒoƒoe atɔ̃ kple sikafi atɔ̃ ɖe Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo ƒe xexlẽme nu
1Samuel6:5 Miwɔ miaƒe ƒoƒoeawo kple afi
1Samuel6:6 Nukaŋuti miehe
1Samuel6:7 Eyata mifɔ nuwo vɛ
1Samuel6:8 Mikɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la da ɖe tasiaɖam la me
1Samuel6:9 Eye ne miekpɔ bena
1Samuel6:10 Tete ŋutsuawo wɔ alea; wòlé nyivinɔ eve
1Samuel6:11 Emegbe wotsɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la kple aɖakavi
1Samuel6:12 Eye nyinɔwo lé mɔ kɔ ɖo ta Bet-Semes
1Samuel6:13 Ke Bet-Semestɔwo le lu ŋem le bali la me
1Samuel6:14 Esi tasiaɖam la va Bet-Semestɔ Yosua ƒe agble me
1Samuel6:15 Eye Lewitɔwo kɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la kple aɖakavi
1Samuel6:16 Filistitɔwo ƒe amegã atɔ̃awo kpɔ eteƒe
1Samuel6:17 Sikaƒoƒoe
1Samuel6:18 Eye sikafiawo le amegã atɔ̃awo ƒe xexlẽme nu
1Samuel6:19 Eye wowu amewo le Bet-Semestɔwo dome
1Samuel6:20 Eye Bet-Semestɔwo gblɔ bena: Ameka ate ŋu anɔ te ɖe Yehowa
1Samuel6:21 Tete wodɔ ame ɖo ɖe Kiryat-Yearimtɔwo gblɔ bena: Filistitɔwo gbugbɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la vɛ
1Samuel7:1 Tete Kiryat-Yearimtɔwo va kɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la yi ɖada ɖe togbɛ dzi le Abinadab ƒe me
1Samuel7:2 Tso gbesigbe aɖaka la va Kiryat-Yearim la
1Samuel7:3 Tete Samuel gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la bena. Ne mietrɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu kple miaƒe dzi blibo la
1Samuel7:4 Tete Israel-viwo ɖe Baalwo kple Astartewo ɖa
1Samuel7:5 Eye Samuel gblɔ bena: Miƒo Israel blibo la nu ƒu va Mizpa
1Samuel7:6 Tete wova kpe ta ɖe Mizpa
1Samuel7:7 Esi Filistitɔwo se bena
1Samuel7:8 Tete Israel-viwo gblɔ na Samuel bena: Megadzudzɔ kukuɖeɖe na Yehowa
1Samuel7:9 Eye Samuel lé alẽvi
1Samuel7:10 Esi Samuel le numevɔa sam la
1Samuel7:11 Israel-ŋutsuwo do tso Mizpa heti Filistitowo yome
1Samuel7:12 Eye Samuel kɔ kpea ɖe ɖo Mizpa kple Sen dome
1Samuel7:13 Wobɔbɔ Filistitɔwo ɖe anyi
1Samuel7:14 Eye du
1Samuel7:15 Samuel drɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel le ele agbe me ŋkekewo katã me.
1Samuel7:16 Etsana ƒe sia ƒe dea Betel
1Samuel7:17 Emegbe wòtrɔna va Rama
1Samuel8:1 Eye wova me
1Samuel8:2 Viaŋutsu ŋgɔgbea ŋkɔ nye Yoel
1Samuel8:3 Ke viaŋutsuwo meto eƒe ʋe me o
1Samuel8:4 Tete Israel-ame tsitsiwo katã va kpe ta ɖe Samuel gbɔ le Rama
1Samuel8:5 eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel8:6 Ke nya la medze Samuel ŋu o
1Samuel8:7 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel bena: Ɖo to dukɔ la ƒe gbe le nusianu
1Samuel8:8 Alesi wole wɔwɔm tso gbesigbe mekplɔ wo tso Egipte vaseɖe egbe
1Samuel8:9 Eyata do to woƒe gbe; ɖeko naxlɔ̃ nu wo
1Samuel8:10 Tete Samuel gblɔ Yehowa ƒe nyawo katã na dukɔ
1Samuel8:11 hegblɔ bena: Fia
1Samuel8:12 Atsɔ wo ado amegãwo ɖe ame akpe kple ame blaatɔ̃ nu na eɖokui
1Samuel8:13 Atsɔ mia vinyɔnuwo awɔ amitɔlawo
1Samuel8:14 Eye woaxɔ agble
1Samuel8:15 Axɔ agblemenu kple weingblemenu fe ewolia le mia si na eƒe aƒe dzikpɔlawo kple dɔlawo.
1Samuel8:16 Axɔ miaƒe dɔlaŋutsuwo kple dɔlanyɔnuwo kple miaƒe ɖekakpui zãzɛwo kpakple miaƒe tedziwo
1Samuel8:17 Axɔ miaƒe alẽwo ƒe ewolia
1Samuel8:18 Gbemagbe míado ɣli le fia
1Samuel8:19 Gake dukɔ la gbe toɖoɖo Samuel hegblɔ bena: Gbeɖe
1Samuel8:20 ne miawo hã mianɔ abe dukɔwo katã ene! Míaƒe fia nadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na mí
1Samuel8:21 Eye Samuel se dukɔ la ƒe nyawo katã
1Samuel8:22 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel bena: Ɖo to woƒe gbe
1Samuel9:1 Ŋutsua ɖe le Benyamin
1Samuel9:2 Eye ŋutsuvia de le esi
1Samuel9:3 Eye Saul fofo Kis ƒe tedzinɔwo bu
1Samuel9:4 Eye wotsa le Efrayim-to kple Salisa-nyigba dzi womekpɔ wo o; wotsa le Saalim-nyigba dzi
1Samuel9:5 Esi wova Zuf-nyigba dzi la
1Samuel9:6 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel9:7 Saul gblɔ na eƒe dɔla bena: Ne míeyi ɖe
1Samuel9:8 Tete dɔla la gaɖo ŋu na Saul gblɔ bena. Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel9:9 Tsã
1Samuel9:10 Saul gblɔ na eƒe dɔla la bena: Wò nya la le eme
1Samuel9:11 Esi wole to liam yina dua me la
1Samuel9:12 Woɖo ŋu na wo bena. Ẽ
1Samuel9:13 Ne miede dua me la
1Samuel9:14 Tete woyi dua me. Eye esi woɖo dua me la
1Samuel9:15 Ke Yehowa de gbe to me na Samuel ŋkeke ɖeka va yi
1Samuel9:16 Etsɔ wɔle siawo la mele ŋutsua ɖe ɖo ge ɖe wò tso Benyamin-nyigba dzi
1Samuel9:17 Esi Samuel kpɔ Saul la
1Samuel9:18 Tete Saul te ɖe Samuel ŋu le agbo la nu gblɔ bena: Taflatse
1Samuel9:19 Samuel ɖo ŋu na Saul gblɔ bena: Nyee nye nukpɔla la. Dze ŋgɔnye yi to la dzi
1Samuel9:20 Megatsi dzi le tedzinɔ
1Samuel9:21 Saul ɖo ŋu gblɔ bena: Ɖe menye Benyamintɔ menye tso Israel ƒe to suetɔ me
1Samuel9:22 Tete Samuel kplɔ Saul kple eƒe ɖɔla yi xɔa me
1Samuel9:23 Azɔ Samuel gblɔ na nuɖala bena: Tsɔ lã
1Samuel9:24 Tete nuɖala yi ɖatsɔ ata kple nusiwo le eŋu la
1Samuel9:25 Emegbe woɖi tso toa dzi yi dua me
1Samuel9:26 Eye wolɔ ŋdi kanya; esi agu dze la
1Samuel9:27 Esi woɖo ɖua ƒe mlɔenu la
1Samuel10:1 Tete Samuel tsɔ amigoe la kɔ ɖe la me ne
1Samuel10:2 Ne edzo le gbɔnye egbea la
1Samuel10:3 Ne eyi azɔlia dzi tso afima va ɖo logotiwo gbɔ le Tabor la
1Samuel10:4 Woana ɖoaƒe wò
1Samuel10:5 Emegbe ava Mawu ƒe Gibea
1Samuel10:6 Tete Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ adze dziwò
1Samuel10:7 Ne dzesi siawo va me na wò la
1Samuel10:8 Dze ŋgɔnye yi Gilgal
1Samuel10:9 Eye esi wòtrɔ be
1Samuel10:10 Esi wòva ɖo Gibea la
1Samuel10:11 Esi amesiwo katã nyae tsã
1Samuel10:12 Tete amea ɖe ɖo ŋu le afima bena: Ameka nye woawo ya fofo? Eyata wòtrɔ zu lodonya be: A
1Samuel10:13 Esi wowu nyagbɔgblɔɖi nu la
1Samuel10:14 Eye Saul nyuri gblɔ na eya kple dɔla la bena: Afika mietso? Eɖo ŋu bena: Tedzinɔwo di ge mietso
1Samuel10:15 Tete Saul nyuri gblɔ bena: Taflatse
1Samuel10:16 Saul ɖo ŋu na nyuria bena: Egblɔ na mi be
1Samuel10:17 Eye Samuel yɔ dukɔ la va Yehowa ŋku me le Mizpa.
1Samuel10:18 Eye wogblɔ na Israel-viwo bena: Ale Yehowa
1Samuel10:19 Ke miawo miegbe Mawu
1Samuel10:20 Eye Samuel na Israel-toawo te va
1Samuel10:21 Benyamin-to la te va le woƒe ƒomeawo nu
1Samuel10:22 Eye wogabia nu Yehowa bena: Ɖe ame la hã va afisia? Yehowa ɖo ŋu bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel10:23 Tete woƒu du ɖahee tso afima vɛ
1Samuel10:24 Eye Samuel gblɔ na dukɔ blibo la bena: Miele amesi Yehowa tia na mi la kpɔma? Amea ɖeke mede enu le dukɔ blibo la dome o! Tete dukɔ blibo la tso aseye gblɔ bena: Fia nenɔ agbe!
1Samuel10:25 Azɔ Samuel gblɔ fiaɖuɖu ƒe kɔnuwo na dukɔ la
1Samuel10:26 Eye Saul hã yi aƒe le Gibea
1Samuel10:27 Ke ame vloa ɖewo gblɔ bena: Amesia hãe aɖe mía? Wodo vloe
1Samuel11:1 Emegbe Amonitɔ Nahas ho va de to de Yabes-Gilead. Tete Yabes-ŋutsuwo katã gblɔ na Nahas bena: Bia nu kpli mí
1Samuel11:2 Ke Amonitɔ Nahas ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Hafi mabia nu kpli mi la
1Samuel11:3 Tete Yabes-ame tsitsiwo gblɔ nɛ bena: Na asinu mí ŋkeke adre
1Samuel11:4 Eye ame dɔdɔwo va Saul ƒe Gibea hegblɔ nyawo ɖe dukɔ la ƒe to me; tete dukɔ blibo la fa avi kple ɣli.
1Samuel11:5 Ke Saul le nyiwo yome tso agble gbɔ. Tete Saul gblɔ bena: Nuka le dukɔ la wɔm wòle avi fam? Eye wòto Yabes-ŋutsuawo ƒe nyawo nɛ.
1Samuel11:6 Esi Saul se nya siawo la
1Samuel11:7 Enumake wòlé nyi eve heɖi
1Samuel11:8 Eye woxlẽ wo le Besek: Israel-viwo le ame akpe alafa etɔ̃
1Samuel11:9 Azɔ wògblɔ na ame dɔdɔ
1Samuel11:10 Eye Yabestɔwo gblɔ bena: Etsɔ la míado ava mia gbɔ
1Samuel11:11 Esi ŋu ke la
