1Samuel11:12 Emegbe dukɔ la gblɔ na Samuel bena: Amekawo gblɔ be: Saul hãe aɖu fia ɖe mía dzia? Mikplɔ ameawo de asi
1Samuel11:13 Ke Saul gblɔ bena: Womawu amea ɖeke le egbe ŋkeke sia dzi o
1Samuel11:14 Eye Samuel gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Miva míayi Gilgal
1Samuel11:15 Ale dukɔ blibo la yi Gilgal
1Samuel12:1 Eye Samuel gblɔ na Israel blibo la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel12:2 Azɔ fia la adze mia ŋgɔ. Ke nye la metsi
1Samuel12:3 Nyee nye si
1Samuel12:4 Woɖo ŋu bena: Mèsẽ ŋuta le amea ɖeke ŋu o
1Samuel12:5 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Yehowa kple eƒe amesiamina la wonye ɖasefo na mi egbe sia be
1Samuel12:6 Tete Samuel gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Eya nye Yehowa
1Samuel12:7 Eyata miva ɖo
1Samuel12:8 Esi Yakob va Egipte la
1Samuel12:9 Ke woŋlɔ Yehowa
1Samuel12:10 Eye wodo ɣli yɔ Yehowa gblɔ bena: Miewɔ nuvɔ̃
1Samuel12:11 Tete Yehowa ɖɔ Yerub-Baal
1Samuel12:12 Ke esi miekpɔ be
1Samuel12:13 Azɔ miaƒe fia
1Samuel12:14 Ne mieva Yehowa
1Samuel12:15 Ke ne mieɖo to Yehowa ƒe gbe o
1Samuel12:16 Ke mite va fifia hã
1Samuel12:17 Alo menye fifi enye luŋeɣi oa? Ke mele Yehowa yɔ ge
1Samuel12:18 Eye Samuel yɔ Yehowa
1Samuel12:19 Eye dukɔ blibo la gblɔ na Samuel bena: Ɖe kuku na Yehowa
1Samuel12:20 Eye Samuel gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Migavɔ̃ o! Mienyã wɔ nu vlo siawo katã hafi
1Samuel12:21 Migate ɖa
1Samuel12:22 Elabena Yehowa maɖe asi le eƒe dukɔ ŋu o le eƒe ŋkɔ gã la ta; elabena edze egɔme
1Samuel12:23 Ke nede megbe xaa tso nye hã gbɔnye
1Samuel12:24 Ɖeko mivɔ̃ Yehowa
1Samuel12:25 Ke ne miewɔ nu vlo la
1Samuel13:1 Saul ɖu fia ƒe ɖeka
1Samuel13:2 Saul tia ame akpe etɔ̃ tso Israel. Ame akpe eve le Saul ŋu le Mixmas kple Betel-to dzi
1Samuel13:3 Eye Yonatan si Filistitɔwo ƒe dzɔla
1Samuel13:4 Eye Israel blibo la se bena
1Samuel13:5 Eye Filistitɔwo kpe ta be
1Samuel13:6 Esi Israel-ŋutsuwo kpɔ be
1Samuel13:7 Eye Hebritɔwo tso Yordan yi Gad-nyigba kple Gilead-nyigba dzi; ke Saul gale Gilgal ke
1Samuel13:8 Eye wolala ŋkeke adre
1Samuel13:9 Eye Saul gblɔ bena: Mihe numevɔsa kple akpedavɔsa vɛ! Eye wosa numevɔ.
1Samuel13:10 Esi wosa numevɔ vɔ la
1Samuel13:11 Ke Samuel gblɔ bena: Nuka nèwɔ? Saul ɖo ŋu bena: Esi mekpɔ be
1Samuel13:12 tete mebu be
1Samuel13:13 Samuel gblɔ na Saul bena: Ewo bometsinu! Ɖe wònye ɖe nèlé Yehowa
1Samuel13:14 Ke azɔ wò fiaɖuɖu mali ke o. Yehowa ɖi ŋutsu bubu
1Samuel13:15 Tete Samuel dze mo tso Gilgal yi Gibea-Benyamin. Ke Saul xlẽ dukɔ
1Samuel13:16 Eye Saul kple via Yonatan kpakple dukɔ
1Samuel13:17 Eye aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ tso Filistitowo ƒe asaɖa me
1Samuel13:18 Aʋalɔgo evelia trɔ to Bet-Xoron-mɔ
1Samuel13:19 Ke nutulaa ɖeke mele Israel-nyigba blibo la dzi o; elabena Filistitɔwo bu be
1Samuel13:20 Eye Israel blibo la dome amesiame yia Filistitowo gbɔ ɖatea woƒe agblenuwo
1Samuel13:21 Eye woƒe hɛ gobɛwo
1Samuel13:22 Esi aʋakpegbe ɖo la
1Samuel13:23 Eye Filistitɔwo ƒe dzɔlaa ɖewo to Mixmas ƒe to dzi mɔ.
1Samuel14:1 Gbe ɖeka Saul vi Yonatan gblɔ na ɖekakpui
1Samuel14:2 Eye Saul bɔbɔ nɔ yevuboɖati te le Migron le Gibea godo
1Samuel14:3 Eye Axiya
1Samuel14:4 Eye agakpe tsyɔƒu eve le to dzi mɔ
1Samuel14:5 Agakpe ɖeka dzɔ kã ɖe anyiehekpa dzi ɖo ta Mixmas
1Samuel14:6 Eye Yonatan gblɔ na ɖekakpui
1Samuel14:7 Tete eƒe adekplɔvi ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Wɔ nusianu
1Samuel14:8 Eye Yonatan gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel14:9 Ne wogblɔ na mi bena: mitɔ
1Samuel14:10 Ke ne wogblɔ na mí bena: Miva mía gbɔ la
1Samuel14:11 Eye Filistitɔwo ƒe dzɔlawo kpɔ woa kple evea. Tete Filistitɔwo gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel14:12 Eye ŋutsu
1Samuel14:13 Yonatan ta asi kple afɔ
1Samuel14:14 Amesiwo Yonatan kple eƒe adekplɔvi wu gbã la
1Samuel14:15 Eye ŋɔdzi ɖo asaɖa la kple gbeadzi kpakple aʋakɔ blibo la; dzidzi ƒo dzɔlawo kple afunyilawo
1Samuel14:16 Eye Saul ƒe gbetasrãla
1Samuel14:17 Tete Saul gblɔ na aʋakɔ
1Samuel14:18 Eye Saul gblɔ na Axiya bena: Tsɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la vɛ! Elabena Mawu ƒe aɖaka la le Israel-viwo gbɔ ɣemaɣi.
1Samuel14:19 Esi Saul le nu ƒom kple nunɔla
1Samuel14:20 Eye Saul kple aʋakɔ blibo
1Samuel14:21 Hebritɔ
1Samuel14:22 Eye Israel-ŋutsu
1Samuel14:23 Ale Yehowa ɖe Israel gbemagbe
1Samuel14:24 Ke ɖeɖi te Israel-ŋutsuwo ŋu gbemagbe
1Samuel14:25 Dukɔ blibo la va ɖo ave me
1Samuel14:26 Eye esi dukɔ la va avee me la
1Samuel14:27 Ke Yonatan mese be
1Samuel14:28 Tete amea ɖe gblɔ le dukɔa dome ɖa bena: Fofowò ka atam na dukɔ la be: Aɖi amesi aɖu nu egbea la ŋu! Eva ɖeɖi te dukɔ la ŋu hafi.
1Samuel14:29 Yonatan gblɔ bena: Fofonye he dzɔgbevɔ̃e va anyigba la dzi; kpo ɖa esi meɖe anyitsi ʋee sia nu me la
1Samuel14:30 De wònye aʋakɔ la ɖe woɖu aboyonu
1Samuel14:31 Eye wòsi Filistitɔwo gbemagbe tso Mixmas vaseɖe Ayalon
1Samuel14:32 Eye aʋakɔ la dze aboyonuawo dzi
1Samuel14:33 Eye wova gblɔe na Saul bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel14:34 Eye Saul gagblɔ bena: Mikaka ɖe aʋakɔ la dome
1Samuel14:35 Eye Saul ɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa; esia nye vɔsamlekpui gbãtɔ
1Samuel14:36 Eye Saul gblɔ bena: Mina míaho ati Filistitɔwo yome le zã me
1Samuel14:37 Eye Saul bia nu Mawu se bena: Maho dze Filistitɔwo yomea? Atsɔ wo ade asi na Israel mahã? Ke meɖo nyaa ɖeke ŋu nɛ gbemagbe o.
1Samuel14:38 Tete Saul gblɔ bena: Mi dukɔ la ƒe tatɔwo katã
1Samuel14:39 Mefa Yehowa
1Samuel14:40 Eye wògblɔ na Israel blibo la bena: Miɖo ɖe akpa ɖeka
1Samuel14:41 Eye Saul gblɔ na Yehowa bena: Israel ƒe Mawu
1Samuel14:42 Eye Saul gblɔ be: Midzidze nu ɖe mia kple vinye Yonatan dzi! Tete nudzidze la lé Yonatan.
1Samuel14:43 Eye Saul gblɔ na Yonatan bena: Gblɔe nam
1Samuel14:44 Eye Saul gblɔ be: Yehowa nefiam
1Samuel14:45 Gake dukɔ la gblɔ na Saul bena: Ɖe Yonatan
1Samuel14:46 Eye Saul gbugbɔ le Filistitowo yome
1Samuel14:47 Azɔ Israel-fiaɖuƒe la su Saul si
1Samuel14:48 Ewo kalẽ
1Samuel14:49 Saul viŋutsuwo nye: Yonatan
1Samuel14:50 Saul srɔ̃ ŋkɔ nye Axinoam
1Samuel14:51 Saul fofo Kis kple Abner fofo Ner wonye Abiel viwo.
1Samuel14:52 Eye Saul wo aʋa kple Filistitowo vevie le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã me. Ne Saul nya kpo ŋutsu kakoa ɖe alo kalẽtɔa ɖe ko la
1Samuel15:1 Eye Samuel gblɔ na Saul bena: Yehowae dom
1Samuel15:2 Ate Yehowa Zebaot gblɔ esi: Meɖo ŋku nusi Amalek wo Israel la dzi
1Samuel15:3 Eyata yi
1Samuel15:4 Tete Saul na woɖe gbe ƒã na dukɔ la
1Samuel15:5 Eye Saul va! Amalekitɔwo ƒe du gbɔ
1Samuel15:6 Eye Saul gblɔ na Kenitɔwo bena: Midzo
1Samuel15:7 Eye Saul si Amalekitɔwo tso Xawila vaseɖe Sur
1Samuel15:8 Ele Amalekitɔwo ƒe fia Agag agbagbe
1Samuel15:9 Eye Saul kple dukɔ la kpɔ Agag kple alẽ nyuiwo
1Samuel15:10 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel bena:
1Samuel15:11 Evem be
1Samuel15:12 Eye Samuel fɔ ŋdi kanya
1Samuel15:13 Esi Samuel va Saul gbɔ la
1Samuel15:14 Ke Samuel gblɔ bena: Alẽwo kple nyiwo ƒe xɔxlɔ̃ ka nye esi le ɖiɖim ɖe to me nam mele sesem?
1Samuel15:15 Saul ɖo ŋu bena: Amalekitɔwo gbɔ wokplɔ wo tsoe
1Samuel15:16 Tete Samuel gblɔ na Saul bena: Ɖo to gbɔ
1Samuel15:17 Samuel gblɔ be: Mele eme oa? Esi mèbu ɖokuiwò naneke o hã
1Samuel15:18 Eye Yehowa dɔ wò ɖe nugbe gblɔ bena: Yi naɖatsrɔ̃ nuvɔ̃wɔla
1Samuel15:19 Nukaŋuti meɖo to Yehowa ƒe gbe o; edze aboyonuwo dzi
1Samuel15:20 Saul ɖo ŋu na Samuel bena: Meɖo to Yehowa ƒe gbe tso
1Samuel15:21 Negbe dukɔ la koe ha alẽwo kple nyiwo
1Samuel15:22 Tete Samuel gblɔ bena: A
1Samuel15:23 Elabena tosesẽ enye afakaka ƒe nuvɔ̃
1Samuel15:24 Saul gblɔ na Samuel bena: Mewɔ nuvɔ̃ be
1Samuel15:25 Eyata tso nye nuvɔ̃wo kem
1Samuel15:26 Samuel gblɔ na Saul bena; Nyemagbugbɔ kpli wò o; elabena ègbe Yehowa ƒe gbe
1Samuel15:27 Ke esi Samuel trɔ be
1Samuel15:28 Tete Samuel gblɔ nɛ bena: Yehowa dze Israel-fiaɖuƒe la le asiwò egbe
1Samuel15:29 Israel ƒe ŋusẽtɔ mekaa aʋatso o
1Samuel15:30 Eye wògblɔ bena: Mewɔ nuvɔ̃; gake de bubu ŋunye fifia le nye dukɔ la ƒe ame tsitsiwo kple Israel ŋku me dzro
1Samuel15:31 Tete Samuel gbugbɔ kple Saul ɖo
1Samuel15:32 Eye Samuel gblɔ bena: Mikplɔ Amalek-fia Agag vɛ nam! Agag zɔ yi egbɔ kakaka
1Samuel15:33 Samuel gblɔ bena: Alesi wò yi ɖe viwo le nyɔnuwo ŋu la
1Samuel15:34 Samuel dzo yi Rama
1Samuel15:35 Eye Samuel megakpɔ Saul kpɔ o vaseɖe eƒe kugbe; elabena Samuel xa nu le Saul ŋu
1Samuel16:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel bena: Ŋkeke nenie nanɔ konyi fam le Saul
1Samuel16:2 Samuel do ŋu bena: Aleke mawɔ ate ŋui? Ne Saul see la
1Samuel16:3 Kpe Isai va vɔsa la gbɔ
1Samuel16:4 Samuel wɔ
1Samuel16:5 Eɖo ŋu bena: Ŋutifafae! Vɔ sa ge meva na Yehowa. Mikɔ mia ɖokui ŋu
1Samuel16:6 Esi wova
1Samuel16:7 Ke Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel bena: Megakpɔ eƒe dzedzeme kple eƒe atsudzɔdzɔ o
1Samuel16:8 Yehowa kpɔa keke dzi me ke. Tete Isai yɔ Abinadab
1Samuel16:9 Isai kplɔ Sama to eŋku me
1Samuel16:10 Ale Isai kplɔ via adreawo to Samuel ŋku me
1Samuel16:11 Eye Samuel bia Isai bena: Ɖekakpuiawo vɔa? Eɖo ŋu bena: Ekpɔtɔ ɖevitɔ
1Samuel16:12 Tete wòdɔ ame woɖakplɔe vɛ; ebiã
1Samuel16:13 Tete Samuel tsɔ lãdzo
1Samuel16:14 Ke Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ dzo le Saul dzi
1Samuel16:15 Eye Saul ƒe dolawo gblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel16:16 Mía aƒetɔ ɖi nyaa ɖe gblɔ
1Samuel16:17 Saul ɖo ŋu na eƒe dolawo bena: Miyi ɖadi ŋutsu
1Samuel16:18 Tete ɖekakpuiawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ bena: Kpo ɖa
1Samuel16:19 Eye Saul do ame ɖo ɖe Isai gbɔ
1Samuel16:20 Tete Isai kple tedzi ɖeka
1Samuel16:21 Ale Dawid va Saul gbɔ
1Samuel16:22 Eye Saul ɖo ame ɖo ɖe Isai bena: Na Dawid nanɔ gbɔnye
1Samuel16:23 Eye ne Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ la dze Saul dzi la
1Samuel17:1 Eye Filistitowo ƒo woƒe aʋakɔwo nu ƒu
1Samuel17:2 Eye Saul kple Israel-ŋutsuwo hã ƒo ƒu heƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe logotibali la me
1Samuel17:3 Filistitowo tsi tre ɖe to ŋu le go si me
1Samuel17:4 Tete ame dzɔtsua ɖe ɖo tso Filistitɔwo ƒe asaɖa la me
1Samuel17:5 Eɖo akɔblikuku ɖe ta
1Samuel17:6 Edo akɔbliwu ɖe akpligbe
1Samuel17:7 Eƒe akplɔ ƒe ati le abe abaladoti ene
1Samuel17:8 Eye wòtsi tre yɔ Israel ƒe aʋalɔgoawo ɖa gblɔ na wo bena: Nukaŋuti mieho va dze aʋa? Alo menye Filistitɔ menye
1Samuel17:9 Ne ete ŋu wɔ aʋa kplim
1Samuel17:10 Eye Filistitɔ la gblɔ bena: Meɖe alɔme le Israel ƒe aʋalɔgoawo ŋu egbe. Miɖe ŋutsu ɖeka nam
1Samuel17:11 Esi Saul kple Israel blibo la se Filistitɔa ƒe nyawo la
1Samuel17:12 Dawid enye Efrattɔ ma
1Samuel17:13 Eye Isai ƒe vi xoxoetɔ etɔ̃awo kplɔ Saul ɖo yi aʋa la. Via etɔ̃
1Samuel17:14 Dawid enye ɖevitɔ
1Samuel17:15 Eye Dawid dzona le Saul gbɔ enuenu ɖakplɔa fofoa ƒe alẽwo le Betlexem.
1Samuel17:16 Ke Filistitɔ la tena vana ŋdi kple fiẽ va tsia tre ɖi ŋkeke blane sɔŋ.
1Samuel17:17 Eye Isai gblɔ na via Dawid bena: Tsɔ bli tɔtɔe efa ɖeka sia kple abolo bɔbɔ ewo siawo ƒu du yi na nɔviwòwo le asaɖa la me!
1Samuel17:18 Tsɔ notsi babla lalã ewo siawo yi na ame akpe ƒe amegã
1Samuel17:19 Woawo kple Saul kpakple Israel-ŋutsuwo katã le aʋa wɔm kple Filistitɔwo le logobali la me.
1Samuel17:20 Eye Dawid fɔ ŋdi kanya hetsɔ alẽawo de asi na alẽkplɔla
1Samuel17:21 Eye Israel kple Filistitowo ƒe aʋalɔgoawo dze aʋa hedze ŋgɔ wo nɔewo.
1Samuel17:22 Eye Dawid tsa nusiwo wotso vɛ la
1Samuel17:23 Esi wòle nu ƒom kpli wo la
1Samuel17:24 Ke esi Israel-ŋutsuwo katã kpɔ ŋutsua la
1Samuel17:25 Eye Israel-ŋutsuwo gblɔ bena: Miele ŋutsu sia
1Samuel17:26 Tete Dawid bia ŋutsu
1Samuel17:27 Ameawo ɖo ŋu ne abe tsã ene be: Ale kple ale woawɔ na amesi wui la
1Samuel17:28 Esi nɔvia xoxoetɔ Eliab se
1Samuel17:29 Dawid ɖo ŋu bena: Nuka mehewɔ fifia? Menye nya ta koe mebia oa?
1Samuel17:30 Eye wòtrɔ le egbɔ te ɖe ame bubu ŋu hebia nya mawo ke
1Samuel17:31 Wose nya
1Samuel17:32 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Saul bena: Dzika megatso amea ɖeke ƒo o! Wò dɔla ayi aɖawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔ ma.
1Samuel17:33 Saul gblɔ na Dawid bena: Màte ŋu ayi aɖawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔ sia o
1Samuel17:34 Dawid gblɔ na Saul bena: Ne wò ɖɔla le fofoa ƒe alẽwo kplɔm
1Samuel17:35 metia eyome
1Samuel17:36 Alesi wò ɖɔla ƒoa dzata kple sisiblisi la
1Samuel17:37 Dawid gagblɔ bena: Yehowa
1Samuel17:38 Eye Saul na Dawid do eƒe awu
1Samuel17:39 Eye Dawid ta eƒe yi ɖe awu la dzi
1Samuel17:40 Etsɔ eƒe atizɔti ɖe asi
1Samuel17:41 Eye Filistitɔ la le tetem ɖe Dawid ŋu
1Samuel17:42 Eye Filistitɔ la fɔ kɔ dzi kpɔ Dawid
1Samuel17:43 Tete Filistitɔ la gblɔ na Dawid bena: Avũe menye
1Samuel17:44 Eye Filistitɔ la gblɔ na Dawid bena: Va gbɔnye
1Samuel17:45 Dawid gblɔ na
1Samuel17:46 Yehowa atsɔ wò ade asi nam egbea
1Samuel17:47 eye ameha blibo sia nadze sii bena
1Samuel17:48 Eye esi Filistitɔ la ɖe zɔ ɖe Dawid dzi
1Samuel17:49 Tete Dawid ƒo asi ɖe akplɔ me ɖe kpe ɖeka da kple akafo heƒo Filistitɔ la ƒe ŋgonu
1Samuel17:50 Ale Dawid tsɔ akafo kple kpe la kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Filistitɔ la dzi
1Samuel17:51 Tete Dawid ƒu du te ɖe Filistitɔ la ŋu
1Samuel17:52 Eye Israel-ŋutsuwo kple Yuda-ŋutsuwo ho
1Samuel17:53 Eye Israel-viwo trɔ tso Filistitɔwo yometiti me heva ha woƒe asaɖawo.
1Samuel17:54 Eye Dawid tsɔ Filistitɔ la ƒe ta va Yerusalem
1Samuel17:55 Esi Saul kpɔ Dawid wòyina Filistitɔa kpe ge la
1Samuel17:56 Fia la gblɔ bena; Yi ɖabia amesi vi ɖekakpui la nye ta se.
1Samuel17:57 Esi Dawid gbɔ tso Filistitɔ la wuƒe la
1Samuel17:58 Eye Saul biae bena: Ɖekakpui
1Samuel18:1 Esi wòƒo nu kple Saul vɔ la
1Samuel18:2 Eye Saul xɔe gbemagbe
1Samuel18:3 Eye Yonatan kple Dawid wòbia nu
1Samuel18:4 Eye Yonatan ɖe awu ʋlaya
1Samuel18:5 Eye Dawid yia afisiafi
1Samuel18:6 Esi wogbɔ tso Dawid ƒe Filistitɔa wuƒe la
1Samuel18:7 Eye nyɔnuawo le ʋu ƒom hedo ha ɖa bena: Saul wu akpe
1Samuel18:8 Tete dzi ku Saul ŋutɔ
1Samuel18:9 Tso gbemagbe dzi Saul va Dawid kpɔ ge ɖe ƒomevii.
1Samuel18:10 Esi ŋu ke la
1Samuel18:11 Eye Saul da akplɔ la
1Samuel18:12 Azɔ Saul de asi Dawid vɔvɔ̃ me
1Samuel18:13 Eye Saul ɖee ɖa le eɖokui ŋu hetsɔ ɖo amegã ɖe ame akpe nu
1Samuel18:14 Dawid ƒe mɔwo katã dzea edzi
1Samuel18:15 Esi Saul kpɔ be
1Samuel18:16 Ke Israel blibo la kple Yuda lɔ̃a Dawid ƒe nya
1Samuel18:17 Eye Saul gblɔ na Dawid bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel18:18 Dawid gblɔ na Saul bena: Ameka menye
1Samuel18:19 Ke esi ɣeyiɣi
1Samuel18:20 Gake Saul ƒe vinyɔnu Mixal lɔ̃ Dawid ƒe nya; esi wova gblɔe na Saul la
1Samuel18:21 Tete Saul gblɔ bena: Matsɔe nɛ
1Samuel18:22 Eye Saul de se na eƒe dɔlawo bena: Miƒo nu kple Dawid le adza me be: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel18:23 Saul ƒe dɔlawo gblɔ nya siawo ɖe Dawid ƒe to me
1Samuel18:24 Tete Saul ƒe dɔlawo va gblɔe ne bena: Ale kple ale Dawid gblɔ esi.
1Samuel18:25 Eye Saul gblɔ be: Ale miagblɔ na Dawid enye si: Fia mele srɔ̃ɖenua ɖeke dim o
1Samuel18:26 Dɔlawo va to nya la na Dawid
1Samuel18:27 Dawid kple eƒe amewo ho yi ɖawu ame alafa eve le Filistitɔwo dome
1Samuel18:28 Esi Saul kpɔ dze sii be
1Samuel18:29 Saul gavɔ Dawid ɖe dzi
1Samuel18:30 Eye wòva me
1Samuel19:1 Eye Saul gblɔ na via Yonatan kple eƒe dɔlawo katã bena
1Samuel19:2 Eye Yonatan va gblɔe na Dawid bena: Fofonye Saul le didim be
1Samuel19:3 Ke nye la mayi adatsi tre ɖe fofonye gbɔ le gbedzi
1Samuel19:4 Eye Yonatan ƒo nu nyuie le Dawid ŋu na fofoa Saul gblɔ nɛ bena: Fia megada vo ɖe eƒe dɔla Dawid ŋu o
1Samuel19:5 Etsɔ eƒe agbe ɖo asiƒo me hewu Filistitɔ la
1Samuel19:6 Tete Saul ɖo to Yonatan ƒe gbe
1Samuel19:7 Tete Yonatan yɔ Dawid hegblɔ nyawo katã nɛ
1Samuel19:8 Eye aʋa gadzɔ
1Samuel19:9 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ gatso Yehowa gbɔ va dze Saul dzi
1Samuel19:10 Eye Saul di be
1Samuel19:11 Tete Saul dɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Dawid ƒe me
1Samuel19:12 Eye Mixal ɖiɖi Dawid to fesre nu
1Samuel19:13 Eye Mixal tsɔ aklama kpakpɛ da de aba dzi
1Samuel19:14 Tete Saul ɖɔ amewo ɖo ɖa
1Samuel19:15 Eye Saul dɔ amewo ɖo ɖa
1Samuel19:16 Esi dɔlawo va la
1Samuel19:17 Tete Saul gblɔ na Mixal bena: Nukaŋuti nèflum
1Samuel19:18 Ke Dawid si dzo
1Samuel19:19 Tete wova gblɔe na Saul be: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel19:20 Enumake Saul dɔ amewo ɖo ɖa
1Samuel19:21 Eye wova gblɔe na Saul
1Samuel19:22 Tete eya ŋutɔ yi Rama
1Samuel19:23 Eye wòyi Nayot le Rama. Tete Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ la va eya hã dzi
1Samuel19:24 Eye eya hã ɖe eƒe awuwo ɖi hede asi nyagbɔgblɔ me ɖi le Samuel ŋku me
1Samuel20:1 Eye Dawid si tso Nayot le Rama heva ƒo nu kple Yonatan gblɔ bena: Nuka mewo
1Samuel20:2 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Esia nede megbe xaa
1Samuel20:3 Ke Dawid gaka atam gblɔ bena: Fofowò nyae be
1Samuel20:4 Tete Yonatan gblɔ na Dawid bena: Gblɔ nusi mawɔ na wò!
1Samuel20:5 Dawid gblɔ na Yonatan bena: Kpɔ da
1Samuel20:6 Ne fofowò bia tanye la
1Samuel20:7 Ne egblɔ be
1Samuel20:8 Eyata ve wò dɔla nu
1Samuel20:9 Yonatan gblɔ bena: Esia nede megbe xaa tso gbɔwò
1Samuel20:10 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Yonatan bena: Ne fofowò da gbe de gbɔwò la
1Samuel20:11 Tete Yonatan gblɔ na Dawid bena: Va miyi gbe me! Eye woa kple eve la woyi gbe me.
1Samuel20:12 Eye Yonatan gblɔ na Dawid bena: Yehowa
1Samuel20:13 ekema Yehowa nafia Yonatan agafiae ɖe dzi! Ne fofonye ɖo vɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò kplikpaa la
1Samuel20:14 Ne metsi agbe la
1Samuel20:15 Eye ne Yehowa tsrɔ̃ Dawid ƒe futɔwo dome ɖesiade ɖa le anyigba dzi la
1Samuel20:16 Ale Yonatan bla nu kple Dawid gblɔ bena: Yehowa abia hlɔ̃ Dawid ƒe futɔwo!
1Samuel20:17 Eye Yonatan gaka atam na Dawid de dɔla
1Samuel20:18 Eye Yonatan gblɔ nɛ bena: Etsɔe nye dzinu yeye
1Samuel20:19 Eye nyitsɔ la nade abla ayi afisi nèɣla ɖokuiwò do le gbedzrogbe
1Samuel20:20 Mele aŋutrɔ etɔ da ge de exa
1Samuel20:21 Eye madɔ ɖekakpuia ɖe ɖa agblɔ be: Yi ɖadi aŋutrɔwo! Ne megblɔ na ɖekakpui la be: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel20:22 Ke ne megblɔ na ɖekakpui la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel20:23 Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel20:24 Eye Dawid ɣla eɖokui ɖe gbea me. Esi dzinu yeye do la
1Samuel20:25 Eye fia la bɔbɔ nɔ eteƒe xoxoa le gli ŋu
1Samuel20:26 Ke Saul megblɔ nyaa ɖeke gbemagbe o
1Samuel20:27 Esi Dawid nɔƒe ɖi gbɔlo le dzinu yeye ƒe ŋkeke evelia dzi la
1Samuel20:28 Yonatan ɖo ŋu na Saul bena: Dawid bia gbem be
1Samuel20:29 Egblɔ be: Na mayi
1Samuel20:30 Tete Saul do dɔmedzoe ɖe Yonatan ŋu
1Samuel20:31 Elabena ŋkeke alesi Isai vi la le agbe le anyigba dzi la
1Samuel20:32 Yonatan ɖo ŋu na fofoa Saul gblɔ ne bena: Nukata woaku ɖo
1Samuel20:33 Enumake Saul da akplɔe
1Samuel20:34 Eye dzi ku Yonatan vevie
1Samuel20:35 Esi ŋu ke la
1Samuel20:36 Eye wògblɔ na ŋutsuvi la bena: Ƒu du
1Samuel20:37 Esi ŋutsuvi la va
1Samuel20:38 Yonatan gado ɣli ɖe ŋutsuvi la yome bena: Ɖe abla
1Samuel20:39 Ke ŋutsuvi la menya naneke me o
1Samuel20:40 Yonatan tsɔ eƒe nuawo na ŋutsuvi
1Samuel20:41 Esi ŋutsuvia dzo la
1Samuel20:42 Eye Yonatan gblɔ na Dawid bena: Yi le ŋutifafa me; nusi dzi mía ame eve míeka atam ɖo le Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ dzi bena
1Samuel21:1 Eye wòdze mɔ heyi
1Samuel21:2 Eye Dawid va nunɔla Aximelex gbɔ le Nob; tete Aximelex ɖe abla va kpe Dawid
1Samuel21:3 Dawid do ŋu na nunɔla Aximelex bena: Fia de gbe asi nam
1Samuel21:4 Eyata nuka le asiwò? Na abolo atɔ ato nusi nya le asiwò lam!
1Samuel21:5 Nunɔla la gblɔ na Dawid bena: Abolo dzodzroa ɖeke mele asinye o
1Samuel21:6 Dawid ɖo ŋu na nunɔla la gblɔ nɛ bena: Wotsri nyɔnu na mi etsɔ kple nyitsɔ
1Samuel21:7 Eye nunɔla la tsɔ nu kɔkɔe la nɛ
1Samuel21:8 Ke Saul ƒe dɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka le afima
1Samuel21:9 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Aximelex bena: Akplɔ alo yia ɖeke mele asiwò le afisia oa? Nyemetsɔ nye yi alo aʋawɔnua ɖeke ɖe asi o
1Samuel21:10 Nunɔla la gblɔ bena: Filistitɔ Goliat
1Samuel21:11 Eye Dawid dze mo gbemagbe hesi le Saul nu
1Samuel21:12 Tete Axis ƒe dɔlawo gblɔ nɛ bena: Ɖe menye eya nye Dawid
1Samuel21:13 Nya siawo de dzi gbɔ na Dawid
1Samuel21:14 Tete wòdo tsu eɖokui le woƒe ŋku me
1Samuel21:15 Eye Axis gblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo bena: Miekpɔ be
1Samuel21:16 Alo aɖaʋatɔ ƒe koe le wɔyem
1Samuel22:1 Eye Dawid dzo le afima hesi yi Adulam-gado la me
1Samuel22:2 Eye hiãtɔwo
1Samuel22:3 Eye Dawid dzo tso afima heyi Mizpe le Moab
1Samuel22:4 Eye wòkplɔ wo va Moab-fia gbɔe
1Samuel22:5 Ke nyagblɔɖila Gad gblɔ na Dawid bena: Megatsi mɔ̃ me le to la dzi o
1Samuel22:6 Eye Saul se Dawid kple amesiwo le eŋu la ŋkɔ. Ke Saul bɔbɔ nɔ to dzi le baniti te le Gibea; ele eƒe akplɔ ɖe asi
1Samuel22:7 Tete Saul gblɔ na eƒe dɔla
1Samuel22:8 hafi mi katã miebla ɖe ŋunye
1Samuel22:9 Tete Edomtɔ Doeg
1Samuel22:10 Ebia nu Yehowa nɛ
1Samuel22:11 Tete fia la da be
1Samuel22:12 Eye Saul gblɔ bena: Axitub vi
1Samuel22:13 Saul gblɔ nɛ bena: Nukaŋuti mia kple Isai vi la miebla ɖe ŋunye? Etso abolo kple yi ne
1Samuel22:14 Tete Aximelex ɖo ŋu na fia la gblɔ bena: Ameka le wò dɔlawo katã dome
1Samuel22:15 Egbee mede asi nubiabia me Mawu nɛa? Esia nede megbe xaa tso gbɔnye! Fia megada nya ɖe eƒe dɔla kple fofonye ƒe aƒe blibo la dzi o
1Samuel22:16 Tete fia la gblɔ bena: Wò Aximelex kple fofowò ƒe aƒemetɔwo katã miaku!
1Samuel22:17 Eye fia la gblɔ na blafo
1Samuel22:18 Tete fia la gblɔ na Doeg bena: Wòa te yi
1Samuel22:19 Etsɔ yi tsrɔ̃ Nob
1Samuel22:20 Eye Axitub vi
1Samuel22:21 Eye Abyatar gblɔ na Dawid bena: Saul wu Yehowa ƒe nunɔlawo!
1Samuel22:22 Tete Dawid gblɔ na Abyatar bena: Gbemagbe
1Samuel22:23 Tsi gbɔnye
1Samuel23:1 Eye wova gblɔ na Dawid bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel23:2 Tete Dawid bia Yehowa bena: Mayi ɖasi Filistitɔ siawoa? Yehowa gblɔ na Dawid bena: Yi
1Samuel23:3 Tete Dawid ƒe amewo gblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel23:4 Dawid gabia nu Yehowa
1Samuel23:5 Tete Dawid kple eƒe amewo yi Kegila
1Samuel23:6 Esi Aximelex vi Abyatar si va Dawid gbɔ le Kegila la
1Samuel23:7 Eye wova gblɔ na Saul bena: Dawid va Kegila. Tete Saul gblɔ bena: Mawu tsoe de asi nam
1Samuel23:8 Eye Saul yɔ dukɔ blibo la ƒo ƒu
1Samuel23:9 Esi Dawid dze sii be
1Samuel23:10 Eye Dawid gblɔ be: Yehowa
1Samuel23:11 Ɖe Kegilatɔwo atsɔm ade asi nɛa? Eye ɖe Saul le vava ge
1Samuel23:12 Eye Dawid gblɔ bena: Ɖe Kegilatɔwo atsɔ mía kple nye amewo ade asi na Saul mahã? Yehowa ɖo ŋu bena: Woatsɔ mi ade asi.
1Samuel23:13 Tete Dawid kple eƒe amewo
1Samuel23:14 Eye Dawid nɔ bebeƒewo le gbedzi kple towo dzi; eye Saul du ŋkekeawo katã
1Samuel23:15 Eye Dawid kpɔ bena
1Samuel23:16 Eye Saul vi Yonatan dze ma yi Dawid gbɔ le ave la me
1Samuel23:17 Eye wògblɔ ne bena: Megavɔ̃ o
1Samuel23:18 Eye woa kple eve la wobla nu le Yehowa ŋku me; Dawid tsi ave la me
1Samuel23:19 Eye Siftɔwo va Saul gbɔ le Gibea gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel23:20 Eyata fia
1Samuel23:21 Saul gblɔ bena: Yehowa ayra mi
1Samuel23:22 Miyi ɖadi eme tsitotsito
1Samuel23:23 Eyata miyi ɖadii le bebeƒe
1Samuel23:24 Eye wotso dze Saul ŋgɔ heyi Sif; ke Dawid kple eƒe amewo le Maon-gbedzi le gbadzaƒe
1Samuel23:25 Esi Saul kple eƒe amewo yi edi ge
1Samuel23:26 Saul le to la ƒe go si me
1Samuel23:27 Tete ame dɔdɔa ɖe va Saul gbɔ gblɔ bena: Nètsɔ nava
1Samuel23:28 Eye Saul gbugbɔ tso Dawid yometiƒe heyi ɖakpe Filistitɔwo. Eyata wona ŋkɔ teƒe ma bena kaklãgakpe.
1Samuel24:1 Eye Dawid tso afima yi ɖanɔ totamemɔ̃ me le En-Gedi.
1Samuel24:2 Esi Saul gbɔ tso Filistitɔwo yometiƒe la
1Samuel24:3 Tete Saul ɖe ŋutsu tiatia akpe etɔ le Israel blibo la me heyi
1Samuel24:4 Eye wova alẽkpɔwo gbɔ le mɔ to
1Samuel24:5 Tete Dawid ƒe amewo gblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel24:6 Ke esi Dawid wòe vɔ la
1Samuel24:7 Eye wògblɔ na eƒe amewo bena: Neɖe megbe xaa tso gbɔnye le Yehowa ta be
1Samuel24:8 Ke Dawid gbe nya na eƒe amewo
1Samuel24:9 Emegbe Dawid tso hedo le agado la me
1Samuel24:10 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Saul bena: Nukaŋuti nèle amegbetɔ ƒe gbe sem be
1Samuel24:11 Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel24:12 Fofonye
1Samuel24:13 Yehowa nadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le mía kpli wò dome
1Samuel24:14 Abe alesi blematɔwo doa lo ene be: Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo gbɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi tsona! Ke nye asi made ŋuwò o!
1Samuel24:15 Ameka gɔ̃ yome Israel-fia la dze
1Samuel24:16 Yehowa nanye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la
1Samuel24:17 Esi Dawid wu nuƒoƒo na Saul nu vɔ la
1Samuel24:18 hegblɔ na Dawid bena: Enye ame dzɔdzɔe wum
1Samuel24:19 Ede nyui
1Samuel24:20 Ɖe amea ɖe atu eƒe futɔ
1Samuel24:21 Ke kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel24:22 Eyata ta Yehowa nam be
1Samuel24:23 Tete Dawid ka atam na Saul; eye Saul yi aƒe
1Samuel25:1 Eye Samuel ku
1Samuel25:2 Ke ŋutsua ɖe nɔ Maon
1Samuel25:3 Ŋutsu la ŋkɔ nye Nabal
1Samuel25:4 Esi Dawid se le gbeadzi bena
1Samuel25:5 Dawid dɔ ɖekakpui ewo gblɔ na wo bena: Miyi Nabal gbɔ le Karmel
1Samuel25:6 eye migblɔ na nɔvinye la bena: Edɔa
1Samuel25:7 Mese be
1Samuel25:8 Bia wò ɖekakpuiawo
1Samuel25:9 Tete Dawid ƒe ɖekakpuiawo va gblɔ nya siawo katã na Nabal le Dawid ƒe ŋkɔ me
1Samuel25:10 Ke Nabal ɖo ŋu na Dawid ƒe dɔlawo gblɔ bena: Ameka nye Dawid
1Samuel25:11 Ɖe matsɔ nye nuɖuɖu kple nye nunono kpakple lã
1Samuel25:12 Eye Dawid ƒe ɖekakpuiawo gbugbɔ lé woƒe mɔ heva gblɔ nyawo katã nɛ.
1Samuel25:13 Tete Dawid gblɔ na eƒe amewo bena: Mia dome amesiame nefa yi! Eye wo dome amesiame ta yi
1Samuel25:14 Ke ɖekakpuiawo dometɔ ɖeka va gblɔ na Nabal srɔ̃ Abigail bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel25:15 Ŋutsuawo ƒe dome ko ɖe mía ŋu
1Samuel25:16 Gli wonye le mía ŋu le zã kple ŋkeke me
1Samuel25:17 Eyata bu ta me nadi nusi nawɔ
1Samuel25:18 Tete Abigail wɔ kaba tsɔ abolo alafa eve
1Samuel25:19 Eye wògblɔ na eƒe ɖekakpuiwo bena: Midze ŋgɔnye; kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel25:20 Esi wòdo tedzi ɖi abu hebu ɖe toa xa la
1Samuel25:21 Ke Dawid gblɔ tsã bena: Yakatsyɔ mekpɔ amesia ƒe nuwo katã dzi le gbeadzi
1Samuel25:22 Mawu afia Dawid ƒe futɔwo agafia wo ɖe dzi
1Samuel25:23 Esi Abigail kpɔ Dawid la
1Samuel25:24 Eye wòdze klo ɖe eƒe afa nu gblɔ bena: Nye aƒetɔ
1Samuel25:25 Nye aƒetɔ megaɖii na Nabal
1Samuel25:26 Eyata nye aƒetɔ
1Samuel25:27 Ke azɔ la xɔ nusiwo wò dɔlanyɔnu tsɔ vɛ na nye aƒetɔ la
1Samuel25:28 Tsɔ wò dɔlanyɔnu ƒe vodadawo kee! Yehowa ana nye aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe nali ke
1Samuel25:29 Ne amea ɖe tso ti yowòme
1Samuel25:30 Eye nenye be
1Samuel25:31 ne nusia maganɔ mɔ me na wò
1Samuel25:32 Tete Dawid gblɔ na Abigail bena: Woakafu Yehowa
1Samuel25:33 Woakafu wò nunya
1Samuel25:34 Ɖeko meta Yehowa
1Samuel25:35 Eye Dawid xɔ nusiwo wòtsɔ vɛ la le esi
1Samuel25:36 Esi Abigail va Nabal gbɔ la
1Samuel25:37 Ke esi ŋu ke
1Samuel25:38 Le ŋkeke ewo megbe la Yehowa ƒe asi va Nabal dzi
1Samuel25:39 Esi Dawid se be
1Samuel25:40 Eye Dawid ƒe dɔlawo va Abigail gbɔ le Karmel
1Samuel25:41 Tete wòtsi tre
1Samuel25:42 Enumake Abigail wɔ kaba dze mɔ
1Samuel25:43 Dawid ɖe Axinoam tso Yezreel hã
1Samuel25:44 Ke Saul tsɔ vianyɔnu Mixal
1Samuel26:1 Eye Siftɔwo va Saul gbɔ le Gibea gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel26:2 Tete Saul dze mɔ yi Sif-gbedzi
1Samuel26:3 Eye Saul ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xaxila-togbɛ
1Samuel26:4 edɔ ŋkutsalawo ɖa
1Samuel26:5 Eye Dawid tso heva afisi Saul ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖo
1Samuel26:6 Tete Dawid xɔ edzi gblɔ na Xititɔ Aximelex kple Abisai
1Samuel26:7 Eye Dawid kple Abisai wova aʋakɔ la gbɔ le zã me; kpo ɖa
1Samuel26:8 Tete Abisai gblɔ na Dawid bena: Mawu tso wò futɔ de asi na wo egbe
1Samuel26:9 Ke Dawid gblɔ na Abisai bena: Megawui o: elabena ameka ade eƒe asi Yehowa ƒe amesiamina la ŋu
1Samuel26:10 Dawid gagblɔ bena: Meta Yehowa ƒe agbe: Ne menye Yehowae awui
1Samuel26:11 Nede megbe xaa tso gbɔnye le Yehowa ta be
1Samuel26:12 Tete Dawid tso akplɔa kple tsize la le Saul ƒe tade eye wodzo: ke amea ɖeke mekpɔe o
1Samuel26:13 Eye Dawid yi go keme hetsi tre ɖe to la tame le adzɔge
1Samuel26:14 Tete Dawid yɔ aʋakɔ la kple Abner
1Samuel26:15 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Abner bena: Menye ŋutsue nènye oa? Ameka de nuwò le Israel? Nukaŋuti mèdzɔ wò aƒetɔ fia la ŋu oa? Elabena amea ɖe tso dukɔ la dome va
1Samuel26:16 Menye nu nyui nye esia nèwɔ o. Meta Yehowa ƒe agbe be: Mi amesiwo medza miaƒe aƒetɔ
1Samuel26:17 Saul dze si Dawid ƒe gbe
1Samuel26:18 Eye wògblɔ bena: Nukaŋuti nye aƒetɔ le eƒe dɔla yome tim? Nuka mewo
1Samuel26:19 Azɔ nye aƒetɔ nese eƒe dɔla ƒe nyawo dzro: Nenye Yehowae do wò ɖe ŋunye la
1Samuel26:20 Eyata nye ʋu megage ɖe anyigba ɖe adzɔge tso Yehowa ƒe ŋku ta o
1Samuel26:21 Tete Saul gblɔ bena: Mewɔ nuvɔ̃
1Samuel26:22 Dawid ɖo ŋu gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel26:23 Yehowa aɖo amesiame ƒe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ kple nuteƒewɔwɔ teƒe nɛ
1Samuel26:24 Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel26:25 Eye Saul gblɔ na Dawid bena: Woayra wò
1Samuel27:1 Ke Dawid gblɔ le eƒe dzi me bena: Gbe ɖeka ko mele Saul si me tsi ge; anyo nam wu
1Samuel27:2 Tete Dawid kple ŋutsu alafa aɖe
1Samuel27:3 Eye Dawid kple eƒe amewo
1Samuel27:4 Esi wova gblɔ na Saul bena
1Samuel27:5 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Axis bena: Ne ève nunye la
1Samuel27:6 Tete Axis tso Ziklag nɛ gbemagbe; eyata Ziklag zu Yuda-fiawo to vaseɖe egbe.
1Samuel27:7 Ŋkeke
1Samuel27:8 Eye Dawid kple eƒe amewo yi ɖadze Gesuritɔwo
1Samuel27:9 Tete Dawid si anyigba la
1Samuel27:10 Ne Axis bia bena; afika dzi mieɖadze egbea hã la
1Samuel27:11 Dawid mena ŋutsu alo nyɔnu tsi agbe o
1Samuel27:12 Axis ɖo ŋu ɖe Dawid ŋu hebu bena
1Samuel28:1 Eye wòva me le ɣemaɣi bena
1Samuel28:2 Tete Dawid gblɔ na Axis bena: Enyo
1Samuel28:3 Samuel ku
1Samuel28:4 Esi Filistitɔwo kpe ta va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sunem la
1Samuel28:5 Ke esi Saul kpɔ Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋakɔa la
1Samuel28:6 Eye Saul bia nu Yehowa
1Samuel28:7 Tete Saul gblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo bena: Midi nyɔnua ɖe
1Samuel28:8 Tete Saul trɔ eƒe nɔnɔme hedo awu bubuwo
1Samuel28:9 Nyɔnu la gblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel28:10 Tete Saul ta Yehowa nɛ bena: Meta Yehowa ƒe agbe
1Samuel28:11 Nyɔnu la gblɔ bena: Ameka yɔ ge mala na wò? Eɖo ŋu bena: Yɔ Samuel nam!
1Samuel28:12 Esi nyɔnua kpɔ Samuel la
1Samuel28:13 Ke fia la gblɔ nɛ bena: Megavɔ̃ o
1Samuel28:14 Eye wòbiae bena: Aleke eƒe nɔnɔme le? Eɖo nu bena: Ame tsitsia ɖe le dodom
1Samuel28:15 Eye Samuel gblɔ na Saul bena: Nukaŋuti neɖe fu nam
1Samuel28:16 Samuel gblɔ be: Yehowa trɔ ʋu le yowòme hezu wò futɔ; evɔ nukaŋuti nèle nu biamem?
1Samuel28:17 Yehowa wɔ
1Samuel28:18 Esi meɖo to Yehowa ƒe gbe o
1Samuel28:19 Yehowa atsɔ Israel hã ade asi na Filistitɔwo akpe ɖe ŋuwò
1Samuel28:20 Enumake Saul tsra ɖe anyigba dremu
1Samuel28:21 Eye nyɔnu la va Saul gbɔ
1Samuel28:22 Eyata wò hã ɖo to wò dɔlanyɔnu ƒe gbe
1Samuel28:23 Ke egbe gblɔ bena: Nyemele nu ɖu ge o. Tete eƒe dɔlawo kple nyɔnu la ƒoe ɖe enu
1Samuel28:24 Nyivi damia ɖe le nyɔnu la si le aƒea me
1Samuel28:25 Eye wòtsɔe va ɖo Saul kple eƒe dɔlawo kɔme
1Samuel29:1 Eye Filistitɔwo ƒo woƒe aʋakɔwo katã nu ƒu ɖe Afek
1Samuel29:2 Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo ho yi alafaalafa kple akpeakpe: ke Dawid kple eƒe amewo ho mamlea kpe ɖe Axis ŋu.
1Samuel29:3 Tete Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo gblɔ bena: Nuka dim Hebritɔ siawo le? Axis ɖo ŋu na Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo bena: Alo menye eya nye Dawid
1Samuel29:4 Tete Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo do dɔmedzoe ɖe eŋu
1Samuel29:5 Ɖe menye eyae nye Dawid
1Samuel29:6 Tete Axis yɔ Dawid gblɔ nɛ bena: Meta Yehowa ƒe agbe
1Samuel29:7 Eyata gbugbɔ yi le ŋutifafa me
1Samuel29:8 Dawid gblɔ na Axis bena: Nuka mehewɔ
1Samuel29:9 Axis ɖo ŋu gblɔ na Dawid bena: Nye la menyae bena
1Samuel29:10 Eyata mia kple wò aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla
1Samuel29:11 Tete Dawid kple eƒe amewo fɔ ŋdi kanya
1Samuel30:1 Esi Dawid kple eƒe amewo gbɔ va Ziklag le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la
1Samuel30:2 Woɖe aboyo nyɔnu
1Samuel30:3 Esi Dawid kple eƒe amewo va dua me la
1Samuel30:4 Tete Dawid kple aʋakɔ
1Samuel30:5 Wòlé Dawid srɔ̃ eveawo
1Samuel30:6 Eye Dawid xaxa ŋutɔ
1Samuel30:7 Eye Dawid gblɔ na nunɔla Abyatar
1Samuel30:8 Eye Dawid bia nu Yehowa bena: Mati adzoha sia yomea? Eye matu woa? Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Ti wo yome
1Samuel30:9 Tete Dawid kple ame alafa ade
1Samuel30:10 Eye Dawid kple ame alafa ene ti wo yome
1Samuel30:11 Wokpɔ Egipte-ŋutsua ɖe le gbe me
1Samuel30:12 Woka gbotsetsebolo hetsɔ weintsetse ƒuƒu kpe ɖe eŋu nɛ woɖu
1Samuel30:13 Dawid biae bena: Ameka ƒe ame nènye? Eye afika nètso? Eɖo ŋu be: Egipte-ɖekakpui menye
1Samuel30:14 Míeyi ɖadze Kretitɔwo ƒe dziehe kple Yuda-nyigba kpakple Kaleb ƒe dziehe gome dzi
1Samuel30:15 Eye Dawid gblɔ nɛ bena: Màkplɔm ayi adzoha siawo gbɔe oa? Eɖo ŋu bena: Ta Mawu nam be
1Samuel30:16 Esi wòkplɔe yii la
1Samuel30:17 Tete Dawid si wo tso ɣetrɔ vaseɖe fiẽ
1Samuel30:18 Eye Dawid xɔ nusiwo katã Amalekitɔwo ha la
1Samuel30:19 Woƒe nusiwo katã woɖe aboyo la
1Samuel30:20 Eye Dawid xɔ alẽwo kple nyiwo katã hã
1Samuel30:21 Esi Dawid va ame alafa eve
1Samuel30:22 Tete ame vlo kple yakame
1Samuel30:23 Ke Dawid gblɔ bena: Nɔvinyewo
1Samuel30:24 Ameka aɖo to mi le nya sia me? Ke boŋ amesiwo de aʋa la kple amesiwo tsi nuawo gbɔ la
1Samuel30:25 Eye wotsɔe wɔ se kple kɔnu na Israel tso gbemagbe dzi vaseɖe egbe.
1Samuel30:26 Esi Dawid gbɔ va Ziklag la
1Samuel30:27 Eɖoe ɖe amesiwo le Betel
1Samuel30:28 amesiwo le Aroer
1Samuel30:29 amesiwo le Raxal
1Samuel30:30 amesiwo le Xorma
1Samuel30:31 kpakple amesiwo le Xebron kple teƒe
1Samuel31:1 Eye Filistitɔwo wɔ aʋa kple Israel
1Samuel31:2 Filistitɔwo ɖe Saul kple viaŋutsuwo ɖe nu
1Samuel31:3 Aʋa la nu sẽ ŋutɔ ɖe Saul dzi
1Samuel31:4 Eye Saul gblɔ na eƒe adekplɔvi la bena: Di wò yi naƒo ɖem
1Samuel31:5 Ke esi Saul ƒe adekplɔvi la kpɔ be
1Samuel31:6 Ale Saul kple viaŋutsu etɔ̃awo kple eƒe adekplɔvi la kpakple eƒe amewo katã ku gbe ɖeka enye si.
1Samuel31:7 Esi Israel-ŋutsu
1Samuel31:8 Esi ŋu ke la. Filistitɔwo va nu ɖe ge le ame tsiaʋawo ŋu
1Samuel31:9 Tete wotso ɖa le enu
1Samuel31:10 Wotsɔ eƒe ŋutinuawo va da ɖe Astartewo ƒe me
1Samuel31:11 Ke esi: Yabes-Gileadtɔwo se nusi Filistitɔwo wɔ Saul la
1Samuel31:12 tete ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo dze mɔ zɔ zã blibo la ɖaɖe Saul kple viaŋutsuwo ƒe kukuawo le gli ŋu le Bet-San
1Samuel31:13 Eye wotsɔ woƒe ƒuwo ɖi ɖe baniti te le Yabes
2Samuel1:1 Eye wòva me le Saul ƒe ku megbe
2Samuel1:2 kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel1:3 Eye Dawid biae bena: Afika netso? Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Israel ƒe asaɖa mee mesi tso!
2Samuel1:4 Dawid gblɔ nɛ bena: Aleke nya la le? Taflatse
2Samuel1:5 Tete Dawid bia ɖekakpui
2Samuel1:6 Ɖekakpui
2Samuel1:7 Esi wònyè ka kpam la
2Samuel1:8 Eye wòbiam bena: Ameka nenye? Meɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Amalekitɔ menye.
2Samuel1:9 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Te ɖe ŋunye
2Samuel1:10 Tete mete ɖe eŋu hewui
2Samuel1:11 Tete Dawid kple ŋutsu
2Samuel1:12 Eye wofa konyi
2Samuel1:13 Eye Dawid bia ɖekakpui
2Samuel1:14 Tete Dawid gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuka? Mèvɔ̃ be
2Samuel1:15 Eye Dawid yɔ ɖekakpuiawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ bena: Te va
2Samuel1:16 Eye Dawid gblɔ nɛ bena: Wò ʋu anɔ wò ta dzi! Elabena wò ŋutɔ wò nue ɖi ɖase le ɖokuiwò ŋu gblɔ bena: Mewu Yehowa ƒe amesiamina la.
2Samuel1:17 Tete Dawid kpa konyifaha sia le Saul kple via Yonatan ŋu
2Samuel1:18 eye wòde se be
2Samuel1:19 Oo Israel
2Samuel1:20 Migaɖe gbe ƒãe le Gat o
2Samuel1:21 Mi Gilboa-towo
2Samuel1:22 Yonatan ƒe aŋutrɔ medea megbe le ame tsiaʋawo ƒe ʋu kple kalẽtɔwo ƒe ami me o
2Samuel1:23 Saul kple Yonatan
2Samuel1:24 Israel-nyɔnuviwo
2Samuel1:25 Aleke kalẽtɔwo tsi aʋa ale
2Samuel1:26 Tɔwo le veyem
2Samuel1:27 Aleke kalẽtɔwo tsi aʋa
2Samuel2:1 Le nya sia megbe la Dawid bia Yehowa bena: Mayi Yuda-duawo dometɔ ɖeka mea? Yehowa ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Yi! Eye Dawid gblɔ be: Afika yi ge mala? Yehowa ɖo ŋu bena: Yi Xebron!
2Samuel2:2 Tete Dawid yi afima
2Samuel2:3 Eye Dawid kplɔ ŋutsu
2Samuel2:4 Tete Yuda-ŋutsuwo va
2Samuel2:5 Tete Dawid ɖɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Yabes-Gileadtɔwo gblɔ na wo bena: Yehowa ayra mi
2Samuel2:6 Eyata Yehowa ave mia nu
2Samuel2:7 Ke migana miaƒe asi nado agblɔ o
2Samuel2:8 Ke Saul ƒe aʋafia Abner
2Samuel2:9 eye wòɖoe fia ɖe Gilead kple Asertɔwo
2Samuel2:10 Saul vi Is-Boset xɔ ƒe blane
2Samuel2:11 Ŋkeke
2Samuel2:12 Eye Abner
2Samuel2:13 Eye Zeruya vi Yoab kple Dawid ƒe dɔlawo hã ho
2Samuel2:14 Tete Abner gblɔ na Yoab bena: Na ɖekakpuiawo natsi tre; ne woate wo ɖokui akpɔ le mía ŋku me! Eye Yoab gblɔ bena: Ne wotsi tre!
2Samuel2:15 Eye wotsi tre yi le woƒe xexlẽme nu; ame wuieve nye Saul vi Is-Boset lɔ tso Benyamin
2Samuel2:16 Wòlé ta na wo nɔewo heƒo yi ɖe wo nɔewo ƒe abla me
2Samuel2:17 Aʋa la nu sẽ ŋutɔ gbemagbe
2Samuel2:18 Eye Zeruya viŋutsu etɔ̃ le afima: Yoab
2Samuel2:19 Eye Asahel ɖe Abner ɖe nu
2Samuel2:20 Tete Abner nyẽ kɔ gblɔ bena: Wòe nye Asahel mahã? Eɖo ŋu bena: Nyee.
2Samuel2:21 Abner gblɔ nɛ bena: Dze ɖe ɖusi alo mia me
2Samuel2:22 Abner gagblɔ na Asahel bena: Trɔ le yonyeme dzro! Nukata mada nu wò aƒu anyi? Aleke mawɔ agate gu akpɔ nɔviwò Yoab ŋku mea?
2Samuel2:23 Ke egbe tɔtrɔ
2Samuel2:24 Eye Yoab kple Abisai woti Abner yome
2Samuel2:25 Tete Benyamin-viwo ƒo wo ɖokui nu ƒu ɖe Abner yome hewɔ asafokɔ ɖeka
2Samuel2:26 Eye Abner yɔ Yoab gblɔ bena: Ɖe yi anɔ nuɖuɖu dzi koa? Menyae be
2Samuel2:27 Yoab ɖo ŋu bena: Meta Mawu ƒe agbe
2Samuel2:28 Eye Yoab ku kpẽ
2Samuel2:29 Eye Abner kple eƒe amewo to tagba le zã blibo la me hetso Yordan
2Samuel2:30 Eye esi Yoab gbugbɔ tso Abner yometiƒe la
2Samuel2:31 Ke Dawid ƒe dɔlawo wu ame alafa etɔ̃ kple blaade le Benyamin kple Abner ƒe amewo ŋu.
2Samuel2:32 Eye wokɔ Asahel ɖaɖi de fofoa ɖiƒe le Betlexem; eye Yoab kple eƒe amewo zɔ zã blibo la
2Samuel3:1 Eye ana nɔ Saul ƒe aƒe kple Dawid ƒe aƒe dome eteƒe didi Eye Dawid ɖe ŋusẽ kpɔm de dzi
2Samuel3:2 Eye wodzi ŋutsuviwo na Dawid le Xebron: Eƒe ŋgɔgbevi nye Amnon
2Samuel3:3 Evia evelia nye Xileab
2Samuel3:4 Enelia nye Adoniya
2Samuel3:5 eye adelia nye Yitream
2Samuel3:6 Esi aʋa nɔ Saul ƒe aƒe kple Dawid ƒe aƒe dome la
2Samuel3:7 Ahiãa ɖe nɔ Saul si
2Samuel3:8 Tete Abner do dɔmedzoe le Is-Boset ƒe nyawo ta gblɔ bena: Avũ ta menye tso Yuda? Meve fofowò ƒe aƒe kple nɔviawo kpakple xɔlɔ̃awo nu egbea
2Samuel3:9 Mawu nefia Abner
2Samuel3:10 yeaxɔ fiaduƒe la le Saul ƒe aƒe si
2Samuel3:11 Ke mete ŋu ɖo nyaa ɖeke ŋu na Abner o
2Samuel3:12 Enumake Abner dɔ amewo do de Dawid
2Samuel3:13 Eɖo ŋu bena: Enyo
2Samuel3:14 Tete Dawid dɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Saul vi Is-Boset
2Samuel3:15 Eve Is-Boset dɔ woɖaxɔe le srɔ̃a Lais vi Paltiel si vɛ.
2Samuel3:16 Eye srɔ̃a dze eyome le avi fam ʋuu kekeke vaseɖe Baxurim; eye Abner gblɔ nɛ bena: Gbugbɔ yi! Tete wògbugbɔ.
2Samuel3:17 Ke Abner ƒo nu kple Israel-amegãwo bena: Menye egbe o
2Samuel3:18 Miwɔe azɔ! Elabena Yehowa gblɔ le Dawid ŋu be: Nye dɔla Dawid ƒe asi dzi to ge mala ade nye dukɔ Israel tso Filistitɔwo kple woƒe futɔwo katã si me.
2Samuel3:19 Eye Abner ƒo nu ɖe Benyamin hã ƒe to me: emegbe Abner yi Xebron
2Samuel3:20 Esi Abner kple ŋutsu blave
2Samuel3:21 Eye Abner gblɔ na Dawid bena: Na matso ayi aɖaƒo Israel blibo la nu ƒu ɖe nye aƒetɔ fia ŋu
2Samuel3:22 Eye kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel3:23 Esi Yoab kple aʋakɔ blibo
2Samuel3:24 Tete Yoab va fia la gbɔ gblɔ bena: Nuka nye esi nèwu? Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel3:25 Mènya Abner
2Samuel3:26 Tete Yoab do le Dawid gbɔ hedɔ ame ɖo ɖe Abner yome
2Samuel3:27 Esi Abner trɔ gbɔ va Xebron la
2Samuel3:28 Ke esi Dawid va see la
2Samuel3:29 Neva Yoab ƒe ta kple fofoa ƒe aƒe blibo la dzi
2Samuel3:30 Yoab kple nɔvia Abisai wowu Abner
2Samuel3:31 Tete Dawid gblɔ na Yoab kple ameha
2Samuel3:32 Eye woɖi Abner ɖe Xebron; fia la fa avi kple ɣli le Abner ƒe yɔdo to
2Samuel3:33 Eye fia la fa na Abner gblɔ bena: Ɖe Abner aku abe yakame enea?
2Samuel3:34 Womebla asi na wò o
2Samuel3:35 Esi ɣe gale dzi ko
2Samuel3:36 Eye esi ameha blibo la dze sii la
2Samuel3:37 Eye ameha la katã kple Israel blibo la dze sii gbemagbe bena: Abner
2Samuel3:38 Eye fia la gblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo bena: Mienyae be
2Samuel3:39 Ke nye la ɖevi dzaa menye
2Samuel4:1 Esi Saul vi se bena
2Samuel4:2 Eye ŋutsu eve
2Samuel4:3 ke Beerottɔwo si yi Gitaim
2Samuel4:4 Eye ŋutsuvia ɖe le Saul vi Yonatan si
2Samuel4:5 Azã Beerottɔ Rimon viwo
2Samuel4:6 Wova aƒea me
2Samuel4:7 Esi wova aƒea me la
2Samuel4:8 Eye wotsɔ Is-Boset ƒe ta vɛ na Dawid le Xebron gblɔ na fia la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel4:9 Tete Dawid ɖo ŋu na Rexab kple nɔvia Baana
2Samuel4:10 Melé ame ma
2Samuel4:11 Azɔ esi ame vlowo wu ame dzɔdzɔe ɖe eƒe aba dzi le eƒe xɔ me la
2Samuel4:12 Tete Dawid de se na ɖekakpuiawo
2Samuel5:1 Tete Israel-toawo katã va Dawid gbɔ le Xebron
2Samuel5:2 Tsã esi Saul nye fia ɖe Israel nu la
2Samuel5:3 Ale Israel-amegãwo katã va fia la gbɔ le Xebron
2Samuel5:4 Dawid xa ƒe blaetɔ̃
2Samuel5:5 Eɖu fia ɖe Yuda dzi le Xebron ƒe adre kple dzinu ade
2Samuel5:6 Eye fia la kple eƒe amewo ho yi Yerusalem ɖe Yebusitɔ
2Samuel5:7 Ke Dawid xa Zion-mɔ̃ la
2Samuel5:8 Gbemagbe Dawid gblɔ bena: Amesi asi Yebusitɔwo hekpe ɖe xodrɔ̃wo kple ŋkuagbãtɔwo
2Samuel5:9 Eye Dawid va na mɔ̃ la me hena ŋkɔe be Dawid ƒe du; eye Dawid ɖo gli ƒo xlãe va kpe tso Milo to anyigba gome.
2Samuel5:10 Eye Dawid le ŋusẽ kpɔm ɖe dzi
2Samuel5:11 Eye Tiro-fia Xiram ɖo amewo kple sedertiwo ɖe Dawid hekpe ɖe atikpalawo kple kpefulawo ŋu
2Samuel5:12 Azɔ Dawid dze sii bena
2Samuel5:13 Esi Dawid tso Xebron va la
2Samuel5:14 Amesiwo wodzi nɛ le Yerusalem ƒe ŋkɔwo nye esi: Samua
2Samuel5:15 Yibxar
2Samuel5:16 Elisama
2Samuel5:17 Tete Filistitowo se bena
2Samuel5:18 Eye Filistitɔwo va kaka ɖe Refaim-bali la me.
2Samuel5:19 Eye Dawid bia nu Yehowa bena: Mahe ɖe Filistitɔwo ŋua
2Samuel5:20 Tete Dawid va Baal-Perazim
2Samuel5:21 Ke wogblẽ woƒe legbawo ɖe afima
2Samuel5:22 Eye Filistitɔwo gaho heva kaka ɖe Refaim-bali la me
2Samuel5:23 Tete Dawid bia nu Yehowa
2Samuel5:24 Eye ne eva me be
2Samuel5:25 Eye Dawid wɔ
2Samuel6:1 Eye Dawid gaƒo Israel ƒe ame tiatiawo katã nu ƒu
2Samuel6:2 Eye Dawid kple dukɔ blibo
2Samuel6:3 Woɖa Mawu ƒe aɖaka la ɖe tasiaɖam yeyea ɖe me
2Samuel6:4 Esi wotsɔe tso Abinadab ƒe aƒe
2Samuel6:5 Eye Dawid kple Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la le ɣe ɖum kple ŋusẽ katã hele ha dzim ɖe saŋku kple kasaŋku
2Samuel6:6 Esi wova Naxon ƒe lugbɔƒe la
2Samuel6:7 Ke Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Usa ŋu
2Samuel6:8 Tete wòve Dawid be
2Samuel6:9 Eye Dawid vɔ̃ Yehowa gbemagbe hegblɔ be: Aleke Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la ava gbɔnye?
2Samuel6:10 Eye Dawid melɔ̃ be
2Samuel6:11 Ale Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la tsi Gattɔ Obed-Edom ƒe me dzinu etɔ̃
2Samuel6:12 Eve wova gblɔna fia Dawid bena: Yehowa yra Obed-Edom ƒe aƒe kple eƒe nuwo katã le Mawu ƒe aɖaka la ta. Tete Dawid yi ɖakɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la tso Obed-Edom ƒe me va Dawid ƒe ɖu la me kple dzidzɔ.
2Samuel6:13 Eye wòva me
2Samuel6:14 Dawid ɖu ɣe kple ŋusẽ katã le Yehowa ŋku me
2Samuel6:15 Eye Dawid kple Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la te aseye tsom le kpẽ kum hetsɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la yii.
2Samuel6:16 Esi Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la va Dawid ƒe dua me la
2Samuel6:17 Eye wotsɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaka la va da ɖe enɔƒe le agbadɔ
2Samuel6:18 Esi Dawid sa numevɔ kple akpedavɔ vɔ la
2Samuel6:19 Eye Dawid ma abolo bɔbɔ
2Samuel6:20 Esi Dawid yi gbe do ge na eƒemetɔwo la
2Samuel6:21 Tete Dawid gblɔ na Mixal bena: Yehowa
2Samuel6:22 Ne meɖi gbɔ
2Samuel6:23 Ke Saul vinyɔnu Mixal tsi ko vaseɖe eƒe kugbe.
2Samuel7:1 Eye wòva me
2Samuel7:2 fia la gblɔ na nyagblɔɖila Natan bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel7:3 Natan do ŋu na fia la bena: Yi nawɔ nusianu
2Samuel7:4 Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va Natan gbɔ le zã ma me bena:
2Samuel7:5 Yi nagblɔ na nye dɔla Dawid bena: Ale Yehowa to enye si: Wòe atu xɔ nam manɔ emea?
2Samuel7:6 Elabena tso gbesigbe mekplɔ Israel-viwo tso Egipte la
2Samuel7:7 Ŋkeke alesi menɔ Israel-viwo katã dome tsã la
2Samuel7:8 Azɔ ale nagblɔ na nye dɔla Dawid enye si: Gbe
2Samuel7:9 Menɔ anyi kpli wò le afisiafi
2Samuel7:10 Mana nɔƒe nye dukɔ Israel
2Samuel7:11 tso gbesigbe meɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo ɖe nye dukɔ Israel nu la o. Mana gbɔdzɔe wò tso wò futɔwo katã si me
2Samuel7:12 Ne wò azã de
2Samuel7:13 Eya natu xɔ na nye ŋkɔ
2Samuel7:14 Manye fofoa
2Samuel7:15 Gake nye amenuveve madzo le egbo
2Samuel7:16 Wò aƒe kple wò fiaɖuƒe anɔ anyi tegbee le ŋkunye me
2Samuel7:17 Eye Natan ƒo nu kple Dawid ɖe nya siawo katã kple ŋutega sia nu pɛpɛpɛ.
2Samuel7:18 Eye fia Dawid yi ɖabɔbɔ nɔ Yehowa ŋku me hegblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ Yehowa
2Samuel7:19 Aƒetɔ Yehowa
2Samuel7:20 Eye nukata Dawid aganɔ nu ƒom kpli wò
2Samuel7:21 Le wò nya kple wò tamesusu ta nèwɔ nu gã siawo katã
2Samuel7:22 Eyata ètri akɔ
2Samuel7:23 Dukɔ ka le anyigba dzi de wò dukɔ Israel nu
2Samuel7:24 Eye nèɖo wò dukɔ Israel tè dzi
2Samuel7:25 Eyata
2Samuel7:26 Ekema wò ŋkɔ ade du tegbee
2Samuel7:27 Elabena wò Yehowa Zebaot
2Samuel7:28 Azɔ Aƒetɔ Yehowa
2Samuel7:29 Eyata lɔ̃ nayra wò dɔla ƒe aƒe la
2Samuel8:1 Eye wòva me le nusiawo megbe bena
2Samuel8:2 Emegbe wòsi Moabitɔwo
2Samuel8:3 Eye Dawid si Zoba-fia Hadadezer
2Samuel8:4 Dawid lé sɔdola akpe ɖeka kple alafa adre kpakple afɔzɔla akpe blave
2Samuel8:5 Eye esi Aramtɔwo tso Damasko
2Samuel8:6 Eye Dawid ɖe amewo ɖo Aramtɔwo ƒe Damasko
2Samuel8:7 Eye Dawid xɔ sikakpoxɔnu
2Samuel8:8 Eye fia Dawid xɔ akɔbli geɖe fũ le Beta kple Berotai
2Samuel8:9 Esi Xamat-fia Toi se bena
2Samuel8:10 Toi do via Yoram ɖe fia Dawid
2Samuel8:11 Eye fia Dawid ka woawo hã ŋu na Yehowa hekpe ɖe klosalo kple sika
2Samuel8:12 Exɔ wo le Aramtɔwo
2Samuel8:13 Eye Dawid ƒe ŋkɔ nyɔ. Esi wògbɔ tso Aramtɔwo siƒe la
2Samuel8:14 Eye wòɖe amewo ɖo Edom
2Samuel8:15 Ale Dawid ɖu fia de Israel blibo la dzi
2Samuel8:16 Yoab
2Samuel8:17 Zadok
2Samuel8:18 Benaya
2Samuel9:1 Eye Dawid bia bena: Ɖe amea ɖeke mekpɔtɔ ɖe Saul ƒe me
2Samuel9:2 Dɔlaa ɖe le Saul ƒe me
2Samuel9:3 Fia la bia bena: Ɖe amea ɖeke megale Saul ƒe me
2Samuel9:4 Tete fia la gblɔ nɛ bena: Afika wòle? Ziba ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel9:5 Tete fia Dawid ɖo ame ɖa woaɖakplɔe vɛ tso Lo-Debar le Amiel vi Maxir ƒe me.
2Samuel9:6 Eye esi Saul vi Yonatan ƒe vi Mefiboset va Dawid gbɔ la
2Samuel9:7 Dawid gblɔ nɛ bena: Megavɔ̃ o
2Samuel9:8 Ke eya de ta agu gblɔ bena: Ameka nye wò dɔla
2Samuel9:9 Tete fia la ya Saul ƒe ɖekakpui Ziba gblɔ nɛ bena: Metsɔ nusiwo katã nye Saul kple eƒe aƒe blibo la to la
2Samuel9:10 Eye mia kple viwòŋutsuwo kple wò dɔlawo miade agble
2Samuel9:11 Tete Ziba gblɔ na fia la bena: Alesi nye aƒetɔ fia de se na eƒe dɔla la
2Samuel9:12 Eye ŋutsuvi suea ɖe le Mefiboset si
2Samuel9:13 Ke Mefiboset nɔ Yerusalem
2Samuel10:1 Esia megbe la Amon-viwo ƒe fia ku
2Samuel10:2 Tete Dawid gblɔ bena: Mave Naxas vi Xanun nu
2Samuel10:3 Amon-viwo ƒe amegãwo gblɔ na woƒe aƒetɔ Xanun bena: Ɖe Dawid dɔ akɔfalawo ɖa
2Samuel10:4 Tete Xanun lé Dawid ƒe dɔlawo
2Samuel10:5 Esi wova gblɔe na Dawid la
2Samuel10:6 Ke esi Amon-viwo kpo be
2Samuel10:7 Esi Dawid see la
2Samuel10:8 Tete Amon-viwo ho va dze aʋa ɖe agbo la nu
2Samuel10:9 Esi Yoab kpɔ be
2Samuel10:10 Ke etsɔ aʋakɔ la ƒe kpɔtɔea de asi na nɔvia Abisai
2Samuel10:11 Eye wògblɔ bena: Ne Aramtɔwo sesẽ wum la
2Samuel10:12 Lé dzi de ƒo
2Samuel10:13 Tete Yoab kple aʋakɔ
2Samuel10:14 Eye esi Amon-viwo kpo be
2Samuel10:15 Esi Aramtɔwo kpɔ bena
2Samuel10:16 Eye Hadadezer do be
2Samuel10:17 Esi wova gblɔe na Dawid la
2Samuel10:18 Ke Aramtɔwo si le Israel nu
2Samuel10:19 Esi fia
2Samuel11:1 Esi ƒe trɔ
2Samuel11:2 Le ɣetrɔ me
2Samuel11:3 Tete Dawid do woyi ɖabia nyɔnu la gome se
2Samuel11:4 Eye Dawid do ame woyi ɖakplɔe vɛ
2Samuel11:5 Eye nyɔnu la fɔ fu
2Samuel11:6 Tete Dawid do ame do de Yoab bena: Ɖo Uriya
2Samuel11:7 Eye esi Uriya va egbo la
2Samuel11:8 Dawid gagblɔ na Uriya bena: Yi aƒewò me
2Samuel11:9 Ke Uriya tsi eƒe aƒetɔ ƒe dɔlawo katã gbɔ dɔ le fia ƒe agbo nu
2Samuel11:10 Eye wova gblɔ na Dawid bena: Uriya meyi eƒe me o. Tete Dawid gblɔ na Uriya bena: Alo menye mɔ dzi nètso gbɔ oa? Nukaŋuti meyi aƒewò me o?
2Samuel11:11 Uriya ɖo ŋu na Dawid bena: Aɖaka la kple Israel kpakple Yuda wole agbadɔ me
2Samuel11:12 Dawid gblɔ na Uriya bena: Tsi afisia egbea hã
2Samuel11:13 Eye Dawid kpee wòva ɖu nu no nu le egbɔ
2Samuel11:14 Esi ŋu ke la
2Samuel11:15 Ale wòŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽa me enye si: Miɖe Uriya ɖo ŋgɔ
2Samuel11:16 Eye wòva me
2Samuel11:17 Tete duametɔwo do va wɔ aʋa kple Yoab
2Samuel11:18 Enumake Yoab do ame be
2Samuel11:19 Eye Yoab de se na dɔla la bena: Ne ègblɔ aʋanyawo katã na fia la vɔ
2Samuel11:20 eye fia la do dɔmedzoe gblɔ na wò bena: Nukaŋuti miegogo dua
2Samuel11:21 Ameka wu Abimelex
2Samuel11:22 Eye dɔla la yi ɖagblɔ nya
2Samuel11:23 Dɔla la ɖo ŋu na Dawid bena: Ŋutsuawo sesẽ wu mí
2Samuel11:24 Tete aŋutrɔdalawo le gli dzi tewò dɔlawo
2Samuel11:25 Dawid gblɔ na dɔla la bena: Ale nagblɔ na Yoab enye si: Megana nusia nave wò o
2Samuel11:26 Esi Uriya srɔ̃ se bena
2Samuel11:27 Eye esi wòwɔ aho vɔ la
2Samuel12:1 Tete Yehowa dɔ Natan ɖo ɖe Dawid
2Samuel12:2 Alẽ kple nyiwo le kesinɔtɔ la si fũ.
2Samuel12:3 Ke naneke mele ame dahe la si o
2Samuel12:4 Ke esi mɔzɔlaa ɖe va dze kesinɔtɔa la
2Samuel12:5 Tete dzi ku Dawid vevie ɖe ŋutsu la ŋu
2Samuel12:6 eye wòaɖo alẽvi la teƒe zi ene
2Samuel12:7 Tete Natan gblɔ na Dawid bena: Wòe nye ŋutsu la! Ale Yehowa
2Samuel12:8 mede wò aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe asi na wò
2Samuel12:9 Nukaŋuti nèdo vlo Yehowa ƒe gbe hewɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi sia le eƒe ŋku me? Ewu Uriya
2Samuel12:10 Eyata yi madzo le aƒewò me gbeɖe o
2Samuel12:11 Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel12:12 Wòa èwɔe le bebe me
2Samuel12:13 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Natan bena: Mewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe Yehowa ŋu. Natan gblɔ na Dawid bena: Yehowa hã ɖe wò nuvɔ̃ la ɖa; mele kuku ge o.
2Samuel12:14 Ke esi newɔ nusia
2Samuel12:15 Emegbe Natan yi aƒe me. Eye Yehowa ɖe fu na ɖevi
2Samuel12:16 Ke Dawid ƒo koko na Mawu le ɖevi la ta
2Samuel12:17 Eye eƒe me amegãwo va egbɔ
2Samuel12:18 Le ŋkeke adreagbe la ɖevi la ku. Eye Dawid ƒe dɔlawo le vɔvɔ̃m be
2Samuel12:19 Esi Dawid kpɔ be
2Samuel12:20 Tete Dawid tsi tre tso anyigba
2Samuel12:21 Eƒe dolawo gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuka nye si newɔ? Esi ɖevi la gale agbe la
2Samuel12:22 Eɖo ŋu bena: Esi ɖevi la le agbe la
2Samuel12:23 Ke azɔ esi wòku la
2Samuel12:24 Eye Dawid fa aka na srɔ̃a Bat-Seba; eye wòyi ɖadɔ egbɔ
2Samuel12:25 Eye wotsɔe ɖe asi na nyagblɔɖila Natan
2Samuel12:26 Eye Yoab wo aʋa kple Amon-viwo ƒe Raba
2Samuel12:27 Tete Yoab da amewo ɖo ɖe Dawid gblɔ bena: Mewɔ aʋa kple Raba
2Samuel12:28 Eyata ƒo aʋakɔ
2Samuel12:29 Tete Dawid ƒo aʋakɔ blibo la nu ƒu yi Raba
2Samuel12:30 Eye wòɖe fiakuku la le woƒe fia ta; eƒe kpekpeme le sika talento ɖeka
2Samuel12:31 Eye wòkplɔ dukɔ
2Samuel13:1 Esia megbe la Dawid vi Absalom nɔvinyɔnu Tamar
2Samuel13:2 Eye wòve Amnon
2Samuel13:3 Xɔlɔ̃a ɖe le Amnon si
2Samuel13:4 Eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Fia vi
2Samuel13:5 Eye Yonadab gblɔ ne bena: Yi ɖamlɔ wò aba dzi
2Samuel13:6 Eye Amnon mlɔ anyi le kpɔ̃dɔ lém
2Samuel13:7 Tete Dawid ɖo ame ɖe Tamar ƒe me be
2Samuel13:8 Eye Tamar yi nɔvia Amnon ƒe me
2Samuel13:9 Eye wòtree le nutɔgba me le eŋku me: ke egbe be
2Samuel13:10 Azɔ Amnon gblɔ na Tamar bena: Tsɔ nuɖuɖua va xogã me
2Samuel13:11 Esi wòtsɔe nɛ
2Samuel13:12 Ke eɖo ŋu bena: Kpao
2Samuel13:13 Ke nye ɖe
2Samuel13:14 Ke egbe toɖoɖo eƒe gbe
2Samuel13:15 Ke azɔ Amnon lé fui vevie ŋuta
2Samuel13:16 Eɖo ŋu ne bena: Megawɔe o
2Samuel13:17 Eye wòyɔ ɖekakpui
2Samuel13:18 Edo awu ʋlayaa ɖe; elabena alea fia vinyɔnu
2Samuel13:19 Eye Tamar ku afi kɔ ɖe ta me
2Samuel13:20 Tete nɔvia Absalom gblɔ nɛ bena: Ɖe nɔviwò Amnon va gbɔwòa? Nɔvinye
2Samuel13:21 Esi fia Dawid se nya siawo katã la
2Samuel13:22 Ke Absalom megblɔ nya vɔ̃ alo nyuia ɖeke na Amnon o; elabena Absalom lé fu Amnon
2Samuel13:23 Eye wòva me le ƒe eve megbe
2Samuel13:24 Eye Absalom va fia la gbɔ gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel13:25 Fia la gblɔ na Absalom bena: Gbeɖe
2Samuel13:26 Eye Absalom gblɔ bena: Ne mèlɔ̃ o la
2Samuel13:27 Ke Absalom ƒoe ɖe enu
2Samuel13:28 Eye Absalom de se na eƒe ɖekakpuiwo bena: Miɖo ŋku anyi; ne wein na Amnon le dzidzɔ kpɔm
2Samuel13:29 Eye Absalom ƒe ɖekakpuiawo wɔ Amnon
2Samuel13:30 Esi wole mɔ dzi la
2Samuel13:31 Tete fia la tsi tre dze eƒe awuwo
2Samuel13:32 Ke Yonadab
2Samuel13:33 Eyata nye aƒetɔ fia megana nya sia naɖu dzi nɛ be
2Samuel13:34 Ke Absalom si. Eye ɖekakpui
2Samuel13:35 Tete Yonadab gblɔ na fia la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel13:36 Esi wòɖe nu le nyaa me la
2Samuel13:37 Ke Absalom si yi Gesur-fia Talmai
2Samuel13:38 Eye Absalom si yi Gesur ɖatsi afima ƒe etɔ̃.
2Samuel13:39 Ke ele fia Dawid dzrom vevie be
2Samuel14:1 Eye Zeruya vi Yoab dze sii bena
2Samuel14:2 Tete Yoab dɔ ame ɖe Tekoa woɖakplɔ nyɔnu dzeaɖaŋua ɖe vɛ
2Samuel14:3 Eye nayi fia la gbɔ agblɔ nya siawo nɛ! Eye Yoab de nyawo enu.
2Samuel14:4 Eye Tekoa-nyɔnu la va fia la gbɔ
2Samuel14:5 Fia la gblɔ ne bena: Nya ka dzo ɖe dziwò? Eɖo ŋu bena: Ahosi menye
2Samuel14:6 Ŋutsuvi eve le wò dɔlanyɔnu si
2Samuel14:7 Azɔ kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel14:8 Tete fia la gblɔ na nyɔnu la bena: Yi aƒewò me
2Samuel14:9 Eye Tekoa-nyɔnu la gblɔ na fia la bena: Nye aƒetɔ fia
2Samuel14:10 Fia la gblɔ bena: Ne amea ɖe ƒo nu ɖe gbɔwò la
2Samuel14:11 Nyɔnu la gblɔ be: Taflatse
2Samuel14:12 Ke nyɔnu la gblɔ bena: Taflatse
2Samuel14:13 Nyɔnu la gblɔ bena: Nukaŋuti nèle esia bum ɖe Mawu ƒe dukɔ la ŋu? Esi fia la gblɔ nya sia
2Samuel14:14 Elabena ele be
2Samuel14:15 Esi dukɔ la le ŋɔdzi dom nam la
2Samuel14:16 Elabena fiã la aɖo to eƒe dɔlanyɔnu
2Samuel14:17 Eye wò dɔlanyɔnu bu be: Nye aƒetɔ fia la ƒe nya ana ɖoɖoe nazi: elabena nye aƒetɔ fia la le abe Mawu ƒe dɔla ene
2Samuel14:18 Tete fia la xɔ dzi gblɔ na nyɔnu la bena: Megaɣla nya
2Samuel14:19 Eye fia la gblɔ bena: Menye Yoab ƒe asie li kpli wò le nya siawo katã me oa? Nyɔnu la ɖo ŋu gblɔ bena: Meta wò agbe
2Samuel14:20 Wò dɔla Yoab wɔ nusia
2Samuel14:21 Emegbe fia la gblɔ na Yoab bena; Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel14:22 Tete Yoab bɔbɔ heɖe ta agu
2Samuel14:23 Tete Yoab dze mɔ yi Gesur
2Samuel14:24 Eye fia la gblɔ be: Netrɔ yi eƒe me
2Samuel14:25 Ke amea ɖeke medze ɖeka ɖe Absalom nu le Israel blibo la o
2Samuel14:26 Eye ne eko eƒe taɖa la
2Samuel14:27 Wodzi ŋutsuvi etɔ̃ kple nyɔnuvi ɖeka
2Samuel14:28 Esi Absalom nɔ Yerusalem ƒe eve
2Samuel14:29 Absalom dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Yoab be
2Samuel14:30 Tete wògblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo bena: Mikpɔ ɖa
2Samuel14:31 Eye Yoab tso yi Absalom gbɔ le aƒea me gblɔ ne bena: Nukaŋuti wò dɔlawo tɔ dzo agble
2Samuel14:32 Absalom ɖo ŋu na Yoab bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel14:33 Tete Yoab yi fia la gbɔ ɖagblɔe ne; eye wòyɔ Absalom. Esi wòva fia la gbɔ la
2Samuel15:1 Esia megbe la Absalom di tasiaɖam kple sɔwo na eɖokui hekpe ɖe ŋutsu blaatɔ̃
2Samuel15:2 Eye Absalom fɔna ŋdi kanya ɖatsia tre ɖe agbo la ƒe mɔ to; eye wòva me
2Samuel15:3 Absalom gblɔna nɛ bena: Wò nya le eme
2Samuel15:4 Eye Absalom gblɔ bena: Ɖe wònye amea ɖee atsɔm aɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ɖe anyigba la dzi
2Samuel15:5 Eye wòva me
2Samuel15:6 Alea Absalom wɔ na Israel blibo
2Samuel15:7 Le ƒe ene megbe la Absalom gblɔ na fia la bena: Taflatse
2Samuel15:8 Elabena esi menɔ Gesur le Aram la
2Samuel15:9 Fia gblɔ nɛ bena: Yi le ŋutifafa me! Tete wòdze mɔ heyi Xebron.
2Samuel15:10 Eye Absalom dɔ ŋkutsalawo ɖo ɖe Israel-toawo katã me bena: Ne kpẽ ɖi miese la
2Samuel15:11 Eye ŋutsu alafa eve kpe ɖe Absalom ŋu tso Yerusalem
2Samuel15:12 Eye esi Absalom le vɔ sam la
2Samuel15:13 Eye amea de va toe na Dawid gblɔ bena: Israel-ŋutsuwo ƒe dzi trɔ ɖe Absalom ŋu.
2Samuel15:14 Tete Dawid gblɔ na eƒe dɔla
2Samuel15:15 Fia ƒe dɔlawo ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Wò dɔlawo nye si
2Samuel15:16 Tete fia la dzo
2Samuel15:17 Ale fia la dzo
2Samuel15:18 Eƒe dɔlawo katã le exa le yiyim
2Samuel15:19 Eye fia la gblɔ na Gatitɔ Itai bena: Nukaŋuti wò hã nèbe
2Samuel15:20 Etsɔ nèva
2Samuel15:21 Ke Itai ɖo ŋu na fia la gblɔ bena: Meta Yehowa ƒe agbe kple nye aƒetɔ fia ƒe agbe: Afisi nye aƒetɔ fia ano la
2Samuel15:22 Dawid gblɔ na Itai bena: Yi kpli mí! Ale Gatitɔ Itai kple eƒe amewo katã kpakple ɖevi
2Samuel15:23 Eye anyigba blibo la fa avi hoo
2Samuel15:24 Eye kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel15:25 Ke fia la gblɔ na Zadok bena: Gbugbɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la yi dua mee! Ne Yehowa ve nunye la
2Samuel15:26 Gake ne egblɔ be
2Samuel15:27 Eye fia la gblɔ na nunɔla Zadok bena: Wòe nye nukpɔla
2Samuel15:28 Mikpɔ ɖa
2Samuel15:29 Tete Zadok kple Abyatar wogbugbɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la va Yerusalem
2Samuel15:30 Eye Dawid lia amiti-togbɛ la
2Samuel15:31 Eye wova gblɔ na Dawid bena: Axitofel le nugbeɖolawo dome kpe ɖe Absalom ŋu! Tete Dawid gblɔ bena: Yehowa
2Samuel15:32 Esi Dawid va ɖo toa ta me
2Samuel15:33 Dawid gblɔ nɛ bena: Ne ayi azɔlia dzi kplim la
2Samuel15:34 ke ne ègbugbɔ yi dua me
2Samuel15:35 Nunɔla Zadok kple Abyatar hã le afima kpe ɖe ŋuwò; eyata ne èse nya sia nya le fia ƒe me ko la
2Samuel15:36 Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel15:37 Eye Dawid xɔlɔ̃ Xusai va dua me
2Samuel16:1 Esi Dawid to toa ta me yi ʋee la
2Samuel16:2 Fia la bia Ziba bena: Nuka nèbe
2Samuel16:3 Fia la gblɔ be: Afika wò aƒetɔ ƒe vi la le? Ziba ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel16:4 Tete fia la gblɔ na Ziba bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel16:5 Esi fia Dawid va Baxurim la
2Samuel16:6 Eye wòfɔ kpe le Dawid kple fia Dawid ƒe dɔlawo katã kple ameha blibo la kpakple kalẽtɔ
2Samuel16:7 Eye Simei le ɖiŋu dom le gbɔgblɔm be: Dzo
2Samuel16:8 Yehowa gbugbɔ Saul
2Samuel16:9 Zeruya vi Abisai gblɔ na fia la bena: Nukaŋuti avũ kuku sia anɔ ɖiŋu dom na nye aƒetɔ fia la? Na mayi aɖatso ta le enu!
2Samuel16:10 Ke fia la gblɔ be: Nya ka me mele kple mi Zeruya viwo? Nedo ɖiŋu faa! Elabena nenye Yehowae gblɔ nɛ be: do ɖiŋu na Dawid la! ameka kpɔ mɔ agblɔ be: nukaŋuti nèle wɔwɔm alea?
2Samuel16:11 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Abisai kple eƒe dɔlawo katã bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel16:12 Ɖewohĩ Yehowa akpɔ nye hiã la nam
2Samuel16:13 Eye Dawid kple eƒe amewo lé mɔ
2Samuel16:14 Eye fia la kple ameha blibo
2Samuel16:15 Ke Absalom kple ameha blibo
2Samuel16:16 Esime Dawid xɔlɔ̃ Xusai
2Samuel16:17 Tete Absalom gblɔ na Xusai bena: Xɔ̃wò lae nye esia lɔ̃m nèlea? Nukaŋuti mèyi kple xɔwo la oa?
2Samuel16:18 Xusai ɖo ŋu na Absalom bena: Kpao
2Samuel16:19 Eye evevea ke: Ameka masubɔ
2Samuel16:20 Eye Absalom gblɔ na Axitofel bena: Miɖe adaŋu
2Samuel16:21 Axitofel gblɔ na Absalom bena: Yi fofowò ƒe ahiã
2Samuel16:22 Eye wowɔ agbadɔ ɖe xɔta na Absalom
2Samuel16:23 Wobua Axitofel ƒe aɖaŋu
2Samuel17:1 Eye Axitofel gblɔ na Absalom bena: Na maɖu ŋutsu akpe wuieve
2Samuel17:2 eye mado ɖe edzi
2Samuel17:3 eye makplɔ ameha blibo la vɛ na wò! Ne wo katã gbugbɔ va
2Samuel17:4 Nya la dze Absalom kple Israel-ame tsitsiwo katã ŋu.
2Samuel17:5 Tete Absalom gblɔ bena: Miɖayɔ Xusai
2Samuel17:6 Esi Xusai va Absalom gbɔ la
2Samuel17:7 Xusai gblɔ na Absalom bena: Adaŋu
2Samuel17:8 Eye Xusai gblɔ bena: Enya fofowò kple eƒe amewo be
2Samuel17:9 Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel17:10 eye dzi aɖe le kalẽtɔ kekeake
2Samuel17:11 Ke nye aɖaŋu enye si: Na Israel blibo la nakpe la ɖe ŋuwò tso Dan vaseɖe Beer-Seba
2Samuel17:12 Míado ɖe edzi le teƒeawo dome oa ɖe
2Samuel17:13 Eye ne ede megbe yi dua ɖe me la
2Samuel17:14 Tete Absalom kple Israel-ŋutsuwo katã gblɔ bena: Xusai
2Samuel17:15 Eye Xusai gblɔ na nunɔla Zadok kple Abyatar bena: Ale kple ala Axitofel ɖo aɖaŋu na Absalom kple Israel-ame tsitsiwo enye si
2Samuel17:16 Eyata nètsɔ
2Samuel17:17 Eye Yonatan kple Aximaaz wonɔ Rogel-vudo la gbɔ. Eye dɔlanyɔnua ɖe hea gbe yinae na wo woɖagblɔna na fia Dawid be: womekpɔ mɔ ayi dua me o
2Samuel17:18 Ke ŋutsuvia ɖe kpɔ wo
2Samuel17:19 Ke nyɔnua ɖe tsɔ avɔ keke ɖe vudo la nu
2Samuel17:20 Eye Absalom ƒe dɔlawo va nyɔnu la gbɔ le aƒea me hebia bena: Afika Aximaaz kple Yonatan wole? Nyɔnu la ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Woyi to la godo. Eye esi wodi wo
2Samuel17:21 Eye esi wodzo la
2Samuel17:22 Tete Dawid kple ameha
2Samuel17:23 Esi Axitofel kpɔ be
2Samuel17:24 Ke Dawid va Maxanayim
2Samuel17:25 Eye Absalom tsɔ Amasa ɖo aʋakɔ la nu ɖe Yoab teƒe; Amasa enye Ismael-ŋutsu
2Samuel17:26 Eye Israel kple Absalom ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Gilead-nyigba dzi.
2Samuel17:27 Eye wòva me
2Samuel17:28 wohe abawo
2Samuel17:29 anyitsi
2Samuel18:1 Eye Dawid xlẽ dukɔ la
2Samuel18:2 Eye Dawid tsɔ aʋakɔ ta ƒe etɔ̃liawo ɖeka de Yoab si
2Samuel18:3 Ke aʋakɔ la ɖo ŋu bena: Megayi o; elabena ne míesi la
2Samuel18:4 Fia la gblɔ na wo bena: Mawɔ nusi nyo mia ŋu. Tete fia la tsi tre ɖe agbo la xa
2Samuel18:5 Eye fia la de se na Yoab kple Abisai kpakple Itai bena: Mikpɔ ɖekakpui Absalom la dzi nam nyuie! Eye aʋakɔ blibo la see
2Samuel18:6 Eye aʋakɔ la ho yi gbedzi
2Samuel18:7 Dawid ƒe dɔlawo si Israel ƒe aʋakɔ la le afima
2Samuel18:8 Eye aʋa la kaka tso afima ɖe anyigba blibo la dzi
2Samuel18:9 Eye Absalom va ƒo go Dawid ƒe dolawo Absalom do tedzisɔ
2Samuel18:10 Eye ŋutsua ɖe kpɔe va gblɔ na Yoab bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel18:11 Tete Yoab gblɔ na ŋutsu
2Samuel18:12 Ŋutsu la ɖo ŋu na Yoab bena: Ne woxlẽ klosalo akpe ɖeka ɖe asi me nam hã la
2Samuel18:13 Ɖe wònye ɖe mewo nane ɖe eŋu le adza me la
2Samuel18:14 Tete Yoab gblɔ bena: Nyematɔ ɖe gbɔwò didie o! Eye wòtsɔ akplɔ etɔ̃ ɖe asi ɖatɔ Absalom ƒe dzinu; ke esi wogale agbe le klẽtia ŋu ko la
2Samuel18:15 ɖekakpui ewo
2Samuel18:16 Tete Yoab ku kpẽ
2Samuel18:17 Eye wotsɔ Absalom ƒu gbe ɖe do gãa ɖe me le avea me
2Samuel18:18 Ke esi Absalom le agbe la
2Samuel18:19 Eye Zadok vi Aximaaz gblɔ bena: Maƒu du ahe du ayi na fia la bena
2Samuel18:20 Tete Yoab gblɔ nɛ bena: Mèle du nyuia ɖeke he ge ayii egbea o
2Samuel18:21 Eye Yoab gblɔ na Kusitɔ la bena: Yi ɖagblɔ nusi nekpɔ la
2Samuel18:22 Ke Zadok vi Aximaaz gaxɔ edzi gblɔ na Yoab bena: Ne edze agbodo ʋuu hã
2Samuel18:23 Ne edze agbodo ʋuu hã la
2Samuel18:24 Dawid bɔbɔ nɔ agbo eve dome
2Samuel18:25 Tete dzɔla la gblɔe na fia la. Eye fia la gblɔ bena: Nenye eya ɖekae la
2Samuel18:26 agbonudzɔla la gakpɔ ŋutsu bubu le du ƒum
2Samuel18:27 Eye dzɔla la gblɔ bena: Ame gbãtɔ ƒe duƒuƒume ɖi Zadok vi Aximaaz tɔ. Tete fia la gblɔ bena: Ame nyui wònye
2Samuel18:28 Eve Aximaaz do ɣli gblɔ na ba la bena: Ŋutifafa! Eye wobɔbɔ de ta agu ɖe fia la ŋku me gblɔ bena: Woayra Yehowa
2Samuel18:29 Fia la gblɔ be: Ɖekakpui Absalom li sesiea? Aximaaz ɖo ŋu bena: Mekpɔ zitɔtɔ gãa ɖe
2Samuel18:30 Fia la gblɔ be: Te ɖe aga
2Samuel18:31 Eye kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel18:32 Fia la gblɔ na Kusitɔ la bena: Ɖekakpui Absalom li sesiea? Kusitɔ la ɖo ŋu bena: Ava me na nye aƒetɔ fía ƒe futɔwo kple amesiwo katã tsi
2Samuel19:1 Tete fia la ƒo kpakpakpa heyi ɖe agbo la ƒe akpala me
2Samuel19:2 Eye wova gblɔ na Yoab bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel19:3 Ale dziɖuɖu la trɔ zu konyifafa na dukɔ blibo la gbemagbe
2Samuel19:4 Eve aʋakɔ la zɔ minyaminya va yi ɖe du la me
2Samuel19:5 Fia la tsyɔ nu ŋku me
2Samuel19:6 Tete Yoab yi ɖe fia la gbɔ le xɔa me gblɔ bena: Ede ŋukpe mo na wò dɔlawo katã
2Samuel19:7 elɔ̃ amesiwo lé fu wò
2Samuel19:8 Eyata tsi tre
2Samuel19:9 Tete fia la tsi tre va bɔbɔ nɔ agbo nu. Eye wova gblɔe na aʋakɔ blibo la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel19:10 Eye dukɔ blibo la he dzre le Israel-toawo katã me gblɔ bena: Fia la ɖe mí tso míaƒe futɔwo si me
2Samuel19:11 Ke Absalom
2Samuel19:12 Eye Dawid dɔ ame ɖo ɖe nunɔla Zadok kple Abyatar gblɔ bena: Miƒo nu kple Yuda-ame tsitsiwo bena: Nukaŋuti miebe
2Samuel19:13 Nɔvinyewo míenye
2Samuel19:14 Eye migblɔ na Amasa bena: Alo menye nye ƒu kple nye ŋutilã nenye oa? Mawu nafiam agafiam ɖe dzi
2Samuel19:15 Ale wòtrɔ Yuda-ŋutsuwo katã ƒe dzi abe ŋutsu ɖeka tɔ ene
2Samuel19:16 Eye fia la gbugbɔ heva Yordan nu; ke Yuda va Gilgal
2Samuel19:17 Tete Benyamintɔ Simei
2Samuel19:18 Eye Benyamin-ŋutsu akpe ɖeka kple dɔla Ziba
2Samuel19:19 Emegbe duwo yi
2Samuel19:20 Eye wògblɔ na fia la bena: Nye aƒetɔ megabu vodada nam o
2Samuel19:21 Elabena wò dɔla nyae be
2Samuel19:22 Tete Abisai
2Samuel19:23 Ke Dawid ɖo ŋu bena: Nya ka me mele kpli mi Zeruya viwo
2Samuel19:24 Eye fia la gblɔ na Simei bena: Mèle kuku ge o! Eye fia la ka atam nɛ.
2Samuel19:25 Eye Saul vi Mefiboset va kpe fia la; ke meɖo eƒe afɔ kple ge ɖo o
2Samuel19:26 Esi wòva Yerusalem fia la kpe ge la
2Samuel19:27 Eɖo ŋu bena: Nye aƒetɔ fia
2Samuel19:28 Eye wòva zɔ wò dɔla gɔme na nye aƒetɔ fia la; ke nye aƒetɔ fia la le abe Mawu ƒe ɖɔla ene
2Samuel19:29 Elabena fofonye ƒemetɔwo katã menye naneke o
2Samuel19:30 Fia la gblɔ nɛ bena: Nukaŋuti nègale nu ƒom ɖe edzi? Megblɔ be
2Samuel19:31 Tete Mefiboset ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Esi nye aƒetɔ fia la trɔ gbɔ va aƒe le ŋutifafa me ko la
2Samuel19:32 Gileadtɔ Barsilai hã tso Roglim va
2Samuel19:33 Barsilai ku amegã ɖeɖi xɔ ƒe blanyi; eya kpɔ fia la dzi
2Samuel19:34 Eye fia la gblɔ na Barsilai bena: Yi kplim
2Samuel19:35 Tete Barsilai ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Ŋkeke nenie megale agbe nɔ ge
2Samuel19:36 Ƒe blanyi mexɔ egbe siawo. Ɖe mate ŋu ade vovo nu nyui kple nu manyomanyo domea? Ɖe nusi wò dɔla ɖuna
2Samuel19:37 Ɖeko wò dɔla be
2Samuel19:38 Na wò dɔla nagbugbɔ
2Samuel19:39 Fia la gblɔ be: Kimham neyi kplim
2Samuel19:40 Eye aʋakɔ blibo la tso Yordan
2Samuel19:41 Emegbe fia la yi azɔli la dzi heva Gilgal
2Samuel19:42 Eye kpɔ ɖa
2Samuel19:43 Tete Yuda-ŋutsuwo katã ɖo ŋu na Israel-ŋutsuwo bena: Le esi fia la tsɔ mía gbɔ la tae! Nukaŋuti miele dɔmedzoe dom le nya sia ŋuti? Ɖe mieɖu fia la ƒe nanea? Alo ɖe míexɔ nunana le esia?
2Samuel19:44 Israel-ŋutsuwo ɖo ŋu na Yuda-ŋutsuwo bena: Míexɔ akpa ewo le fia gome
2Samuel20:1 Eye yakamea ɖe le afima
2Samuel20:2 Tete Israel-ŋutsuwo katã tu le Dawid ŋu hedze Seba
2Samuel20:3 Esi Dawid va eƒe me le Yerusalem la
2Samuel20:4 Eye na la gblɔ na Amasa bena: Yɔ Yuda-ŋutsuwo nam le ŋkeke etɔ me
2Samuel20:5 Eye Amasa yi Yuda yɔ ge; ke esi wòtsi anyi ɣeyiɣi
2Samuel20:6 tete Dawid gblɔ na Abisai bena: Azɔ Seba
2Samuel20:7 Eye Yoab ƒe amewo ho dze eyome hekpe ɖe Kretitɔwo kple Pletitɔwo kpakple kalẽtɔwo katã ŋu
2Samuel20:8 Esi woɖo kpe gã
2Samuel20:9 Yoab gblɔ na Amasa bena: Nɔvinye
2Samuel20:10 Ke Amasa melé ŋku ɖe yi
2Samuel20:11 Yoab ƒe ɖekakpuiwo dometɔ ɖeka tsi egbɔ le gbɔgblɔm bena Amesi ke lɔ̃a Yoab ƒe nya kple amesi ke nye Dawid lɔ la
2Samuel20:12 Ke Amasa le mimlim le eƒe nu me le maƒo me. Esi ŋutsu la kpɔ be
2Samuel20:13 Esi wòtee ɖa le mɔa dzi la
2Samuel20:14 Ke eya tsa to Israel-toawo katã me vaseɖe Abel-Bet-Maaxa
2Samuel20:15 Azɔ wova ɖe to ɖe wo le Abel-Bet-Maaxa
2Samuel20:16 Tete nyɔnu dzeaɖaŋua ɖe do ɣli tso dua me bena: Ago gbɔ! Ago gbɔ! Taflatse
2Samuel20:17 Tete wote ɖe eŋu
2Samuel20:18 Eye wògblɔ bena: Blema la wogblɔna be: Mibia le Abel
2Samuel20:19 Nyee nye ame fafa kple anukwaretɔwo dometɔ ɖeka le Israel; èbe
2Samuel20:20 Tete Yoab xɔ edzi gblɔ bena: Nyemebe
2Samuel20:21 Nya la mele alea o
2Samuel20:22 Eye nyɔnu la va dukɔ blibo la gbɔ kple eƒe aɖaŋudzedze la
2Samuel20:23 Yoab le Israel ƒe aʋakɔ blibo la nu
2Samuel20:24 Adoram kpɔa dɔwɔwɔ dzi
2Samuel20:25 Seya enye agbalẽŋlɔla
2Samuel20:26 eye Ira
2Samuel21:1 Eye do to le Dawid ŋɔli ƒe etɔ̃ sɔŋ Ira ɖe enu; eye Dawid do gbe ɖa na Yehowa. Tete Yehowa gblɔ bena: Saul kple eƒe aƒe la ɖe hlɔ̃fe
2Samuel21:2 Eye fia la ya Gibeontɔwo ƒo nu kpli wo. Gibeontɔwo metso Israel-viwo dome o
2Samuel21:3 Eye Dawid gblɔ na Gibeontɔwo bena: Nuka mawo na mi
2Samuel21:4 Gibeontɔwo ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Klosalonya alo sikanyaa ɖeke mele mía kple Saul kple eƒe aƒe la dome o
2Samuel21:5 Woɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Ŋutsu
2Samuel21:6 Ne woɖe ame adre na le viaŋutsuwo dome
2Samuel21:7 Ke fia la ve Mefiboset
2Samuel21:8 Tete fia la lé Aya vinyɔnu Rizpa ƒe viŋutsu eveawo
2Samuel21:9 eye wotsɔ wo de asi na Gibeontɔwo
2Samuel21:10 Tete Aya vinyɔnu Rizpa tsɔ akpanya keke ɖe agakpe la dzi tso nuŋeɣi ƒe gɔmedzedze
2Samuel21:11 Esi wogblɔ nusi Aya vinyɔnu Rizpa
2Samuel21:12 Dawid yi ɖaxɔ Saul kple via Yonatan ƒe ƒuwo
2Samuel21:13 Eye wotsɔ Saul kple via Yonatan ƒe ƒuwo tso afima vɛ
2Samuel21:14 Eye woɖi Saul kple via Yonatan ƒe ƒuwo ɖe Zela le Benyamin-nyigba dzi ɖe fofoa Kis ƒe yɔdo me
2Samuel21:15 Filistitɔwo gãwo aʋa kple Israel
2Samuel21:16 Eye Yisbi tso Nob
2Samuel21:17 Ke Zeruya vi Abisai xɔ nɛ
2Samuel21:18 Eye wòva me emegbe be
2Samuel21:19 Wogawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔwo le Gob
2Samuel21:20 Wogawɔ aʋa le Gat
2Samuel21:21 Eɖu fewu le Israel ŋu
2Samuel21:22 Ame ene siawo tso ame dzɔtsuwo ƒe dzidzime le Gat
2Samuel22:1 Tete Dawid gblɔ ha sia ƒe nyawo na Yehowa le gbesigbe Yehowa ɖee tso eƒe futɔwo katã kple Saul si me
2Samuel22:2 eye wògblɔ be: Yehowa enye nye agakpe
2Samuel22:3 Mawu enye nye ɣaɣlaƒe
2Samuel22:4 Meyɔ Yehowa
2Samuel22:5 Elabena ku ƒe tsitsotsoewo ɖe to ɖem eve gbegblẽ ƒe tɔsisiwo do ŋɔdzi nam.
2Samuel22:6 Tsiẽƒe ƒe kawo ƒo xlãm eve ku ƒe adoboliwo ɖem
2Samuel22:7 Meyɔ Yehowa le nye xaxa me eye meɖo ɣli na nye Mawu
2Samuel22:8 Anyigba ʋã
2Samuel22:9 Dzudzɔ de dzi tso eƒe ŋɔti me
2Samuel22:10 Eviã dziƒo heɖi ɖe anyi
2Samuel22:11 Ena Kerubi dzi hedzo
2Samuel22:12 Ewo viviti no me abe agbadɔ ene
2Samuel22:13 Dzoka xɔxɔwo do tso keklẽ me le eŋgɔ.
2Samuel22:14 Yehowa ɖe gbe tso dziƒo
2Samuel22:15 Eda aŋutrɔ wòkaka wo hlẽ
2Samuel22:16 Tete atsiaƒu gɔme dze
2Samuel22:17 Edo alɔ ɖa tso dzi lém
2Samuel22:18 Eɖem tso nye futɔ sesẽ la kple nye ketɔwo si me
2Samuel22:19 Wodze dzinye le gbesigbe meɖo dzɔgbevɔ̃e me
2Samuel22:20 Ekplɔm va dogba dzi
2Samuel22:21 Yehowa wɔ nam ɖe nye dzɔdzɔenyenye nu
2Samuel22:22 Elabena melé ŋku ɖe Yehowa ƒe mɔwo ŋu
2Samuel22:23 Elabena eƒe sewo katã le ŋkunye me
2Samuel22:24 Mede blibo le eƒe ŋku me
2Samuel22:25 Eyata Yehowa ɖo eteƒe nam le nye dzɔdzɔenyenye ta
2Samuel22:26 Wò dɔme nyona ɖe dɔmenyotɔ ŋu
2Samuel22:27 Edzana le amesi dzana gbɔ
2Samuel22:28 Exɔna na dukɔ
2Samuel22:29 Elabena wò Yehowa ènye nye akaɖi
2Samuel22:30 Elabena dziwò metona nyaa avuzi le amehawo dzi
2Samuel22:31 Mawu ƒe mɔ de blibo
2Samuel22:32 Elabena ameka nye mawu kpe ɖe Yehowa ŋu? Eye ameka nye agakpe kpe ɖe mía Mawu la ŋu?
2Samuel22:33 Mawu enye nye mɔ̃ sesẽ
2Samuel22:34 Ewɔ nye afɔ abe zinɔwo tɔ ene
2Samuel22:35 Efia aʋawɔwɔ nye asiwò
2Samuel22:36 Etsɔ wò xɔxɔ ƒe akpoxɔnu la nam
2Samuel22:37 Ena nye afɔɖeɖe keke le tenye
2Samuel22:38 Meɖe nye futɔwo ɖe nu
2Samuel22:39 Metsrɔ̃ wo
2Samuel22:40 Etsɔ ŋusẽ bla ali dzi nam ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ŋu
2Samuel22:41 Ena nye futɔwo trɔ ʋume dem
2Samuel22:42 Wodo ɣli na Yehowa
2Samuel22:43 Metu wo abe anyigba ʋuʋudedi ene
2Samuel22:44 Eɖem tso nye dukɔ ƒe dzrewɔwɔwo me
2Samuel22:45 Amedzroviwo vivi nu me nam; tonu ko wose
2Samuel22:46 Dzidzi ƒo amedzroviawo
2Samuel22:47 Yehowa le agbe; woakafu nye agakpe
2Samuel22:48 Mawu
2Samuel22:49 Ekplɔm tso nye futɔwo dome
2Samuel22:50 Eyata mele kafuwòm
2Samuel22:51 Eɖe xɔxɔ gã fia eƒe fia
2Samuel23:1 Dawid ƒe nya mamleawo nye esi; Dawid
2Samuel23:2 Yehowa ƒe Gbɔgbɔ ƒo nu to dzinye
2Samuel23:3 Israel ƒe Mawu la ƒo nu
2Samuel23:4 le abe alesi ŋdi kɔna
2Samuel23:5 Ɖe nye aƒe mele alea le Mawu ŋku me oa? Elabena ebia nu mava kplim
2Samuel23:6 Ke yakamewo katã le abe ŋu
2Samuel23:7 ke boŋ amesi be
2Samuel23:8 Dawid ƒe kalẽtɔwo ŋkɔwo nye esi: Isbaal
2Samuel23:9 Eyometɔ nye Eleazar
2Samuel23:10 eya tsi tre
2Samuel23:11 Evometɔ nye Sama
2Samuel23:12 etsi tre ɖe agble la titina
2Samuel23:13 Eye amegã blaetɔ̃awo dometɔ etɔ̃ tso yi Dawid gbɔ le Adulam-do la me le nuŋeŋɔli. Esime Filistitɔwo ƒe adzohawo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Refaim-bali la me la
2Samuel23:14 Dawid le mɔ̃ me le to dzi
2Samuel23:15 Eye nu de asi Dawid dzodzro me
2Samuel23:16 Tete kalẽtɔ etɔ̃awo yi ɖage ɖe Filistitɔwo ƒe asaɖa me
2Samuel23:17 Eye wògblɔ be: Yehowa
2Samuel23:18 Abisai
2Samuel23:19 Wode bubu eŋu le ame blaetɔ̃awo dome
2Samuel23:20 Benaya
2Samuel23:21 Eya wu Egipte-ŋutsu kakoa ɖe; akplɔ le Egiptetɔ la si
2Samuel23:22 Nusia Benaya
2Samuel23:23 Wode bubu eŋu le ame blaetɔ̃awo dome
2Samuel23:24 Asahel
2Samuel23:25 Xaroditɔ Sama kple Xaroditɔ Elika.
2Samuel23:26 Paltitɔ Xelez kple Tekoatɔ Ira
2Samuel23:27 Antotitɔ Abiezer kple Xusatitɔ Mebunai
2Samuel23:28 Axoxitɔ Zalmon kple Netotatitɔ Maharai
2Samuel23:29 Netofatitɔ Xeleb
2Samuel23:30 Piratonitɔ Benaya kple Hidai
2Samuel23:31 Arbatitɔ Abi-Albon kple Barxumitɔ Azmawet
2Samuel23:32 Saalbonitɔ Eliaxba
2Samuel23:33 Yona tan
2Samuel23:34 Elifelet
2Samuel23:35 Karmelitɔ Xezrai
2Samuel23:36 Yigal
2Samuel23:37 Amonitɔ Zelek
2Samuel23:38 Yitritɔ Ira kple Yitritɔ Gareb
2Samuel23:39 kpakple Xititɔ Uriya. Wo katã le ame blaetɔ̃ vɔ adre.
2Samuel24:1 Eye Yehowa gado dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋuti
2Samuel24:2 Tete fia la gblɔ na aʋakɔ la ƒe tatɔ Yoab bena: Yi ɖatsa le Israel-toawo katã me tso Dan vaseɖe Beer-Seba eye naxlẽ dukɔ la
2Samuel24:3 Yoab ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Ne Yehowa na dukɔ la dzi ɖe dzi zi alafa wu alesi wole
2Samuel24:4 Ke esi fia ta tsi eƒe nya la dzi na Yoab kple aʋakplɔlawo la. Yoab kple aʋakplɔlawo dzo le fia la gbɔ
2Samuel24:5 Eye wotso Yordan heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Aroer
2Samuel24:6 Wòto Gilead heva Kades le Xititɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi
2Samuel24:7 Eye wova Tiro ƒe mɔ̃ sesẽ la gbɔ heto Xiwitɔwo kple Kanaanitɔwo ƒe duwo katã me
2Samuel24:8 Eye wotsa to anyigba blibo la dzi
2Samuel24:9 Eye Yoab tsa dukɔ la ƒe xexlẽme vɛ na fia la: aʋa wolã
2Samuel24:10 Tete Dawid ƒe dzi lã kpo
2Samuel24:11 Esi Dawid fɔ ŋdi kanya la
2Samuel24:12 Yi nagblɔ na Dawid bena: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nu etɔ metsɔ le ŋkuwò me ɖom
2Samuel24:13 Tete Gad va Dawid gbɔ
2Samuel24:14 Dawid gblɔ na Gad bena: Mexaxa ŋutɔ! Na miadze Yehowa si me
2Samuel24:15 Eye Yehowa na dɔvɔ̃ ɖo Israel dome tso ŋdi vaseɖe ɣeyiɣi
2Samuel24:16 Esi mawudɔla la do eƒe asi ɖe Yerusalem dzi
2Samuel24:17 Esi Dawid kpɔ mawudɔla
2Samuel24:18 Eye Gad va Dawid gbɔ gbemagbe gblɔ ne bena: Yi nadaɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa ɖe Yebusitɔ Arawna ƒe lugbɔƒe!
2Samuel24:19 Tete Dawid yi le Gad ƒe nya la nu
2Samuel24:20 Esi Arawna fɔ kɔ te la
2Samuel24:21 Eye Arawna gblɔ bena: Nukata nye aƒetɔ fia va eƒe dɔla gbɔ ɖo? Dawid ɖo eŋu bena: Ɖe mebe
2Samuel24:22 Arawna gblɔ na Dawid bena: Nye aƒetɔ fia nexɔe
2Samuel24:23 Nusiawo katã wò dɔla Arawna tsɔ na eƒe aƒetɔ fia la. Eye Arawna gblɔ na fia la bena: Yehowa
2Samuel24:24 Ke fia la gblɔ na Arawna bena: Kpao
2Samuel24:25 Tete Dawid ɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa ɖe afima
1Kings1:1 Esi fia Dawid ku amegã xɔ ƒe geɖe la
1Kings1:2 Tete eƒe dolawo gblɔ nɛ bena: Woadi ɖetugbi atiatia ɖe na miaƒe aƒetɔ fia la
1Kings1:3 Eye wodi ɖetugbi dzetugbe le Israel-nyigba blibo la katã dzi
1Kings1:4 Ɖetugbi la dze tugbe ŋutɔ
1Kings1:5 Ke Adoniya
1Kings1:6 Le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo me la fofoa mehe nya ɖe eŋu kpɔ be: nukaŋuti nèwɔ esi kple esi hã o. Edze ɖeka hã ŋutɔ
1Kings1:7 Eye wòɖo gbe ɖi kple Yoab
1Kings1:8 Ke nunɔla Zadok
1Kings1:9 Eye Adoniya wu alẽwo
1Kings1:10 ke mekpe nyagblɔɖila Natan Benaya kple kalẽtɔwo kple nɔvia Salomo o.
1Kings1:11 Eye Natan gblɔ na Salomo dada Bat-Seba bena: Mese be
1Kings1:12 Eyata va maɖo adaŋu na wò
1Kings1:13 Tso
1Kings1:14 Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings1:15 Tete Bat-Seba yi fia la gbɔ le xɔgã me. Fia lã tsi ŋutɔ
1Kings1:16 Eye Bat-Seba bɔbɔ hede la agu ɖe fia la ŋku me
1Kings1:17 Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Nye aƒetɔ
1Kings1:18 Ke azɔ la
1Kings1:19 Ewu nyitsuwo
1Kings1:20 Nye aƒetɔ fia
1Kings1:21 Elabena ava me be
1Kings1:22 Eye kpɔ ɖa
1Kings1:23 Tete woyi ɖa gblɔe na fia la bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings1:24 Eye Natan gblɔ bena: Nye aƒetɔ fia
1Kings1:25 Elabena egbe la eyi ɖa wu nyitsuwo
1Kings1:26 Ke mekpe nye
1Kings1:27 Nye aƒetɔ fia gbɔe nya sia tso
1Kings1:28 Tete fia Dawid xɔ edzi gblɔ bena; Miyɔ Bat-Seba ɖem! Eye wòva fia la gbɔ le eme hetsi tre ɖe fia la ŋku me.
1Kings1:29 Eye fia la ka atam gblɔ bena: Meta Yehowa
1Kings1:30 Alesi meta Yehowa
1Kings1:31 Tete Bat-Seba bɔbɔ ɖe fia la ŋku me hede ta agu gblɔ bena: Nye aƒetɔ fia nanɔ agbe tegbee.
1Kings1:32 Eye fia Dawid gblɔ bena: Miyɔ nunɔla Zadok kple nyagblɔɖila Natan kpakple Benaya
1Kings1:33 fia la gblɔ na wo bena: Miɖe miaƒe aƒetɔ ƒe dɔlawo kpe ɖe mia ɖokui ŋu
1Kings1:34 Eye nunɔla Zadok kple nyagblɔɖila Natan nasi ami ne le afima ahaɖoe fia ɖe Israel nu; miku kpẽ
1Kings1:35 Emegbe mikplɔe do
1Kings1:36 Tete Benaya
1Kings1:37 Alesi Yehowa nɔ kple nye aƒetɔ fia la
1Kings1:38 Tete nunɔla Zadok
1Kings1:39 Eye nunɔla Zadok tsɔ lãdzo
1Kings1:40 Emegbe dukɔ blibo la kplɔe ɖo
1Kings1:41 Esi Adoniya kple amesiwo katã wokpe ɖe egbɔ la
1Kings1:42 Esi wogale nuƒoƒo dzi la
1Kings1:43 Yonatan ɖo ŋu gblɔ na Adoniya bena: Ele eme! Míaƒe aƒetɔ fia Dawid tsɔ Salomo ɖo fiae.
1Kings1:44 Fia la dɔ nunɔla Zadok
1Kings1:45 Eye nunɔla Zadok kple nyagblɔɖila Natan wosi ami nɛ heɖoe fia le Gixon
1Kings1:46 Salomo bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui la dzi;
1Kings1:47 eye fia la ƒe dɔlawo hã yi
1Kings1:48 Eye fia la hã gblɔ be: Woakafu Yehowa
1Kings1:49 Tete dzika tso amesiwo katã Adoniya kpe la ƒo
1Kings1:50 Ke Adoniya le Salomo vɔ̃m
1Kings1:51 Eye wova gblɔ na Salomo bena: Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings1:52 Eye Salomo gblɔ bena: Ne enye nuteƒewɔla la
1Kings1:53 Eye fia Salomo dɔ woɖakplɔe tso vɔsamlekpui la gbɔ ve
1Kings2:1 Esi Dawid ƒe kuɣi le aƒe tum la
1Kings2:2 Mele demagbɔnugbe yim
1Kings2:3 Lé ŋku ɖe Yehowa
1Kings2:4 ne Yehowa ƒe nya
1Kings2:5 Enya nusi Yoab
1Kings2:6 Wɔ ɖe wò nunya la nu
1Kings2:7 Ke ve Gileadtɔ Barsilai ƒe viŋutsuwo nu
1Kings2:8 Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings2:9 Eyata megagbe tohehe ne o
1Kings2:10 Eye Dawid mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ
1Kings2:11 Ɣeyiɣi
1Kings2:12 Eye Salomo bɔbɔ nɔ fofoa Dawid ƒe fiazikpui la dzi
1Kings2:13 Eye Adoniya. Xagit vi la
1Kings2:14 Eye wògblɔ bena: Nyaa ɖe le asinye
1Kings2:15 Eye wògblɔ be: Wò ŋutɔ ènyae be
1Kings2:16 Azɔ mabia nu ɖeka tso asiwò
1Kings2:17 Eye wògblɔ bena: Taflatse
1Kings2:18 Bat-Seba ɖo ŋu be: Enyo
1Kings2:19 Eye Bat-Seba va fia Salomo gbɔ
1Kings2:20 Eye wògblɔ bena: Mabia nu via ɖe tso asiwò
1Kings2:21 Eye wògblɔ bena: Woatsɔ Abisag
1Kings2:22 Tete fia Salomo ɖo ŋu gblɔ na dadaa bena: Nukaŋuti nele Abisag
1Kings2:23 Eye fia Salomo ta Yehowa bena: Mawu nafiam agadiam ɖe dzi
1Kings2:24 Eyata meta Yehowa ƒe agbe
1Kings2:25 Eye fia Salomo dɔ Benaya
1Kings2:26 Eye ha la gblɔ na nunɔla Abyatar bena: Yi wò agble le Anatot
1Kings2:27 Ale Salomo nyã Abyatar
1Kings2:28 Eye nya la ɖi Yoab se
1Kings2:29 Eye wova gblɔ na Ha Salomo bena
1Kings2:30 Eye Benaya yi Yehowa ƒe agbadɔ la me hegblɔ nɛ bena: Ale fia la gblɔ esi: Do go! Eɖo ŋu bena: Gbeɖe
1Kings2:31 Fia la gblɔ nɛ bena: Wo abe alesi wògblɔ ene; da nui ƒu anyi
1Kings2:32 Yehowa agbugbɔ eƒe nu ava eƒe ta dzi
1Kings2:33 Eye woƒe ʋu agbugbɔ ava Yoab kple eƒe dzidzimeviwo ƒe ta dzi tegbee; ke ŋutifafa atso Yehowa gbɔ ava Dawid kple eƒe dzidzimeviwo kple eƒe aƒe kpakple eƒe fiazikpui la dzi tegbee.
1Kings2:34 Tete Benaya
1Kings2:35 Eye fia la tso Benaya
1Kings2:36 Eye fia la do ame ɖo da
1Kings2:37 Gbesigbe nado atso Kidron-toʋua la nyae be
1Kings2:38 Simei ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Enyo
1Kings2:39 Ke eva me le ƒe elɔ̃ megbe bena
1Kings2:40 Tete Simei tso
1Kings2:41 Eye wova gblɔ na Salomo bena: Simei dzo tso Yerusalem yi Gat
1Kings2:42 Tete fia la dɔ woɖayɔ Simei ve
1Kings2:43 Nukaŋuti mèwɔ Yehowa ƒe atam kple se
1Kings2:44 Eye fia la gblɔ na Simei be: Wò ŋutɔ ènya vɔ
1Kings2:45 Ke woayra Salomo va
1Kings2:46 Tete fia la de se na Benaya
1Kings3:1 Esi fiaɖuƒe la li ke ɖe Salomo si me la
1Kings3:2 Ke dukɔ la gasa vɔ le nuxeƒewo
1Kings3:3 Eye Salomo lɔ Yehowa hezɔ le fofoa Dawid ƒe ɖoɖowo nu; ke esa vɔ
1Kings3:4 Eye fia la yi Gibeon
1Kings3:5 Tete Yehowa ɖe eɖokui fia Salomo le drɔ̃eƒe le zã me le Gibeon
1Kings3:6 Salomo ɖo ŋu bena: Eve wò dɔla
1Kings3:7 Azɔ Yehowa
1Kings3:8 Eye wò dɔla le dukɔ
1Kings3:9 Eyata na dzi nyanu wò dɔla
1Kings3:10 Nya sia dze Aƒetɔ la ŋu
1Kings3:11 Eye Mawu gblɔ nɛ bena: Esi nèbia nusia
1Kings3:12 kpɔ ɖa
1Kings3:13 Eye nusi mèbia o hã la
1Kings3:14 Ne èzɔ nye mowo dzi helé nye ɖoɖowo kple sewo me ɖe asi
1Kings3:15 Ke esi Salomo nyo la
1Kings3:16 Ɣemaɣi la gbolo eve wova fia la gbɔ
1Kings3:17 Eye nyɔnu ɖeka gblɔ bena: Taflatse aƒetɔ
1Kings3:18 Esi nyɔnu sia hã dzi vi
1Kings3:19 Eye nyɔnu sia ƒe vi ku le zã me
1Kings3:20 Tete wòfɔ le zã titina kɔ vinye le axanye
1Kings3:21 Esi metɔ ŋdi
1Kings3:22 Nyɔnu evelia ɖo ŋu be: Kpao
1Kings3:23 Tete fia la gblɔ be: Amesi gblɔ be: Vinyee nye agbagbea
1Kings3:24 Eye fia la gblɔ be
1Kings3:25 Eye fia la gblɔ be: Mife ɖevi gbagbe la me ɖe eve
1Kings3:26 Tete nyɔnu
1Kings3:27 Tete fia la xɔ edzi gblɔ bena: Mitsɔ ɖevi gbagbe la nɛ
1Kings3:28 Esi Israel blibo la se ʋɔnu
1Kings4:1 Ale ba Salomo ɖu fia ɖe Israel blibo la dzi.
1Kings4:2 Eƒe amegãwo nye si: Azarya
1Kings4:3 Elixoref kple Axiya
1Kings4:4 Benaya
1Kings4:5 Azarya
1Kings4:6 Axisar le fiasã la nu
1Kings4:7 Eye dzikpɔla wuieve le Salomo si ɖe Israel blibo la nu
1Kings4:8 Woƒe ŋkɔwo nye
1Kings4:9 Ben-Deker le Makaz
1Kings4:10 Ben-Xesed le Arubot nu
1Kings4:11 Ben-Abinadab tɔ enye Xor-nyigba blibo la; eya ɖe Salomo ƒe vinyɔnu Tatat;
1Kings4:12 Baana
1Kings4:13 Ben-Geber le Ramot-Gilead nu
1Kings4:14 Aminadab
1Kings4:15 Aximaaz le Naftali nu

1Kings4:18 Simei
