Esther1:1 Eva me le Axasweros ŋɔli — eya nye Axasweros
Esther1:2 le ɣemaɣi
Esther1:3 etu aglo na eƒe amegãwo katã kple eƒe dɔlawo le eƒe ftaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe etɔ̃lia me
Esther1:4 eye wòna wokpɔ eƒe fiaɖuƒe ƒe kesinɔnu veviwo kple eƒe gãnyenye ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo nyuiawo ŋkeke geɖe
Esther1:5 Esi ŋkekeawo de vɔ la
Esther1:6 Wotsi avɔ ɣito
Esther1:7 Woku aha ɖe sikakpluwo me
Esther1:8 Wono aha la le ɖoɖo la nu dzizizi manɔme
Esther1:9 Eye fiasrɔ̃ Wasti hã tu aglo na nyɔnuwo ɖe fiasã
Esther1:10 Le ŋkeke adreliagbe
Esther1:11 woaɖakplɔ fiasrɔ̃ Wasti va fia ŋku me
Esther1:12 Ke fiasrɔ̃ Wasti gbe fia ƒe nya
Esther1:13 Eye fia la bia gbe
Esther1:14 Amesiwo te ɖe ŋu la
Esther1:15 Nuka woawɔ fiasrɔ̃ Wasti le se la nu? Elabena mewo fia Axasweros ƒe nya
Esther1:16 Tete Memuxan ɖo ŋu le fia kple amegãwo ŋku me bena. Menye fia la ɖeɖeko ŋu fiasrɔ̃ Wasti da vo ɖo o
Esther1:17 Elabena fiasrɔ̃ ƒe nuwɔwɔ la aɖo nyɔnuwo katã dome
Esther1:18 Eye egbe sia ke Persia-amegãwo kple Meɖia-amegãwo ƒe srɔ̃wo hã agblɔ alea ɖe fia ƒe amegãwo katã ŋu
Esther1:19 Ne edze fia ŋu la
Esther1:20 Ne wose fia ƒe se
Esther1:21 Tete nya la dze fia kple amegãwo ŋu
Esther1:22 eye wòɖo agbalẽ ɖe fia ƒe anyigbawo katã dzi le anyigba sia anyigba kple eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ kple dukɔ sia dukɔ kple eƒe gbegbɔgblɔ nu be: Ŋutsu sia ŋutsu enye aƒetɔ ɖe eƒe me eye eƒemetɔwo nabui.
Esther2:1 Le nya siawo megbe
Esther2:2 Tete fia la ƒe ɖekakpuiwo amesiwo subɔnɛ la
Esther2:3 eye fia la neɖo dzikpɔlawo ɖe eƒe fiaɖuƒe ƒe anyigbawo katã dzi
Esther2:4 eye nyɔnuvi
Esther2:5 Yuda-ŋutsua ɖe nɔ Susa-mɔ̃ me
Esther2:6 eye woɖe aboyo eya kple aboyomeawo tso Yerusalem hekpe ɖe Yuda-fia Yexonya
Esther2:7 Eya nyi etɔɖia ƒe nyɔnuvi Hadasa
Esther2:8 Esime fia ƒe nya kple eƒe se ɖi wose
Esther2:9 Nyɔnuvi la dze eŋu
Esther2:10 Ke Ester meyɔ eƒe dukɔ kple wo de o
Esther2:11 Eye Mardoxai ɖia tsa gbesiagbe le nyɔnuwo ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔxɔnu la nu
Esther2:12 Eye ne fia Axasweros gbɔ yiyi ɖo nyɔnuviawo dome ɖesiaɖe dzi
Esther2:13 ekema nyɔnuvi la yia fia gbɔ
Esther2:14 Ne eyi le fiẽ
Esther2:15 Eye esi wòɖo Ester
Esther2:16 Wokplɔ Ester yi fiasã me le fia Axasweros gbɔ le dzinu ewolia
Esther2:17 Eye fia la lɔ̃a Ester wu nyɔnuwo katã
Esther2:18 Eye fia la tu aglo gãa ɖe na eƒe amegãwo katã kple eƒe dɔlawo
Esther2:19 Esi woƒo ɖetugbiwo nu ƒu zi evelia la
Esther2:20 Ke Ester meyɔ wo de kple eƒe dukɔ o
Esther2:21 Le ɣemaɣi
Esther2:22 Tete Mardoxai se nya la
Esther2:23 Esi wodzro nya la me kpɔ be
Esther3:1 Le nya siawo megbe la fia Axasweros do gã Haman
Esther3:2 Fia ƒe ɖɔla
Esther3:3 Tete fia ƒe dɔla
Esther3:4 Esime wole alea gblɔm nɛ gbesiagbe
Esther3:5 Eye esi Haman kpɔ be
Esther3:6 Ke ebu Mardoxai ɖeɖeko wuwu numaɖinui; elabena woyɔ Mardoxai ƒe dukɔ nɛ. Eyata Haman di be
Esther3:7 Le dzinu gbãtɔ
Esther3:8 Tete Haman gblɔ na fia Axasweros bena: Dukɔ ɖekaa ɖe li
Esther3:9 Ne edze fia ŋu la
Esther3:10 Tete fia la ɖe eƒe ŋkosigɛ le asi hetsɔ na Haman
Esther3:11 Fia la gblɔ na Haman bena: Klosalo la nenɔ anyi ko; gake woawɔ dukɔ: la
Esther3:12 Tete woyɔ fia ƒe agbalẽŋlɔlawo le dzinu gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wutetɔ̃lia dzi
Esther3:13 Tete wode agbalẽ la duxɔlawo si ɖo ɖe fia ƒe anyigbawo katã dzi
Esther3:14 Agbalẽ la me nya enye si: Woade se le anyigba vovovoawo dzi
Esther3:15 Tete duxɔlawo yi kaba le fia ƒe nya la nu
Esther4:1 Esi Mardoxai se nya
Esther4:2 heva fia ƒe agbo nu; elabena amea ɖeke mekpɔ mɔ anɔ akpanya me age ɖe fia ƒe agbo me o.
Esther4:3 Eye nuxaxa gãa ɖe ɖo Yudatɔwo dome le anyigba
Esther4:4 Esi Ester ƒe nyɔnudɔlawo kple eƒe aƒe dzikpɔlawo va toe nɛ la
Esther4:5 Tete Ester yɔ Hatax tso fia ƒe aƒe dzikpɔla
Esther4:6 Eye Hatax yi Mardoxai gbɔ le dua ƒe ablɔ
Esther4:7 Tete Mardoxai gblɔ nusiwo katã dzɔ ɖe eɖzi
Esther4:8 Etsɔ se
Esther4:9 Eye esi Hatax va gblɔ Mardoxai ƒe nyawo na Ester la
Esther4:10 Ester ƒo nu kple Hatax
Esther4:11 Fia ƒe dɔlawo katã kple fia ƒe anyigbawo dzitɔwo nyae bena
Esther4:12 Eye woɖagblɔ Ester ƒe nyawo na Mardoxai.
Esther4:13 Tete Mardoxai be
Esther4:14 elabena ne àzi kpi le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Esther4:15 Tete Ester be
Esther4:16 Yi ɖaƒo Yudatɔ
Esther4:17 Eye Mardoxai yi ɖawɔ pɛpɛpɛ
Esther5:1 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la Ester do fiawu
Esther5:2 Ke esi fia la kpɔ fiasrɔ̃ Ester wòtsi tre ɖe xoxɔnua la
Esther5:3 Fia la gblɔ nɛ bena: Fiasrɔ̃ Ester
Esther5:4 Ester ɖo ŋu bena: Ne edze fia ŋu la
Esther5:5 Tete fia la gblɔ be: Miɖayɔ Haman vɛ kaba
Esther5:6 Esime wole wein nom la
Esther5:7 Ester ɖo ŋu gblɔ bena: Nye biabia kple nye didi enye si:
Esther5:8 Ne fia la ve nunye
Esther5:9 Tete Haman do go gbemagbe kple dzidzɔ
Esther5:10 ke Haman zi eɖokui dzi. Esi wòva eƒe me la
Esther5:11 Eye Haman xlẽ eƒe kesinɔnu nyuiawo
Esther5:12 Eye Haman gagblɔ bena: Fiasrɔ̃ Ester hã mekpe amea ɖeke kpe ɖe fia ŋu ɖe kplɔ̃
Esther5:13 Ke nusiawo katã meɖi ve nam o
Esther5:14 Tete srɔ̃ Zeres kple xɔlɔ̃wo katã gblɔ nɛ bena Na
Esther6:1 Le zã ma me la fia la tsi zãdomadɔlɔ̃e
Esther6:2 Tete wokpɔ woŋlɔ ɖi be Mardoxai ɖe fia ƒe aƒe dzikpɔla eveawo Bigtana kple Zeres
Esther6:3 Tete fia la bia bena: Nuka wowɔ tsɔ de bubu Mardoxai ŋui
Esther6:4 Eye fia la gblɔ be Amekae le xɔxɔnua? — Haman ye va fiasã ƒe xɔxɔnu gbãtɔ be
Esther6:5 Tete fia ƒe dɔlawo gblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Esther6:6 Esi Haman ge ɖe eme la
Esther6:7 Tete Haman ɖo ŋu na fia la bena: Ne fia la di be
Esther6:8 ekema woaɖe fiawu
Esther6:9 emegbe woatsɔ awua kple sɔ Ia ade asi na bubumeawo
Esther6:10 Tete fia la gblɔ na Haman bena: Netsɔ
Esther6:11 Eye Haman tso awu kple sɔ la
Esther6:12 Azɔ Mardoxai trɔ va fia ƒe agbo me; ke Haman ɖe abla yi eƒe me
Esther6:13 Eye Haman xlẽ nusiwo katã dzɔ ɖe edzi la
Esther6:14 Esime wogale nu ƒom kplii la
Esther7:1 Tete fia la kple Haman wova kplɔ̃ ŋu le fiasrɔ̃ Ester gbɔ.
Esther7:2 Eye esi wole wein nom la
Esther7:3 Fiasrɔ̃ Ester ɖo ŋu gblɔ bena: Fia
Esther7:4 Elabena wotsɔ mía kple nye dukɔ dzra
Esther7:5 Tete fia
Esther7:6 Ester ɖo ŋu bena: Ketɔ kple futɔ lae nye Haman vɔ̃ɖi sia! Tete Haman ɖi vo le fia kple fiasrɔ̃ ŋku me.
Esther7:7 Ke fia la tsɔ dziku tsi tre le wein la gbɔ heyi fiasã ƒe abɔ me; eye Haman tsi afima
Esther7:8 Eye esi fia la trɔ tso fiasã ƒe abɔ me va xɔ
Esther7:9 Eye Xarbona
Esther7:10 Eye wohe Haman ɖe ati
Esther8:1 Gbemagbe fia Axasweros tso Yudatɔwo ƒe ketɔ Haman ƒe aƒe na fiasrɔ̃ Ester. Eye Mardoxai va fia la ŋku me
Esther8:2 Eye fia la ɖe eƒe ŋkɔsigɛ
Esther8:3 Ester gaƒo nu le fia la ŋku me
Esther8:4 Tete fia la tsɔ
Esther8:5 gblɔ bena: Ne edze fia la ŋu
Esther8:6 Elabena aleke mate ŋu
Esther8:7 Tete fia Axasweros gblɔ na fiasrɔ̃ Ester kple Yudatɔ Mardoxai bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Esther8:8 Ke miawo miŋlɔ agbalẽ ɖo ɖe Yudatɔwo le fia ƒe ŋkɔ me
Esther8:9 Tete woyɔ fia ƒe agbalẽŋlɔlawo ɣemaɣi le dzinu etɔ̃lia
Esther8:10 Woŋlɔ agbalẽ la le fia Axasweros ƒe ŋkɔ me
Esther8:11 be: Fia la ɖe mɔ na Yudatɔ
Esther8:12 le ŋkeke ɖeka dzi le fia Axasweros ƒe anyigbawo katã dzi le dzinu wuievelia
Esther8:13 Agbalẽ la me nya enye si: Woade se le anyigba vovovoawo dzi
Esther8:14 Tete duxɔlawo wɔ kaba do fia ƒe sɔ ɖiduwo
Esther8:15 Eye Mardoxai le fiawu
Esther8:16 Eye wònye dzɔgbenyuie
Esther8:17 Yudatɔwo kpɔ dzidzɔ
Esther9:1 Le dzinu wuievelia
Esther9:2 Tete Yudatɔwo ƒo wo dokui nu ƒu ɖe woƒe duwo me le fia Axasweros ƒe anyigbawo katã dzi
Esther9:3 Anyigbawo ƒe tatɔwo katã
Esther9:4 Elabena Mardoxai zu gã le na ƒe me
Esther9:5 Eye Yudatɔwo tsɔ yi dza woƒe futɔwo katã
Esther9:6 Yudatɔwo wu ŋutsu alafa atɔ̃ le Susa-mɔ̃ me

Esther9:8 Porata
Esther9:9 Parmasta

Esther9:22 abe ŋkeke

Esther9:32 Ester ƒe se la ɖo kpe Purim ƒe ɖoɖowo dzi
Esther10:1 Fia Axasweros ɖo nuɖzɔɖzɔ na anyigba la kple atsiaƒu me ƒukpowo.

Job1:1 Ŋutsua ɖe nɔ Uz-nyigba dzi
Job1:2 Wodzi ŋutsuvi adre kple nyɔnuvi eta ne.
Job1:3 Eƒe lãwo le ale akpe adre
Job1:4 Eye viaŋutsuwo tua aglo ɖe woƒe aƒewo me
Job1:5 Eye ne aglotuɣiawo trɔ va kpe la
Job1:6 Eye wòva me gbe ɖeka be
Job1:7 Tete Yehowa bia Satana be: Afika nètso? Satana ɖo ŋu na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Metso tsatsa ge le anyigba dzi kple tsa ɖi ge le edzi.
Job1:8 Yehowa gblɔ na Satana be: Elé ŋku ɖe nye dɔla Hiob ŋua? Elabena enye ame maɖifɔ
Job1:9 Tete Satana ɖo ŋu na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Dzodzroe Hiob vɔ̃a Mawua?
Job1:10 Ɖe menye wòe tɔ kpɔ ɖe eya ŋutɔ kple eƒe nuwo katã ŋu godoo oa? Eyra eƒe aƒe kpakple eƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo
Job1:11 Ke do asi da
Job1:12 Yehowa gblɔ na Satana be: Kpɔ ɖa
Job1:13 Eye wòva me gbe ɖeka be
Job1:14 tete ame dɔdɔa de va Hiob gbɔ gblɔ bena: Nyiawo le agble ŋlɔm
Job1:15 kasia Sabatɔwo va dze wo dzi
Job1:16 Esi amesia gale nuƒoƒo dzi la
Job1:17 Esi mekpɔ ɖe nu le eme o le ame bubu va gblɔ bena: Kalɖeatɔwo dze aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ va dze kposɔawo dzi
Job1:18 Esi amesia gale nuƒoƒo dzi le ame bubu va gblɔ bena: Esi viwòŋutsuwo kple viwònyɔnuwo le nu ɖum
Job1:19 kpɔ ɖa
Job1:20 Tete Hiob tso hedze eƒe awu
Job1:21 gblɔ bena: Amama mele tso ɖanye ƒe ɖɔ me
Job1:22 Le nusiawo katã me la Hiob mewɔ nuvɔ̃ o
Job2:1 Eye wòva me gbe ɖeka
Job2:2 Tete Yehowa bia Satana bena: A ika nètso? Satana ɖo ŋu na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Metso tsatsa ge le anyigba dzi kple tsa ɖi ge le edzi.
Job2:3 Yehowa gblɔ na Satana be: Ele ŋku ɖe nye dɔla Hiob ŋua? Elabena enye ame maɖifɔ
Job2:4 Tete Satana ɖo ŋu na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Ŋutigbalẽ ɖe ŋutigbalẽe teƒe
Job2:5 Ke ɖo wò abɔ ɖa
Job2:6 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Satana bena: Kpa ɖa
Job2:7 Tete Satana dzo le Yehowa ŋku me hekplɔ ƒoƒoe vɔ̃ɖi ƒu Hiob tso eƒe afɔƒome vaseɖe eƒe dzodome.
Job2:8 Eye wòbɔbɔ nɔ dzowo me hetsɔ sonu gaglɛ le ŋuti kumi.
Job2:9 Tete srɔ̃a gblɔ nɛ bena: Egale wo blibonyenye me ɖe asi koa? Gbe Mawu
Job2:10 Ke eya ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Eƒo nu

Job2:12 Ke esi wota mo te le adzɔge la
Job2:13 Eye wobɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe anyigba ɖe egbɔ ŋkeke adre kple zã adre; ke wo dometɔa ɖeke meƒo nu kplii o
Job3:1 Emegbe Hiob ke nu heƒo fi de eƒe dzigbe.
Job3:2 Eye Hiob xɔ edzi gblɔ bena:
Job3:3 Gbesigbe wodzim kple zã
Job3:4 Ŋkeke ma nedo viviti
Job3:5 Viviti kple blukɔ negbugbɔe yii
Job3:6 Viviti nekplɔ zã ma yii

Job3:9 Eƒe ŋukeɣleti neɖo viviti; nelala keklẽ

Job3:12 Nukata wotsɔm do akɔ eye nukata meno no ɖo?

Job3:20 Nukaŋuti wòna kekeli ayaɖulawo? Eye wòtsɔ agbe na nuxalawo?

Job4:4 Wo nya fɔ ame kudɔewo ɖe te
Job4:5 Azɔ

Job4:7 Bu eme kpɔ! Ameka dome gblẽ fɔmaɖimaɖii kpɔa? Eye afika wotsrɔ̃ ame dzɔdzɔewo le kpɔa?
Job4:8 Le nye nukpɔkpɔ nu la amesiwo ŋlɔa dzɔgbevɔ̃e hetsɔa agbagbadzedze ƒãna la

Job4:17 De ame kodzogbea nye dzɔdzɔetɔ le Mawu ŋku mea? Alo ɖe ŋutsua ɖe dza le ewɔla ŋku mea?

Job4:21 Ɖe mele eme oa? Ne wotso woƒe agbadɔka le wo ŋu la
Job5:1 Yɔ ame kpɔ
Job5:2 Ke boŋ dziku wua bometsila
Job5:3 Mekpɔ bometsilaa ɖe do ke; tete wònyunyɔ ɖe enɔƒe enumake.
Job5:4 Ɖeɖe metso ɖe viawo gbo o
Job5:5 Dɔwuitɔwo mi eƒe agblemenuwo

Job5:8 Nyee wònyea

Job5:10 amesi naa tsidzadza anyigba

Job5:14 Viviti kpea wo le ŋkeke me

Job5:24 Ekema adze sii be
Job5:25 Adze sii be
Job5:26 Atsi aƒu ga

Job6:1 Tete Hiob do ŋu gblɔ bena:
Job6:2 Ne woaxada nye dziku
Job6:3 Ke azɔ la ele kpekpem wu ƒutake
Job6:4 Elabena ŋusẽkatãtɔ ƒe aŋutrɔ le nye lã me
Job6:5 Ɖe gbetedzi xlɔ̃na le gbe mumu gbɔa? Alo de nyitsu ɖea gbe le eƒe nuɖuɖu gbɔa?
Job6:6 Ɖe nu vɔvɔ nya ɖuna
Job6:7 Nye luʋɔ gbe asiɖeɖe eŋu: nuɖuɖu nyɔŋu wònye nam.
Job6:8 Oo
Job6:9 Ɖe wòadze Mawu ŋu
Job6:10 Anye ne nye akɔ afa tso
Job6:11 Nukae nye nye ŋusẽ
Job6:12 Nye ŋusẽ la
Job6:13 Metsi ya me
Job6:14 Ne dzi ɖe le amea ɖe ƒo la
Job6:15 Nɔvinyewo wɔ alakpanu abe tɔsisi ene; woɖi ta
Job6:16 siwo tsi babla na woblu
Job6:17 Ɣeyiɣi
Job6:18 Asihawo dze gbe to tagba
Job6:19 Temamɔzɔhawo le afima kpɔm
Job6:20 ke woƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ zu ŋukpe
Job6:21 Alea miawo hã miele ɖeke mee o; miekpɔ ŋɔdzi
Job6:22 Ɖe megblɔ be: Mina num
Job6:23 miɖem tso ketɔ la si me
Job6:24 Mifia num
Job6:25 Aleke gbegbe ŋusẽ mehele nyateƒe ƒe nyawo mee o! Ke aleke miaƒe nya heɖeameŋuawo le?
Job6:26 Nya tɔe miebe
Job6:27 Nu ko wònye miele dzidzem ɖe tsyɔ̃eviwo dzi
Job6:28 Azɔ
Job6:29 Mitrɔ dzro
Job6:30 Ɖe alakpa le nye aɖe dzia? Eye ɖe nye veme madze si nu vlo oa?
Job7:1 Ɖe menye aʋa mee amegbetɔ le le anyigba dzi oa? Eye ɖe eƒe ŋkekewo mele abe agbatedɔwɔla ƒe ŋkekewo ene oa?
Job7:2 Alesi kluvi ƒe ŋku blãna ɖe vɔvɔli ŋu
Job7:3 nenema nyea mexɔ hiãɣletiwoe
Job7:4 Ne memlɔ anyi la
Job7:5 Nye ŋutilã dze nyẽ
Job7:6 Nye ŋkekewo ɖia ɖu wu avɔlɔ̃ʋu
Job7:7 Mibu eme kpɔ
Job7:8 Amesiwo ƒe ŋku le ŋunye la
Job7:9 Alilikpo buna
Job7:10 megatrɔna va eƒe me o
Job7:11 Eyata nye hã nyemaxe mɔ na nye nu o; maƒo nu
Job7:12 Atsiaƒue menyea
Job7:13 Ne megblɔ be: Nye aba nefa akɔ nam
Job7:14 ekema ètsɔa drɔ̃e doa vɔvɔ̃ nam
Job7:15 ale be nye luʋɔ di be
Job7:16 Etim azɔ
Job7:17 Nuka nye amegbelɔ be
Job7:18 Eɖoa teƒe nɛ ŋdi sia ŋdi
Job7:19 Ɣekaɣi naɖe kɔ ɖa le ŋunye
Job7:20 Ne mewɔ nuvɔ̃ la
Job7:21 Nukaŋuti mẽtsɔ nye dzidadawo ke o
Job8:1 Tete Suaxtɔ Bildad xɔ edzi gblɔ bena:
Job8:2 Zi nenie nanɔ nu ƒom alea
Job8:3 Ɖe Mawu atrɔ gbo nya dzɔdzɔea? Eye ɖe ŋusẽkatãtɔ atrɔ gbo dzɔdzɔenyenyea?
Job8:4 Nenyo ɖe viwòwo wɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe eŋu la
Job8:5 Ke ne èdi Mawu vevie
Job8:6 ne èdza
Job8:7 Eye ne ele nyaŋui gbã la

Job8:9 Elabena míatvo la etsɔviwo míenye
Job8:10 Woawoe afia nu wò
Job8:11 Ɖe nyɔnufɛgbe miena ɖe afisi sii mele oa? Eye ɖe aƒla miena tsi makpɔmakpɔea?
Job8:12 Egale mumu ko
Job8:13 Alea wonona na amesiwo kalã ŋlɔ Mawu be la

Job8:15 Eziɔna ɖe eƒe xɔ ŋu

Job8:17 Edoa ke ɖe kpewo dzi
Job8:18 Ne eɖee da le eteƒe la
Job8:19 Kpɔ ɖa
Job8:20 Kpɔ ɖa
Job8:21 Agana nu koko nayɔ wò nume
Job8:22 Ŋukpe ale wò ketɔwo

Job9:2 Nyateƒe

Job9:4 Dzi nyanu le esi

Job9:6 Eʋuʋu anyigba le enɔƒe
Job9:7 Ede se na ɣe
Job9:8 Eya ɖeka keke dziŋgɔli me
Job9:9 Ewɔ koklovinɔ
Job9:10 Ewɔ nu gã
Job9:11 Kpɔ ɖa
Job9:12 Kpɔ ɖa
Job9:13 Mawu mefaa eƒe dziku nu o
Job9:14 Aleke nyea mahe nya kplii
Job9:15 Ne tɔnye dza ʋuu keke hã la

Job9:18 Mede mɔ nam be

Job9:21 Nyemeɖi fɔ o! Nyemedze si ɖokuinye o
Job9:22 Wo katã le ɖeka! Eyata mebe: Ame maɖifɔ kple fɔɖila siaa wotsrɔ̃na.
Job9:23 Ne atam de asi amewuwu me ɖe vo me ta
Job9:24 Wotsɔ anyigba de asi na nu vlo wɔlawo
Job9:25 Nye ŋkekewo le abla dem wu duƒula; wosi
Job9:26 Woyi mii abe aƒlaʋu ene
Job9:27 Ne mebu be: maŋlɔ nye konyifafa be
Job9:28 ekema nye veveseseawo katã doa vɔvɔ̃ nam
Job9:29 Fɔɖila menye tso

Job11:1 Tete Naamatɔ Zofar xɔ dzi gblɔ bena:

Job12:1 Eye Hiob ɖo du gblɔ bena:
Job12:2 Nyateƒee! Miawo koe nye amewo

Job21:8 Wo viwo lia ke le wo gbɔ kple woƒe dzidzimeviwo le wo ŋku me.
Job21:9 Woƒe aƒewo nɔa ŋutifafa me
Job21:10 Eƒe nyitsu yɔa asi
Job21:11 Woɖea woƒe ŋutsuviwo doa goe abe lãha ene
Job21:12 Wonɔa ha dzim ɖe gakogoe kple gakasaŋku ŋu
Job21:13 Woɖua woƒe ŋkekewo le dzidzɔ me
Job21:14 Ke wogblóna na Mawu be: Te ɖa le mía gbɔ
Job21:15 Ameka nye ŋusẽkatãtɔ
Job21:16 Kpa ɖa

Job21:18 be woanɔ abe gbe ƒuƒu le ya nu ene
Job21:19 Mawu ɖo nuxi dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖi na viawo. Aɖo eteƒe nɛ
Job21:20 Eƒe ŋkuwo akpɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe gbegblẽ
Job21:21 Elabena eƒe aƒe me nya ka tsɔ egbɔ le emegbe
Job21:22 Ɖe wobe
Job21:23 Amea ɖe ku
Job21:24 eƒe zewo yɔ fũ kple notsi
Job21:25 Ke ame bubu ku

Job22:4 Ɖe wòle to hem na wò le wò mawuvɔvɔ̃ ta
Job22:5 Ɖe wò nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ mekeke ta

Job22:21 Dze xɔlɔ̃ kplii

Job34:19 Eya
Job34:20 Woku ɖe aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka me
Job34:21 Elabena etsɔ ŋku ɖo amegbetɔ ƒe mɔwo ŋu
Job34:22 Viviti kple blukɔa ɖeke meli
Job34:23 Elabena meɖoa ŋkeke na amegbetɔ
Job34:24 Egbãa ŋusẽtɔwo gudugudu
Job34:25 Esi wònya woƒe nuwɔnawo la
Job34:26 Eƒoa wo abe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ene le dutoƒo;
Job34:27 elabena wode megbe le eŋu

Job34:30 be ame vlowo magaɖu dzi

Job34:32 Nusi kpɔm nyemele o la

Job35:1 Eye Elihu xɔ edzi gblɔ bena:
Job35:2 Nya nyui enye sia gblɔm nèle be: „Tɔnye dzɔ wu Mawu tɔa?“
Job35:3 Elabena ele gbɔgblɔm be: Viɖe ka wònye nam? Eye ne nyemele nuvɔ̃ wɔm o hã la
Job35:4 Maɖo eŋu na mia kple xɔ̃wòwo!
Job35:5 Fɔ kɔ te
Job35:6 Ne éwɔ nuvɔ̃ la
Job35:7 Ne ènye ame dzɔdzɔe la
Job35:8 Ame abe wò ene

Job35:11 amesi fia nu mi wu anyigba dzi lãwo
Job35:12 Wodo ɣli le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe dadaa ta

Job35:14 Azɔ nèle gbɔgblɔm hã be
Job35:15 Ke azɔ

Job36:1 Eye Elihu ƒo nu yi dzi gblɔ bena:

Job36:4 Elabena nytateƒee
Job36:5 Kpɔ ɖa

Job36:7 Meɖea eƒe ŋku ɖa le ame dzɔdzɔewo ŋu o
Job36:8 Ne wode kɔsɔkɔsɔ wo
Job36:9 eɖea woƒe nuwɔwɔ kple woƒe dzidadawo fiaa wo
Job36:10 eʋua to na wo ɖe tohehe la ŋu hegblɔna be
Job36:11 Ne woɖo to
Job36:12 Ke ne womeɖo to o la
Job36:13 Dɔmedzoe le dzi ta na eme vlowo
Job36:14 ale be wokuna le ɖekakpui dzodzoe me
Job36:15 Ke etsɔa hiã ɖea hiãtɔwoe
Job36:16 Aɖe wò hã tso xaxa ƒe ve me ayi teƒe keke
Job36:17 Ke ne ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe afiatsotso yɔ mewò fũ la

Job36:24 Ke boŋ ɖo eƒe nuwɔwɔ

Job38:1 Eye Yehowa ɖo ŋu na Hiob le dziya me gblɔ bena:
Job38:2 Amekae tsɔ nuƒoƒo
Job38:3 Tso
Job38:4 Afika nènɔ
Job38:5 Ameka ɖo eƒe dzidzeme? Enyae tso! Alo ameka da dzidzeka nɛ?
Job38:6 Nuka dzi wodo egɔme anyi do
Job38:7 esime ŋukeɣletiviwo katã le aseye tsom
Job38:8 Ameka tso ʋɔtruwo xe mɔ na atsiaƒu
Job38:9 Esime metsyɔ alilikpo nɛ
Job38:10 meɖo liƒo nɛ
Job38:11 hegblɔ bena: Afii nava se ɖo
Job38:12 Le wò agbe me ŋkekewo me la
Job38:13 ne wòalé anyigbatoga aʋuʋu ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖa le eŋua?
Job38:14 Etrɔna abe tsu
Job38:15 Woaxɔ kekeli le ame vɔ̃ɖi si
Job38:16 Ɖe nede atsiaƒu dzɔƒe
Job38:17 De woʋu ku ƒe agbo na wò
Job38:18 Ekpɔ anyigba ƒe kekemea? Ne enya nusiawo katã la
Job38:19 Kekeli gbɔ mɔ ɖe
Job38:20 ne nakplɔ wo ayi woƒe liƒo dzii
Job38:21 Enyae tso
Job38:22 Ɖe nède afisi wodzra sno ɖo
Job38:23 esiwo metu do ɖe xaxaɣi
Job38:24 Mɔ ka kekeli mãna tona
Job38:25 Ameka ɖo toƒe na tsidzadza gãwo kple mɔ na dziɖegbe kple dzikedzo
Job38:26 ne tsi nadze ɖe anyigba
Job38:27 ne woana tagba kple gbegbe naɖi kɔ
Job38:28 Ɖe fofo li na tsidzadza
Job38:29 Ameka ƒe dɔ mee tsi babla tso
Job38:30 Tsiwo lía abe kpe ene
Job38:31 Wòe saa atifieŋuwo ƒe ka
Job38:32 Wòe kplɔa ŋukeɣletivi doa goe
Job38:33 Enya dziƒo ƒe sewoa
Job38:34 A le ŋu aɖe gbe na alilikpo be
Job38:35 Ate ŋu ada dzikedzowo
Job38:36 Ameka tsɔ nunya ɖo alilikpo tsiɖitsiɖi me
Job38:37 Ameka tsɔ nunya xlẽ alilikpowoe
Job38:38 ale be anyigba wɔ agbi heƒuna
Job38:39 Wòe kaa ade na dzatanɔ
Job38:40 ne wotsyɔ akɔ anyi ɖe dowo me
Job38:41 Ameka ɖaa nuɖuɖu na akpaviã

Job40:1 Eye Yehowa ɖo ŋu na Hiob gblɔ bena:

Job40:3 Tete Hiob ɖo ŋu na Yehowa gblɔ bena:
Job40:4 Kpɔ ɖa
Job40:5 Meƒo nu zi ɖeka
Job40:6 Tete Yehowa ɖo ŋu na Hiob le dziya me gblɔ bena:
Job40:7 Sa ava ɖe ali abe ŋutsu ene
Job40:8 Ɖe nagblẽ nye afiatsotso me
Job40:9 Ɖe abɔ le asiwò abe Mawu ene
Job40:10 Ekema tsɔ bubu kple gãnyenye ɖo atsyɔ̃e

Job40:12 Lé ŋku ɖe dadalawo katã dzi

Job40:20 Elabena nuɖuɖu miena ɖe towo dzi ne eye gbemelãwo katã ɖia adzrɔ le afima.

Job42:4 Ɖo to

Psalms9:11 Amesiwo dze si wò ŋkɔ la

Psalms9:13 Elabena ebia hlɔ̃ hlɔ̃dolawo

Psalms10:1 Yehowa
Psalms10:2 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe dada doa dzikatsoƒoe na hiãtɔwo; woatsɔ woawo ŋutɔ ƒe aye
Psalms10:3 Elabena ame vɔ̃ɖi tsoa eƒe dzimedidiwo ƒoa adegbee
Psalms10:4 Ame vɔ̃ɖi buna le eƒe dada me be: Mabia eta ase o
Psalms10:5 Eƒe nuwɔwɔ dzea dzi nɛ ɣesiaɣi; wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ le dziƒo ʋi tso egbɔ
Psalms10:6 Egblɔna le eƒe dzi me bena: Ke maɖe le tenye akpɔ o
Psalms10:7 Ɖiŋudodo
Psalms10:8 Enɔa xa me ɖe agblekɔƒewo xa
Psalms10:9 Edea xa ɖe ɣaɣlɛƒe abe dzata le eve dodoe me ene
Psalms10:10 Eƒonɛ ƒua anyi
Psalms10:11 Egblɔna le eƒe dzi me be: Mawu ƒe ŋku dzo le edzi
Psalms10:12 Yehowa
Psalms10:13 Nukaŋuti ame vɔ̃ɖi le alɔme ɖem le Mawu ŋu le gbɔgblɔm le eƒe dzi me be
Psalms10:14 Ekpɔe
Psalms10:15 Ŋe abɔ na eme vɔ̃ɖi kple nuvɔ̃wɔla; ɖe àdi eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ
Psalms10:16 Yehowa enye fia tegbetegbe
Psalms10:17 Wò Yehowa
Psalms10:18 ne natso afia na tsyɔ̃eviwo kple hiãtɔwo
Psalms11:1 Dawid tɔ na henɔ la. Yehowae mesi tso. Aleke miele gbɔgblɔm nam be: Misi yi miaƒe towo dzi abe xevi ene?
Psalms11:2 Elabena ame vɔ̃ɖiwo vu da me
Psalms11:3 Elabena wogbã gɔmeɖoɖoanyiwo ke hã
Psalms11:4 Yehowa le eƒe gbedoxɔ kɔkɔe la me
Psalms11:5 Yehowa doa ame dzɔdzɔe kpɔna
Psalms11:6 Ana dzoka nadza ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo dzi
Psalms11:7 Elabena Yehowa enye nuteƒewɔla
Psalms12:1 Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la
Psalms12:2 Yehowa
Psalms12:3 Amesiame vivia nume henɔa aʋatso kam na nɔvia
Psalms12:4 Yehowa netsrɔ nume ŋanɛ tɔwo kple aɖe
Psalms12:5 amesiwo gblɔna be: Míaƒe aɖewo doa ŋusẽ mí
Psalms12:6 Yehowa be: Metso azɔ le ŋutasesẽ le hiãtɔwo ŋu kple ame dahewo ƒe hũɖeɖe ta
Psalms12:7 Yehowa ƒe nyawo dza abe klosalo
Psalms12:8 Oo

Psalms13:4 Kpɔm ɖa
Psalms13:5 Ne nye futɔ magagblɔ be: „Mede enu“ o

Psalms14:1 Dawid tɔ na henɔ la. Abunetɔwo gblɔna le woƒe dzi me be: Mawua ɖeke meli o. Wowɔa nu gbegblẽwo kple nu nyɔŋuwo. Amea ɖeke meli

Psalms17:1 Dawid ƒe gbedodoɖa. Yehowa

Psalms17:5 Nye afɔɖeɖewo li ɖe wò mɔwo dzi zã

Psalms18:20 Ekplɔm yi dogba dzi

Psalms18:22 Elabena mele ŋku ɖe Yehowa ƒe mɔwo ŋu
Psalms18:23 Wò sewo katã le ŋkunye me
Psalms18:24 Fɔɖiɖia ɖeke mele ŋunye le eŋku me o
Psalms18:25 Ale Yehowa ɖo eteƒe nam le nye dzɔdzɔenyenye kple nye asi dzadzɛ

Psalms18:29 Ena nye akaɖi klẽ; Yehowa
Psalms18:30 Elabena wòe li kplim meƒua du ɖe aʋakɔwo dzi; nye Mawu li kplim metia kpo flɔa gli!
Psalms18:31 Fɔɖiɖi mele Mawu ƒe mɔ ŋu o
Psalms18:32 Elabena Mawu kae li kpe ɖe Yehowa ŋu
Psalms18:33 Mawu tsa ŋusẽ bla ali dzi nam
Psalms18:34 Ewo nye afa abe zinɔwo tɔ ene
Psalms18:35 Efia aʋawɔwɔ nye asi kple ɖa me vuvu nye alɔ.
Psalms18:36 Etsɔ wò xɔname ƒe akpoxɔnu nam
Psalms18:37 Ena nye afɔɖeɖe me keke le tenye
Psalms18:38 Meli nye futɔwo yome ɖatu wo
Psalms18:39 Megbã wo nyanyanya
Psalms18:40 Etsɔ ŋusẽ bla ali dzi nam ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ŋu
Psalms18:41 Ena nye futɔwo trɔ ʋume ɖem

Psalms18:46 Nu te du bubu me viwo ŋu

Psalms28:1 Dawid tɔ. Yehowa
Psalms28:2 Se nye kokoƒogbe
Psalms28:3 Megakplɔm kpe ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi kple nu vlo wɔlawo ŋu o
Psalms28:4 Wɔ na wo le woƒe nuwɔnawo kple nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo nu; wɔ na wo le woƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo nu
Psalms28:5 Elabena womelé ŋku ɖe Yehowa ƒe nuwɔwɔwo kple eƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo ŋu o. Agbã wo
Psalms28:6 Woakafu Yehowa
Psalms28:7 Yehowa enye nye ŋusẽ kple nye akpoxɔnu
Psalms28:8 Yehowa enye ŋusẽ na eƒe dukɔ; eya nye mɔ̃ kple xɔname na eƒe amesiamina.
Psalms28:9 Xɔ na wò dukɔ
Psalms29:1 Dawid ƒe ha. Mi mawuviwo
Psalms29:2 Mitsɔ Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ ŋu bubu nɛ; mide ta agu na Yehowa le atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo kɔkɔe me
Psalms29:3 Yehowa ƒe gbe di ɖe tsiwo dzi; bubu ƒe Mawu la ɖe gbe
Psalms29:4 Yehowa ƒe gbe ɖi kple ŋusẽ
Psalms29:5 Yehowa ƒe gbe ŋe seɖertiwo
Psalms29:6 Ena woti kpo abe nyivi ene
Psalms29:7 Yehowa ƒe gbe ke dzo mia.
Psalms29:8 Yehowa ƒe gbe na gbedzi ʋuʋu
Psalms29:9 Yehowa ƒe gbe na fu ɖu zinɔwo
Psalms29:10 Yehowa bɔbɔ nɔ anyi gli ɖe tɔɖɔɖɔ dzi; Yehowa bɔbɔ nɔ anyi gli abe fia ene tegbee.
Psalms29:11 Yehowa atsɔ ŋusẽ na eƒe dukɔ; Yehowa atsɔ ŋutifafa ayra eƒe dukɔ!

Psalms31:6 Metsɔ nye gbɔgbɔ le asiwò me dem; Yehowa
Psalms31:7 Melé fu amesiwo ku ɖe nu maɖinuwo ŋu la; ke nyea meɖo ŋu ɖe Yehowa ŋu.

Psalms42:1 Korax-viwo ƒe nufiameha na henɔ la.
Psalms42:2 Alesi zinɔ ƒe veme ƒuna ɖe tɔʋu ŋu la
Psalms42:3 Tsikɔ le nye luʋɔ wum ɖe Mawu ŋu
Psalms42:4 Nye aɖatsiwo zu nuɖuɖu nam zã kple keli
Psalms42:5 Ne meɖo ŋu
Psalms42:6 Nye luʋɔ
Psalms42:7 Mawunye! Nye luʋɔ le nu xam le menye
Psalms42:8 Le wò tsiwo ƒe kɔkɔɖanyi bababa me la tɔɖɔɖɔ yɔ tɔɖɔɖɔ; wò tsi kpakawo kple tsitsotsoewo ŋe ɖe dzinye.

Psalms44:1 Korax-viwo ƒe nufiameha na henɔ la.
Psalms44:2 Mawu
Psalms44:3 Etsɔ wò asi nyã dukɔwo
Psalms44:4 Elabena menye woawo ŋutɔ ƒe yi wotsɔ xɔ anyigba lae o
Psalms44:5 Mawu
Psalms44:6 Wòe míatsɔ aƒu míaƒe futɔwo anyii
Psalms44:7 Elabena nyemele ŋu ɖom ɖe nye dati ŋu o
Psalms44:8 ke boŋ wòe xɔ mí tso míaƒe futɔwo si me
Psalms44:9 Míetsɔ Mawu le adegbe ƒomi ɖaa
Psalms44:10 Ke ètsɔ mí ƒu gbe
Psalms44:11 Ena míede megbe le míaƒe futɔwo nu
Psalms44:12 Etsɔ mí na
Psalms44:13 Etsɔ wò dukɔ dzra ho kpɔtsɔe
Psalms44:14 Etsɔ mí wɔ vlodonu na míaƒe aƒelikawo kple alɔmeɖenu kpakple nu ɖikokoea na amesiwo ƒo xlã mi.
Psalms44:15 Etsɔ mí wɔ hameloe le dukɔwo dome kple ame
Psalms44:16 Nye vlododo le ŋkunye me ŋkekeawo katã
Psalms44:17 be manɔ vlodoamela kple fewuɖula ŋkɔ sem
Psalms44:18 Nusiawo katã va mía dzi
Psalms44:19 Míaƒe dzi mefe ɖa o
Psalms44:20 Elabena èto mí nyanyanya le amegãxiwo nɔƒe
Psalms44:21 Ɖe wònye ɖe míeŋlɔ mía Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ be
Psalms44:22 enye ne mía Mawu madi egɔme oa? Elabena enya dzi me gogloeaƒe ke.
Psalms44:23 Elabena tawò wole mía wum atraɖi ɖaa
Psalms44:24 Nyɔ
Psalms44:25 Nukaŋuti nèɣla wò ŋku me
Psalms44:26 Elabena míaƒe luʋɔ bɔbɔ vaseɖe ke me ke
Psalms44:27 Tso
Psalms45:1 Korax-viwo ƒe nufiameha
Psalms45:2 Nya nyuiwo le fiefiẽm le nye dzi me wlɔwlɔwlɔ. Mebe: Nye hawo nye fia la tɔ; nye aɖe enye amesi bi ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ me la

Psalms45:4 Ta wò yi

Psalms78:28 Ena woge dze woƒe asaɖa titina ƒo xlã woƒe nɔƒewo.
Psalms78:29 Ale wuɖui ɖi ƒo taŋ
Psalms78:30 Woƒe nudzodzro la nu mekpɔ yi haɖe o

Psalms78:33 Eyata wòna woƒe ŋkekewo bu ɖe gbahlaya me kple woƒe ƒewo ɖe ŋɔdzi me.

Psalms78:37 ke woƒe dzi meku de eŋu tsehe o

Psalms78:39 Eɖoa ŋku edzi be
Psalms78:40 Zi nenie womehedze aglã ɖe eŋu le gbeadzi
Psalms78:41 Wole Mawu tetekpɔ dzi ɖaa
Psalms78:42 Womeɖo ŋku eƒe asi dzi le gbesigbe wòɖe wo tso ketɔ la si me
Psalms78:43 esime wòwɔ eƒe dzesiwo le Egipte kple eƒe nukunuwo le Zoan-tagba la o.
Psalms78:44 Ene woƒe tɔsisiwo trɔ zu ʋu
Psalms78:45 Eɖo togbatowo ɖe wo dome woɖu wo
Psalms78:46 Etsɔ woƒe numiemiewo na ʋetrawo kple woƒe agblemenuwo na ʋetsuviwo.
Psalms78:47 Eto woƒe weinkawo nyanyanya kple dzikpe
Psalms78:48 Etsɔ woƒe lãwo na dzikpe kple woƒe lãhawo na dzikedzo.
Psalms78:49 Eɖo eƒe dɔmedzoe heliheli
Psalms78:50 Eɖe mɔ na eƒe dɔmedzoe

Psalms78:52 Ena eƒe dukɔ ho abe alẽwo ene

Psalms78:60 eye wògblẽ nɔƒe

Psalms78:62 Etsɔ ete dukɔ de asi na yi
Psalms78:63 Dzo fiã eƒe ɖekakpuiwo
Psalms78:64 Eƒe nunɔlawo tsi yi nu

Psalms78:66 eye wònyã eƒe futɔwo ɖe megbe; ŋukpe mavɔe wòdo wo.

Psalms79:1 Asaƒ ƒe ha. Mawu
Psalms79:2 Wotsɔ wò dɔlawo ƒe kukuawo na dziƒoxewo
Psalms79:3 Wokɔ woƒe nu ɖe Yerusalem ŋu goɖoo abe tsi ene
Psalms79:4 Míezu ŋukpe na míaƒe aƒelikawo kple alɔmeɖenu kpakple vlododo na amesiwo ƒo xlã mi?
Psalms79:5 Yehowa
Psalms79:6 Trɔ wò dziku heliheli la kɔ ɖe dukɔ
Psalms79:7 Elabena womi Yakob
Psalms79:8 Megaɖi tsãtɔwo ƒe vodadawo na mí o! Netsɔ

Psalms101:1 Dawid ƒe ha. Madzi ha le amenuveve kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ŋu

Psalms101:3 Nyemetsɔ nu tovo aɖo ŋku me o

Psalms102:8 Alɔ̃dɔdɔ zu dɔ

Psalms102:20 Elabena ekpɔ nu tso eƒe kɔkɔƒe kɔkɔe la

Psalms102:22 ne woaxlẽ nya afia le Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ ŋu le Zion kple eƒe kafukafu ŋu le Yerusalem

Psalms103:1 Dawid tɔ. Luʋɔnye
Psalms103:2 Luʋɔnye

Psalms104:22 Ne ɣe dze la

Psalms105:1 Mida akpe na Yehowa

Psalms105:7 eya nye Yehowa
Psalms105:8 Aɖo ŋu eƒe nubabla
Psalms105:9 nu

Psalms105:11 hegblɔ bena: Wòe matsɔ Kanaan-nyigba na
Psalms105:12 Esime womede ha o
Psalms105:13 eye woho tso dukɔ gbɔ yi dukɔ gbɔ
Psalms105:14 mana amea ɖeke te wo ɖe anyi o
Psalms105:15 Migaka asi nye amesiaminawo ŋu o
Psalms105:16 Eyɔ dɔwuame va anyigba dzi
Psalms105:17 Edɔ ŋutsua ɖe ɖe wo ŋgɔ; wotsɔ Yosef dzra kluvii.
Psalms105:18 Womimi eƒe afɔ ɖe atiboli ŋu
Psalms105:19 vaseɖe ɣeyiɣi
Psalms105:20 Tete fia la ɖɔ woɖaɖee
Psalms105:21 Etsɔe ɖo aƒetɔ ɖe eƒe aƒe nu kple eƒe nuwo katã dzikpɔlae
Psalms105:22 ne wòabla eƒe amegãwo
Psalms105:23 Eye Israel va Egipte
Psalms105:24 Eye wòna eƒe dukɔ dzi ŋutɔ

Psalms105:26 Edɔ eƒe dɔla Mose kple Aron
Psalms105:27 Ewɔ eƒe dzesiwo le wo dome kple nukunuwo le Xam-nyigba dzi.
Psalms105:28 Eɖo viviti ɖa
Psalms105:29 Ena woƒe towo zu ʋu
Psalms105:30 Woƒe anyigba dzi gblẽ kple akpɔkplɔwo
Psalms105:31 Eƒo nu
Psalms105:32 Ena tsikpewo wu ɖe tsidzadza teƒe kple dzoƒaɖewo ɖe woƒe anyigba dzi.
Psalms105:33 Eƒo woƒe weinkawo kple gbotiwo ƒu anyi
Psalms105:34 Eƒo nu
Psalms105:35 eve woɖu numiemiewo katã le woƒe anyigba dzi
Psalms105:36 Ewo ŋgɔgbeviwo katã lewoƒe anyigba dzi
Psalms105:37 Ekplɔ wo dzoe kple klosalo kple sika
Psalms105:38 Dzi dzɔ Egipte le woƒe ʋuʋu la ta
Psalms105:39 Ekeke alilikpo tsyɔ wo dzi
Psalms105:40 Wobia nu
Psalms105:41 Enu agakpe nu
Psalms105:42 Elabena eɖo ŋku eƒe nya kɔkɔe
Psalms105:43 Eye wòkplɔ eƒe dukɔ la le dzidzɔ me kple eƒe ame dadawo le aseyetsotso me.
Psalms105:44 Etsɔ dukɔwo ƒe anyigbawo na wo
Psalms105:45 ne woalé ŋku ɖe eƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu
Psalms106:1 Mikafu Yehowa! Miɖa akpe na Yehowa
Psalms106:2 Amekae ate ŋu agblɔ Yehowa ƒe nutsuwɔwɔwo ade goe
Psalms106:3 Woayrã amesiwo léa se la me ɖe asi
Psalms106:4 Yehowa
Psalms106:5 ne makpɔ wò ame tiatiawo ƒe dzɔgbenyuie
Psalms106:6 Míewɔ nuvɔ̃ kpe ɖe mía fofowo ŋu
Psalms106:7 Mía fofowo melé ŋku ɖe wò nukunuwo ŋule Egipte o
Psalms106:8 Ke exɔ na wo le eƒe ŋkɔ la ta
Psalms106:9 Eblu ɖe Avaƒu la ta wòmle
Psalms106:10 Exɔ na wo tso ketɔ la si me
Psalms106:11 Tsi nye tsyo woƒe adikãtɔwo dzi
Psalms106:12 eye woxɔ eƒe nyawo dzi se hedzi ha le eƒe kafukafu ŋu.
Psalms106:13 Woŋlɔ eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo be kaba
Psalms106:14 Wodzro nu le gbedzi
Psalms106:15 Ewɔ woƒe didi dzi na wo
Psalms106:16 Eye woʋã ŋu Mose le asaɖa me kple Yehowa ƒe ame kɔkɔe Aron.
Psalms106:17 Anyigba ke nu hemi Datan
Psalms106:18 Dzo bi woƒe amehawo
Psalms106:19 Wowɔ nyivi le Xoreb gbɔ
Psalms106:20 Eye wotsɔ woƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ɖɔ li nyitsu
Psalms106:21 Woƒe ŋku dzo le Mawu
Psalms106:22 amesi wɔ nukunuwo le Xam-nyigba dzi kple nu dziŋɔwo le Avaƒu la nu.
Psalms106:23 Tete wòbe
Psalms106:24 Wodo vlo anyigba nyo la

Psalms106:27 yeakaka wo viwo ɖe dukɔwo dome
Psalms106:28 Woku ɖe Baal-Peor ŋu
Psalms106:29 wotsɔ woƒe nuwɔwɔwo ɖo dziku nɛ
Psalms106:30 Tete Pinexas tso hetso nyo la me
Psalms106:31 Eye wobui dzɔdzɔenyenye na eya kple eƒe dzidzimeviwo katã tegbee.
Psalms106:32 Wodo dziku nɛ le dzrewɔtsi la gbɔ
Psalms106:33 Wodo dziku na eƒe gbɔgbɔ
Psalms106:34 Wometsrɔ̃ dukɔwo
Psalms106:35 ke boŋ wotsaka kple dukɔwo
Psalms106:36 Wosubɔ woƒe legbawo
Psalms106:37 Eye wotsɔ woƒe ŋutsuviwo kple woƒe nyɔnuviwo sa vɔ na gbetsiwo.
Psalms106:38 Wokɔ nu maɖifɔ ɖi
Psalms106:39 Wotsɔ woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ƒo di wo ɖokui
Psalms106:40 Tete Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe bi ɖe eƒe dukɔ la ŋu
Psalms106:41 Etsɔ wo de asi na dukɔwo
Psalms106:42 Woƒe futɔwo xaxa wo ɖo
Psalms106:43 Exɔ na wo zi geɖe; ke woawo se to le woƒe aɖaŋudedewo nu

Psalms106:45 Eɖo ŋu eƒe nubabla le wo ta

Psalms106:47 Yehowa
Psalms106:48 Woakafu Yehowa
Psalms107:1 Mida akpe na Yehowa
Psalms107:2 Amesiwo Yehowa de la
Psalms107:3 eye wòƒo wo nu ƒu tso anyigbawo dzi
Psalms107:4 Wotre mɔ le gbedzi kple gbedadaƒo
Psalms107:5 Dɔ kple tsikɔ wu wo
Psalms107:6 Tete wodo ɣli na Yehowa le woƒe hiã me; eɖe wo tso woƒe xaxa me
Psalms107:7 hekplɔ wo to mɔtata dzi
Psalms107:8 Woawo neda akpe na Yehowa le eƒe amenuveve kple eƒe nukunu
Psalms107:9 Elabena ena luʋɔ tsikɔwuwo ɖi kɔ
Psalms107:10 Wobɔbɔ nɔ viviti kple blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi me
Psalms107:11 Elabena wosẽ to ɖe Mawu ƒe nyawo ŋu
Psalms107:12 ale be wòtsɔ hiãkame bɔbɔ woƒe dzi ɖe anyi
Psalms107:13 Tete woɖo ɣli na Yehowa le woƒe hiã me
Psalms107:14 Eɖe wo tso viviti kple blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi me
Psalms107:15 Woawo neda akpe na Yehowa le eƒe amenuveve kple eƒe nukunu
Psalms107:16 Elabena egbã akɔbligbowo
Psalms107:17 Bometsilawo wonye
Psalms107:18 Nuɖuɖuwo katã nyɔ ŋu na woƒe luʋɔ
Psalms107:19 Tete wodo ɣli na Yehowa le woƒe hiã me
Psalms107:20 Edo eƒe nya da wòyɔ dɔ wo
Psalms107:21 Woawo neda akpe na Yehowa le eƒe amenuveve kple eƒe nukunu
Psalms107:22 woawo nesa akpedavɔ
Psalms107:23 Wole ʋuwo me zɔ atsiaƒu dzi
Psalms107:24 Wokpɔ Yehowa ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo kple eƒe nukunuwo le tɔ gɔme.
Psalms107:25 Eƒo nu
Psalms107:26 Woyi dzi hoo hedze abu me; woƒe luʋɔ lolo gbanaa le xaxa me.
Psalms107:27 Wole totrom le ya nu
Psalms107:28 Tete wodo ɣli na Yehowa le woƒe hiã me
Psalms107:29 Ena ahom la dze anyi kpoo
Psalms107:30 Dzi dzɔ wo be
Psalms107:31 Woada akpe na Yehowa le eƒe amenuveve kple eƒe nukunu
Psalms107:32 woadoe ɖe dzi le dukɔ la ƒe takpekpe me
Psalms107:33 Ewɔ tɔsisiwo wòzu gbegbe kple tsidzɔƒewo wozu kuɖinyigba
Psalms107:34 anyigba wɔnu zu dzeƒee le edzinɔlawo ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ta.
Psalms107:35 Etrɔ gbegbe wòzu tsi ta kple kuɖinyigba wòzu tsidzɔƒe.
Psalms107:36 Etsɔ dɔwuitɔwo ɖo afima
Psalms107:37 woaƒã nu ɖe agble me
Psalms107:38 Eyra wo
Psalms107:39 Wozu ʋee
Psalms107:40 Etrɔ vlododo kɔ ɖe ame ŋkutɔwo dzi
Psalms107:41 Ke ekɔ ame dahe ɖe dzi tso hiã me
Psalms107:42 Dzime dzɔdzɔe tɔwo kpɔe
Psalms107:43 Amesi nye nunyala la

Psalms108:2 Mawu
Psalms108:3 Saŋku kple kasaŋku
Psalms108:4 Yehowa

Psalms108:6 Oo Mawu
Psalms108:7 Ne woaxe na wò ame lɔlɔ̃wo; tsɔ wò nuɖusi ɖe mí

Psalms108:9 Gilead enye tɔnye
Psalms108:10 nye tsileze enye Moab
Psalms108:11 Amekae akplɔm ayi du sesẽ la mee
Psalms108:12 Mawu
Psalms108:13 Kpe ɖe mía ŋu ɖe míaƒe ketɔwo ŋuti
Psalms108:14 Mawue míatsɔ awɔ kalẽe
Psalms109:1 Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la. Wò
Psalms109:2 Elabena ame vɔ̃ɖiwo kple alakpadalawo ƒe nu ke ɖe ŋunye
Psalms109:3 Wotsɔ fuléamenyawo ɖe to ɖem
Psalms109:4 Wolém ɖe ke me ɖe nye lɔlɔ̃ teƒe; gbedodoɖa sɔŋ ko nyama mezu.
Psalms109:5 Wotsɔ vɔ̃ ɖo nyui teƒe nam kple fuléle ɖo nye lɔlɔ̃ teƒe.
Psalms109:6 Da ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖe eŋu
Psalms109:7 Nenye ame ɖifɔ le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me
Psalms109:8 Eƒe ŋkekewo nezu ʋee
Psalms109:9 Viawo nezu tsyɔ̃eviwo
Psalms109:10 Viawo nenɔ tsa glãla tsam anɔ nu biam
Psalms109:11 Fetɔ nehe eƒe nuwo katã ɖe akɔme
Psalms109:12 Amea ɖeke meganɔ anyi nɛ
Psalms109:13 Woatsrɔ̃ eƒe dzidzimeviwo
Psalms109:14 Woaɖo ŋu fofoawo ƒe vodada le Yehowa gbɔ
Psalms109:15 ke boŋ woana Yehowa ŋku me ɖaa
Psalms109:16 Elabena meɖo ŋku dɔmenyowɔwɔ dzi o
Psalms109:17 Elɔ̃ fiƒode
Psalms109:18 Eta fiƒode abe avɔ ene
Psalms109:19 Nenye eƒe avɔ
Psalms109:20 Esia nenye nye ketɔwo kple amesiwo le nye gblɔm ɖe ŋunye la
Psalms109:21 Ke wò
Psalms109:22 Elabena hiãkpela kple ame dahe menye
Psalms109:23 Nenye yi abe vɔvɔli
Psalms109:24 Nye klo zu hehe le nutsitsidɔ ta
Psalms109:25 Nyea mezu alɔmeɖenu na wo
Psalms109:26 Kpe ɖe ŋunye
Psalms109:27 Ekema woadze sii be
Psalms109:28 Woaƒo fi ade faa
Psalms109:29 Nye ketɔwo ata vlododo
Psalms109:30 Matsɔ nye nu ada akpe na Yehowa vevie
Psalms109:31 Elabena ele tsitre ɖe ame dahe la ƒe nuɖusi me
Psalms110:1 Dawid ƒe ha. Yehowa gblɔ na nye Aƒetɔ be: Bɔbɔ nɔ nye nuɖusi me
Psalms110:2 Yehowa ado wò ŋusẽ ƒe fiatikplɔ da tso Zion be: Ɖu fia le wo futɔwo titina!
Psalms110:3 Wò dukɔ atsɔ eɖokui ake wò le wò aʋakpegbe
Psalms110:4 Yehowa ka atam
Psalms110:5 Aƒetɔ la le wò nuɖusi me
Psalms110:6 Adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le dukɔwo dome; atsɔ ame kukuwo ayɔ teƒe kekewoe
Psalms110:7 Tɔʋu
Psalms111:1 Mikafu Yehowa! Makafu Yehowa tso dzi blibo me le dzime dzɔdzɔe tɔwo ƒe adaŋu me kple amehawo dome.
Psalms111:2 Yehowa ƒe dɔwɔwɔ lolo
Psalms111:3 Gãnyenye kple atsyɔ̃ nye eƒe nuwɔwɔ
Psalms111:4 Edo ŋkuɖodzinu eƒe nukunuwo ŋu
Psalms111:5 Ena nuɖuɖu amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ la; eɖoa ŋku eƒe nubabla dzi tegbee.

Proverbs12:11 Amesi de eƒe agble la
Proverbs12:12 Nu vlo wɔlawo ƒe aboyonu le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo dzrom; ke ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe ke adze.
Proverbs12:13 Nuyiwo ƒe ɖaɖaƒu enye mɔ̃ na vɔ̃ɖitɔ la; ke ame dzɔdzɔe sina le hiã nu.
Proverbs12:14 Amegbetɔ ƒe nu ƒe kutsetse hea nyui vana nɛ taŋtaŋ
Proverbs12:15 Bometsila ƒe mɔ dzɔna le eya ŋutɔ ŋku me; ke nunyala doa to aɖaŋuɖoɖo.
Proverbs12:16 Bometsila mesea dzikudodo o; ke amesi ɣlaa eƒe dzu la
Proverbs12:17 Amesi nu nyateƒe donu le la
Proverbs12:18 Amea
Proverbs12:19 Nyateƒenuyi anɔ anyi tegbee; ke alakpaɖe anɔ anyi aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka ko.
Proverbs12:20 Alakpa le dzi me na amesiwo ɖo vɔ̃wɔwɔ; ke amesiwo ɖea adaŋu le ŋutifafa ŋu la
Proverbs12:21 Vɔ̃a ɖeke mekpe ame dzɔdzɔe o; ke ame vɔ̃ɖiwo la
Proverbs12:22 Alakpanuyiwo nye ŋunyɔ na Yehowa; ke amesiwo wɔa nuteƒe ƒe nu nyoa eŋu
Proverbs12:23 Nunyala mekɔa nu le eƒe sidzedze dzi o; ke bometsila ƒe dzi doa boblo eƒe bometsitsi.
Proverbs12:24 Veviedola ƒe asi aɖu fia; ke kuviatɔ adzɔ nu.
Proverbs12:25 Nuxaxa le dzi me tea ame ɖe anyi; ke xɔlɔ̃nya doa dzidzɔ na ame.
Proverbs12:26 Ame dzɔdzɔe tsaa ŋu na eƒe lãnyiƒe; ke ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe mɔ kplɔa wo tranae.
Proverbs12:27 Kuviatɔ memea eƒe adelã o; ke veviedodo la nu xɔasi wònye na amegbetɔ.
Proverbs12:28 Agbe le dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe mɔ dzi; ke mɔ dzeɖexɛ kplɔa ame yia ku mee.
Proverbs13:1 Yi nyanu sea fofoa ƒe amehehe; ke mokaname metsɔa fu ɖe fewuɖula ŋu o.
Proverbs13:2 Ame ƒe nu ƒe kutsetse wotsɔna ɖua nu nyui; ke ame mawɔnuteƒewo ƒe dzodzro enye ŋutasesẽ.
Proverbs13:3 Amesi kpɔa eƒe nu dzi la
Proverbs13:4 Nu le kuviatɔ dzrom
Proverbs13:5 Ame dzɔdzɔe la léa fu alakpanya; ke ame vɔ̃ɖe la dea dzu kple ŋukpe eɖokui ŋu.
Proverbs13:6 Dzɔdzɔenyenye kpɔa amesiwo fɔɖiɖi mele woƒe zɔzɔme ŋu o la ta; ke nu tovo wɔwɔ ƒua nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo anyi.
Proverbs13:7 Amea ɖewo ɖoa kesinɔtɔ wo ɖokui
Proverbs13:8 Kesinɔnu ame tsɔna ɖea eƒe agbee; ke ame dahe mesea ŋɔdzidonyaa ɖeke o.
Proverbs13:9 Ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe kekeli klẽna nyuie; ke eme vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe akaɖi tsina.
Proverbs13:10 Dadala dzre sɔŋ ko wòhena vɛ; ke nunya le emesiwo nana woɖoa aɖaŋu na wo la dome.
Proverbs13:11 Kesinɔnu
Proverbs13:12 Lala vivivo ɖe wòdoa veve na dzi; ke didi
Proverbs13:13 Amesi doa vlo nya la
Proverbs13:14 Nunyala ƒe nu fia me la
Proverbs13:15 Gɔmesese nyui hea ŋudzedzekpɔkpɔ vɛ; ke ame mawɔnuteƒewo ƒe mɔ kplɔa wo dea gbegblẽ me.
Proverbs13:16 Nugɔmeselɛ wɔa nu ɖe nunya me; ke bometsila tsɔa bometsitsi doa bobloe.
Proverbs13:17 Duxɔla vɔ̃ɖi gena ɖe dzɔgbevɔ̃e me; ke duxɔla nyateƒetɔ daa gbe le ame ŋu.
Proverbs13:18 Ahedada kple ŋukpe ava amesi gbe amehehe la dzi; ke amesi bu mokaname la
Proverbs13:19 Ne ame ƒe didi va me la
Proverbs13:20 Ne èzɔ kple nunyalawo la
Proverbs13:21 Dzɔgbevɔe tia nuvɔwɔlawo yome; ke etsɔa nyui tua fe na eme dzɔdzɔewo.
Proverbs13:22 Viwo ƒe viwo nyia dɔmenyotɔ ƒe dome; ke wodzraa nuvɔ̃wɔla ƒe nuwo ɖo ne ame dzɔdzɔe.
Proverbs13:23 Agble yeye me nu naa nuɖuɖu eme dahewo fu; ke amea ɖewo tsrɔ̃na to woƒe nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ me.
Proverbs13:24 Amesi vea nu le eƒe ameƒoti gbɔ la
Proverbs13:25 Nu le ame dzɔdzɔe si wòaɖu aɖi ƒo; ke dɔkoe le ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe ƒodo wɔm.
Proverbs14:1 Nyɔnuwo ƒe nunya tua woƒe xɔ; ke bometsitsi tsɔa eya ŋutɔ ƒe asi gbãnɛ ƒua anyi.

Proverbs14:3 Bometsila ƒe nu enye ameƒoti hena eƒe dàda; ke nunyalawo ƒe nuyi kpoa wo dzi.

Proverbs14:15 Amebebewu xɔa nya sia nya dzi sena; ke nunyala léa ŋku ɖè eƒe afɔɖeɖe ŋu.

Ecclesiastes12:14 Elabena Mawu le nuwɔwɔwo katã
SongOfSongs1:1 Salomo hawo ƒe ha.
SongOfSongs1:2 Etsɔ wo nu gbugbɔ nu nam
SongOfSongs1:3 Wò ami le ya ɖem nyuie; wo ŋkɔ le abe ami
SongOfSongs1:4 Kplɔm yii
SongOfSongs1:5 Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo
SongOfSongs1:6 Migamɔ kpɔyem be
SongOfSongs1:7 Wò
SongOfSongs1:8 Wò tugbedzɛ le nyɔnuwo dome
SongOfSongs1:9 Xɔ̃nye
SongOfSongs1:10 Dzonu le tonu na wò nyuie
SongOfSongs1:11 Míatu sikakɔsɔkɔsɔ kple klosalokpeviwo na wò.
SongOfSongs1:12 Esime fia la bɔbɔ nɔ eƒe ablegɔ me la
SongOfSongs1:13 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ le ahe miregoe le akɔnu nam ene.
SongOfSongs1:14 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ nye koferseƒoƒo nam le Engedi-weingblewo me.
SongOfSongs1:15 Edze tugbe
SongOfSongs1:16 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ
SongOfSongs1:17 Míaƒe xɔ ƒe daɖedziwo nye sedertiwo
SongOfSongs2:1 Nyee nye seƒoƒo le Saron kple dzogbenya le baliwo me.
SongOfSongs2:2 Alesi dzogbenya noa aŋɔka mea le nenema xɔ̃nye le nyɔnuviwo domee.
SongOfSongs2:3 Alesi atɔlɔŋutiti le avemetiwo domee la
SongOfSongs2:4 Ekplɔm yi weinxɔ me
SongOfSongs2:5 Mi tso weintsetsebolo de agbe ŋunye
SongOfSongs2:6 Etsɔ eƒe mía de nye ta te
SongOfSongs2:7 Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo
SongOfSongs2:8 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ ŋkɔ le ɖiɖim! Kpɔ ɖa
SongOfSongs2:9 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ le abe sãde alo zivi ene
SongOfSongs2:10 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ xɔ edzi gblɔ nam bena: Xɔ̃nye
SongOfSongs2:11 Elabena vuvɔŋɔli yi aƒe
SongOfSongs2:12 Seƒoƒowo ɖo ɖe anyigba dzi
SongOfSongs2:13 Gboti ƒe tsetsewo ɖe asi ɖiɖi me
SongOfSongs2:14 Nye ahɔne le kpetowo me
SongOfSongs2:15 Milé abeiwo na mi
SongOfSongs2:16 Tɔnyee nye nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ la
SongOfSongs2:17 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ
SongOfSongs3:1 Meɖi amesi nye luʋɔ lɔna la
SongOfSongs3:2 Eyata mafa aɖatsa le dua me le ablɔ me kple kpɔdomewo
SongOfSongs3:3 Dzɔla
SongOfSongs3:4 Nyemekpɔ to wo ŋu yi o
SongOfSongs3:5 Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo
SongOfSongs3:6 Amekae nye ekem tso gbe me gbɔna abe dzudzɔ babla ene
SongOfSongs3:7 Kpo da
SongOfSongs3:8 Wo katã wobi de aʋawɔwɔ me
SongOfSongs3:9 Fia Salomo na wotso Libanon-ti kpa atiklãe.
SongOfSongs3:10 Ele alɔwo nye klosalo
SongOfSongs3:11 Mi Zion-nyɔnuviwo
SongOfSongs4:1 Èdze tugbe
SongOfSongs4:2 Wò aɖuwo le abe alẽha
SongOfSongs4:3 Wò nuyiwo le abe ka dzẽ ene
SongOfSongs4:4 Wò ka le abe Dawid ƒe xɔ tsrala
SongOfSongs4:5 Wò nowo le abe sãdevi eve
SongOfSongs4:6 Mayi atike ʋeʋẽe towo kple dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe donu togbɛwo dzi
SongOfSongs4:7 Xɔ̃nye
SongOfSongs4:8 Ɖi kplim tso Libanon dzi
SongOfSongs4:9 Nɔvinyenyɔnu
SongOfSongs4:10 Nɔyinyenyɔnu
SongOfSongs4:11 Ŋugbetɔ
SongOfSongs4:12 Nɔvinyenyɔnu
SongOfSongs4:13 Wò numiemiewo nye yevuboɖabɔ
SongOfSongs4:14 gbe ʋeʋẽewo kple agumetaku
SongOfSongs4:15 Abɔ me tsidzidzi
SongOfSongs4:16 Anyieheya
SongOfSongs4:17 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ va eƒe abɔ me
SongOfSongs5:1 Nɔvinyenyɔnu
SongOfSongs5:2 Mele alɔ̃ dɔm
SongOfSongs5:3 Meɖe nye avɔwo ɖi
SongOfSongs5:4 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ do asi ɖe fesre nu
SongOfSongs5:5 Mefa
SongOfSongs5:6 Meʋu ʋɔa na nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ
SongOfSongs5:7 Dzɔla
SongOfSongs5:8 Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo
SongOfSongs5:9 Nyɔnuwo ƒe tughedzɛ
SongOfSongs5:10 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ fu
SongOfSongs5:11 eƒe ta enye sika nyuitɔ
SongOfSongs5:12 eƒe ŋkuwo le abe ahɔne le tɔʋu to ene
SongOfSongs5:13 eƒe alɔgo enye atike ʋeʋẽe kpo
SongOfSongs5:14 eƒe alɔwo nye sikati mlimɔwo
SongOfSongs5:15 eƒe atawo nye kpe ɣi sɔti
SongOfSongs5:16 vivi le eƒe nu me
SongOfSongs6:1 Nyɔnuwo ƒe tugbedzɛ
SongOfSongs6:2 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ yi eƒe abɔ me
SongOfSongs6:3 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ la enye tɔnye
SongOfSongs6:4 Xɔ̃nye
SongOfSongs6:5 Ɖe ŋku ɖa le ŋunye
SongOfSongs6:6 Wo aɖuwo le abe alẽha
SongOfSongs6:7 Wo tonuƒui le dzedzem le moxevɔ me abe yevuboɖa
SongOfSongs6:8 Fiasrɔ̃wo le blaade
SongOfSongs6:9 Ke ɖeka koe nye nye; ahɔne
SongOfSongs6:10 Amekae le anyi me kpɔmahe agudzedze ene
SongOfSongs6:11 Meyi ɖe azibɔ me
SongOfSongs6:12 Nye didi kplɔm le manyamanya me yi ɖe nyee dukɔ ŋku la ƒe tasiaɖam gbɔe.
SongOfSongs7:1 Trɔ
SongOfSongs7:2 Wo bubume vinyɔnu
SongOfSongs7:3 wò akɔnu enye ze tegblẽ
SongOfSongs7:4 wò nowo le abe sãdevi eve
SongOfSongs7:5 wò kɔ enye nyiɖuxɔ tsrala; wò ŋkuwo le abe ta
SongOfSongs7:6 Wò ta
SongOfSongs7:7 Edze tugbe
SongOfSongs7:8 Ele tsralɛ abe deti ene
SongOfSongs7:9 Mebe
SongOfSongs7:10 Wò nu me nenye wen nyuitɔ
SongOfSongs7:11 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ tɔ menye
SongOfSongs7:12 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ
SongOfSongs7:13 Míafɔ ŋdi kanya ayi weingblewo me
SongOfSongs7:14 Agbitsawo ƒe ʋeʋẽ gbagba ɖi
SongOfSongs8:1 Oo
SongOfSongs8:2 anye ne makplɔ wò ayi danye ƒe me
SongOfSongs8:3 Etsɔ eƒe mía de nye ta te
SongOfSongs8:4 Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo
SongOfSongs8:5 Ameka nye ekem tso gbe me gbɔna heziɔ ɖe eƒe lɔlɔ̃tɔ ŋu? Atɔtɔŋutiti le menyɔ wò le; afima dawò se veve dzi wò ɖo
SongOfSongs8:6 Tsɔm wɔ ŋkɔslgɛ ɖe wò dzi ŋu kple ŋkɔsigɛ de wò asi! Elabena lɔlɔ̃ tri akɔ wu ku
SongOfSongs8:7 Tsi geɖe mate ŋu atsi lɔlɔ̃ o
SongOfSongs8:8 Nɔvinyɔnu suea ɖe le mia si
SongOfSongs8:9 Nenye gbe wonye la
SongOfSongs8:10 Gli menye
SongOfSongs8:11 Weingble le Salomo si le Baal-Hamon; etsɔ weingble la ɖe asi na dzikpɔlawo be
SongOfSongs8:12 Nye weingble le nye ŋutɔ asinye me
SongOfSongs8:13 Wò nyɔnu
SongOfSongs8:14 Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ
Isaiah1:1 Esia nye ŋutega
Isaiah1:2 Mi dziƒowo
Isaiah1:3 Nyitsu nyaa etoa
Isaiah1:4 Baba na mi anyigba dzi nɔlawo
Isaiah1:5 Nukaŋuti woanɔ mia ƒoƒo dzi
Isaiah1:6 Teƒe nyuia ɖeke mele eŋu o
Isaiah1:7 Miaƒe anyigba zu gbegbe; dzo fiã miaƒe duwo
Isaiah1:8 Eye Zion-nyɔnuvi tsi anyi abe agbadɔ le weingble me
Isaiah1:9 Ɖe menye Yehowa Zebaot ye kpɔtɔ ame ʋeea ɖewo ɖi na mí o la
Isaiah1:10 Mi Sodom-amegãwo
Isaiah1:11 Yehowa be
Isaiah1:12 Ne mieva
Isaiah1:13 Migasa nuɖuvɔ alakpatɔ azɔ o
Isaiah1:14 Melé fu miaƒe dzinu yeyewo kple miaƒe ŋkekenyuiewo
Isaiah1:15 Ne mieke miaƒe abɔwo la
Isaiah1:16 Mile tsi
Isaiah1:17 Misrɔ̃ nu nyui wɔwɔ
Isaiah1:18 Yehowa be: Miva mídrɔ̃ nɔ nu! Ne miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo le abe nyagadzĩ ene la
Isaiah1:19 Ne mielɔ̃
Isaiah1:20 Ke ne miegbe
Isaiah1:21 Aleke du wɔnuteƒe
Isaiah1:22 Wò klosalo zu aŋuka
Isaiah1:23 Wò amegãwo zu aglãdzelawo kple fiafiwo xɔlɔ̃; wo dome amesiame lɔ̃a zãnunana
Isaiah1:24 Eyata Aƒetɔ
Isaiah1:25 Matrɔ nye asi ɖe ŋuwò
Isaiah1:26 Magaɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo na wò abe tsã ene
Isaiah1:27 Woatso ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ aɖe Zion
Isaiah1:28 Woagbã godzelawo kple nuvɔ̃wɔlawo siaa nyanyanya
Isaiah1:29 Elabena ŋu akpe mi le logoti
Isaiah1:30 Elabena mia ŋutɔwo mianɔ abe logoti
Isaiah1:31 Ame sesẽ la azu ɖetifu
Isaiah2:1 Nya
Isaiah2:2 Ava me le ŋkeke mlɔeawo me be
Isaiah2:3 Eye dukɔ geɖewo atso agblɔ bena: Mina míayi Yehowa ƒe to la
Isaiah2:4 Adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na anyigba dzi dukɔwo
Isaiah2:5 Yakob ƒe aƒe
Isaiah2:6 Etso wò dukɔ
Isaiah2:7 Klosalo kple sika yɔ eƒe anyigba dzi fũ
Isaiah2:8 Legbawo yɔ eƒe anyigba dzi fũ; wode ta agu na woawo ŋutɔwo ƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo
Isaiah2:9 Ale amegbetɔ de ta agu
Isaiah2:10 Yi ɖe agato me
Isaiah2:11 Woabɔbɔ amegbetɔwo ƒe ŋku kɔkɔwo ɖe anyi
Isaiah2:12 Elabena ŋkeke li na Yehowa Zebaot ɖe dadalawo katã kple ame kɔkɔwo
Isaiah2:13 ɖe Libanon ƒe sedertiwo katã
Isaiah2:14 ɖe to kɔkɔwo katã kple togbɛ kɔkɔwo katã ŋu;
Isaiah2:15 ɖe xɔ tsrala kɔkɔwo katã kple gli sesẽwo katã ŋu;
Isaiah2:16 ɖe Tarsis-ʋuwo katã kple nukpɔkpɔ veviwo katã ŋu.
Isaiah2:17 Woabɔbɔ amegbetɔwo ƒe adegbeƒoƒo ɖe anyi
Isaiah2:18 Eye legbawo nu ayi keŋkeŋ.
Isaiah2:19 Eye wòayi kpetowo kple anyigba dzi dowo me tso Yehowa ƒe ŋɔdzi kple eƒe gãnyenye ƒe atsyɔ̃ nu
Isaiah2:20 Gbemagbe la amegbetɔ atsɔ eƒe klosalolegba kple eƒe sikalegba
Isaiah2:21 ne wòayi agadowo kple kpetowo me tso Yehowa ƒe ŋɔdzi kple eƒe gãnyenye ƒe atsyɔ̃ la nu
Isaiah2:22 Eyata miɖe asi le amegbetɔ
Isaiah3:1 Elabena kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah3:2 kalẽtɔwo kple aʋawɔlawo
Isaiah3:3 ame blaatɔ̃wo ƒe amegãwo
Isaiah3:4 Matso ɖeviwo aɖo woƒe amegãwoe
Isaiah3:5 amewo asẽ ŋuta le wo nɔewo ŋu
Isaiah3:6 Ne amea ɖe alé nɔvia le fofoa ƒe me bena: „Avɔ le asiwò
Isaiah3:7 axɔ edzi agblɔ gbemagbe bena: „Nyemele abiwɔlaa ɖeke nye ge o
Isaiah3:8 Elabena Yerusalem amũ
Isaiah3:9 Woƒe moɖoɖo le ɖase ɖim le wo ŋu
Isaiah3:10 Woayra ame dzɔdzɔewo
Isaiah3:11 Baba na ame vɔ̃ɖi
Isaiah3:12 Nye dukɔ ƒe ŋutasẽlawo nye ɖeviwo
Isaiah3:13 Yehowa tso
Isaiah3:14 Yehowa kple eƒe dukɔ ƒe ame tsitsiwo kpakple eƒe amegãwo ɖi ʋɔnu be: Miawo miegblẽ nye weingble
Isaiah3:15 Aƒetɔ
Isaiah3:16 Yehowa be: Esi Zion-nyɔnuviwo dana
Isaiah3:17 eyata Aƒetɔ la abebe ta na Zion-nyɔnuviwo
Isaiah3:18 Gbemagbe Aƒetɔ la aɖe afɔgɛwo ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ɖa
Isaiah3:19 togɛwo
Isaiah3:20 takuwo
Isaiah3:21 asigɛwo kple ŋɔtigɛwo
Isaiah3:22 atsyɔ̃vɔwo
Isaiah3:23 ahuhɔ̃ewo
Isaiah3:24 Ʋeʋẽ kũ axɔ ɖe ʋeʋẽ lilili teƒe
Isaiah3:25 Wò ŋutsuwo atsi yi nu
Isaiah3:26 Woƒe agbowo axa nu
Isaiah4:1 Nyɔnu adre alé ŋutsu ɖeka gbemagbe agblɔ bena: Míaɖu mía ŋutɔwo ƒe abolo
Isaiah4:2 Gbemagbe la Yehowa ƒe atidzedze anye atsyɔ̃ kple bubu
Isaiah4:3 Eye ava me be
Isaiah4:4 nenye be
Isaiah4:5 Eye Yehowa aɖo alilikpo kple dzudzɔ ɖe Zion-to ƒe nɔƒewo katã kple eƒe takpeƒewo le ŋkeke me kpakple dzo keklẽ le zã me; elabena wòa tsyɔ nu atsyɔɖoɖowo katã dzi
Isaiah4:6 eye agbadɔ anɔ anyi anye vɔvɔli dodo le ŋkeke me le dzoxɔxɔ ta
Isaiah5:1 Mele ha dzi ge le xɔ̃nye ŋu
Isaiah5:2 Edzobo eme
Isaiah5:3 Eyata mi Yerusalemtɔwo kple mi Yuda-ŋutsuwo
Isaiah5:4 Nukae woawɔ na nye weingble la
Isaiah5:5 Azɔ mana mianya nusi wɔ ge mala nye weingble la: Makaka kpo le eŋu
Isaiah5:6 Mawɔe woazu afutime; womaɖe eŋu o
Isaiah5:7 Elabena Israel ƒe aƒe lae nye Yehowa Zebaot ƒe weingble
Isaiah5:8 Baba na amesiwo le xɔ tsiãm ɖe xɔ nu
Isaiah5:9 Yehowa Zebaot gblɔ ɖe to me nam bena: Ne xɔ gbogboawo matrɔ zu gbegbe
Isaiah5:10 Elabena Weingble
Isaiah5:11 Baba na amesiwo tɔa fɔŋli hetia aha muame yome
Isaiah5:12 Kasaŋkuwo
Isaiah5:13 Eyata woaɖe aboyo nye dukɔ le manyamanya me
Isaiah5:14 Eyata tsieƒe ke eƒe ve me
Isaiah5:15 Ekema amegbetɔ atsyɔ akɔ anyi
Isaiah5:16 Yehowa Zebaot anye gã le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me
Isaiah5:17 Alẽviwo aɖu gbe le afima
Isaiah5:18 Baba na amesiwo tsɔa alakpaka dea vodada nɔa hehem
Isaiah5:19 Amesiwo noa gbɔgblɔm bena: Newɔ kabakaba
Isaiah5:20 Baba na amesiwo yɔa vɔ̃ be nyui kple nyui be vɔ̃
Isaiah5:21 Baba na amesiwo bua wo ɖokui nunyalawoe
Isaiah5:22 Baba na amesiwo nye kalẽawo le weinnono me kple ŋutsuwɔlawo le aha muame toto me.
Isaiah5:23 Amesiwo xɔa zãnu hetsona na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo
Isaiah5:24 Eyata woƒe ke azu nu nyunyɔ abe ahɔ̃liti takpoe
Isaiah5:25 Eyata Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe bi ɖe eƒe dukɔ ŋu
Isaiah5:26 Akɔ aflaga dzi na dukɔa ɖe le didiƒe
Isaiah5:27 Ɖeɖi mate amea ɖeke ŋu o
Isaiah5:28 wonyre woƒe aŋutrɔwo
Isaiah5:29 Wole gbe ɖem abe dzatanɔ ene
Isaiah5:30 Eye wòaɖe gbe ɖe eɖzi gbemagbe abe atsiaƒu ƒe gbeɖeɖe ene
Isaiah6:1 Le ƒe
Isaiah6:2 Serafiwo le eta me
Isaiah6:3 Eye wodo ɣli ɖo ɖe wo nɔewo gblɔ bena: Kɔkɔe
Isaiah6:4 Ɣlidola la ƒe gbe na kpuiawo ƒe agunu ʋuʋu
Isaiah6:5 Tete megblɔ be: Alele
Isaiah6:6 Tete Serafiwo dometɔ ɖeka dzo va gbɔnye
Isaiah6:7 eye wòtsɔe lili nu nam gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah6:8 Tete mese Aƒetɔ la ƒe gbe wògblɔ bena: Ameka madɔ
Isaiah6:9 Eye wògblɔ bena: Yi naɖagblɔ na dukɔ sia bena: Minɔ nusese dzi ko
Isaiah6:10 Na dukɔ sia ƒe dzi naku atri
Isaiah6:11 Tete megblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ
Isaiah6:12 vaseɖe esime Yehowa nakplɔ amewo adzoe
Isaiah6:13 Eye ne akpa ewolia susɔ la
Isaiah7:1 Le Yuda-fia Axaz
Isaiah7:2 Eye wova gblɔ na Dawid ƒe aƒe la bena: Aram ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Efrayim. Tete eya kple eƒe dukɔ ƒe dzi ʋuʋu nyanyanya
Isaiah7:3 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Yesaya bena: Mia kple viwò Sear-Yasub mido yi ɖakpe Axaz le dzigbeta la ƒe tɔʋu ƒe mlɔenu le avɔnyãla ƒe agblemɔ to
Isaiah7:4 eye nagblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖokui wò dzi
Isaiah7:5 Esi Aram
Isaiah7:6 mina míaho ɖe Yuda ŋu
Isaiah7:7 ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Maɖze edzi o
Isaiah7:8 Elabena Aram ƒe ta enye Damasko
Isaiah7:9 Efrayim ƒe ta enye Samaria
Isaiah7:10 Eye Yehowa gaƒo nu kple Axaz gblɔ bena:
Isaiah7:11 Bia dzesi tso Yehowa
Isaiah7:12 Tete Axaz gblɔ bena: Nyema-biae o
Isaiah7:13 Eye wògblɔ bena: Dawid ƒe aƒe la
Isaiah7:14 Eyata Aƒetɔ la ŋuta ana dzesi mi: Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah7:15 Notsi kpekẽ kple anyitsi wòano
Isaiah7:16 Elabena hafi ɖevi la nava nya vɔ̃tsitsri kple nyuitiatia la
Isaiah7:17 Eye Yehowa akplɔ Asur-fia aƒu mia kple wò dukɔ kpakple fofowò ƒe aƒe
Isaiah7:18 Eye woava me le ŋkeke ma dzi be
Isaiah7:19 eye wo katã woava aƒo ɖe bali globowo kple kpetowo kple ŋuvegoewo katã kpakple lãnyiƒewo katã.
Isaiah7:20 Gbemagbe la Aƒetɔ la aɣe talũhɛ
Isaiah7:21 Eye woava me le ɣemaɣi be
Isaiah7:22 Eye le esi notsi bɔ ta la
Isaiah7:23 Eye wòava me le ɣemaɣi be
Isaiah7:24 Aŋutrɔ kple da woatso yi afimae
Isaiah7:25 Eye womagate ŋu aɖe to
Isaiah8:1 Eye Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Tso nuŋlɔkpe gãa ɖe
Isaiah8:2 De ɖasefo wɔnuteƒe wo nam: nunɔla Uriya kple Zaxarya
Isaiah8:3 Eye mete de nyɔnu nyagblɔɖila ŋu wòto fu
Isaiah8:4 Elabena hafi ɖevi la nade asi fofo kple dada yɔyɔ me la
Isaiah8:5 Eye Yehowa gaƒo nu kplim gblɔ bena:
Isaiah8:6 Esi dukɔ sia do vlo Siloa-tsi
Isaiah8:7 eyata Aƒetɔ la akplɔ tɔsisi la ƒe tsi gã sẽŋuwo ava ƒo ɖe wo dzi
Isaiah8:8 asi ato Yuda
Isaiah8:9 Mi dukɔwo
Isaiah8:10 Ne miede adaŋu la
Isaiah8:11 Elabena ale Yehowa ƒo nu kplim
Isaiah8:12 Migayɔ nusiwo katã dukɔ sia yɔna be nugbeɖoɖo la
Isaiah8:13 Mibu Yehowa Zebaot kokoe
Isaiah8:14 Azu kɔkɔeƒe
Isaiah8:15 eye ame geɖewo aklii adze anyi ahaŋe keŋkeŋ
Isaiah8:16 Bia ɖaseɖiɖi la
Isaiah8:17 Eyata mele Yehowa
Isaiah8:18 Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah8:19 Ne wogblɔ na mi be
Isaiah8:20 Mitrɔ ɖe nufiame kple ɖaseɖiɖi la ŋu! Ne womegblɔ alea o la
Isaiah8:21 Woanɔ tsa glãla tsam
Isaiah8:22 alo wode ko to la
Isaiah8:23 Elabena afisi xaxa le la
Isaiah9:1 Dukɔ
Isaiah9:2 Edzi dukɔ la ɖe edzi
Isaiah9:3 Elabena èŋe woƒe agba ƒe kɔkuti
Isaiah9:4 Elabena wòtɔ dzo amesiwo ƒo aʋazi la ƒe afɔkpawo katã kple awu
Isaiah9:5 Elabena wodzi vi na mí
Isaiah9:6 ne eƒe dziɖuɖu nakeke ta
Isaiah9:7 Aƒetɔ la gblɔ nya ɖo ɖe Yakob
Isaiah9:8 ne dukɔ blibo la nadze sii hekpe ɖe Efrayim kple Samaria-tɔwo ŋu
Isaiah9:9 „Anyikpewoe mũ dze anyi
Isaiah9:10 Eye Yehowa do Rezin ƒe ketɔwo ɖe dzi ɖe eŋu
Isaiah9:11 Aram tso ɣedzeƒe

Isaiah27:4 Dzi mele kuyem o; ne makpɔ aŋɔkawo kple ŋuwò la

Isaiah28:1 Baba na Efrayim-hamulawo ƒe dàdafiakuku kple eƒe atsyɔ̃ ƒe seƒoƒo dzeani yɔyrɔ
Isaiah28:2 Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah28:3 Woafanya Efrayim-hamulawo ƒe dàdafiakuku kple alo;
Isaiah28:4 eye woava me na eƒe atsyɔ̃ ƒe seƒoƒo dzeani yɔyrɔ
Isaiah28:5 Le ɣemaɣi la Yehowa Zebaot anye atsyɔ̃kuku kple ŋgoblanu dzeani na eƒe dukɔ susɔea;
Isaiah28:6 anye ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃gbɔgbɔ na amesi le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ nu kple ŋusẽ na amesiwo gbugbɔ aʋa ɖo ɖe agbo nu.
Isaiah28:7 Ke wein le ya mum amesiawo hã

Isaiah28:10 Se ɖe se dzi

Isaiah28:18 woagblẽ mia kple ku ƒe nubabla la me

Isaiah43:2 Ne èto to me la

Isaiah43:7 amesiwo katã ŋu woyɔ nye ŋkɔ do

Isaiah44:5 Amesi agblɔ be

Jeremiah31:1 Yehowa be: Le ɣemaɣi la manye Mawu na Israel ƒe ƒomeawo katã
Jeremiah31:2 Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Dukɔ
Jeremiah31:3 Yehowa ɖe eɖokui fiãm le didiƒe. Metsɔ lɔlɔ̃ mava lɔ̃ wò
Jeremiah31:4 Ɖetugbi Israel
Jeremiah31:5 woagade weingble ɖe Samaria-towo dzi; amesi wo de wo la
Jeremiah31:6 Elabena ŋkeke li gbɔna
Jeremiah31:7 Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mido dzidzɔɣli ɖe Yakob ŋu
Jeremiah31:8 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah31:9 Woanɔ avi dzi ava
Jeremiah31:10 Mi dukɔwo
Jeremiah31:11 Elabena Yehowa xa Yakob ƒle
Jeremiah31:12 Woava atso aseye le Zion ƒe togbɛ dzi

Jeremiah31:14 matsɔ ami aɖi ƒo na nunɔlawo
Jeremiah31:15 Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Wose konyifagbe le Rama kple avifafa vevie

Jeremiah31:17 Yehowa be: Mɔkpɔkpɔ le wò ŋkeke

Jeremiah31:20 Efrayim la
Jeremiah31:21 Ɖo ŋkuɖodzikpewo

Jeremiah31:25 Elabena mafa dzi na luʋɔ
Jeremiah31:26 Esia ta menvɔ ɖo
Jeremiah31:27 Yehowa be: Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah31:28 Eye alesi menɔ ŋute ɖe wo ŋu
Jeremiah31:29 Le ŋkeke mawo me la womagagblɔ azɔ be: „Fofowo ɖu weintsetse hɔhlɔ̃e
Jeremiah31:30 ke boŋ amesiame aku ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe vodada ta
Jeremiah31:31 Yehowa be: Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah31:32 Manɔ abe nusi mebia kple wo fofowo le gbesigbe melé woƒe alɔnu

Jeremiah31:34 Amea ɖeke magafia nu xɔlɔ̃via kple nɔvia agblɔ be: „Dze si Yehowa“ o

Jeremiah36:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va na Yeremya le Yuda-fia Yoyakim
Jeremiah36:2 Tsɔ agbalẽ naŋlɔ nya
Jeremiah36:3 Amea ɖe menya nu o Yuda ƒe aƒe la ase vɔ̃
Jeremiah36:4 Tete Yeremya yɔ Barux
Jeremiah36:5 Eye Yeremya de se na Barux bena: Mele ga me
Jeremiah36:6 Eyata yi naɖaxlẽ agbalẽ sia
Jeremiah36:7 Amea ɖe menya nu o woatsɔ kokoƒoƒo abɔbɔ wo ɖokui ɖe anyi le Yehowa ŋku me
Jeremiah36:8 Tete Barux
Jeremiah36:9 Le Yuda-fia Yoyakim
Jeremiah36:10 Eye Barux xlẽ Yeremya ƒe nyawo le agbalẽ la me de dukɔ blibo la ƒe towo me le agbalẽŋlɔla Gemarya
Jeremiah36:11 Eye Safan vi Gemarya ƒe vi Mixaya se Yehowa ƒe nyawo katã tso agbalẽ la me.
Jeremiah36:12 Tete wòyi agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe xɔ me le fia ƒe me
Jeremiah36:13 Eye Mixaya gblɔ nya
Jeremiah36:14 Tete amegãwo katã dɔ Kus vi Selemya ƒe vi Netanya ƒe vi Yehudi ɖo ɖe Barux gblɔ bena: Tsɔ agbalẽ
Jeremiah36:15 Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Bɔbɔ nɔ anyi naxlẽe ɖe to me na mí! Eye Barux xlẽe ɖe to me na wo.
Jeremiah36:16 Esi wose nya siawo katã la
Jeremiah36:17 Eye wòbia Barux bena: Gblɔ alesi nèwɔ hafi ŋlɔ nya siawo katã tso enu me la na mí.
Jeremiah36:18 Barux ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Etsɔ eƒe nu gblɔ nya siawo katã nam
Jeremiah36:19 Eye amegãwo gblɔ na Barux bena: Yi
Jeremiah36:20 Esi wotsɔ agbalẽ la dzra ɖo ɖe agbalẽŋlɔla Elisama ƒe xɔ me la
Jeremiah36:21 Tete fia la dɔ Yehudi ɖa
Jeremiah36:22 Fia la bɔbɔ nɔ vuvɔŋɔlixɔ me le dzinu asiekelia me
Jeremiah36:23 Eye ne Yehudi xlẽ axa etɔ̃ alo ene vɔ la
Jeremiah36:24 Eye dzidzi meƒo fia la kple eƒe dɔlawo katã
Jeremiah36:25 Eye esi Elnatan
Jeremiah36:26 Eye fia la de se na fiavi Yeraxmeel kple Seraya
Jeremiah36:27 Eye esi fia la tɔ dzo agbalẽ
Jeremiah36:28 Gatsɔ agbalẽ bubu

Jeremiah38:7 Eye aƒedzikpɔla Ebed-Melex

Jeremiah38:20 Yeremya ɖo ŋu bena: Womelé tsɔ wò ge ade asi o. Ɖo to Yehowa ƒe gbe ko
Jeremiah38:21 Ke ne egbe dodo yi la

Jeremiah38:25 Eye ne amegãwo se be
Jeremiah38:26 ekema naɖo ŋu na wo bena: Ɖe metsɔ kokoƒoƒo bɔbɔ ɖokuinye ɖe anyi le fia la ŋku me be

Jeremiah39:1 Eye woxɔ Yerusalem. Babel-fia Nebukadnezar kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la va Yerusalem heɖe to ɖee le Yuda-fia Zedekiya ƒe ƒe asiekelia me le dzinu ewolia dzi
Jeremiah39:2 eye wogbã du la le Zedekiya ƒe ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me le dzinu enelia ƒe ŋkeke asiekelia dzi.
Jeremiah39:3 Eye Babel-fia ƒe amegãwo katã va bɔbɔ nɔ agbo dometɔ nu; Nergal-Sarezer
Jeremiah39:4 Eye esi Yuda-fia Zedekiya kple aʋawɔlawo katã kpɔ wo la
Jeremiah39:5 Ke Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ la li wo yome
Jeremiah39:6 Babel-fia wu Zedekiya viwo le eya ŋuta ŋku me le Ribla eye Babel-fia wu Yuda ƒe bubumewo katã.
Jeremiah39:7 Egbã ŋku na Zedekiya
Jeremiah39:8 Eye Kaldeatɔwo tɔ dzo fia ƒe aƒe kple dukɔ la ƒe aƒewo
Jeremiah39:9 Eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan de aboyo dukɔa ƒe ame susɔea
Jeremiah39:10 Ke fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan gblẽ dukɔ la ƒe ame dahe

Jeremiah51:37 Babel azu anyiglãgo kple amegãxiwo nɔƒe
Jeremiah51:38 Wo katã le xɔxlɔ̃m abe dzatawo ene
Jeremiah51:39 Yehowa be: Ne woƒe lãme tɔ dzo la
Jeremiah51:40 Mana woakplɔ wo ayi wuƒe abe alẽviwo
Jeremiah51:41 Aleke asi su Sesax dzi
Jeremiah51:42 Atsiaƒu ƒo ɖe Babel dzi
Jeremiah51:43 Eƒe duwo zu gbegbe
Jeremiah51:44 Mahe to na Babel ƒe Bel
Jeremiah51:45 Nye dukɔ
Jeremiah51:46 Ne nyaa ɖe ɖi le ƒe si me
Jeremiah51:47 Eyata kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah51:48 Dziƒo kple anyigba kple edzi nuwo katã atso aseye ɖe Babel ŋu; elabena nugblẽla atso anyiehe ava ƒo ɖe edzi
Jeremiah51:49 Israel ƒe ame tsiaʋawo
Jeremiah51:50 Mi amesiwo si le yi nu
Jeremiah51:51 Ŋukpe lé mí
Jeremiah51:52 Yehowa be: Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah51:53 Ne Babel lia dziŋgɔli me
Jeremiah51:54 Miƒu to anyi
Jeremiah51:55 Elabena Yehowa atsrɔ̃ Babel
Jeremiah51:56 Elabena nugblẽla aƒo ɖe Babel dzi
Jeremiah51:57 Eye mana aha woƒe tatɔwo kple woƒe nunyalawo
Jeremiah51:58 Ale Yehowa Zebaot gblɔ esi: Woagbã Babel ƒe gli kekeawo vaseɖe agunu ke
Jeremiah51:59 Nyagblɔɖila Yeremya ƒe nya
Jeremiah51:60 Tete Yeremya ŋlɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e

Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya xɔ ƒe blave vo ɖekɛ
Jeremiah52:2 Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me
Jeremiah52:3 Elabena Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Yerusalem kple Yuda ŋu
Jeremiah52:4 Babel-fia Nebukadnezar kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ho ɖe Yerusalem ŋu le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe asiekelia me le dzinu ewolia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi; woɖe to ɖee
Jeremiah52:5 Woɖe to ɖe dua
Jeremiah52:6 Le dzinu enelia ƒe ŋkeke asiekelia dzi la dɔwuame nu sẽ le dua me
Jeremiah52:7 Woŋɔ mɔ ɖe dua ŋu
Jeremiah52:8 Tete Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ yɔ fia la ɖe nu heva tu Zedekiya le Yerixo-tagba
Jeremiah52:9 Tete wòlé fia la hekplɔe yina Babel-fia le Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi
Jeremiah52:10 Eye Babel-fia wu Zedekiya viwo le eya ŋutɔ ŋku me
Jeremiah52:11 Egbã ŋku na Zedekiya
Jeremiah52:12 Le dzinu atɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi
Jeremiah52:13 eye wòtɔ dzo Yehowa ƒe aƒe kple fia ƒe aƒe
Jeremiah52:14 Eye Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ blibo
Jeremiah52:15 Fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan ɖe aboyo dukɔ la ƒe ame dahewo dometɔa ɖewo
Jeremiah52:16 Eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan gblẽ anyigba dzi ame dahea ɖewo ɖi
Jeremiah52:17 Kaldeatɔwo gbã akɔblisɔti
Jeremiah52:18 Eye wotsɔ zeawo
Jeremiah52:19 Eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã tsɔ nusiwo nye sika kple klosalo sɔŋ la dzoe. Kpluwo
Jeremiah52:20 Sɔti eveawo
Jeremiah52:21 Sɔti ɖeka kɔ abɔklugui wuienyi
Jeremiah52:22 Wotsɔ akɔbli wɔ kɔ ɖe eta me
Jeremiah52:23 Yevuboɖa blaasieke vɔ ade le goawo katã me; yevuboɖa
Jeremiah52:24 Eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã kplɔ nunɔlagã Seraya kple nunɔlagã yometɔ Zefanya kpakple kpuinudzɔla etɔ̃
Jeremiah52:25 kple aƒedzikpɔla ɖeka
Jeremiah52:26 amesiawo fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan kplɔ yi na Babel-fia le Ribla.
Jeremiah52:27 Eye Babel-fia da nu wo hewu wo le Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi. Ale woɖe aboyo Yuda tso edenyigba dzi.
Jeremiah52:28 Amesiwo Nebukadnezar ɖe aboyoe la
Jeremiah52:29 woɖe aboyo ame alafa enyi kple blaetɔ̃ vɔ eve tso Yerusalem le Nebukadnezar ƒe ƒe wuienyilia me;
Jeremiah52:30 eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan ɖe aboyo ame alafa adre kple blane vɔ atɔ̃ dzoe le Nebukadnezar ƒe ƒe blave vɔ etɔ̃lia me; wo katã le ame akpe ene alafa ade.
Jeremiah52:31 Esime woɖe aboyo Yuda-fia Yoyaxin le ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ adre megbe le dzinu wuievelia ƒe ŋkeke blave vɔ atɔ̃lia dzi la
Jeremiah52:32 eƒo nu fafɛ kplii
Jeremiah52:33 Eɖɔ li eƒe gaxɔmewuwo
Jeremiah52:34 Eye Babel-fia na eƒe nuɖuɖui ɖaa

Ezekiel3:25 Wò amevi
Ezekiel3:26 Eye mana wò aɖe nalé ɖe aŋɔ me na wò kaɖii
Ezekiel3:27 Ke ne maƒo nu kpli wò la
Ezekiel4:1 Wò amevi
Ezekiel4:2 ɖo toɖelawo eŋu
Ezekiel4:3 Ke wò la tsa gagba nawɔ gagli atso mia kple ɖu la dome
Ezekiel4:4 Mlɔ wò miamekpa dzi
Ezekiel4:5 Eye maɖo woƒe vodadawo ƒe ƒe na wò ɖe ŋkeke alafa etɔ̃ kple blaasieke
Ezekiel4:6 Eye ne èwu esia nu va la
Ezekiel4:7 Trɔ ŋku me de Yerusalem
Ezekiel4:8 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel4:9 Ke wò la tso bli
Ezekiel4:10 Wò gbe sia gbe nuɖuɖu ƒe dadame nanye sekel blave
Ezekiel4:11 Eye nano tsi ɖe dzidze nu
Ezekiel4:12 Ƒoe abe lubolo ene naɖu
Ezekiel4:13 Eye Yehowa gblɔ bena: Alea Israel-viwo aɖu abolo makɔmakɔ le dukɔwo domee
Ezekiel4:14 Tete megblɔ bena: Ao
Ezekiel4:15 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel4:16 Eye wògblɔ nam be: Amevi
Ezekiel4:17 ne abolo kple tsi nahiã wo
Ezekiel5:1 Wò amegbetɔvi
Ezekiel5:2 Tɔ dzo akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka ɖe dua me
Ezekiel5:3 Ɖe suea ɖe le eŋu nasa ɖe wò avɔ nu
Ezekiel5:4 eye gaɖe ʋeea ɖe le esia ŋu de dzo me
Ezekiel5:5 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nyee tsɔ Yerusalem sia ɖo dukɔwo dome
Ezekiel5:6 Wosẽ to ɖe nye sewo ŋu vloe wu dukɔwo
Ezekiel5:7 Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi miesẽ to wu dukɔ
Ezekiel5:8 eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel5:9 eye mawɔ nu mawɔkpɔa ɖe ŋuwò le wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã ta
Ezekiel5:10 Eyata fofowo aɖu wo viwo le mewo
Ezekiel5:11 Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe
Ezekiel5:12 Wò akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka aku ɖe dɔvɔ̃ nu
Ezekiel5:13 Eye nye dɔmedzoe abi ade eseƒe ke
Ezekiel5:14 Matsɔ wò awɔ gbegbe kple alɔmeɖenu le dukɔ
Ezekiel5:15 Eye azu alɔmeɖenu kple vlodonu
Ezekiel5:16 ne meda dɔwuame ƒe aŋutrɔ vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖe wo dome
Ezekiel5:17 Mahe dɔwuame kple lã wɔadãwo ava mia dzi
Ezekiel6:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel6:2 Amevi
Ezekiel6:3 gblɔ bena: Mi Israel-towo
Ezekiel6:4 Miaƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo agblẽ
Ezekiel6:5 matsɔ Israel-viwo ƒe kukuawo aɖo woƒe legbawo ŋku me
Ezekiel6:6 Míaƒe duwo azu aƒedo le mia nɔƒewo katã
Ezekiel6:7 Eye ame tsiaʋawo atsi mia dome
Ezekiel6:8 Ke ne miekaka ɖe anyigbawo dzi la
Ezekiel6:9 Miaƒe ame sisiwo aɖo ŋku dzinye le dukɔwo dome
Ezekiel6:10 eye wòadze sii be
Ezekiel6:11 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ƒu akpe
Ezekiel6:12 Amesi le didiƒe la
Ezekiel6:13 Eye miadze sii bena
Ezekiel6:14 Mado nye asi ɖa ɖe wo ŋu
Ezekiel7:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel7:2 Amevi
Ezekiel7:3 Azɔ nuwuwu gbɔna na wò
Ezekiel7:4 nye ŋku makpɔ nublanui na wò o
Ezekiel7:5 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel7:6 Nuwuwu gbɔna
Ezekiel7:7 Anyigbadzinɔla
Ezekiel7:8 Azɔ ekpɔtɔ vie matrɔ nye dziku aƒo ɖe dziwò
Ezekiel7:9 Nye ŋku makpɔ nublanui na wò o
Ezekiel7:10 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel7:11 Ŋutasesẽ tsi zu vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ ƒe ameƒoti; wo dometɔa ɖeke megali o
Ezekiel7:12 Azã la ɖo
Ezekiel7:13 Ne nudzrala tsi agbe hã la
Ezekiel7:14 Woku kpẽ
Ezekiel7:15 Yi le xexe
Ezekiel7:16 Miaƒe sisilawo asi
Ezekiel7:17 Alɔwo katã ado agblɔ
Ezekiel7:18 woata akpanya
Ezekiel7:19 Woatsɔ woƒe klosalo aƒu gbe ɖe kpɔdomee
Ezekiel7:20 Wotsɔ woƒe atsyɔ̃nu
Ezekiel7:21 matsɔe ade asi na ame tutɔwo
Ezekiel7:22 Maɖe ko ɖa le wo ŋu
Ezekiel7:23 Mitu kɔsɔkɔsɔ
Ezekiel7:24 Mana dukɔwo ƒe vɔ̃ɖitɔwo nava xɔ woƒe aƒewo

Ezekiel7:26 Dzɔgbevɔ̃e akplɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖo
Ezekiel7:27 Fia axa nu
Ezekiel8:1 Eye wòva me
Ezekiel8:2 Eye medo ŋku anyi

Ezekiel9:1 Emegbe wòdo ɣli ɖe to me nam sesĩe gblɔ bena: Mihe du la ƒe tohehe vɛ
Ezekiel9:2 Tete ŋutsu ade to dzigbegbo
Ezekiel9:3 Eye Israel ƒe Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe la ho tso Kerubiawo ta me
Ezekiel9:4 Eye Yehowa gblɔ ne bena: Yi naɖatsa le Yerusalem dua me
Ezekiel9:5 Ke egblɔ na ame kemeawo mese bena: Minɔ eyome miatsa le dua me
Ezekiel9:6 Miwu amegã ɖeɖiwo
Ezekiel9:7 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Migblẽ kɔ ɖo na aƒe la
Ezekiel9:8 Eye wòva me
Ezekiel9:9 Tete wòɖo ŋu nam bena: Israel ƒe aƒe kple Yuda ƒe vodada sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ
Ezekiel9:10 Eyata nye hã nye ŋku makpɔ nublanui o
Ezekiel9:11 Eye kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel10:1 Eye meɖo ŋku anyi
Ezekiel10:2 Eye wògblɔ na ŋutsu
Ezekiel10:3 Kerubiawo le tsitre ɖe xɔ la ƒe ɖusi me gome
Ezekiel10:4 Tete Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ho dzo le Kerubiawo dzi yi xɔ la ƒe kpui nu
Ezekiel10:5 Eye wose Kerubiawo ƒe aʋala ƒe ɖiɖi le xɔxɔnu kɔtoetɔ ke abe Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe gbe
Ezekiel10:6 Eye esi wòde se na ŋutsu
Ezekiel10:7 Tete Kerubia ɖo asi ɖe Kerubiawo domee heɖe dzo
Ezekiel10:8 Nane dze le Kerubiawo ŋu abe amegbetɔ ƒe asi ene le woƒe aʋalawo te.
Ezekiel10:9 Eye meɖo ŋku anyi
Ezekiel10:10 Nɔnɔme ɖeka li na wo ame eneawo katã
Ezekiel10:11 Ne wole yiyim la
Ezekiel10:12 Ŋkuwo yɔ woƒe ƒodo blibo la kple woƒe megbe
Ezekiel10:13 Woyɔ tasiaɖamfɔawo be „yali“ mese.
Ezekiel10:14 Mo ene li na wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe; mo gbãtɔ nye Kerubi ƒe mo
Ezekiel10:15 Eye Kerubiawo ka wo ɖokui dzi; woawoe nye nu gbagbe
Ezekiel10:16 Ne Kerubiawo le yiyim la
Ezekiel10:17 ne wotɔ la
Ezekiel10:18 Eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe dzo le xɔ la ƒe kpui nu yi ɖanɔ Kerubiawo ta me.
Ezekiel10:19 Tete Kerubiawo ƒo aʋala hekɔ wo ɖokui dzi tso anyigba le ŋkunye me; esi woho la
Ezekiel10:20 Woawo nye nu gbagbe
Ezekiel10:21 Ɖesiaɖe to mo ene
Ezekiel10:22 Woƒe mowo ƒe nɔnɔme enye mo

Ezekiel11:8 Yi vɔ̃m miele

Ezekiel11:10 Míatsi yi nu

Ezekiel16:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va gbɔnye bena:
Ezekiel16:2 Amevi
Ezekiel16:3 Eye gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ na Yerusalem enye si: Wò dzɔƒe kple dziwòƒe enye Kanaan-nyigba; Amoritɔe nye fofowò
Ezekiel16:4 Gbesigbe wodzi wò la
Ezekiel16:5 Ŋkua ɖeke mekpɔ nublanui na wò
Ezekiel16:6 Tete meva to ŋuwò yi
Ezekiel16:7 Eye mana nasɔ gbɔ abe gbe le gbe me ene! Etsi heka ta
Ezekiel16:8 Tete meva to ŋuwò yi
Ezekiel16:9 Mele tsi na wò
Ezekiel16:10 meta avɔ ŋɔŋɔe na wò
Ezekiel16:11 meɖo atsyɔ̃ na wò
Ezekiel16:12 mede ŋɔtigɛ ŋɔti na wò
Ezekiel16:13 Edo sika kple klosalo
Ezekiel16:14 Eye wò ŋkɔ nyɔ le dukɔwo dome le wò tugbedzedze ta
Ezekiel16:15 Ke eɖo dzi ɖe wò tugbedzedze ŋu
Ezekiel16:16 Etsɔ wò avɔwo dometɔa ɖewo wɔ nuxeƒe ŋɔŋɔewoe
Ezekiel16:17 Etsɔ nye sika kple nye klosalo ƒe atsyɔ̃nu
Ezekiel16:18 Etsɔ nye avɔ ŋɔŋɔewo tsyɔ na wo
Ezekiel16:19 Eye nusi metsɔ na wò
Ezekiel16:20 Elé wò ŋutsuvi kple wò nyɔnuvi
Ezekiel16:21 hafi nègawu vinyeŋutsuwo hetɔ dzoea?
Ezekiel16:22 Le wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã kple wò gbolowɔwɔwo me la mèɖo ŋu wò ɖevimenɔɣi
Ezekiel16:23 Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Baba na wò
Ezekiel16:24 ètu trɔ̃xɔwo na ɖokuiwò
Ezekiel16:25 èwɔ nuxeƒewo ɖe kpɔdomeewo ƒe dzogoewo katã dzi
Ezekiel16:26 Ewo gbolo kple wò aƒelika Egipte-viwo
Ezekiel16:27 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:28 Ewo gbolo kple Asur-viwo
Ezekiel16:29 Eye nègawɔ gbolo ɖe dzi kple Kaldea
Ezekiel16:30 Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Nu te wò dzi ŋu
Ezekiel16:31 esi nètu trɔ̃xɔwo ɖe kpɔdomeewo ƒe dzogoewo katã dzi
Ezekiel16:32 Nyɔnu ahasitɔ
Ezekiel16:33 Gbolo bubuwo katã la
Ezekiel16:34 Towo to vovo le wò gbolowɔwɔ me tso nyɔnu bubuwo tɔ gbɔ
Ezekiel16:35 Eyata
Ezekiel16:36 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi nètso wò gbolowɔwɔ kple wò ahiãviwo kpakple wò legba nyɔŋuawo katã
Ezekiel16:37 eyata maƒo wò ahiãviwo katã nu ƒu
Ezekiel16:38 Madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò ɖe gbolowo kple nyɔnu hlɔ̃dolawo ƒe se nu
Ezekiel16:39 Matso wò ade asi na wo
Ezekiel16:40 Woayɔ amehawo ɖe ŋuwò
Ezekiel16:41 Woata dzo wò xɔwo
Ezekiel16:42 Mana nye dziku nu nafa ɖe ŋuwò
Ezekiel16:43 Esi meɖo ŋu wò ɖevimenɔɣi o
Ezekiel16:44 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:45 Dawò vinyɔnu kpamkpam nenye
Ezekiel16:46 Dawòe nye Samaria hekpe ɖe vianyɔnu
Ezekiel16:47 Ɣeyiɣi kpuia ɖe ko mèzɔ woƒe mowo dzi o
Ezekiel16:48 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meta ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne nɔviwònyɔnu Sodom kple vianyɔnuwo hewɔ
Ezekiel16:49 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:50 Woda
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria mewɔ wò nuvɔ̃wo ƒe afã o
Ezekiel16:52 Eyata wò hã ŋukpe nenɔ dziwò
Ezekiel16:53 Magaɖo wo te
Ezekiel16:54 ne wò ŋukpe nanɔ dziwò
Ezekiel16:55 Nɔviwònyɔnu Sodom kple vianyɔnuwo agaɖo woƒe nɔnɔme tsãtɔ me
Ezekiel16:56 Ɖe nɔviwònyɔnu Sodom ƒe ŋɔdzinya menɔ nuwò me le wò dadaɣi
Ezekiel16:57 hafi ne woava klo nu le wò vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ dzi
Ezekiel16:58 Wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔwo kple wò ŋunyɔnuwo anɔ dziwò
Ezekiel16:59 Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi nèdo vlo atam la
Ezekiel16:60 maɖo ŋu nye nu
Ezekiel16:61 Nenye be
Ezekiel16:62 Mabia nu kpli wò
Ezekiel16:63 ne naɖo ŋui
Ezekiel17:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel17:2 Amevi
Ezekiel17:3 gblɔ bena Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Hɔ̃ gãa ɖe
Ezekiel17:4 Èŋe woƒe alɔwo ƒe tametɔ hetsɔ yi nudzralawo ƒe anyigba dzi
Ezekiel17:5 Eye wotsɔ anyigba dzi nukuwo dometɔ ɖeka ɖaƒã de agble me
Ezekiel17:6 Tete wòdze hezu weinka
Ezekiel17:7 Eye hɔ̃ gã bubua ɖe li
Ezekiel17:8 evɔ wònye agblewɔnu mee wodoe ɖo le tɔ gãwo to
Ezekiel17:9 Gblɔ be: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ɖe wòadze edzia? De mava aho eƒe kewo
Ezekiel17:10 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel17:11 Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel17:12 Gblɔ na ƒome sẽto la bena: Miese nusia gɔmea? Gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel17:13 Eɖe ame ɖeka le fiaƒome la me
Ezekiel17:14 ne fiaɖuƒe la natsi to
Ezekiel17:15 Ke edze aglã ɖe eŋu
Ezekiel17:16 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meta ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne menye ɖe woaku ɖe fia
Ezekiel17:17 Eye ne woƒu kpo ɖe eŋu
Ezekiel17:18 Esi wòdo vlo atam la hetu nubabla la
Ezekiel17:19 Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne nyemahe nye atam
Ezekiel17:20 Maɖo nye ɖo nɛ
Ezekiel17:21 Eƒe aʋawɔla tiatiawo katã

Ezekiel17:23 Israel ƒe to kɔkɔ dzi madoe ɖo
Ezekiel17:24 Eye gbemetiwo katã adze sii be
Ezekiel18:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel18:2 Nukaŋuti miele lo sia dom le Israel-nyigba dzi bena: „Fofowo ɖu weintsetse hɔhlɔ̃e
Ezekiel18:3 Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne miagado lo sia lé Israel fi!
Ezekiel18:4 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel18:5 Ne amea ɖe nye ame dzɔdzɔe
Ezekiel18:6 meɖua nu le towo dzi o
Ezekiel18:7 mebaa ame o
Ezekiel18:8 meɖia kasa le agbanadodo me o
Ezekiel18:9 ezɔna ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu
Ezekiel18:10 Eye ne edzi vi sẽŋuta
Ezekiel18:11 evɔ wònye fofoa mewɔa nusiawo dometɔa ɖeke o hafi; eyama ɖua nu le towo dzi
Ezekiel18:12 esẽa ŋuta le ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo ŋu
Ezekiel18:13 eɖia kasa le agbanadodo me
Ezekiel18:14 Eye ne edzi vi
Ezekiel18:15 Meɖua nu le towo dzi o
Ezekiel18:16 mesẽa ŋuta le amea ɖeke ŋu o
Ezekiel18:17 eɖea eƒe asi ɖa tso nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ me
Ezekiel18:18 Ke esi fofoa sea ŋuta le ame ŋu
Ezekiel18:19 Miawo miele gbɔgblɔm be: Nukaŋuti fofo ƒe vodada manɔ via dzi ɖo o hã? Ne via wɔa nu dzɔdzɔe kple nusi le eteƒe
Ezekiel18:20 Amesi wɔa nuvɔ̃ la
Ezekiel18:21 Ne ame vɔ̃ɖi trɔ tso eƒe nuvɔ̃
Ezekiel18:22 Womagaɖo ŋu eƒe dzi
Ezekiel18:23 Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe ku vivia nunyea? negbe ne etrɔ tso eƒe mɔwo dzi
Ezekiel18:24 Eye ne ame dzɔdzɔe ɖe asi le eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu hewɔa nu gbegblẽ
Ezekiel18:25 Ke miele gbɔgblɔm be: „Aƒetɔ la ƒe nuwɔna mele eteƒe o.“ Israel ƒe aƒe
Ezekiel18:26 Ne ame dzɔdzɔe ɖe asi le eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu
Ezekiel18:27 Eye ne ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖe asi le eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi
Ezekiel18:28 Eye ne edze sii
Ezekiel18:29 Israel ƒe aƒe la le gbɔgblɔm be: „Aƒetɔ la ƒe nuwɔna mele eteƒe o.“ Israel ƒe aƒe

Ezekiel18:31 Miɖe miaƒe dzi

Ezekiel20:3 Amevi
Ezekiel20:4 Màdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo oa
Ezekiel20:5 Gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gbesigbe metia Israel
Ezekiel20:6 gbemagbe mekɔ nye asi dzi na wo
Ezekiel20:7 Mía dome amesiame neɖe ŋunyɔnu ɖa le ŋku ta
Ezekiel20:8 Ke wosẽ to ɖe ŋunye
Ezekiel20:9 Ke nyemewɔe o le nye ŋkɔ la
Ezekiel20:10 Ale mekplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi heva gbe dzi.
Ezekiel20:11 Mena nye ɖoɖowo wo

Ezekiel20:16 le esi wodo vlo nye seawo

Ezekiel20:19 Nye Yehowa
Ezekiel20:20 mikɔ nye dzudzɔgbewo ŋu
Ezekiel20:21 Ke wo viwo sẽ to ɖe ŋunye
Ezekiel20:22 Ke megagbugbɔ nye asi ɖe megbe
Ezekiel20:23 Gake hã mekɔ nye asi dzi ɖe wo ŋu le gbea dzi
Ezekiel20:24 le esi womewɔ nye sewo dzi o
Ezekiel20:25 Eyata metsɔ ɖoɖo gbegblẽwo kple se
Ezekiel20:26 Eye mena wotsɔ woƒe vɔsanuwo gblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo ɖokui
Ezekiel20:27 Eyata

Ezekiel20:29 Tete megblɔ na wo bena: Nuxeƒe ka nye esi mieva? Eyata woyɔa togbɛ be nuxeƒe vaseɖe egbe.
Ezekiel20:30 Eyata gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mietsɔ mia fofowo ƒe zɔzɔme le kɔ gblẽm ɖo na mia ɖokui
Ezekiel20:31 Israel ƒe aƒe
Ezekiel20:32 Nusi ɖo ta me na mi lã
Ezekiel20:33 Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe be: Ne nyematsɔ asi sesẽ kple alɔ
Ezekiel20:34 Matsɔ asi sesẽ kple alo
Ezekiel20:35 eye makplɔ mi ayi dukɔwo ƒe gbe dzi

Ezekiel25:17 Mabia hlɔ̃ gã wo
Ezekiel26:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam le ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me le dzinu gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi bena:
Ezekiel26:2 Amevi
Ezekiel26:3 eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Tiro
Ezekiel26:4 Magblẽ Tiro ƒe gliwo
Ezekiel26:5 Azu ɖɔsiaƒe le atsiaƒu titina
Ezekiel26:6 eye woatsɔ yi awu eƒe du
Ezekiel26:7 Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel26:8 Atsɔ yi awu wò du
Ezekiel26:9 Atsɔ eƒe gligbãnuwo atu wò gli
Ezekiel26:10 Eƒe sɔ gbogboawo ƒe ʋuʋudedi abla wò kɔtɔɔ
Ezekiel26:11 Eƒe sɔwo ƒe afɔ anyã avuzi le wò kpɔdomeewo katã
Ezekiel26:12 Woaha wò kesinɔnuwo
Ezekiel26:13 Matsi wò hadzidziwo ƒe ɖiɖi nu
Ezekiel26:14 Mawɔ wò nazu agakpe ƒeƒle
Ezekiel26:15 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe Tiro ŋu enye si: Ne amesiwo woda nui
Ezekiel26:16 Ƒuta amegãwo katã aɖi le woƒe fiazikpuiwo dzi ɖe anyi
Ezekiel26:17 Eye woato konyifaha ɖe ŋuwò agblɔ ɖe ŋuwò bena: Aleke du
Ezekiel26:18 Azɔ ƒukpowo le dzodzom kpekpekpe le wò anyidzegbe
Ezekiel26:19 Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ne mena nèzu aƒedo abe du
Ezekiel26:20 mana nayi aʋlimetɔ
Ezekiel26:21 Matsɔ wò awɔ ŋɔdzinui
Ezekiel27:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel27:2 Amevi
Ezekiel27:3 eye nagblɔ na Tiro bena: Wò
Ezekiel27:4 Wò anyigba le atsiaƒu titina; tsowòlawo na nènyo eteƒe mekɔ o.
Ezekiel27:5 Senirtɔwo ƒe sesewu wotsɔ kpa wòe
Ezekiel27:6 Wotsɔ Basantɔwo ƒe fɔfɔli kpa wò akɔfawoe
Ezekiel27:7 Egiptetɔwo ƒe aklala
Ezekiel27:8 Zidonitɔwo kple Arwadtɔwo nye wo ʋukulawo; Tiro
Ezekiel27:9 Gebal-ame tsitsiwo kple woƒe aɖaŋuawo nɔ mewo
Ezekiel27:10 Amewo tso Persia
Ezekiel27:11 Arwad-viwo kple wò aʋakɔwo le wò gliwo dzi godoo va kpe
Ezekiel27:12 Tarsis tsa asi kpli wò le kesinɔnu gbogboawo katã ta; etsɔ klosalo
Ezekiel27:13 Yawan
Ezekiel27:14 Amesiwo tso Togarma ƒe me la
Ezekiel27:15 Dedantɔwo tsa asi kpli wò
Ezekiel27:16 Aram tsa asi kpli wò le wò aɖaŋudɔ gbogboawo ta; etsɔ adzagba
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda kple Israel tsa asi kpli wò; wotsɔ Minitɔwo ƒe lu
Ezekiel27:18 Damasko tsɔ Xelbontɔwo ƒe wein kple alẽfu ɣi ƒle wò aɖanudɔ gbogboawo kple wò kesinɔnu gbogboawo katãe.
Ezekiel27:19 Wotsɔ Usaltɔwo ƒe wein ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan tsɔ sɔkpa kuntru
Ezekiel27:21 Arabiatɔwo kple Kedar-amegãwo katã nye asitsalawo nɔ asiwò me
Ezekiel27:22 Asitsalawo tso Saba kple Ragma tsa asi kpli wò; wotsɔ atike nyuitɔ vovovowo
Ezekiel27:23 Xaran
Ezekiel27:24 Wotsɔ atsyɔ̃vɔwo
Ezekiel27:25 Tarsis-ʋuwo he wò adzɔnuwo vɛ na wò
Ezekiel27:26 Kuwòlawo ku wò to tɔ gãwo dzi; ɣedzeƒeya gbã wò ɖe atsiaƒu titina!
Ezekiel27:27 Wò kesinɔnuwo
Ezekiel27:28 Kuɖɔɖolawo ƒe ɣli ana ƒutawo nadzo kpekpekpe
Ezekiel27:29 atablukulawo katã ado le woƒe ʋuwo me; ʋukulawo kple kuɖɔɖola
Ezekiel27:30 Wòado aƒa ɖe ŋuwò
Ezekiel27:31 Woalũ ta kokoe le tawo
Ezekiel27:32 Woato konyifaha ɖe ŋuwò le woƒe nuxaxa me adzi ha ade wò bena: „Ameka le abe Tiro ene? Ɖoɖoe zi le eŋu abe aƒedo ene le atsiaƒu titina.
Ezekiel27:33 Esi wò adzɔnuwo to atsiaƒu dzi va la
Ezekiel27:34 Azɔ ègbã gudugudu ɖe tɔ gɔme
Ezekiel27:35 Ƒukpo dzinɔlawo katã ƒe nu ku ɖe ŋuwò
Ezekiel27:36 Dukɔwo ƒe asitsalawo le tsiã dom ɖe ŋuwò; nuwo yi ŋɔdzitɔe

Ezekiel28:2 Amevi

Ezekiel28:5 wò nunya geɖe kple wò asitsatsa nètso kpo kesinɔnui kpaŋkpaŋ
Ezekiel28:6 eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi. Esi newɔ wò dzi abe Mawu to ene la
Ezekiel28:7 eyata kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel28:8 Woatutu wò ade aʋli me
Ezekiel28:9 Ɖe àgblɔ emegbe le wuwòlawo ŋku me be
Ezekiel28:10 Àku abe bolotɔwo ene ɖe du bubu me towo si me; Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Nyee gblɔe!
Ezekiel28:11 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel28:12 Amevi
Ezekiel28:13 Ena Mawu ƒe abɔ Eden me

Ezekiel28:17 Wò dzi de asi dada me le wò nyonyo ta
Ezekiel28:18 Etsɔ wò vodada gbogboawo kple wò asitsatsa madzɔmadzɔ gblẽ ko ɖo na wò kɔkɔeƒe la; eyata mena dzo do tso mewo hefiã wò

Ezekiel28:21 Amevi

Ezekiel36:1 Wò amevi
Ezekiel36:2 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi futɔ la le ehẽ dom ɖe mia ŋu be
Ezekiel36:3 eyata gblɔ nya ɖi gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi wogblẽ mi
Ezekiel36:4 eyata mi Israel-towo
Ezekiel36:5 Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Matsɔ nye ŋuʋaʋã ƒe dzobibi aƒo nu kple dukɔwo ƒe susɔea kpakple Edom blibo la
Ezekiel36:6 Eyata gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Israel-nyigba ŋu
Ezekiel36:7 eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mekɔ nye asi dzi heka atam be: Dukɔ
Ezekiel36:8 Ke mi Israel-towo
Ezekiel36:9 Elabena kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel36:10 Mana Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la ƒe amewo nasɔ gbɔ ɖe mia dzi
Ezekiel36:11 Mana amegbetɔwo kple lãwo nasɔ gbɔ ɖe mia dzi
Ezekiel36:12 Mana amegbetɔwo
Ezekiel36:13 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi wole gbɔgblɔm na mi be
Ezekiel36:14 eyata màgaɖu amelã azɔ o
Ezekiel36:15 Nyemena nagase dukɔwo ƒe vlodoame azɔ o
Ezekiel36:16 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel36:17 Amevi
Ezekiel36:18 Eyata metrɔ nye dziku ƒo ɖe wo dzi le ʋu
Ezekiel36:19 Mekaka wo ɖe dukɔwo dome
Ezekiel36:20 Eye esi wova dukɔwo dome la
Ezekiel36:21 Tete wòvem le nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe
Ezekiel36:22 Eyata gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Israel ƒe aƒe
Ezekiel36:23 Eye makɔ nye ŋkɔ gã
Ezekiel36:24 Makplɔ mi atso dukɔwo dome
Ezekiel36:25 Mahlẽ tsi dzadzɛ ɖe mia ŋu
Ezekiel36:26 Mana dzi yeye mi
Ezekiel36:27 Maɖe nye gbɔgbɔ mia me
Ezekiel36:28 Eye mianɔ anyigba
Ezekiel36:29 Maɖe mi atso miaƒe nu makɔmakɔwo katã me; mayɔ bli vɛ
Ezekiel36:30 Mana atikutsetsewo kple agble me nukuwo nasɔ gbɔ
Ezekiel36:31 Miaɖo ŋu miaƒe zɔzɔme vɔ̃ɖiawo kple miaƒe nuwɔna manyomanyoawo
Ezekiel36:32 Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Menye mia tae mele ewɔm ɖo o
Ezekiel36:33 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gbesigbe makɔ mia ŋu tso miaƒe vodadawo katã me la
Ezekiel36:34 Woade anyigba
Ezekiel36:35 eye woagblɔ bena: „Anyigba
Ezekiel36:36 Eye dukɔ mamlea

Ezekiel36:38 Alesi ale
Ezekiel37:1 Eye Yehowa ƒe asi va dzinye
Ezekiel37:2 Ekplɔm towo ŋui godoo
Ezekiel37:3 Tete wògblɔ nam be: Amevi
Ezekiel37:4 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe ƒu siawo ŋu gblɔ na wo bena: Mi ƒu ƒuƒuwo
Ezekiel37:5 Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ na ƒu siawo enye si: Made gbɔgbɔ mia me
Ezekiel37:6 Made lãmeka mia ŋu
Ezekiel37:7 Eye megblɔ nya ɖi
Ezekiel37:8 Eye meɖo ŋku anyi hekpɔ bena
Ezekiel37:9 Tete wògblɔ nam bena: Gblɔ nya ɖi do ɖe gbɔgbɔ
Ezekiel37:10 Eye megblɔ nya ɖi

Ezekiel37:14 Made nye gbɔgbɔ mia me
Ezekiel37:15 Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena:
Ezekiel37:16 Amevi

Ezekiel37:19 ekema gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel37:20 Lé ati

Ezekiel37:24 Nye dɔla Dawid anye fia ɖe wo nu
Ezekiel37:25 Woanɔ anyigba
Ezekiel37:26 Mabia ŋutifafa ƒe nu kpli wo
Ezekiel37:27 Nye nɔƒe anɔ wo dome

Ezekiel40:1 Le aboyoɖeɖe mí ƒe ƒe blave vɔ atɔ̃lia ƒe gɔmedzedzea me

Ezekiel40:3 Esi wòkplɔm va afimae la
Ezekiel40:4 Eye ŋutsu la gblɔ nam bena: Amevi
Ezekiel40:5 Eye gli ƒo xlã xa la godoo va kpe. Dzidzeti
Ezekiel40:6 Eye wòyi ɖe agbo
Ezekiel40:7 eye xɔvi
Ezekiel40:8 Eye wodzidze agbo la ƒe akpata
Ezekiel40:9 Edzidze agbo la ƒe akpata wòle abɔklugui enyi
Ezekiel40:10 Xɔvi etɔ̃ le agbo
Ezekiel40:11 Edzidze agbo la ƒe mɔnu wòkeke abɔklugui ewo
Ezekiel40:12 Adzrala le xɔviawo ŋgɔ do ɖe ŋgɔgbe
Ezekiel40:13 Eye wodzidze agbo la ƒe kekeme tso xɔvi ɖeka megbe vaseɖe evelia megbe wòle abɔklugui blave vɔ atɔ̃; mɔnu dze ŋgɔ mɔnu.
Ezekiel40:14 Ewɔ akpata la wòle abɔklugui blave
Ezekiel40:15 Tso agbo gotatɔ nu vaseɖe akpata ƒe agbo metɔ nu le abɔklugui blaatɔ̃.
Ezekiel40:16 Fesre
Ezekiel40:17 Eye wòkplɔm yi xɔxɔnu egodotɔ

Ezekiel40:19 Eye wodzidze kekeme
Ezekiel40:20 Eye wodzidze agbo
Ezekiel40:21 Xɔvi etɔ̃ le eƒe axa ɖeka
Ezekiel40:22 Eƒe fesrewo
Ezekiel40:23 Xɔxɔnu metɔ ƒe agbo dze ŋgɔ agbo
Ezekiel40:24 Tete wòkplɔm yi dziehe gome
Ezekiel40:25 Fesrewo le eya kple eƒe akpata ŋu godoo va kpe abe fesre kemeawo ene; edidi abɔklugui blaatɔ̃
Ezekiel40:26 Atrakpuifɔflɔ adre woliana yia edzi
Ezekiel40:27 Agbo le xɔxɔnu meta ŋu ɖo ta dziehe gome
Ezekiel40:28 Tete wòkplɔm to dzigbegbo la nu yi xɔxɔnu metɔ; eye wodzidze dzigbegbo la abe dzidzeme kemeawo ene.
