Romans6:1 Azɔ nuka gblɔ ge míala? Alo ɖe miaganɔ nuvɔ̃ me

Romans6:3 Alo ɖe mienyɛ bena
Romans6:4 Eyaŋuti esi wode mawutsi ta na mí ɖe eƒe ku me la
Romans6:5 Elabena ne míezu ɖeka kplii hena sɔsɔ kplii le eƒe ku me la
Romans6:6 esi mienyã esia bena
Romans6:7 Elabena amesi ke ku la
Romans6:8 Ke ne mia kple Kristo mieku la
Romans6:9 elabena mienyae bena

Romans12:1 Azɔ mexlɔ̃ nu mi
Romans12:2 Eye migana miaƒe anyinɔnɔ naɖi xexe sia me o
Romans12:3 Elabena to amenuveve
Romans12:4 Elabena alesi ŋutinu geɖewo le ŋutilã ɖeka ŋu na mi
Romans12:5 nenema ke mí ame geɖewo míenye ŋutilã ɖeka le Kristo me
Romans12:6 eye amenuvevenunana
Romans12:7 nenye subɔsubɔ la
Romans12:8 ne amea ɖe le nu xlɔ̃m la
Romans12:9 Lɔlɔ̃ la neganye alakpanu o! Mitsri nuvɔ̃
Romans12:10 Miaƒe lɔlɔ̃ na mia nɔewo nayɔ fũ kple dadavilɔlɔ̃
Romans12:11 Ne veviedodo hiã la
Romans12:12 Dzi nedzo mi le mɔkpɔkpɔ me
Romans12:13 Mikpe ɖe ame kɔkɔewo ƒe hiãtuame ŋuti
Romans12:14 Miyra amesiwo ɖa mia yome la

Ephesians6:19 kple nye hã lanye
Ephesians6:20 esi ŋuti menye ame dɔdɔ le kɔsɔkɔsɔ me
Ephesians6:21 Ke bene miawo hã mianya alesi mele kple nusi wɔm mele la
Ephesians6:22 medɔ amesia ɖo ɖe mia gbɔ le esia ŋuti
Ephesians6:23 Ŋutifafa kple lɔlɔ̃ kple xɔse
Ephesians6:24 Amenuveve nanɔ anyi kple amesiwo katã lɔ̃a mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ɖikaɖika la.
Philippians1:1 Paulo kple Timoteo
Philippians1:2 Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa
Philippians1:3 Meda akpe na Mawunye le nye ŋkuɖoɖo
Philippians1:4 ɖaasi le nye kukuɖeɖe
Philippians1:5 le miaƒe hadede
Philippians1:6 esia ke ŋuti meɖoa ŋu ɖo bena
Philippians1:7 abe alesi wòdzo nam bena
Philippians1:8 Elabena Mawue nye nye ɖaseɖila
Philippians1:9 Eye esia ŋuti medoa gbe ɖa ɖo
Philippians1:10 bena miate ŋu ade vovo nyui kple vɔ̃ dome
Philippians1:11 bene dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe ku
Philippians1:12 Ke mele didim bena
Philippians1:13 ale bena nye bablawo dze ƒã le Kristo me ɖe asrafomɔ̃ blibo la katã me kple ame mamleawo katã gbɔ
Philippians1:14 eye nɔviwo dome ame geɖeawo ɖo ŋu ɖe nye bablawo ŋu le Aƒetɔ la me
Philippians1:15 Hafi amea ɖewo ɖea gbe ƒã Kristo le ŋuʋaʋã kple dzrewɔwɔ ŋuti; ke amea ɖewo hã ɖea gbe ƒãe le tameɖoɖo nyui ŋuti:
Philippians1:16 Amesiawo gblɔnɛ tso lɔlɔ̃ me; elabena wonyae be
Philippians1:17 Ame kemeawo gblɔa Kristo fiana tso dzrewɔwɔ me
Philippians1:18 Ekema nukae ma? Ne wowɔe le mo sia mɔ dzi
Philippians1:19 elabena menyae bena
Philippians1:20 le nye lala vevie kple mɔkpɔkpɔ la nu be
Philippians1:21 Elabena nye la Kristo enye agbe nam
Philippians1:22 Ke ne nye agbenɔnɔ le ŋutilã me na nye dɔwɔwɔ tsea ku la
Philippians1:23 Elabena mexaxa ɖe nusiawo kpakple eve dome: Ele dzroyem be
Philippians1:24 gake la anyinɔnɔ le ŋutilã me la ele vevie wu le mia ta.
Philippians1:25 Eye esia ke ŋuti meɖoa ŋu ɖo
Philippians1:26 bena miaƒe adegbeƒoƒo la nasɔ gbɔ ɖe dzi le Kristo Yesu me le tanye to esia me
Philippians1:27 Ɖeko mizɔ
Philippians1:28 eye migaɖi vo le naneke me le miaƒe adikãtɔwo ŋuti o
Philippians1:29 elabena eɖi na mi le Kristo ta bena
Philippians1:30 elabena ʋiʋli ma ke
Philippians2:1 Azɔ la ne nuxɔxlɔ̃a ɖe li le Kristo me
Philippians2:2 ekema miyɔ nye dzidzɔ la fũ
Philippians2:3 migawɔ naneke le dzrewɔwɔ alo bubu dzodzro ta o
Philippians2:4 amesiame nagakpɔ nusi nye ye ŋutɔ to dzi o
Philippians2:5 Mina susu ma ke
Philippians2:6 amesi esi wònye Mawu ƒe nɔnɔmee wòna hã la
Philippians2:7 ke boŋ eɖi gbɔlo eɖokui
Philippians2:8 Ebɔbɔ eɖokui ɖe anyi
Philippians2:9 Esia ke ŋuti hã Mawu do eyama ɖe dzi kakaka
Philippians2:10 bene amesiwo le dziƒo kple amesiwo le anyigba dzi kple amesiwo le anyigba te la
Philippians2:11 eye aɖe sia aɖe naʋu me bena
Philippians2:12 Eyaŋuti
Philippians2:13 Elabena Mawu enye amesi wɔa didi kple nuwɔwɔ siaa le mia me le eƒe ŋudzedze la ŋuti.
Philippians2:14 Miwo nuwo katã liʋiliʋilili kple ɖikeke manɔmee
Philippians2:15 bena miazu mokaka manɔŋutɔwo kple ame dzadzɛwo
Philippians2:16 esi me mieléa agbenya la ɖe asi le hena nye adegbeƒoƒo le Kristo ƒe ŋkeke la dzi
Philippians2:17 Ke ne wotsɔm mè le miaƒe xɔse ƒe vɔsasa kple subɔsubɔdɔ ta hã la
Philippians2:18 Ke nenema ke miawo hã dzi nedzɔ mi
Philippians2:19 Ke mele mɔ kpam le Aƒetɔ Yesu me bena
Philippians2:20 Elabena amea ɖeke mele asinye
Philippians2:21 elabena wo kalẽ la woa ŋutɔwo tɔ dim wole
Philippians2:22 Ke mienya eƒe kelili bena
Philippians2:23 Azɔ la mele mɔ kpɔm bena
Philippians2:24 ke meɖo dzi ɖe Aƒetɔ la ŋu bena
Philippians2:25 Gake la mebu bena
Philippians2:26 elabena edzroe vevie be
Philippians2:27 Eye elé dɔ vavã de kuku ge kloe; gake la Mawu kpɔ nublanui nɛ
Philippians2:28 Eyaŋuti meɖoe ɖa kaba wu bena
Philippians2:29 Eyaŋuti la mixɔe le Aƒetɔ la me kple dzidzɔ katã
Philippians2:30 Elabena Kristo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti wòde kuku ge ɖo kloe
Philippians3:1 Mlɔeba la
Philippians3:2 Mikpɔ nyuie le avũawo ŋuti
Philippians3:3 Elabena mi amesiwo subɔa Mawu le gbɔgbɔ me la
Philippians3:4 Wònye nye la ŋuɖoɖo ɖe ŋutilã ŋu gɔ̃ hã anɔ asinye hafi
Philippians3:5 Ŋkeke enviagbe wotso aʋa nam
Philippians3:6 le ŋuʋaʋã nu la hame yometila menye; le dzɔdzɔenyenye
Philippians3:7 Gake nusiwo nye viɖe nam la
Philippians3:8 Ẽ
Philippians3:9 eye woakpɔm le eyama me
Philippians3:10 bene madze si eyama kple eƒe tsitretsitsi ƒe ŋusẽ kple eƒe fukpekpewo ƒe hadede
Philippians3:11 negbe godo la made ame kukuwo ƒe tsitretsitsi la gbɔ.
Philippians3:12 Menye ɖe nye asi su edzi xoxo
Philippians3:13 Nɔvinyewo
Philippians3:14 Ke nu ɖeka ko menya: Nusiwo le megbenye la
Philippians3:15 Eyaŋuti ame alesi nu le blibo le mía dome la
Philippians3:16 Gake nusi dzi miesu xoxo la
Philippians3:17 Mizu hanyesrɔ̃lawo
Philippians3:18 Elabena ame geɖewo zɔna
Philippians3:19 Amesiwo ƒe nuwuwu enye gbegblẽ
Philippians3:20 Ke miaƒe dumetɔnyenye le dziƒo
Philippians3:21 amesi aɖuɖɔ miaƒe bɔbɔɖeanyiŋutilã ƒe nɔnɔme
Philippians4:1 Eyata
Philippians4:2 Mele nu xlɔ̃m Ewodia
Philippians4:3 Ẽ
Philippians4:4 Dzi nadzɔ mi le Aƒetɔ la me ɖaasi; megale egblɔm bena: Dzi nadzɔ mi!
Philippians4:5 Amewo katã nanya miaƒe tufafa! Aƒetɔ la gogo.
Philippians4:6 Migatsi dzimaɖi le naneke ŋuti o
Philippians4:7 Eye Mawu ƒe ŋutifafa
Philippians4:8 Mlɔeba la
Philippians4:9 Nusiwo hã miesrɔ̃
Philippians4:10 Ke mekpɔ dzidzɔ geɖe le Aƒetɔ la me bena
Philippians4:11 Menye ɖe megblɔ esia le hiahiã ŋuti o; elabena nye la mesrɔ̃e bena
Philippians4:12 Menya alesi mabɔbɔ ɖokuinye de anyi
Philippians4:13 Metea ŋu wɔa nuwo katã le Kristo
Philippians4:14 Gake la miewɔe nyuie be
Philippians4:15 Ke
Philippians4:16 eye esime menɔ Tesalonika gɔ̃ hã la
Philippians4:17 Menye be
Philippians4:18 Ke nuwo katã le asinye
Philippians4:19 Ke nye Mawu la ana miaƒe hiahiã katã nazu nukpɔkpɔ taŋtaŋ le eƒe kesinɔ la nu le ŋutikɔkɔe me le Kristo Yesu me.
Philippians4:20 Ke Mawu
Philippians4:21 Miɖuɖɔ ame kɔkɔewo katã nam ƒã le Kristo Yesu me! Nɔvi
Philippians4:22 Ame kɔkɔewo katã ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã
Philippians4:23 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi! Amen.

Colossians1:7 abe alesi miesrɔ̃e hã le Epafra

Colossians1:9 Eyata míawo hã
Colossians1:10 bene miazu alesi dze Aƒetɔ la hena eƒe ŋudzedze katã
Colossians1:11 eye miatsi le sidzedze Mawu me

Colossians1:13 amesi ɖe mí tso viviti ƒe ŋusẽ la me
Colossians1:14 amesi me míekpɔ fexexeɖeta
Colossians1:15 amesi nye Mawu makpɔmakpɔ ƒe nɔnɔme kple nuwɔwɔwo katã ƒe ŋgɔgbevi la.
Colossians1:16 Elabena wowɔ nuwo katã le eya ke me
Colossians1:17 eye eyama tre dzɔdzɔ na nuwo katã
Colossians1:18 eye eyamae nye ŋutilã
Colossians1:19 elabena edze Mawu ŋu bena
Colossians1:20 eye wòto eyama dzi lé avu le nuwo katã kple eɖokui dome
Colossians1:21 Eye mi amesiwo nye ame tutɔwo kple ketɔwo le miaƒe tamesusu me le dɔwɔwɔ vɔ̃wo me tsã la;
Colossians1:22 ke azɔ la elé avu le mia kplii dome le eƒe anyigba dzi ŋutilã la me to ku me
Colossians1:23 nenye bena
Colossians1:24 Azɔ la mekpɔa dzidzɔ le fu
Colossians1:25 esi ƒe subɔla mezu le Mawu ƒe xɔnuvinyenye
Colossians1:26 Nya ɣaɣla

Colossians1:29 nusi ta hã medzea agbagba ɖo
Colossians2:1 Elabena mele didim be
Colossians2:2 bene woafa akɔ na woƒe dziwo
Colossians2:3 amesi me woɣla nunya kple sidzedze ƒe kesinɔnuwo katã ɖo.

Colossians2:17 Esiawo nye nusiwo gbɔna la ƒe vɔvɔli; ke nu la ŋutɔ le Kristo me va.
Colossians2:18 Migana amea ɖeke nate dziɖuɖufetu la mi o

1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo kple Silvano kple Timoteo woŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Tesalonikatɔwo ƒe hame
1Thessalonians1:2 Miedaa akpe na Mawu ɖaasi le mi katã mia ta
1Thessalonians1:3 eye ɖaa míeɖoa ŋku miaƒe xɔse ƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple lɔlɔ̃ ƒe agbagbadzedze kpakple mɔkpɔkpɔ na mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo la ƒe dzidodo le Mawu
1Thessalonians1:4 Elabena
1Thessalonians1:5 elabena míaƒe nyanyuie la meva mia gbɔ le nya me ɖeɖeko o
1Thessalonians1:6 Eye miawo miezu míawo kple Aƒetɔ la srɔ̃lawo
1Thessalonians1:7 ale bena mietrɔ zu kpɔɖeŋu na amesiwo katã xɔnɛ sena le Makedonia kple Axaya.
1Thessalonians1:8 Elabena Aƒetɔ ƒe nya la ɖi hoo tso mia gbɔ
1Thessalonians1:9 elabena woa ŋutɔwo gblɔa nya fiana le mía ŋuti
1Thessalonians1:10 eye míalala Via tso dziƒo
1Thessalonians2:1 Elabena
1Thessalonians2:2 ke boŋ wònye míekpe fu
1Thessalonians2:3 Elabena míaƒe nuxɔxlɔ̃ metso beble alo makɔmakɔnyenye me o
1Thessalonians2:4 ke boŋ abe alesi Mawu kpo mí míedze bena
1Thessalonians2:5 Elabena womekpɔ mi ɣeaɖekeɣi míele numevivinyawo gblɔm
1Thessalonians2:6 Eye miedi bubu tso amewo gbɔ hã o
1Thessalonians2:7 ke miefa tu le mia dome
1Thessalonians2:8 nenema ke esi mielɔ̃a nu le mia gbɔ o ŋuti la
1Thessalonians2:9 Elabena
1Thessalonians2:10 Miawoe nye ɖaseɖilawo kple Mawu hã
1Thessalonians2:11 eye mienyae hã bena
1Thessalonians2:12 eye míeɖi ɖase na mi be
1Thessalonians2:13 Eye le esia ta míawo hã miedaa akpe na Mawu ɖaa bena
1Thessalonians2:14 Elabena miawo
1Thessalonians2:15 amesiwo hã wu Aƒetɔ Yesu kple woa ŋutɔwo ƒe nyagblɔɖilawo
1Thessalonians2:16 esi wòxea mo na mí
1Thessalonians2:17 Ke míawo la
1Thessalonians2:18 Eyata míedi be
1Thessalonians2:19 Elabena amekae nye míaƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ kple dzidzɔ kple adegbeƒoƒo ƒe fiakuku la
1Thessalonians2:20 Elabena miawoe nye míaƒe kafukafu kple dzidzɔ.

1Thessalonians4:2 elabena mienya se
1Thessalonians4:3 Elabena esiae nye Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu
1Thessalonians4:4 eye mia dome amesiame nanya
1Thessalonians4:5 menye le nudzodzro ƒe fiẽŋufiẽŋui vevie me
1Thessalonians4:6 eye amea ɖeke nagaba nɔvia

1Thessalonians4:17 emegbe la mi amesiwo susɔ le agbe la
1Thessalonians4:18 Eyata mitsɔ nya siawo fa akɔ na mia nɔewo.
1Thessalonians5:1 Ke le ɣeyiɣiwo kple azãgbewo ŋuti la
1Thessalonians5:2 elabena mia ŋutɔwo mienyae kɔte bena
1Thessalonians5:3 Elabena ne wole gbɔgblɔm be
1Thessalonians5:4 Ke miawo
1Thessalonians5:5 elabena mi katã míenye kekeli viwo kple ŋkeke viwo; míenye zã alo viviti ta o.
1Thessalonians5:6 Eyata azɔ migana míanɔ alɔ̃ dɔm abe ame bubuwo ene o
1Thessalonians5:7 Elabena amesiwo dɔa alɔ̃ la
1Thessalonians5:8 ke mí amesiwo nye ŋkeke tɔwo la
1Thessalonians5:9 Elabena Mawu meɖo mí na dziku o
1Thessalonians5:10 amesi ku ɖe mía ta
1Thessalonians5:11 Eyata mifa akɔ na mia nɔewo
1Thessalonians5:12 Ke míele kuku ɖem na mi
1Thessalonians5:13 eye bena míabu wo geɖe ŋutɔ le lɔlɔ̃ me le woƒe dɔwɔwɔ la ta. Minɔ anyi le ŋutifafa me le mia nɔewo dome.
1Thessalonians5:14 Ke míele nu xlɔ̃m mi
1Thessalonians5:15 Mikpɔ nyuie bena
1Thessalonians5:16 Dzi nadzɔ mi ɖaa!
1Thessalonians5:17 Minɔ gbedodoɖa dzi madzudzɔmadzudzɔe!
1Thessalonians5:18 Mida akpe le nusianu ŋuti; elabena esiae nye Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu le Kristo Yesu me hena mi.
1Thessalonians5:19 Migatsi Gbɔgbɔ la nu o!
1Thessalonians5:20 Migado vlo nyagbɔgblɔɖiwo o!
1Thessalonians5:21 Ke mido nuwo katã kpɔ
1Thessalonians5:22 Miɖe mia ɖokui ɖa tso vɔ̃ sia vɔ̃ ƒomevi me!
1Thessalonians5:23 Ke ŋutifafa Mawu la ŋutɔ nakɔ mia ŋuti keŋkeŋ
1Thessalonians5:24 Nuteƒewɔla enye amesi yɔ mi ve
1Thessalonians5:25 Nɔviwo
1Thessalonians5:26 Mitsɔ nugbugbɔ kɔkɔe ɖuɖɔ nɔviwo katã nam ƒã.
1Thessalonians5:27 Metà Aƒetɔ la na mi bena
1Thessalonians5:28 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi! Amen.
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo kple Silvano kple Timoteo woŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Tesalonikatɔwo ƒe hame
2Thessalonians1:2 Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa
2Thessalonians1:3 Ele na mí bena
2Thessalonians1:4 ale bena mia ŋutɔwo míeƒoa adegbe le mia ta le Mawu ƒe hameawo me le miaƒe dzidodo kple miaƒe xɔse
2Thessalonians1:5 nusiwo nye Mawu ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe la ƒe dzesi bena
2Thessalonians1:6 ne ele ale bena
2Thessalonians1:7 eye mi amesiwo kpo xaxa la
2Thessalonians1:8 le dzo ƒe aɖe me
2Thessalonians1:9 amesiwo akpɔ fetu vɔ̃
2Thessalonians1:10 ne ava
2Thessalonians1:11 Esiata hã miedoa gbe ɖa ɖaa le mia ta
2Thessalonians1:12 bene wòakɔ mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋkɔ la ŋuti le mia me
2Thessalonians2:1 Ke míele kuku dem na mi
2Thessalonians2:2 bene miagana woate mi ɖa kaba tso miaƒe tamesusu me o
2Thessalonians2:3 Migana amea ɖeke nable mi le mɔa ɖeke dzi o; elabena Aƒetɔ la mava o
2Thessalonians2:4 amesi tsia tre
2Thessalonians2:5 Alo ɖe mieɖo ŋku edzi bena
2Thessalonians2:6 Eye azɔ la mienya nusi xea mo nɛ
2Thessalonians2:7 Elabena sedzimawɔmawɔ ƒe nya ɣaɣla la le da wɔm ŋusẽtɔe xoxo; ɖeko wòle be
2Thessalonians2:8 eye tete woaɖe sedzimawɔla ɖe go
2Thessalonians2:9 Ame ma ƒe vava lanye le Satana ƒe ŋusẽdɔwɔwɔ nu: Le aʋatsokaka ƒe ŋusẽ kple dzesiwo kple nukunuwo katã
2Thessalonians2:10 kple madzɔmadzɔnyenye ƒe amebeble katã me le amesiwo le tsɔtsrɔm la dome; elabena womexɔ nyateƒe ƒe lolo
2Thessalonians2:11 Eye le esia ta Mawu adɔ beble
2Thessalonians2:12 bene woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu amesiwo katã mexa nyateƒe dzi se o
2Thessalonians2:13 Ke ele na mí be
2Thessalonians2:14 nusi gbɔ woyɔ mi ve to míaƒe nyanyuie la me
2Thessalonians2:15 Eyata azɔ
2Thessalonians2:16 Ke mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ŋutɔ kple Mawu
2Thessalonians2:17 nafa akɔ na miaƒe dziwo
2Thessalonians3:1 Mlɔeba la
2Thessalonians3:2 eye bena woaɖe mí atso votolawo kple ame vɔ̃ɖiwo si me; elabena menye amewo katã si xɔse la le o.
2Thessalonians3:3 Ke nuteƒewɔla enye Aƒetɔ la
2Thessalonians3:4 Ke mieɖo dzi ɖe mia ŋu le Aƒetɔ la me bena
2Thessalonians3:5 Ke Aƒetɔ la atrɔ miaƒe dziwo aɖo ta Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃ kple Kristo ƒe dzidodo la gbɔ.
2Thessalonians3:6 Ke miele se dem na mi
2Thessalonians3:7 Elabena mia ŋutɔwo mienya alesi wòdze mi be
2Thessalonians3:8 eye mieɖu abolo dzro le amea ɖeke gbɔ o
2Thessalonians3:9 menye ɖe ŋusẽ mele mía si o
2Thessalonians3:10 Elabena esime mienɔ mia gbɔ hã la
2Thessalonians3:11 Elabena miese bena
2Thessalonians3:12 Ke míele se dem na nenem me siawo
2Thessalonians3:13 Ke miawo la
2Thessalonians3:14 Ke ne amea ɖe meɖo to miaƒe nya
2Thessalonians3:15 Ke miabui abe futɔ ene o
2Thessalonians3:16 Ke ŋutifafa ƒe Aƒetɔ la ŋutɔ nana ŋutifafa mi le ɣeawokatãɣi me le nusianu me. Aƒetɔ la nanɔ anyi kpli mi katã!
2Thessalonians3:17 Ɖuɖɔ
2Thessalonians3:18 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nana anyi kpli mi katã! Amen.
1Timothy1:1 Paulo
1Timothy1:2 ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Timoteo
1Timothy1:3 Alesi mexlɔ̃ nu wò be
1Timothy1:4 eye bena womagaɖo to gliwo kple dzidzimenya
1Timothy1:5 Ke sedede ƒe nuwuwu enye lɔlɔ̃
1Timothy1:6 nusiwo gbɔ amea ɖewo tre mɔ tso
1Timothy1:7 hele didim be
1Timothy1:8 Ke mienyae bena
1Timothy1:9 eye míenya esia bena
1Timothy1:10 kple ahasiwɔlawo kple amesiwo dɔna kple ŋutsuviwo kple amesiawo kple aʋatsokalawo kple atam dzodzro kalawo
1Timothy1:11 le Mawu yayratɔ ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe nyanyuie
1Timothy1:12 Eye meda akpe na amesi do ŋusẽm
1Timothy1:13 nye amesi nye busunyagblɔla kple yometila kpakple vlodola tsã; ke wokpɔ nublanui nam
1Timothy1:14 Ke mía Aƒetɔ ƒe amenuveve sɔ gbɔ geɖe ŋutɔ le xɔse kple lɔlɔ̃
1Timothy1:15 Nyateƒenya wònye
1Timothy1:16 Ke esia ŋuti wokpɔ nublanui nam
1Timothy1:17 Ke fia mavɔmavɔtɔ

1Timothy1:19 eye nalé xɔse kple dzitsinya nyui ɖe asi

1Timothy2:2 le fiawo kple amesiwo katã ɖu amegãwo la ta

1Timothy2:10 ke nusi dze nyɔnu

1Timothy3:1 Nyateƒenya wònye: Ne amea ɖe le dzikpɔladɔ dim la

1Timothy3:3 menye ahatsunola o
1Timothy3:4 amesi kpɔa ye ŋutɔ ƒe aƒe dzi nyuie
1Timothy3:5 ke ne amea ɖe menya alesi wòa kpɔ ye ŋutɔ ƒe aƒe dzi o la
1Timothy3:6 Menye amesi ƒe dzimetɔtrɔ teƒe medidi o
1Timothy3:7 Ke ele ne be

1Timothy3:9 woalé xɔse ƒe nya ɣaɣla la ɖe asi le dzitsinya dzadzɛ me.
1Timothy3:10 Ke woado amesiawo hã akpɔ gbã
1Timothy3:11 Nenema ke nyɔnuwo hã nalé wo ɖokui nyuie: Woaganye ameŋuzɔlawo o

Titus1:2 ɖe agbe mava ƒe nukpɔkpɔ ŋu
Titus1:3 ke eɖe eƒe nya la fia le ye ŋutɔ ƒe azãgbe la dzi le gbeƒãɖeɖe
Titus1:4 ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Tito
Titus1:5 Eyata megblẽ wò ɖe Kreta
Titus1:6 Amesi ke nye mokaka manɔŋutɔ
Titus1:7 Elabena ele na dzikpɔla bena
Titus1:8 ke boŋ wòanye amedzrowɔla
Titus1:9 amesi léa nyateƒenya la me ɖe asi le nufiafia la nu
Titus1:10 Elabena tosẽla geɖewo kple nya dzodzro gblɔlawo kple ameblelawo li
Titus1:11 amesiwo nu wòle be
Titus1:12 Wo dometɔ ɖeka
Titus1:13 Ɖaseɖiɖi sia nye nyateƒe; le esia ta ka mo na wo vevie
Titus1:14 bene womagaɖo to Yudatɔwo ƒe gliwo kple amesiwo trɔ tso nyateƒe gbɔ la ƒe sededeawo o.
Titus1:15 Nuwo katã le dzadzɛ na ame dzadzɛwo; ke ame ƒoɖiwo kple dzimaxɔsetɔwo la
Titus1:16 Woʋua eme bena

Hebrews13:25 Amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi katã! Amen.

Revelation4:5 Eye dzikedzowo kple dziɖegbewo kple gbeɖiɖiwo do tso fiazikpui la me. Eye dzokakati adre le bibim le fiazikpui la ŋgɔ

Revelation18:10 Eye woanɔ tsitre le adzɔge ke le eƒe fukpekpe ƒe ŋɔdzi la ŋuti agblɔ bena: Baba na wò
Revelation18:11 Eye anyigba dzi sitsalawo le avi fam
Revelation18:12 Adzɔnu siawo nye: Sika kple klosalo kple kpe xɔasiwo kple adzagbawo kple aklala biɖibiɖi kple aɖabɛ kple seda kple awu dzi kple ati ʋeʋẽe ƒomeviwo katã kple nyiɖu ƒe aɖaŋunu bubu ƒomeviwo katã kple ati xɔasi kple gadzẽ kple ga kple kpe xɔasi ƒe aɖaŋunu bubu ƒomeviwo katã
Revelation18:13 kple botsyo kple ami ʋeʋẽe kple atike ʋeʋẽe kple ami sisi kple lifi kple aha kple ami kple wɔ nyuitɔ kple lu kple aƒemelãwo kple alẽwo kple sɔwo kple tasiaɖamwo kple ame ƒeƒlewo kpakple amewo ƒe luʋɔwo.
Revelation18:14 Eye atikutsetse
Revelation18:15 Eye nusiawo ƒe adzɔdola
Revelation18:16 Baba
Revelation18:17 Eye ʋumefia sia ʋumefia kple ʋuɖola sia ʋuɖola kple kahela sia kahela kpakple ƒu dzi dɔwɔlawo katã wole tsitre le adzɔge ke.
Revelation18:18 Eye esi wokpe eƒe bibi ƒe dzudzɔtutu la
Revelation18:19 Eye wolɔ kewɔ kɔ ɖe la me
Revelation18:20 Dzi nedzo mi le eta
Revelation18:21 Eye mawudɔla sesẽa ɖe tsɔ kpea ɖe
Revelation18:22 eye womegale saŋkuƒolawo kple hadzilawo kple dzekulawo kple kpẽkulawo ƒe gbe se ge le mewò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o; eye womegale aɖaŋuwɔla bubu ƒomevia ɖeke kpɔ ge le mewò o
Revelation18:23 eye akaɖi ƒe keklẽ megale keklẽ ge le mewò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o; eye womegale ŋugbetɔ kple ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ ƒe gbe se ge le mewò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o: elabena wò asitsalawo nye anyigba dzi megãwo; elabena woble dukɔwo katã to wò afakaka me.
Revelation18:24 Eye wokpɔ nyagblɔɖilawo kple ame kɔkɔewo kpakple amesiwo katã wowu le anyigba dzi la
Revelation19:1 Nusiawo megbe la mese gbe gãa ɖe le abe ameha gãa ɖe ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene
Revelation19:2 elabena eƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ nye nyateƒetɔ kple dzɔdzɔetɔ; elabena edrɔ̃ ʋɔnu gbolo gã
Revelation19:3 Eye wogagblɔ zi evelia bena: Mikafu Yehowa! Eye eƒe dzudzɔ le tutum le dziƒo yim tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me.
Revelation19:4 Eye amegã xoxo blave vɔ eneawo kple nu gbagbe eneawo tsyɔ mo anyi
Revelation19:5 Eye gbe ɖi tso fiazikpui la me le gbɔgblɔm bena: Mikafu mía Mawu
Revelation19:6 Eye mese gbea ɖe le abe ameha gãa ɖe ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene
Revelation19:7 Mina dzi nadzɔ mí
Revelation19:8 Eye wona ŋusẽe be
Revelation19:9 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Ŋlɔ bena: Woayra amesiwo wokpe va Alẽvi la ƒe srɔ̃ɖenuɖuɖu la gbɔ! Eye wògagblɔ nam bena: Esiawo nye Mawu ƒe nya vavãwo.
Revelation19:10 Eye medze klo ɖe eƒe afɔ nu
Revelation19:11 Eye mekpɔ dziƒo le nuvo; eye kpɔ ɖa
Revelation19:12 eye eƒe ŋkuwo le abe dzo ƒe aɖe ene
Revelation19:13 eye wòdo awua de
Revelation19:14 Eye aʋakɔ
Revelation19:15 Eye yi ɖaɖɛ do tso eƒe nu me
Revelation19:16 Eye ŋkɔŋɔŋlɔ le eƒe awu kple eƒe aligo dzi bena: Fiawo dzi Fia kple aƒetɔwo dzi Aƒetɔ!
Revelation19:17 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla ɖekaa ɖe le tsitre le ɣe me
Revelation19:18 bena miaɖu fiawo ƒe lã kple aʋafiawo ƒe lã kple ame sesẽwo ƒe lã kple sɔwo kple wo dzinɔlawo ƒe lã kple ablɔɖeviwo kple kluviwo kple ɖeviwo kpakple ame tsitsiwo katã ƒe lã.
Revelation19:19 Eye mekpɔ lã la kple anyigba dzi fiawo kple woƒe aʋakɔwo ƒo wo ɖokui nu ƒu
Revelation19:20 Eye wolé lã la kple aʋatsonyagblɔɖila
Revelation19:21 Eye wotsɔ yi
Revelation20:1 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla ɖe le ɖiɖim tso dziƒo
Revelation20:2 Eye wòlé ʋɔ driba
Revelation20:3 Eye wotsɔe ƒu gbe ɖe aʋli me
Revelation20:4 Eye mekpɔ fiazikpuiwo
Revelation20:5 Ame kuku mamleawo la womegbɔ agbe o
Revelation20:6 Yayratɔ kple kɔkɔetɔ enye amesi kpɔ gome le tsitretsitsi gbãtɔ la me; amesiawo dzi ku evelia mekpɔ ŋusẽa ɖeke ɖo o
Revelation20:7 Eye ne ƒe akpe ɖeka la nu va yi la
Revelation20:8 eye wòado go
Revelation20:9 Eye woyi anyigba la ƒe gbadzaƒe
Revelation20:10 Eye wotsɔ Abosam
Revelation20:11 Eye mekpɔ fiazikpui ɣi gãa ɖe kple amesi bɔbɔ nɔ edzi
Revelation20:12 Eye mekpɔ ame kukuwo
Revelation20:13 Eye atsiaƒu ɖe ame kuku
Revelation20:14 Eye wotsɔ ku kple tsiẽƒe ƒu gbe ɖe dzota la me. Dzota sia enye ku evelia.
Revelation20:15 Eye ne womekpɔ amea ɖe ƒe ŋkɔŋɔŋlɔ le agbegbalẽa me o la
Revelation21:1 Eye mekpɔ dziƒo yeye kple anyigba yeye; elabena gbã dziƒo kple gbã nyigba la nu va yi
Revelation21:2 Eye mekpe du kɔkɔe
Revelation21:3 Eye mese gbe gãa ɖe tso fiazikpui la gbɔ le gbɔgblɔm bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Revelation21:4 Eye Mawu latutu aɖatsi sia aɖatsi ɖa le woƒe ŋku mè
Revelation21:5 Eye amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui dzi la
Revelation21:6 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Eva ve me! Nyee nye Alfa kple Omega
Revelation21:7 Amesi ke ɖu dzi la
Revelation21:8 Ke vɔvɔ̃nɔtɔwo kple dzimaxɔsetɔwo kple fewɔlawo kple hlɔ̃dolawo kple matrewɔlawo kple afakalawo kple trɔ̃subɔlawo kple aʋatsokalawo katã la woakpɔ wo tɔ gome le ta
Revelation21:9 Eye mawudɔla adre
Revelation21:10 Eye wòkplɔm yi to kɔkɔ gãa ɖe dzi le gbɔgbɔ me
Revelation21:11 esi ŋu Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le; eƒe keklẽ le abe kpe xɔasi ŋutɔa ɖe ene
Revelation21:12 gli kɔkɔ gãa ɖe le eŋu; agbo wuieve le eŋu
Revelation21:13 Ɣedzeƒe gome la agbo etɔ̃ li
Revelation21:14 Gɔmeɖoɖo wuieve li na dua ƒe gli la
Revelation21:15 Eye amesi le nu ƒom kplim la
Revelation21:16 Eye du la le dzogoe ene me
Revelation21:17 Eye wodzidze du la wòle abɔklugui alafa ɖeka kple blane vɔ ene le amewo ƒe dzidzenu
Revelation21:18 Eye nusi wotsɔ ɖo glia la
Revelation21:19 Eye wotsɔ kpe xɔasi bubu ƒomeviwo katã wɔ leke na dua ƒe gli la ƒe gɔmeɖoɖoawo. Gɔmeɖokpe gbãtɔ nye yaspis
Revelation21:20 atɔ̃lia nye sardonik
Revelation21:21 Eye agbo wuieveawo nye adzagba wuieve
Revelation21:22 Eye nyemekpo gbedoxɔa ɖeke le eme o; elabena Aƒetɔ
Revelation21:23 Eye dua mehiã ɣe alo ɣleti
Revelation21:24 Eye dukɔwo azɔ eƒe kekeli me
Revelation21:25 Eye womatu eƒe agbowo le ŋkeke me o; elabena zã mado le afima o
Revelation21:26 eye woatsɔ dukɔwo ƒe atsyɔ̃ kple bubu ava emee.
Revelation21:27 Eye nusianu
Revelation22:1 Eye wòfia agbetsitɔsisia ɖe
Revelation22:2 Eye ɖe tɔsisi la ƒe goawo kple eve dzi la agbeti ti
Revelation22:3 Eye busunua ɖeke megale anyi nɔ ge o
Revelation22:4 eye woakpɔ eƒe ŋku me
Revelation22:5 Eye zã megale dodo ge o; eye womele akaɖi alo ɣe ƒe keklẽ hiã ge o; elabena Aƒetɔ Mawu ana keklẽ wo
Revelation22:6 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Nya siawo nye nya vavãwo kple nyateƒenyawo
Revelation22:7 Eye kpɔ ɖa
Revelation22:8 Eye nye Yohanes ye nye amesi se nusiawo
Revelation22:9 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Kpɔ ɖa
Revelation22:10 Eye wògblɔ nam bena Megade agbalẽ sia me nyagblɔɖinyawo nu o; elabena ɣeyiɣi la tu aƒe.
Revelation22:11 Amesi ke wɔa vɔ̃ la
Revelation22:12 Kpɔ ɖa

Revelation22:14 Woayra amesiwo nyẽ woƒe awuwo
Revelation22:15 Ke avũwo kple afakalawo kple matrewɔlawo kple hlɔ̃dolawo kple trɔ̃subɔlawo kpakple amesiame
Revelation22:16 Nye Yesu ye nye amesi dɔ nye mawudɔla lã
Revelation22:17 Eye Gbɔgbɔ la kple ŋugbetɔ la le gbɔgblɔm bena: Va! Eye amesi le esem la
Revelation22:18 Mele ɖase ɖim na amesiame
Revelation22:19 eye ne amea ɖe aɖe nane le agbalẽ sia me nyagblɔɖinyawo me la
